   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '13wpol9',
  'title': 'Toxic Friend',
  'post': 'I need some advice on what to do.. I’ve been friends with this girl holly for about 8 years. Her dad owns a restaurant and i’ve been working there about 2 years. Me and all of our others friends are 21 and she’s not yet and she gets mad when we go out. This is starting to cause a problem at work and she is talking to my managers about me. I need to put my 2 weeks in but i’m so nervous and i feel bad. She’s been being mean to me for almost a year now and i don’t know what to do. She says small comments that hurt my feelings and then covers it with “im just joking” but it still seems unnecessary. I’m 21 and i feel like i should be aloud to go out and have a good time, im not trying to leave her out but she just simply isn’t 21 yet. She told me im the reason her and her toxic bf got back together all because i went to the bar. If anybody has any advice please help. I just had to call out of work because i was having a panic attack about this.',
  'text': 'Toxic Friend ### I need some advice on what to do.. I’ve been friends with this girl holly for about 8 years. Her dad owns a restaurant and i’ve been working there about 2 years. Me and all of our others friends are 21 and she’s not yet and she gets mad when we go out. This is starting to cause a problem at work and she is talking to my managers about me. I need to put my 2 weeks in but i’m so nervous and i feel bad. She’s been being mean to me for almost a year now and i don’t know what to do. She says small comments that hurt my feelings and then covers it with “im just joking” but it still seems unnecessary. I’m 21 and i feel like i should be aloud to go out and have a good time, im not trying to leave her out but she just simply isn’t 21 yet. She told me im the reason her and her toxic bf got back together all because i went to the bar. If anybody has any advice please help. I just had to call out of work because i was having a panic attack about this.',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-05-31 15:41:48',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': 'b9leqe',
  'title': 'Just want someone to tell me they like me (romantically)',
  'post': 'I have always told girls I like them and they never have ever said it back. I would just like to hear it even if there is no chance of a relationship forming out of it. Just want to feel wanted.',
  'text': 'Just want someone to tell me they like me (romantically) ### I have always told girls I like them and they never have ever said it back. I would just like to hear it even if there is no chance of a relationship forming out of it. Just want to feel wanted.',
  'upvotes': 32,
  'date': '2019-04-05 01:56:51',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 11000},
 {'id': 'uu3p97',
  'title': 'Depression partner buddy',
  'post': 'Any other depression partner want to connect, chat, and offer support? If so, message me please. I need someone who understands to chat with please.',
  'text': 'Depression partner buddy ### Any other depression partner want to connect, chat, and offer support? If so, message me please. I need someone who understands to chat with please.',
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2022-05-20 17:52:39',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '173r9tt',
  'title': 'Nothing I do is real or valid.',
  'post': 'I feel like everything I do is somehow fake or pathetic compared to what everyone else does. Someone else walks in a room they are them, I walk in a room Im an imposter. Someone else buys a car its nice and cool I buy one its whack and stupid. Someone else goes to the gym they’re improving. I go and Im fake and shouldnt be there. I just feel like nothing I do is valid or taken seriously.',
  'text': 'Nothing I do is real or valid. ### I feel like everything I do is somehow fake or pathetic compared to what everyone else does. Someone else walks in a room they are them, I walk in a room Im an imposter. Someone else buys a car its nice and cool I buy one its whack and stupid. Someone else goes to the gym they’re improving. I go and Im fake and shouldnt be there. I just feel like nothing I do is valid or taken seriously.',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-09 13:03:08',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'loneliness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11111101},
 {'id': 'u7a7lc',
  'title': 'Is divorce really that bad?',
  'post': 'I told my wife yesterday that I want a divorce and she’s been telling me (for years now) that divorce is never the option and that it’s more hell to go through a divorce than it is to work through the issues. \n\nMarried 20+ years with 2 kids (14 and 19) but I do not like her as a person and have no desire to try and rekindle our romance. \n\nI know the divorce process can get ugly but I’d love to hear success stories because all I hear from her over and over is how bad it is. She’s never been divorced but is a product of a divorced marriage and has friends that have been divorced.',
  'text': 'Is divorce really that bad? ### I told my wife yesterday that I want a divorce and she’s been telling me (for years now) that divorce is never the option and that it’s more hell to go through a divorce than it is to work through the issues. Married 20+ years with 2 kids (14 and 19) but I do not like her as a person and have no desire to try and rekindle our romance. I know the divorce process can get ugly but I’d love to hear success stories because all I hear from her over and over is how bad it is. She’s never been divorced but is a product of a divorced marriage and has friends that have been divorced.',
  'upvotes': 123,
  'date': '2022-04-19 17:13:40',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'z1t1s4',
  'title': 'I JUST WANT TO SCREAM',
  'post': 'I am feeling extra stressed today! I’m working from home most days, so it’s been easier for me to actually do work in my own space. But I have to be in the office tomorrow. And the thought of getting up, showering, going to work, seeing my coworkers, talking, meetings…all of it!!!! It stresses me so much!\n\nI dont want to go out. I dont want to see and face people. I dont want to socialize. I dont want to attend meetings. I want to be isolated. I’ve been thinking about this all day and I’m already at the peak of my anxiety. I dont know what to do, I cant shake this off!!! I cant even step outside my door!\n\nI hate this feeling I hate it I hate it I hate it !!!',
  'text': 'I JUST WANT TO SCREAM ### I am feeling extra stressed today! I’m working from home most days, so it’s been easier for me to actually do work in my own space. But I have to be in the office tomorrow. And the thought of getting up, showering, going to work, seeing my coworkers, talking, meetings…all of it!!!! It stresses me so much! I dont want to go out. I dont want to see and face people. I dont want to socialize. I dont want to attend meetings. I want to be isolated. I’ve been thinking about this all day and I’m already at the peak of my anxiety. I dont know what to do, I cant shake this off!!! I cant even step outside my door! I hate this feeling I hate it I hate it I hate it !!!',
  'upvotes': 129,
  'date': '2022-11-22 13:02:19',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11011111},
 {'id': 'yblic5',
  'title': '...',
  'post': "In the grand scheme of things, you're made conscious of your triviality, the absurdity of your existence when people all over the country are busy celebrating the festival of the year while you lie in your room in your pathetic misery. It wouldn't have been so bad if all the places weren't lit up and the sound of laughter and companionship didn't ring all across the streets to reach your ears. The only person you could have texted, you did text and ofcourse they were busy celebrating. It feels even more pathetic and horrible to be alone on days such as these. Wish I were dead.",
  'text': "... ### In the grand scheme of things, you're made conscious of your triviality, the absurdity of your existence when people all over the country are busy celebrating the festival of the year while you lie in your room in your pathetic misery. It wouldn't have been so bad if all the places weren't lit up and the sound of laughter and companionship didn't ring all across the streets to reach your ears. The only person you could have texted, you did text and ofcourse they were busy celebrating. It feels even more pathetic and horrible to be alone on days such as these. Wish I were dead.",
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2022-10-23 16:06:08',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': 'm6bx36',
  'title': 'Alone on birthday.',
  'post': 'So, about 5 years ago I lost both my mom and my dad. My father I lost to cancer and my mother was killed in a motorcycle accident. Today I turn 25 and I’m having an incredibly hard time enjoying today being by myself and being the only one that knows it’s even my birthday. I go through this same thing every big holiday. \nAre there any orphans on here with advice on how to still enjoy getting through life without the guidance of mom or dad?',
  'text': 'Alone on birthday. ### So, about 5 years ago I lost both my mom and my dad. My father I lost to cancer and my mother was killed in a motorcycle accident. Today I turn 25 and I’m having an incredibly hard time enjoying today being by myself and being the only one that knows it’s even my birthday. I go through this same thing every big holiday. Are there any orphans on here with advice on how to still enjoy getting through life without the guidance of mom or dad?',
  'upvotes': 351,
  'date': '2021-03-16 15:41:38',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101100},
 {'id': 'grk8gn',
  'title': 'Feeling unsafe around unstable neighbour.',
  'post': "I've made previous posts about my neighbour who has been yelling some pretty distressing things, and banging incredibly loudly on the walls and ceiling. \n\nI am feeling unsafe about calling wellness checks on him as he will certainly know it's me. I called one last year, and a neighbour called one a few nights ago. All that happens is that he goes to the hospital overnight, and returns the next day to continue the alarming noises. There does not seem to be any follow up or change. \n\nI cannot sleep, and constantly worry that he is going to confront me or do something dangerous to me/himself. \n\nI contacted my landlord last night, but am worried he will not do anything or will escalate his anger towards me. \n\nHow can I feel safe in my own home again?",
  'text': "Feeling unsafe around unstable neighbour. ### I've made previous posts about my neighbour who has been yelling some pretty distressing things, and banging incredibly loudly on the walls and ceiling. I am feeling unsafe about calling wellness checks on him as he will certainly know it's me. I called one last year, and a neighbour called one a few nights ago. All that happens is that he goes to the hospital overnight, and returns the next day to continue the alarming noises. There does not seem to be any follow up or change. I cannot sleep, and constantly worry that he is going to confront me or do something dangerous to me/himself. I contacted my landlord last night, but am worried he will not do anything or will escalate his anger towards me. How can I feel safe in my own home again?",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2020-05-27 13:59:32',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'bnwf3c',
  'title': 'No one to share anything with',
  'post': "What is the point of life if you have no one to share it with? I always hear how you have to live for yourself and be ok with yourself and being alone, and I understand that point of view. But at the same time, I feel like most things in life are meant to be and are better if shared. \n\nI want someone to be there. I want to have someone to love and to think about and to be loved by. Someone to live my life for, not completely as my only reason for living but someone to think about and do things for and share my experiences with.\n\nI've been alone for enough of my life. Why can't I find a person who is willing to share a life with me? Things are better when someone else is there to share them with you. Why can I not have that? What is the point of all of this if everything is done alone?",
  'text': "No one to share anything with ### What is the point of life if you have no one to share it with? I always hear how you have to live for yourself and be ok with yourself and being alone, and I understand that point of view. But at the same time, I feel like most things in life are meant to be and are better if shared. I want someone to be there. I want to have someone to love and to think about and to be loved by. Someone to live my life for, not completely as my only reason for living but someone to think about and do things for and share my experiences with. I've been alone for enough of my life. Why can't I find a person who is willing to share a life with me? Things are better when someone else is there to share them with you. Why can I not have that? What is the point of all of this if everything is done alone?",
  'upvotes': 24,
  'date': '2019-05-13 00:40:52',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '149mn5j',
  'title': 'Being alone until death',
  'post': 'As of late, I was in a Discord server for people similar to me. Initially, things seemed to be okay but as of late, it hasn’t been as pleasant as I’d hope. \n\nWhen I vent out my frustrations or issues, it seems nobody has an answer. No therapist can help me, nobody wants to truly get to know me. So what’s the point?!\n\nPerhaps my sole purpose was to be the means to an end like every person ever. So I’ll just begin my process to end my life when the time is right.',
  'text': 'Being alone until death ### As of late, I was in a Discord server for people similar to me. Initially, things seemed to be okay but as of late, it hasn’t been as pleasant as I’d hope. When I vent out my frustrations or issues, it seems nobody has an answer. No therapist can help me, nobody wants to truly get to know me. So what’s the point?! Perhaps my sole purpose was to be the means to an end like every person ever. So I’ll just begin my process to end my life when the time is right.',
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2023-06-14 23:32:20',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': 'isap0l',
  'title': '“You can never love someone into loving you back.”',
  'post': 'I read this from another reddit user in another different sub and it can sum up my situation.\n\nI loved my husband so much, and I always thought that “If I can make him happy, if I can make him feel so loved by me; he won’t leave.”\n\nBut that quote hit me right in the heart. It doesn’t matter what we do. No matter how much you love someone, you can never love them into loving you back. And that’s what hurts about one sided Divorces. \n\nI don’t want my divorce. But I have to do it.',
  'text': '“You can never love someone into loving you back.” ### I read this from another reddit user in another different sub and it can sum up my situation. I loved my husband so much, and I always thought that “If I can make him happy, if I can make him feel so loved by me; he won’t leave.” But that quote hit me right in the heart. It doesn’t matter what we do. No matter how much you love someone, you can never love them into loving you back. And that’s what hurts about one sided Divorces. I don’t want my divorce. But I have to do it.',
  'upvotes': 201,
  'date': '2020-09-14 00:55:48',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'gmt0b7',
  'title': 'what should i do',
  'post': 'okay so, ive been dating my partner for 6 months now and ive been messing up a lot n when i mean by that i mean i dont keep to my word, i dont think before i say n ive been lying to him, saying things i would do but cant cuz its things i wouldnt normally do and it buildt up till that he has little 2 no trust in me and now he wants me doing this that dissrespect my fam n just destroying bascially evey opportunity for me and the life i had before just to show i really do want him. all this has brought me to a point that i just wouldnt care if i died tomorrow (not saying im suicidal just its the stress) please dont hate on me i just need help thank you',
  'text': 'what should i do ### okay so, ive been dating my partner for 6 months now and ive been messing up a lot n when i mean by that i mean i dont keep to my word, i dont think before i say n ive been lying to him, saying things i would do but cant cuz its things i wouldnt normally do and it buildt up till that he has little 2 no trust in me and now he wants me doing this that dissrespect my fam n just destroying bascially evey opportunity for me and the life i had before just to show i really do want him. all this has brought me to a point that i just wouldnt care if i died tomorrow (not saying im suicidal just its the stress) please dont hate on me i just need help thank you',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2020-05-19 17:25:51',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'anger', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': 'xytxri',
  'title': 'Why parents make their childs live a living hell ?',
  'post': 'Hey, \n\nthis is something I ask myself a lot. How is it possible !? Some parents make sure that their child suffer 24/7 and that everything will be cut away ! \n\nI mean I grew up pretty bad but my father was a raging alcoholic who beat my mom and liked me to shake at nights. Or show me how hard he could punch in the chest because he was a kung fu master (at least in his mind, he learned it from Jacky Chan movies, so pretty pro IMO)   \n\n\nBut some Parents really take full controll of their child dont neglect it, they dont drink, they dont beat but only make sure that their live will be as misreable as possible without any "logical" goal/reason and that is something I dont understand. If someone has an idea I would love to know it !   \n\n\nThanks in advance !',
  'text': 'Why parents make their childs live a living hell ? ### Hey, this is something I ask myself a lot. How is it possible !? Some parents make sure that their child suffer 24/7 and that everything will be cut away ! I mean I grew up pretty bad but my father was a raging alcoholic who beat my mom and liked me to shake at nights. Or show me how hard he could punch in the chest because he was a kung fu master (at least in his mind, he learned it from Jacky Chan movies, so pretty pro IMO) But some Parents really take full controll of their child dont neglect it, they dont drink, they dont beat but only make sure that their live will be as misreable as possible without any "logical" goal/reason and that is something I dont understand. If someone has an idea I would love to know it ! Thanks in advance !',
  'upvotes': 36,
  'date': '2022-10-08 14:18:23',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'h8xcz4',
  'title': 'The woman I married is dead.',
  'post': 'Not literally. My wife was so caring, full of kind energy and loving towards me. I loved her so much We were so happy for the most part. I won’t go into details but we fell apart and filed for no fault divorce. A year later, This new woman is not the same woman I married. I feel like the girl I married has completely died. This new woman is so bitter, and wants nothing to do with me. There has been no explanation or closure and I don’t expect any. 4 years of marriage and two kids, all she is is a past memory and the mother of my children, only speaking at child swap. I don’t know the purpose of this post other than I just needed to get this off my chest and see if anybody else feels the same way about their ex.',
  'text': 'The woman I married is dead. ### Not literally. My wife was so caring, full of kind energy and loving towards me. I loved her so much We were so happy for the most part. I won’t go into details but we fell apart and filed for no fault divorce. A year later, This new woman is not the same woman I married. I feel like the girl I married has completely died. This new woman is so bitter, and wants nothing to do with me. There has been no explanation or closure and I don’t expect any. 4 years of marriage and two kids, all she is is a past memory and the mother of my children, only speaking at child swap. I don’t know the purpose of this post other than I just needed to get this off my chest and see if anybody else feels the same way about their ex.',
  'upvotes': 151,
  'date': '2020-06-14 16:57:47',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'anger', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': 'qtzxa1',
  'title': 'How many of you have actual words that you avoid due to your PTSD?',
  'post': "I was just thinking about this after realizing that I actively avoid the word 'shot'. I was going to tell someone it's worth a shot to try \\_\\_\\_\\_, and then automatically rephrased my wording because it reminds me of my dad's suicide. Writing it out makes me uncomfortable and automatically reminds me of the whole situation, and I realized just thinking about the word made me almost paranoid that using it would cause something bad to happen? Idk how to explain it properly but the feeling sucks. \n\nI was just wondering if anyone else also does things like this? Obviously I need to talk to this with my psychologist, but I'm realizing that I've been slow in understanding a lot of the symptoms brought on by my PTSD...",
  'text': "How many of you have actual words that you avoid due to your PTSD? ### I was just thinking about this after realizing that I actively avoid the word 'shot'. I was going to tell someone it's worth a shot to try \\_\\_\\_\\_, and then automatically rephrased my wording because it reminds me of my dad's suicide. Writing it out makes me uncomfortable and automatically reminds me of the whole situation, and I realized just thinking about the word made me almost paranoid that using it would cause something bad to happen? Idk how to explain it properly but the feeling sucks. I was just wondering if anyone else also does things like this? Obviously I need to talk to this with my psychologist, but I'm realizing that I've been slow in understanding a lot of the symptoms brought on by my PTSD...",
  'upvotes': 112,
  'date': '2021-11-14 21:27:57',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10},
 {'id': '16rjqc8',
  'title': 'It really sneaks up doesn’t it.',
  'post': 'I was fine. I worked out - I went to work. I got to Sunday and I felt like I was drowning. I slept all day and stayed awake into the early hours fantasising about just not having to be on anyone else’s time. I had to call in sick to my job (school counsellor) I went for a walk in the sun and I have cried all day. I’ve just got off the phone to my GP who wrote me a medical certificate. My partner wants to help but just want to fix things and I just want to self medicate. I just needed a rant. Thankyou to anyone reading.',
  'text': 'It really sneaks up doesn’t it. ### I was fine. I worked out - I went to work. I got to Sunday and I felt like I was drowning. I slept all day and stayed awake into the early hours fantasising about just not having to be on anyone else’s time. I had to call in sick to my job (school counsellor) I went for a walk in the sun and I have cried all day. I’ve just got off the phone to my GP who wrote me a medical certificate. My partner wants to help but just want to fix things and I just want to self medicate. I just needed a rant. Thankyou to anyone reading.',
  'upvotes': 66,
  'date': '2023-09-25 05:44:58',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 11100},
 {'id': '17de1ci',
  'title': 'Why?',
  'post': "I am literally still on this earth for other people. It seems crazy, as I sit here unable to do anything except sleep, that all my loved ones are happy, living their lives. These are the people I'm told will be sad if I'm no longer alive. Where are these people?  Why are they not supporting me?  Because I'm supposed act happy so as not to upset them. Basically, I stay to keep people happy and I get to live in darkness. I'm tired of pretending. I'm tired of living to make people happy.",
  'text': "Why? ### I am literally still on this earth for other people. It seems crazy, as I sit here unable to do anything except sleep, that all my loved ones are happy, living their lives. These are the people I'm told will be sad if I'm no longer alive. Where are these people? Why are they not supporting me? Because I'm supposed act happy so as not to upset them. Basically, I stay to keep people happy and I get to live in darkness. I'm tired of pretending. I'm tired of living to make people happy.",
  'upvotes': 34,
  'date': '2023-10-21 22:17:14',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '14j00ow',
  'title': 'Accepting loneliness.',
  'post': 'So I am currently in high school going into junior year. I’ve been dealing with loneliness all my life. \n\nAt first in freshman year I thought that I needed to find a group to be a part of and felt like being lonely was a bad thing. \n\nBut then my mental health went down the drain and for sophomore year I was sent to a residential facility in Provo Utah. I was there from August- early April. At that place I met a lot of cool people and it was the most friends I ever had. But after I got out, my loneliness came back because most of them live in LA and I live in the South Bay Area(six hour drive)\n\nAfter that I kinda just accepted loneliness. Because it’s not worth messing yourself up just for friends in high school which you’ll probably never talk to again once high school finishes. \n\nIt gave me a lot of time to focus on my goals in life and make myself a better person. \n\nSo for all those people that feel like crap for being lonely know that there are plus sides to loneliness as well.',
  'text': 'Accepting loneliness. ### So I am currently in high school going into junior year. I’ve been dealing with loneliness all my life. At first in freshman year I thought that I needed to find a group to be a part of and felt like being lonely was a bad thing. But then my mental health went down the drain and for sophomore year I was sent to a residential facility in Provo Utah. I was there from August- early April. At that place I met a lot of cool people and it was the most friends I ever had. But after I got out, my loneliness came back because most of them live in LA and I live in the South Bay Area(six hour drive) After that I kinda just accepted loneliness. Because it’s not worth messing yourself up just for friends in high school which you’ll probably never talk to again once high school finishes. It gave me a lot of time to focus on my goals in life and make myself a better person. So for all those people that feel like crap for being lonely know that there are plus sides to loneliness as well.',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-06-25 22:54:55',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '135y7ip',
  'title': "12 Things I've Learned from 12 Months Without You",
  'post': "1. I am a good mom - a great one even.\n2. I am a good partner.\n3. I can be a good mom and a good partner and still have a social life.\n4. I can do it on my own. \n5. I'm stronger than I ever knew.\n6. I wasn't asking for too much. \n7. I'm not too much.\n8. It's okay to want validation from your partner.\n9. It's OK to cry when I'm upset or hurt. It doesn't mean I'm making the issue about me.\n10. You can love and miss a person and not want to be with them.\n11. You can really dislike a person and still love them.\n12. Learning to forgive without an apology that you're so badly owed is an accomplishment to be proud of.\n\n12 months without you and I'm doing better than I ever thought was possible.",
  'text': "12 Things I've Learned from 12 Months Without You ### 1. I am a good mom - a great one even. 2. I am a good partner. 3. I can be a good mom and a good partner and still have a social life. 4. I can do it on my own. 5. I'm stronger than I ever knew. 6. I wasn't asking for too much. 7. I'm not too much. 8. It's okay to want validation from your partner. 9. It's OK to cry when I'm upset or hurt. It doesn't mean I'm making the issue about me. 10. You can love and miss a person and not want to be with them. 11. You can really dislike a person and still love them. 12. Learning to forgive without an apology that you're so badly owed is an accomplishment to be proud of. 12 months without you and I'm doing better than I ever thought was possible.",
  'upvotes': 525,
  'date': '2023-05-02 19:48:41',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': '11z36pe',
  'title': "What's the worst thing about being lonely for you?",
  'post': "I know how hard it can be to feel lonely. To feel like no one in this world is here for you to listen to your thoughts, to your feelings, to what you are passionate about. I felt like this for the majority of my life before I was luckily able to turn it around and change massively. What helped me the most in times where it was difficult though was to just write down what's bugging me the most about my loneliness right now. Just to get it off my chest. Let's support each other to show that we are not alone in this!",
  'text': "What's the worst thing about being lonely for you? ### I know how hard it can be to feel lonely. To feel like no one in this world is here for you to listen to your thoughts, to your feelings, to what you are passionate about. I felt like this for the majority of my life before I was luckily able to turn it around and change massively. What helped me the most in times where it was difficult though was to just write down what's bugging me the most about my loneliness right now. Just to get it off my chest. Let's support each other to show that we are not alone in this!",
  'upvotes': 12,
  'date': '2023-03-23 00:50:27',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': '131rrdr',
  'title': 'I am "quiet quitting" life',
  'post': 'I quit any extra stuff. I have no job. I only cook what I need. I eat quick meals like cereal the rest of the time. I have no desire to make any goals or have dreams to aspire to "be" anything. Im 38. I am disappointed that I wake up each morning.   I dont care about anything anymore. I just want to go to sleep and not wake up.',
  'text': 'I am "quiet quitting" life ### I quit any extra stuff. I have no job. I only cook what I need. I eat quick meals like cereal the rest of the time. I have no desire to make any goals or have dreams to aspire to "be" anything. Im 38. I am disappointed that I wake up each morning. I dont care about anything anymore. I just want to go to sleep and not wake up.',
  'upvotes': 86,
  'date': '2023-04-28 13:28:07',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': '170qsl2',
  'title': 'I cannot afford therapy in a "free healthcare" country',
  'post': 'I live in a country that is supposed to have free healthcare, but even though I am very suicidal, I can\'t get help and see a psychotherapist.\n\nPsychotherapists should be free if you have an insurance, but all of them are "overbooked for insurance clients" and only accept self-paying clients. I am a student with a part time job and I don\'t have 50-70€ a session. I have only 300 something in my bank account, which is making me more depressed.\n\nI don\'t know what to do anymore and I don\'t think I will make it if I don\'t do anything about it.\n\nBut I guess a piece of rope is cheaper than a therapy.\n\n\\[Sorry for rant, I needed to vent somehow\\]\n\nEdit : I am from EU - Slovakia',
  'text': 'I cannot afford therapy in a "free healthcare" country ### I live in a country that is supposed to have free healthcare, but even though I am very suicidal, I can\'t get help and see a psychotherapist. Psychotherapists should be free if you have an insurance, but all of them are "overbooked for insurance clients" and only accept self-paying clients. I am a student with a part time job and I don\'t have 50-70€ a session. I have only 300 something in my bank account, which is making me more depressed. I don\'t know what to do anymore and I don\'t think I will make it if I don\'t do anything about it. But I guess a piece of rope is cheaper than a therapy. \\[Sorry for rant, I needed to vent somehow\\] Edit : I am from EU - Slovakia',
  'upvotes': 116,
  'date': '2023-10-05 19:23:28',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10110},
 {'id': 'lp3jge',
  'title': 'Need help on how to support and move forward with my bf',
  'post': 'My bf and i have been dating for almost a year. I really care about him and about a month or two into our relationship he told me about his depression. Recently he has been more and more depressed and saying suicidal things. I talk about this openly with him and ask him questions. I was wondering how I could talk to him so he can make a plan for himself to get better or reach out for help from me or through professionals. Thanks! I usually always do little things for him like cook food and get him small gifts here and there to make him less stressed but I know only that won’t help him as much.',
  'text': 'Need help on how to support and move forward with my bf ### My bf and i have been dating for almost a year. I really care about him and about a month or two into our relationship he told me about his depression. Recently he has been more and more depressed and saying suicidal things. I talk about this openly with him and ask him questions. I was wondering how I could talk to him so he can make a plan for himself to get better or reach out for help from me or through professionals. Thanks! I usually always do little things for him like cook food and get him small gifts here and there to make him less stressed but I know only that won’t help him as much.',
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2021-02-21 18:42:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 110},
 {'id': 'i9dvzr',
  'title': 'Hey guys my band Ghost Town Remedy is making a collaborative music video to help raise awareness for mental illness. If you’ve lost someone due to suicide or have struggled with depression yourself we’d love to have you submit and It only takes about 5 mins to shoot <3',

  'text': 'Hey guys my band Ghost Town Remedy is making a collaborative music video to help raise awareness for mental illness. If you’ve lost someone due to suicide or have struggled with depression yourself we’d love to have you submit and It only takes about 5 mins to shoot <3 ### [Music vid submission](https://youtu.be/Jlv3SFkWGPQ)',
  'upvotes': 24,
  'date': '2020-08-14 02:43:37',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'wf6q03',
  'title': "why do i have to work? why am i forced to work? why can't i just live without working",
  'post': "No one cares about mentally ill/disorder people like me and force us to work and call us lazy even tho we can't because of immense pain and feeling dead inside",
  'text': "why do i have to work? why am i forced to work? why can't i just live without working ### No one cares about mentally ill/disorder people like me and force us to work and call us lazy even tho we can't because of immense pain and feeling dead inside",
  'upvotes': 519,

   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': 'wxveeg',
  'title': 'Can’t give feedback',
  'post': 'I’m more so posting to just vent, but do any of you feel like you can’t say anything negative about your partner to them (“I didn’t like that you did this yesterday”) without totally derailing things? I just wanted to communicate my frustration and have it acknowledged, but now our weekend trip is cancelled and she wants nothing to do with me. I try to come from a place of understanding, but I have feelings too.',
  'text': 'Can’t give feedback ### I’m more so posting to just vent, but do any of you feel like you can’t say anything negative about your partner to them (“I didn’t like that you did this yesterday”) without totally derailing things? I just wanted to communicate my frustration and have it acknowledged, but now our weekend trip is cancelled and she wants nothing to do with me. I try to come from a place of understanding, but I have feelings too.',
  'upvotes': 33,

 {'id': 'yl0493',
  'title': 'I wanna die but i dont wanna kill myself',
  'post': "everyday i feel so numb i just want to die but i don't want to kill myself bc everyone around me will suffer so i just wish every second of the day that something happens to me like a horrible accident whether i just pass out, start bleeding internally or get hit by a truck something quick the better just so i can rest I'm just so tired every single day",
  'text': "I wanna die but i dont wanna kill myself ### everyday i feel so numb i just want to die but i don't want to kill myself bc everyone around me will suffer so i just wish every second of the day that something happens to me like a horrible accident whether i just pass out, start bleeding internally or get hit by a truck something quick the better just so i can rest I'm just so tired every single day",
  'upvotes': 237,
  'date': '2022-11-03 11:32:31',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 110111},
 {'id': '178k12y',
  'title': 'How do I rebel against my brain',
  'post': 'My brain is a non stop factory of terrible thoughts and inventions which I have proved many times to be waaaay off reality. I am inventing my own shit and believing that I am literally the worst person on earth, that I deserve death and that everyone dislikes me profoundly. This voice in my head, I call her the Orphan. I have been able to shut her up sometimes but its coming back and again conditioning all my life.\nI am sick of her I want her out and have a normal life. Very few times ( if not none) she has been right. Its been proven to me many times. Still I am trapped in this dark place.\n\nI am about to start treatment again with Brintellix (I was on sertraline before) and just quit smoking pot. \n\nI need some advice or people go have made it through, this is wasting my life away.',
  'text': 'How do I rebel against my brain ### My brain is a non stop factory of terrible thoughts and inventions which I have proved many times to be waaaay off reality. I am inventing my own shit and believing that I am literally the worst person on earth, that I deserve death and that everyone dislikes me profoundly. This voice in my head, I call her the Orphan. I have been able to shut her up sometimes but its coming back and again conditioning all my life. I am sick of her I want her out and have a normal life. Very few times ( if not none) she has been right. Its been proven to me many times. Still I am trapped in this dark place. I am about to start treatment again with Brintellix (I was on sertraline before) and just quit smoking pot. I need some advice or people go have made it through, this is wasting my life away.',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2023-10-15 17:13:23',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 11010111},
 {'id': '16q4sig',
  'title': 'Hell is the place where the person you ARE meets the person you could have been.',
  'post': 'Read this and made me understand why I feel like this. They meet every day. \n\nThey should become one. \n\nI should stop believing I could be someone ellse. I am me. And I am excactly who I wast destend to be.',
  'text': 'Hell is the place where the person you ARE meets the person you could have been. ### Read this and made me understand why I feel like this. They meet every day. They should become one. I should stop believing I could be someone ellse. I am me. And I am excactly who I wast destend to be.',
  'upvotes': 53,
  'date': '2023-09-23 13:38:44',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'wr83ky',
  'title': 'Well it happened',
  'post': 'After months of support he decided to break up with me. He usually behaves erratically when going through a depressive episode and it’s not the first time he’s done this but it’s the first time I’m taking it seriously. He said he wasn’t enough for me and he wasn’t comfortable in the relationship because he wasn’t giving it his all so I told him he should pack his things and go. It’s so hard and I feel absolutely destroyed because we had talked about marriage and children recently but I have to respect his wishes.',
  'text': 'Well it happened ### After months of support he decided to break up with me. He usually behaves erratically when going through a depressive episode and it’s not the first time he’s done this but it’s the first time I’m taking it seriously. He said he wasn’t enough for me and he wasn’t comfortable in the relationship because he wasn’t giving it his all so I told him he should pack his things and go. It’s so hard and I feel absolutely destroyed because we had talked about marriage and children recently but I have to respect his wishes.',
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2022-08-18 02:57:15',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '16xi4wq',
  'title': 'Mom calls me too sensitive',
  'post': 'Got a onesie for halloween. Showed her a pic and she commented implying it’s too small (I’m self conscious about my weight and she knows this) it’s the right size, but I have some weight from binge eating so you can see some pudge. I called her out, she says I’m too sensitive. Makes me feel stupid and sad because I finally found something I’m excited to wear and am working on developing boundaries. Just sucks.',
  'text': 'Mom calls me too sensitive ### Got a onesie for halloween. Showed her a pic and she commented implying it’s too small (I’m self conscious about my weight and she knows this) it’s the right size, but I have some weight from binge eating so you can see some pudge. I called her out, she says I’m too sensitive. Makes me feel stupid and sad because I finally found something I’m excited to wear and am working on developing boundaries. Just sucks.',
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2023-10-02 00:34:30',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '16ws165',
  'title': "I fucking hate when people compare my struggles to others'",
  'post': 'Every time thay say things like:\n–  I\'ve been through worse\n\n–  I\'ve been through depression without meds (but it is self-diagnosed and they\'ve never consult any professionals)\n\n–  Your life is much better than ... (insert anyone in blank)\n\n–  There\'s no valid reasons to be depressed\n\n–  Everyone has been depressed, no one need meds\n\n–  When are you going to be normal, it has been years\n\n–  Stop having depression, you never try to fix it yourself but always expect me to change\n\nI\'m FURIOUS. I\'m not being "pessimistic" just because I want to. HAVING DEPRESSION IS NOT A FUCKING CHOICE. Oh yes I haven\'t been through world war, but you haven\'t been through depression too. When I\'m upset about this they\'ll always end with, "I said this because I want to help you" and all these bs. OH MY FUCKING GOD SHUT UP AND HAVE DEPRESSION YOU BITCH\n\nanyway, sorry if I\'m too agressive but fuck the assholes (both literally and metaphorically)',
  'text': 'I fucking hate when people compare my struggles to others\' ### Every time thay say things like: – I\'ve been through worse – I\'ve been through depression without meds (but it is self-diagnosed and they\'ve never consult any professionals) – Your life is much better than ... (insert anyone in blank) – There\'s no valid reasons to be depressed – Everyone has been depressed, no one need meds – When are you going to be normal, it has been years – Stop having depression, you never try to fix it yourself but always expect me to change I\'m FURIOUS. I\'m not being "pessimistic" just because I want to. HAVING DEPRESSION IS NOT A FUCKING CHOICE. Oh yes I haven\'t been through world war, but you haven\'t been through depression too. When I\'m upset about this they\'ll always end with, "I said this because I want to help you" and all these bs. OH MY FUCKING GOD SHUT UP AND HAVE DEPRESSION YOU BITCH anyway, sorry if I\'m too agressive but fuck the assholes (both literally and metaphorically)',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-01 04:53:34',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': 'k950p6',
  'title': 'Im 16 and i want to kill myself',
  'post': "My parents believe that I'm a burden and refuse to get me help. I attempted suicide when I was 13. My parents sent me to an outpatient care facility, and I stayed there for a month. The therapist there believed my mom over me. My mom convinced my therapist that I was faking it and that my phone was the problem.\n\nI live a sedentary lifestyle. I’m homeschooled, and I have no friends besides the 26 year old man who sexually groomed me when I was 15. Crazy.\n\nI have the prerogative to change my mind and become proactive, but right now, I feel so lost and unworthy.\n\nIve been cutting my thighs for awhile now and i think the right plant of action is to slit my throat or cut open my legs.",
  'text': "Im 16 and i want to kill myself ### My parents believe that I'm a burden and refuse to get me help. I attempted suicide when I was 13. My parents sent me to an outpatient care facility, and I stayed there for a month. The therapist there believed my mom over me. My mom convinced my therapist that I was faking it and that my phone was the problem. I live a sedentary lifestyle. I’m homeschooled, and I have no friends besides the 26 year old man who sexually groomed me when I was 15. Crazy. I have the prerogative to change my mind and become proactive, but right now, I feel so lost and unworthy. Ive been cutting my thighs for awhile now and i think the right plant of action is to slit my throat or cut open my legs.",
  'upvotes': 1119,
  'date': '2020-12-08 14:23:34',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1011011},
 {'id': 'epufqa',
  'title': 'My last night in bed with my wife',
  'post': 'Tonight is the last night I’m sharing a bed with my wife. She’s been sleeping in the guest room, but she agreed to sleep in our bed tonight. I honestly need it. We brushed our teeth while standing next to each other, trying to speak with toothbrushes in our mouths and making stupid jokes, just like when we got together. It was more sleep over than romance, but the familiarity was really nice. She’s asleep next to me now, so I’m writing this in the dark on my phone. We’re back to back with our feet intertwined, like tomorrow is any other day. I can’t believe this is happening. She’s the most important person in the world to me, and she wants out. I’m glad I have this one last night. It’s hopefully the closure I need. \n\nGoodnight, love. I’ll see you in the morning.',
  'text': 'My last night in bed with my wife ### Tonight is the last night I’m sharing a bed with my wife. She’s been sleeping in the guest room, but she agreed to sleep in our bed tonight. I honestly need it. We brushed our teeth while standing next to each other, trying to speak with toothbrushes in our mouths and making stupid jokes, just like when we got together. It was more sleep over than romance, but the familiarity was really nice. She’s asleep next to me now, so I’m writing this in the dark on my phone. We’re back to back with our feet intertwined, like tomorrow is any other day. I can’t believe this is happening. She’s the most important person in the world to me, and she wants out. I’m glad I have this one last night. It’s hopefully the closure I need. Goodnight, love. I’ll see you in the morning.',
  'upvotes': 186,
  'date': '2020-01-17 03:07:22',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '141xs6z',
  'title': 'Does it get any more toxic?',
  'post': 'Two months out of a terribly long 4 years TOXIC relationship. He cheated. He lied. He was an alcoholic. I kicked him out multiple times. He lost his job so I talked my business partner into giving him one. HUGE mistake. Epic really. He goes off the rails about once a month. He now wants to borrow money from me to pay off his debt so he can find a more permanent place to live citing he’s been living in his car because of me kicking him out. I’ve allowed him to stay one week until his AirBnB long term rental is ready. He is playing the victim in all of this….even though I’ve paid his entire way. I need constructive criticism on how to deal with this. TIA.',
  'text': 'Does it get any more toxic? ### Two months out of a terribly long 4 years TOXIC relationship. He cheated. He lied. He was an alcoholic. I kicked him out multiple times. He lost his job so I talked my business partner into giving him one. HUGE mistake. Epic really. He goes off the rails about once a month. He now wants to borrow money from me to pay off his debt so he can find a more permanent place to live citing he’s been living in his car because of me kicking him out. I’ve allowed him to stay one week until his AirBnB long term rental is ready. He is playing the victim in all of this….even though I’ve paid his entire way. I need constructive criticism on how to deal with this. TIA.',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-06-06 00:36:17',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': 'lv11si',
  'title': 'I would take a terminal illness from someone who actually wants to live.',
  'post': 'Doesn’t that make more sense, anyway?',
  'text': 'I would take a terminal illness from someone who actually wants to live. ### Doesn’t that make more sense, anyway?',
  'upvotes': 447,
  'date': '2021-03-01 05:28:27',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'j9uk2x',
  'title': 'Always Wrong or Too Late',
  'post': 'This is not a post to bash my partner, but on how to better understand his needs.  We have been together for nearly three years and live together. He is 28 and I am 29. \n\nI always feel like I’m too late and playing “catch up” instead of being there in the moment when he needs me. I guess the only way I can explain it is: things seem fine (I know they’re always battling inside) and then boom, shit hits the fan. \n\nHe is not on meds because he’s scared they won’t be the right dose/drug or help at all and just make him worse. \n\nIt’s hard, but I want to support him. I’m a teacher and he’s a teacher’s aide. He can “turn it on” for the camera and the kids, but it’s just an act. \n\nDoes anyone have any ideas or strategies or success stories of what has worked for them? I feel like a complete emotional idiot.. \n\nSigh.',
  'text': 'Always Wrong or Too Late ### This is not a post to bash my partner, but on how to better understand his needs. We have been together for nearly three years and live together. He is 28 and I am 29. I always feel like I’m too late and playing “catch up” instead of being there in the moment when he needs me. I guess the only way I can explain it is: things seem fine (I know they’re always battling inside) and then boom, shit hits the fan. He is not on meds because he’s scared they won’t be the right dose/drug or help at all and just make him worse. It’s hard, but I want to support him. I’m a teacher and he’s a teacher’s aide. He can “turn it on” for the camera and the kids, but it’s just an act. Does anyone have any ideas or strategies or success stories of what has worked for them? I feel like a complete emotional idiot.. Sigh.',
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2020-10-12 16:51:30',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': 'w99aod',
  'title': 'my mind never leaves me alone',
  'post': 'recently i gotten an evil eye bracelet. my brain is constantly paranoid, to add on to it i have near constant nightmares and sometimes i am fearful to sleep bc of them. i got the bracelet to calm my nerves a bit for people that might be “out to get me” but even then it doesnt stop me from being scared. at night i try to sleep and close my eyes but my mind throws in some creepy photo memory it made up and keeps me up longer. i get up and turn on my flashlight and scan my room for abt 5 seconds to make sure there are no “monsters” or anything to take me in my sleep. i dont wear my bracelet as i sleep in fear itll give me bad luck. i try to watch asmr “nightmare prevention.” i tried brown noise which did help for the night but my brain needs constant stimulation or else ill get bored or my mind will try to scare me again.',
  'text': 'my mind never leaves me alone ### recently i gotten an evil eye bracelet. my brain is constantly paranoid, to add on to it i have near constant nightmares and sometimes i am fearful to sleep bc of them. i got the bracelet to calm my nerves a bit for people that might be “out to get me” but even then it doesnt stop me from being scared. at night i try to sleep and close my eyes but my mind throws in some creepy photo memory it made up and keeps me up longer. i get up and turn on my flashlight and scan my room for abt 5 seconds to make sure there are no “monsters” or anything to take me in my sleep. i dont wear my bracelet as i sleep in fear itll give me bad luck. i try to watch asmr “nightmare prevention.” i tried brown noise which did help for the night but my brain needs constant stimulation or else ill get bored or my mind will try to scare me again.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2022-07-27 08:37:13',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000000},
 {'id': 'dxshpe',
  'title': '[Vent/Rant/FML] My husband is a piece of work',
  'post': 'He cheats on me 10+ times with a co worker at his job. After knowing her for only five months and fucking her for one, hes in “love” with both of us and cannot choose who he wants to be with. \n\n⁉️⁉️⁉️\n\nChoose? **Choose?!** Even though I have told him time and time again I’m not, he somehow thinks I’m sticking around for him to realize how fucking amazing I am as a person.\n\nHe then tries to get me to convince *him* why he should choose *me*! \n\n🙄🙄🙄\n\nAfter 11 years of being together if you can’t figure out my worth that’s not my issue. \n\nFuck boi bye!!',
  'text': '[Vent/Rant/FML] My husband is a piece of work ### He cheats on me 10+ times with a co worker at his job. After knowing her for only five months and fucking her for one, hes in “love” with both of us and cannot choose who he wants to be with. ⁉️⁉️⁉️ Choose? **Choose?!** Even though I have told him time and time again I’m not, he somehow thinks I’m sticking around for him to realize how fucking amazing I am as a person. He then tries to get me to convince *him* why he should choose *me*! 🙄🙄🙄 After 11 years of being together if you can’t figure out my worth that’s not my issue. Fuck boi bye!!',
  'upvotes': 147,
  'date': '2019-11-17 21:00:20',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010001},
 {'id': 'c8c7zj',
  'title': 'Does anyone else jump out of their skin from loud sudden noises?',
  'post': "I feel like I'm going fucking insane! My roommate is constantly banging pots and pans around and slamming cabinets in the kitchen. She watches TV insanely loud and when she watches sporting events she screams out randomly and it triggers my PTSD. Also, my upstairs neighbor's stomping around from about 5 p.m. until about 3 in the morning and I feel like I'm going insane from my constant noise.\n\nI realize that people are allowed to live their lives but I'm just sick of being surrounded by the constant noise and it's triggering my anxiety. Sometimes my roommate is so loud that I scream what the fuck was that?! Then she gets mad at me for saying something to her. I'm like well you don't have to slam the fucking cabinets. You could just shut them like a normal person. Then she yelled at me it's not my fault you're sick. And I was like yeah I get that but I still think that you could be a little less noisy. Does anyone else suffer from this? Am I just being petty?",
  'text': "Does anyone else jump out of their skin from loud sudden noises? ### I feel like I'm going fucking insane! My roommate is constantly banging pots and pans around and slamming cabinets in the kitchen. She watches TV insanely loud and when she watches sporting events she screams out randomly and it triggers my PTSD. Also, my upstairs neighbor's stomping around from about 5 p.m. until about 3 in the morning and I feel like I'm going insane from my constant noise. I realize that people are allowed to live their lives but I'm just sick of being surrounded by the constant noise and it's triggering my anxiety. Sometimes my roommate is so loud that I scream what the fuck was that?! Then she gets mad at me for saying something to her. I'm like well you don't have to slam the fucking cabinets. You could just shut them like a normal person. Then she yelled at me it's not my fault you're sick. And I was like yeah I get that but I still think that you could be a little less noisy. Does anyone else suffer from this? Am I just being petty?",
  'upvotes': 204,
  'date': '2019-07-02 17:40:25',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010001},
 {'id': 'hrcr0h',
  'title': 'Tough love?',
  'post': 'My partner suffers from untreated depression. We had a really wonderful weekend, but today he had a panic attack on the way to a camping trip with his friends. I had become upset about something in our past and was venting, and this triggered a terrible episode in him. He called me sobbing, saying that he’s a burden, all he does is disappoint me, and that his future is doomed. \n\nI am personally working on my ability to detach from his emotions. This would’ve really upset me a few weeks ago. No I’m fine with telling him his thoughts are untrue, that I love him, and hanging up the phone to let him deal with it in his own time. When he says things like “All I’m going to do is make you miserable” I just respond with “Okay then don’t try to make me miserable.” How well does the ‘tough love’ approach work for you guys? Did your SO eventually snap out of the self-loathing and take responsibility for their actions and feelings?',
  'text': 'Tough love? ### My partner suffers from untreated depression. We had a really wonderful weekend, but today he had a panic attack on the way to a camping trip with his friends. I had become upset about something in our past and was venting, and this triggered a terrible episode in him. He called me sobbing, saying that he’s a burden, all he does is disappoint me, and that his future is doomed. I am personally working on my ability to detach from his emotions. This would’ve really upset me a few weeks ago. No I’m fine with telling him his thoughts are untrue, that I love him, and hanging up the phone to let him deal with it in his own time. When he says things like “All I’m going to do is make you miserable” I just respond with “Okay then don’t try to make me miserable.” How well does the ‘tough love’ approach work for you guys? Did your SO eventually snap out of the self-loathing and take responsibility for their actions and feelings?',
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2020-07-14 23:41:26',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '172ojrv',
  'title': 'Every night I get swalloed up by Loneliness.',
  'post': "I am beginning to rely on my Propranolol and Alcohol to fall asleep or atleast feel better. I start to feel good after it settles in, but it doens't last long at all. I understand the feeling of Loneliness very well, if you need someone to talk too, I am here. No matter how many people i am surrounded by, it always feels the same.",
  'text': "Every night I get swalloed up by Loneliness. ### I am beginning to rely on my Propranolol and Alcohol to fall asleep or atleast feel better. I start to feel good after it settles in, but it doens't last long at all. I understand the feeling of Loneliness very well, if you need someone to talk too, I am here. No matter how many people i am surrounded by, it always feels the same.",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-08 03:02:50',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 101100},
 {'id': 'g49bkc',
  'title': 'Venting',
  'post': 'I think that the hardest thing about all of this isn’t losing my husband. Yes I love him. Yes he was my best friend. Yes I miss him. But the thing that breaks me down is the loss of the life I thought I would have. I got married young and I imagined us having fun together and growing up together; buying the fixer upper house and arguing when the sink breaks for fifth time that week. I imagined adopting a bunch of dogs and fostering kids. I imagined the vacations we would take and the hardships that we would face together. I imagined having someone to get old with. So while I can accept that my husband and I are not going to be together, I’m struggling to accept that my life will not be the way I imagined. I don’t know what life looks like now...',
  'text': 'Venting ### I think that the hardest thing about all of this isn’t losing my husband. Yes I love him. Yes he was my best friend. Yes I miss him. But the thing that breaks me down is the loss of the life I thought I would have. I got married young and I imagined us having fun together and growing up together; buying the fixer upper house and arguing when the sink breaks for fifth time that week. I imagined adopting a bunch of dogs and fostering kids. I imagined the vacations we would take and the hardships that we would face together. I imagined having someone to get old with. So while I can accept that my husband and I are not going to be together, I’m struggling to accept that my life will not be the way I imagined. I don’t know what life looks like now...',
  'upvotes': 149,
  'date': '2020-04-19 15:17:00',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': '116ax19',
  'title': 'I just want to matter',
  'post': "I wish I mattered, that I improved the lives of those around me, that I'm wanted. They only say kind things to or about me because it makes them feel better, it's out of politeness, nobody actually wants me around, and I can't say I blame them.\n\nI just wish I wasn't a waste.",
  'text': "I just want to matter ### I wish I mattered, that I improved the lives of those around me, that I'm wanted. They only say kind things to or about me because it makes them feel better, it's out of politeness, nobody actually wants me around, and I can't say I blame them. I just wish I wasn't a waste.",
  'upvotes': 154,
  'date': '2023-02-19 13:59:19',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': '16s9ihy',
  'title': 'using comedy to cope',
  'post': "i use comedy in almost all situations especially when communicating with people. i laugh or giggle at awkward moments and even when i say something dumb. i've asked some people what they think of me and they say that i'm a very cheerful guy and that they like to be around me. it's so weird to hear since i feel like everytime i talk to someone it takes a lot out of me but since i laugh and smile so much people like me. it's so fucking weird dude! i honestly thought people hated me and thought i was weird but i guess not. i developed this when i was being bullied and abused by my brothers and alcoholic father, i would instead of crying i would giggle or laugh about it, but this in turn turned into pushed down anger that would come out in bursts. idk why i'm typing this, i guess i think it's interesting",
  'text': "using comedy to cope ### i use comedy in almost all situations especially when communicating with people. i laugh or giggle at awkward moments and even when i say something dumb. i've asked some people what they think of me and they say that i'm a very cheerful guy and that they like to be around me. it's so weird to hear since i feel like everytime i talk to someone it takes a lot out of me but since i laugh and smile so much people like me. it's so fucking weird dude! i honestly thought people hated me and thought i was weird but i guess not. i developed this when i was being bullied and abused by my brothers and alcoholic father, i would instead of crying i would giggle or laugh about it, but this in turn turned into pushed down anger that would come out in bursts. idk why i'm typing this, i guess i think it's interesting",
  'upvotes': 22,
  'date': '2023-09-26 00:56:55',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'e57to2',
  'title': 'Hi wait y am I posting no one will notice',
  'post': "Yay I'm lonely you or every one wont care or just wont realise well I've got 1 friend yet they make fun off me so really I've got none",
  'text': "Hi wait y am I posting no one will notice ### Yay I'm lonely you or every one wont care or just wont realise well I've got 1 friend yet they make fun off me so really I've got none",
  'upvotes': 27,

   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
