 {'id': 'p63528',
  'title': 'Shout out to everyone on this sub..',
  'post': "I read so many of these posts and there are some amazing, compassionate, caring humans on here going through some real tough times. The love and loyalty I see on here to your partners is incredible. At the same time, I see the bravery and courage it takes to separate from a depressed s/o.. and all that heartache and heart break. \n\nSending so much love, support and strength to you all at whatever relationship stage you're at with your depressed partners and ex's. \n\nDepression is a thief. Loving someone with this horrible illness is so tough and I have much respect for whatever path you choose to take.",
  'text': "Shout out to everyone on this sub.. ### I read so many of these posts and there are some amazing, compassionate, caring humans on here going through some real tough times. The love and loyalty I see on here to your partners is incredible. At the same time, I see the bravery and courage it takes to separate from a depressed s/o.. and all that heartache and heart break. Sending so much love, support and strength to you all at whatever relationship stage you're at with your depressed partners and ex's. Depression is a thief. Loving someone with this horrible illness is so tough and I have much respect for whatever path you choose to take.",
  'upvotes': 37,
  'date': '2021-08-17 12:50:51',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '178s5rb',
  'title': 'Losing myself, who am i?',
  'post': 'Losing my self, who am i?\n\nI’m 19 and a male. I don’t know why but recently i feel like i’ve been losing myself more and more. I feel like i don’t truly know myself anymore. It’s getting worse and worse. I’m comparing myself to others my age and feeling like i’m very very far behind in nearly all aspects. I am getting more and more lonely. I’m losing friends and i don’t know how to come back from this? What do i do? Thanks in advance. \n\nFor more info: i’m currently studying and also have a job. I just feel like my personality is changing every day, and my beliefs and experiences are changing me internally far too much.',
  'text': 'Losing myself, who am i? ### Losing my self, who am i? I’m 19 and a male. I don’t know why but recently i feel like i’ve been losing myself more and more. I feel like i don’t truly know myself anymore. It’s getting worse and worse. I’m comparing myself to others my age and feeling like i’m very very far behind in nearly all aspects. I am getting more and more lonely. I’m losing friends and i don’t know how to come back from this? What do i do? Thanks in advance. For more info: i’m currently studying and also have a job. I just feel like my personality is changing every day, and my beliefs and experiences are changing me internally far too much.',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-10-15 23:28:35',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': '173nk21',
  'title': 'I wish I was never born',
  'post': 'I don’t have friends and I don’t want friends I’ve pushed everyone and anyone away \n\nI am forever just a little fucking kid in an adults body and I fucking hate I hate I can’t do anything at all anything at all at my big fucking age and I’m sicker than I thought\nI wish I was dead',
  'text': 'I wish I was never born ### I don’t have friends and I don’t want friends I’ve pushed everyone and anyone away I am forever just a little fucking kid in an adults body and I fucking hate I hate I can’t do anything at all anything at all at my big fucking age and I’m sicker than I thought I wish I was dead',
  'upvotes': 10,

 {'id': '132npqz',
  'title': "How did my ex's personality do a complete 180?",
  'post': "I'm a year into my divorce after 15 years of marriage. The first 12 years were perfect. I'm not looking through rose tinted glasses, we were genuinely happy. Then I think he hit a mid life crises. Started dressing different, acting different, got a load of tattoos, started partying. \n\nHe'd always been so kind and gentle towards me. He made me feel so secure and loved and I believe I did the same for him. Towards the end it was obvious he hated me. Couldn't stand to be around me. \n\nI just can't wrap my head around someone changing so much. I think of all the sweet things he said and done over the years then think about who he turned into and I can't make it make sense!",
  'text': "How did my ex's personality do a complete 180? ### I'm a year into my divorce after 15 years of marriage. The first 12 years were perfect. I'm not looking through rose tinted glasses, we were genuinely happy. Then I think he hit a mid life crises. Started dressing different, acting different, got a load of tattoos, started partying. He'd always been so kind and gentle towards me. He made me feel so secure and loved and I believe I did the same for him. Towards the end it was obvious he hated me. Couldn't stand to be around me. I just can't wrap my head around someone changing so much. I think of all the sweet things he said and done over the years then think about who he turned into and I can't make it make sense!",
  'upvotes': 144,
  'date': '2023-04-29 08:51:04',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'xwgljr',
  'title': 'i miss my old friends',
  'post': 'i had the best group of friends starting college, i was happy and loved. i’m autistic and bipolar and shit and it’s hard finding anyone to talk to. these people were just like me. then BPD took over and self sabotaged me. i don’t want to be alive anymore. i don’t think i can ever make friends like that again. and it won’t be the same. i miss them every day.',
  'text': 'i miss my old friends ### i had the best group of friends starting college, i was happy and loved. i’m autistic and bipolar and shit and it’s hard finding anyone to talk to. these people were just like me. then BPD took over and self sabotaged me. i don’t want to be alive anymore. i don’t think i can ever make friends like that again. and it won’t be the same. i miss them every day.',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2022-10-05 17:21:27',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11111},
 {'id': 'phfbg9',
  'title': 'Does your abusive partner or ex think that you are/were the abusive one?',
  'post': 'Mine sure does.  Sometimes I believe him.',
  'text': 'Does your abusive partner or ex think that you are/were the abusive one? ### Mine sure does. Sometimes I believe him.',
  'upvotes': 171,
  'date': '2021-09-03 22:28:05',
  'emotions': ['anger'],

 {'id': 'ypd84o',
  'title': 'I feel like demons are after me',
  'post': 'I feel like I’m being haunted bro.I know I am and I want it to stop,What did I ever do? I’m a nice person I help as much as I can and this is what I get? I’m trying to be a better person and get closer with god',
  'text': 'I feel like demons are after me ### I feel like I’m being haunted bro.I know I am and I want it to stop,What did I ever do? I’m a nice person I help as much as I can and this is what I get? I’m trying to be a better person and get closer with god',
  'upvotes': 9,

  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': '177vguu',
  'title': 'Painless,quick suicide',
  'post': 'Title, i have no family and friends,people just forget about my existence so i dont need to worry about hurting someone with my death since nobody needs me.',
  'text': 'Painless,quick suicide ### Title, i have no family and friends,people just forget about my existence so i dont need to worry about hurting someone with my death since nobody needs me.',
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2023-10-14 18:12:52',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1111111},
 {'id': 'pxwtpl',
  'title': 'My Dad Committed Suicide Two Days After My Birthday',
  'post': "I am a 36(M). My father committed suicide two days after my 11th birthday. For years I tried to pretend it didn't affect me. I would just down play my birthdays. I would just say that it was just another day, but deep down I was hurting and hurting bad. Through therapy I've come to realize that I cannot let his actions dictate my life anymore. It's not easy to do, but over the last few years I have tried to start celebrate my birthdays. This year I am planning to celebrate my birthday with my friends and my wife. We'll do a cookout and watch some fights. To those contemplating suicide, please know that this action has reverberations for years after.\n\nUpdate: I want to thank everyone for their kind words. It really means a lot during these times.",
  'text': "My Dad Committed Suicide Two Days After My Birthday ### I am a 36(M). My father committed suicide two days after my 11th birthday. For years I tried to pretend it didn't affect me. I would just down play my birthdays. I would just say that it was just another day, but deep down I was hurting and hurting bad. Through therapy I've come to realize that I cannot let his actions dictate my life anymore. It's not easy to do, but over the last few years I have tried to start celebrate my birthdays. This year I am planning to celebrate my birthday with my friends and my wife. We'll do a cookout and watch some fights. To those contemplating suicide, please know that this action has reverberations for years after. Update: I want to thank everyone for their kind words. It really means a lot during these times.",
  'upvotes': 296,
  'date': '2021-09-29 14:43:20',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'odcpoa',
  'title': 'My dad beat me on my 15th birthday.',
  'post': 'So for my 15th i got kinda drunk (paraleptic) and my 52 year old father beat me badly this happend 7 months ago and ive been staying with a friend but im unsure if i should go home or not in fear of happening again (note he has beaten me before just not this badly) he has ADHD and suffers from depression so i understand he has a lot to deal with but he knows that my mother also beat me as a young girl (she was an alcoholic) and knows the emotional trauma that caused me and yet emotionally abuses me by bringing it up so i will do what he says, im basically asking if i should go home or not i mean 7 months is an extreme time to spend away from my family',
  'text': 'My dad beat me on my 15th birthday. ### So for my 15th i got kinda drunk (paraleptic) and my 52 year old father beat me badly this happend 7 months ago and ive been staying with a friend but im unsure if i should go home or not in fear of happening again (note he has beaten me before just not this badly) he has ADHD and suffers from depression so i understand he has a lot to deal with but he knows that my mother also beat me as a young girl (she was an alcoholic) and knows the emotional trauma that caused me and yet emotionally abuses me by bringing it up so i will do what he says, im basically asking if i should go home or not i mean 7 months is an extreme time to spend away from my family',
  'upvotes': 39,
  'date': '2021-07-04 03:54:00',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11000100},
 {'id': '16rls51',
  'title': 'Fake friends and nobody respects me at the very least (im only 13 yrs old)',
  'post': 'My friends are fake af they say that they can’t play with me whenever I ask them to but then the next second I see them playing with someone else and they always talk behind my back literally everytime I come near them + nobody even respects me not even my family literally nobody everyone just enjoys insulting me and laughs about it',
  'text': 'Fake friends and nobody respects me at the very least (im only 13 yrs old) ### My friends are fake af they say that they can’t play with me whenever I ask them to but then the next second I see them playing with someone else and they always talk behind my back literally everytime I come near them + nobody even respects me not even my family literally nobody everyone just enjoys insulting me and laughs about it',
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-09-25 07:51:34',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',

 {'id': '13s7wam',
  'title': 'I feel like I fucked up my life',
  'post': 'I\'m 22m and people I went to high school with are graduating from college/university.  I\'ve only done one year of college because I spent 3 gap years depressed/retaking high school/being a mess.  I\'ve done one year of college and I don\'t even feel confident in my major.  I don\'t know what to do anymore, I feel so fucking lost.\n\nI grew up a "gifted" kid and had all these expectations and I let everyone down.  I feel like such a fucking failure in everything, from hygiene to health to education to career to social relationships to finances.  Not one area of my existence is going well :/',
  'text': 'I feel like I fucked up my life ### I\'m 22m and people I went to high school with are graduating from college/university. I\'ve only done one year of college because I spent 3 gap years depressed/retaking high school/being a mess. I\'ve done one year of college and I don\'t even feel confident in my major. I don\'t know what to do anymore, I feel so fucking lost. I grew up a "gifted" kid and had all these expectations and I let everyone down. I feel like such a fucking failure in everything, from hygiene to health to education to career to social relationships to finances. Not one area of my existence is going well :/',
  'upvotes': 379,
  'date': '2023-05-26 09:04:38',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'nesrq3',
  'title': 'I’ve left, I finally left!',
  'post': 'I finally left my r’ship. I have cried and cried and will probably cry some more about the fact that I loved him way more than he ever did me, but I’m out. I’ve no idea how life looks for the future or even tomorrow but I’m surrounding myself with the people that care about me the most. \n\nNot sure what I’m expecting by posting here, but I have a huge thanks for everyone who offered me supportive comments along the way 💗',
  'text': 'I’ve left, I finally left! ### I finally left my r’ship. I have cried and cried and will probably cry some more about the fact that I loved him way more than he ever did me, but I’m out. I’ve no idea how life looks for the future or even tomorrow but I’m surrounding myself with the people that care about me the most. Not sure what I’m expecting by posting here, but I have a huge thanks for everyone who offered me supportive comments along the way 💗',
  'upvotes': 265,
  'date': '2021-05-17 21:42:49',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'qjps9p',
  'title': 'I feel sad and unmotivated for some unknown reason',
  'post': "I've been feeling unmotivated with the things that I love to do these days and it's making me feel frustrated. I have this hobby that I really like doing but now when I'm actually doing it, I feel like I'm going to cry and I feel so sad and I don't even know why. I can still do it but not with the energy that I have before. Just this feeling of wanting to scream and just bawl out randomly but I can't. I really want this feeling to go away so that I can do my hobby properly again.\n\nAnyone have any thoughts on this? I really want to hear at least one.",
  'text': "I feel sad and unmotivated for some unknown reason ### I've been feeling unmotivated with the things that I love to do these days and it's making me feel frustrated. I have this hobby that I really like doing but now when I'm actually doing it, I feel like I'm going to cry and I feel so sad and I don't even know why. I can still do it but not with the energy that I have before. Just this feeling of wanting to scream and just bawl out randomly but I can't. I really want this feeling to go away so that I can do my hobby properly again. Anyone have any thoughts on this? I really want to hear at least one.",
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2021-10-31 13:44:00',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '11f4alt',
  'title': 'Lonlieness',
  'post': 'I’m 19 years old and I feel I have no one to really talk to, I feel no one cares to really get to know me, or even care for me. I’ve been rejected by every girl I have ever tried for, a girl even said I was cute, asked for my number, initiated the conversation on text and held a convo with me for like 2 days straight then says I’m a dry texter and un adds me. I’m just so confused on why people do this, I’m tired of even trying anymore.',
  'text': 'Lonlieness ### I’m 19 years old and I feel I have no one to really talk to, I feel no one cares to really get to know me, or even care for me. I’ve been rejected by every girl I have ever tried for, a girl even said I was cute, asked for my number, initiated the conversation on text and held a convo with me for like 2 days straight then says I’m a dry texter and un adds me. I’m just so confused on why people do this, I’m tired of even trying anymore.',
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2023-03-01 13:51:46',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '170dawx',
  'title': 'I slept for over 24 hours…',
  'post': 'My depression has gotten worse and unbearable so I just keep sleeping even though I always have nightmares and yesterday (wednesday Oct 4) i slept all day and I feel so worthless/like trash \n\nAnyone can relate? I really didn’t want to but, it happened..',
  'text': 'I slept for over 24 hours… ### My depression has gotten worse and unbearable so I just keep sleeping even though I always have nightmares and yesterday (wednesday Oct 4) i slept all day and I feel so worthless/like trash Anyone can relate? I really didn’t want to but, it happened..',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-05 09:14:28',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '10jimz8',
  'title': 'depression mon star',
  'post': ' i pretend. a LOT. i hide my severe daily depression cuz i dont want to burden folks with the weight of my depression that never ends. (yes i take my meds, yes she\'s raised it. meds are NOT a cure.) i dont want to be \'\'that guy\'\' that sucks the life out of the party. but its so draining and tiring to pretend all the time. exhausting. and sure people SAY "oh you dont have to pretend with me" um ok but yea i do because im not pleasant when im depressed. im rude, angry, bitter, irritable and short tempered and often to lash out at. im not a nice person in my depression. people would get their feels hurt if i acted how i really felt n said what i really thought sooooo yea no...ill just keep pretending. people say "oh you dont have to pretend" as a nice sentiment as long as my behavior is in line with what you want it to be and doesn inconvenience you.',
  'text': 'depression mon star ### i pretend. a LOT. i hide my severe daily depression cuz i dont want to burden folks with the weight of my depression that never ends. (yes i take my meds, yes she\'s raised it. meds are NOT a cure.) i dont want to be \'\'that guy\'\' that sucks the life out of the party. but its so draining and tiring to pretend all the time. exhausting. and sure people SAY "oh you dont have to pretend with me" um ok but yea i do because im not pleasant when im depressed. im rude, angry, bitter, irritable and short tempered and often to lash out at. im not a nice person in my depression. people would get their feels hurt if i acted how i really felt n said what i really thought sooooo yea no...ill just keep pretending. people say "oh you dont have to pretend" as a nice sentiment as long as my behavior is in line with what you want it to be and doesn inconvenience you.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-01-23 17:51:44',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '179a71m',
  'title': 'My depression has gotten permanent',
  'post': "I've had depression for lots of years but it was not permanent. There were some good days as well but now It's gotten worse. It's like I've accepted my fate and given up to depression. I feel lifeless as if i have no soul. I don't talk much and I've lost interest in pretty much everything. Despite being on antidepressants prescribed by the doctors, i still can't come out of the hole I've gotten myself into. I don't know how far I'll go with this.",
  'text': "My depression has gotten permanent ### I've had depression for lots of years but it was not permanent. There were some good days as well but now It's gotten worse. It's like I've accepted my fate and given up to depression. I feel lifeless as if i have no soul. I don't talk much and I've lost interest in pretty much everything. Despite being on antidepressants prescribed by the doctors, i still can't come out of the hole I've gotten myself into. I don't know how far I'll go with this.",
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-10-16 16:33:07',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 110101},
 {'id': '16bdv4p',
  'title': "I didn't have a bad childhood - so why am I like this?",
  'post': 'Most websites say that most depression comes from having a bad childhood. But I didn\'t, I was never hungry, I always had a roof over my head, a few friends... I was bullied a little in high-school but I was a goth/emo kid mid naughties so easy target but not physically bullied just words and shit. I had a rough time at University with self doubt and friendship breakdowns but... I dont understand why I\'m depressed all the time and have been off and on since the start of my 20s.\n\nI feel I don\'t have a reason to be depressed. Yes Ive had heart-break and loss and my life isnt where I thought it would be at this time but Im not sick (I hope) or very poor, I live "comfortably" so why do I feel like this?',
  'text': 'I didn\'t have a bad childhood - so why am I like this? ### Most websites say that most depression comes from having a bad childhood. But I didn\'t, I was never hungry, I always had a roof over my head, a few friends... I was bullied a little in high-school but I was a goth/emo kid mid naughties so easy target but not physically bullied just words and shit. I had a rough time at University with self doubt and friendship breakdowns but... I dont understand why I\'m depressed all the time and have been off and on since the start of my 20s. I feel I don\'t have a reason to be depressed. Yes Ive had heart-break and loss and my life isnt where I thought it would be at this time but Im not sick (I hope) or very poor, I live "comfortably" so why do I feel like this?',
  'upvotes': 200,
  'date': '2023-09-06 07:41:04',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 110100},
 {'id': '113qvbr',
  'title': 'I’ve come to a tragic realisation about life',
  'post': 'I have no aspirations for my life, every job is some shit exploitative soul sucking task you do every day for decades that takes far too much effort to get but is necessary for survival. So my options for the future are to kill myself, suffer or suffer but in a different way. If the only “meaning” life has is to experience life and that experience brings me nothing but pain and misery then what’s the fucking point. \n\nAlso to top it all off, I’m a 23 year old virgin who’s never kissed a girl, and honestly I don’t blame anyone else for that. Nobody should have to tolerate someone as pathetic and worthless as me.',
  'text': 'I’ve come to a tragic realisation about life ### I have no aspirations for my life, every job is some shit exploitative soul sucking task you do every day for decades that takes far too much effort to get but is necessary for survival. So my options for the future are to kill myself, suffer or suffer but in a different way. If the only “meaning” life has is to experience life and that experience brings me nothing but pain and misery then what’s the fucking point. Also to top it all off, I’m a 23 year old virgin who’s never kissed a girl, and honestly I don’t blame anyone else for that. Nobody should have to tolerate someone as pathetic and worthless as me.',
  'upvotes': 119,
  'date': '2023-02-16 13:40:28',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': 'pgmzaw',
  'title': 'SAD (seasonal affective disorder) is already getting me depressed. How can I make this season okay for me?',
  'post': "Had anyone tried a daylight lamp, or whatever, that's meant to help with that?",
  'text': "SAD (seasonal affective disorder) is already getting me depressed. How can I make this season okay for me? ### Had anyone tried a daylight lamp, or whatever, that's meant to help with that?",
  'upvotes': 12,
  'date': '2021-09-02 17:51:46',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'wlx0o6',
  'title': 'I cut off contact with my abusive parents yesterday',
  'post': 'It still feels so surreal. I thought I was going to be stuck with them forever but now I never have to talk to them again. Of course some family members are blaming me but oh well I can handle that. My abusers are gone…',
  'text': 'I cut off contact with my abusive parents yesterday ### It still feels so surreal. I thought I was going to be stuck with them forever but now I never have to talk to them again. Of course some family members are blaming me but oh well I can handle that. My abusers are gone…',
  'upvotes': 121,
  'date': '2022-08-11 17:25:29',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'anger', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101101},
 {'id': 'ovapod',
  'title': 'How should I tell my family that I dont want them in my life?',
  'post': "My parents were really abusive when I was a child, both emotionally and physically. \nSince then, they have changed a lot, I guess they trying their best, but I just dont want to see them. Im not mad or angry at them, but I cannot forgive and dont want them to be part of my life.\nHow can I tell this to them? \nNowdays we get along quite well, they have no idea how I feel, and I think it would be a huge trauma to them if I told.\nI dont want to hurt them, dont want an argument, but I my mental health is getting worse and worse, just had a suicide attempt..etc, 'couse I feel trapped and have no idea how to kick my family out of my life.\n\nIm 24",
  'text': "How should I tell my family that I dont want them in my life? ### My parents were really abusive when I was a child, both emotionally and physically. Since then, they have changed a lot, I guess they trying their best, but I just dont want to see them. Im not mad or angry at them, but I cannot forgive and dont want them to be part of my life. How can I tell this to them? Nowdays we get along quite well, they have no idea how I feel, and I think it would be a huge trauma to them if I told. I dont want to hurt them, dont want an argument, but I my mental health is getting worse and worse, just had a suicide attempt..etc, 'couse I feel trapped and have no idea how to kick my family out of my life. Im 24",
  'upvotes': 52,
  'date': '2021-07-31 16:57:19',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'loneliness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11110},
 {'id': 'p2difa',
  'title': 'Tell someone who is freaking out to "take a deep breath" instead of "calm down"',
  'post': 'I think telling someone to "calm down" does them no good. They were already freaking out and stressing out. It also doesn\'t do much when instead if you say "take a deep breathe" it\'s actually telling them something to do while it calms them down. I find I get more frustrated and angry even when I tell myself to "calm down". I do this all the time whenever I see a guy or a girl freaking out and never get any push back for telling them to "take a deep breathe". Just a helpful tip if you have someone in your life who tends to freak out a lot and gets tired of you telling them to "calm down".',
  'text': 'Tell someone who is freaking out to "take a deep breath" instead of "calm down" ### I think telling someone to "calm down" does them no good. They were already freaking out and stressing out. It also doesn\'t do much when instead if you say "take a deep breathe" it\'s actually telling them something to do while it calms them down. I find I get more frustrated and angry even when I tell myself to "calm down". I do this all the time whenever I see a guy or a girl freaking out and never get any push back for telling them to "take a deep breathe". Just a helpful tip if you have someone in your life who tends to freak out a lot and gets tired of you telling them to "calm down".',
  'upvotes': 418,
  'date': '2021-08-11 13:53:54',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'qt2t10',
  'title': 'There’s really no point in living if you’re poor',
  'post': 'I’m struggling. Live paycheck to paycheck and it seems like I’m about to be homeless again for a short period.\n\nEveryone hates the homeless because their not making any money and no one wants to be associated with people that don’t make money. \n\nI’m tired of my self worth being tied to how much money I make. This shouldn’t be normal.',
  'text': 'There’s really no point in living if you’re poor ### I’m struggling. Live paycheck to paycheck and it seems like I’m about to be homeless again for a short period. Everyone hates the homeless because their not making any money and no one wants to be associated with people that don’t make money. I’m tired of my self worth being tied to how much money I make. This shouldn’t be normal.',
  'upvotes': 453,
  'date': '2021-11-13 14:50:53',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': 'zwhk4b',
  'title': "I hate myself, and i don't want to get better",
  'post': "I don't see the point in living. I hate the body i was born into. I hate the life i was born into. I have no motivation to live or talk to people or exist in general. I only want to eat junk food and lay on my bed watching the same videos on repeat. Nothing makes me happy. I dont feel like getting up, doing anything, taking care of myself. It doesnt make me feel good. Why be alive at this point, when i'm not even living. I dont want to get better because that means i have to start doing things again, and i dont want to do anything",
  'text': "I hate myself, and i don't want to get better ### I don't see the point in living. I hate the body i was born into. I hate the life i was born into. I have no motivation to live or talk to people or exist in general. I only want to eat junk food and lay on my bed watching the same videos on repeat. Nothing makes me happy. I dont feel like getting up, doing anything, taking care of myself. It doesnt make me feel good. Why be alive at this point, when i'm not even living. I dont want to get better because that means i have to start doing things again, and i dont want to do anything",
  'upvotes': 189,
  'date': '2022-12-27 15:01:41',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness',

 {'id': 'bqyq8z',
  'title': 'My cat saved my life today',
  'post': 'Trigger warning: suicide\n\nToday I was in tears and closed my bedroom door and started tying a hangman’s Knot. All of a sudden my cat stuck his paw under my door and grabbed the rope, pulled it all under and ran away with it. I know he was just trying to play but he made me stop and think about everything I have. He changed my mind. I know it’s cliche but my rescue cat really did rescue me.',
  'text': 'My cat saved my life today ### Trigger warning: suicide Today I was in tears and closed my bedroom door and started tying a hangman’s Knot. All of a sudden my cat stuck his paw under my door and grabbed the rope, pulled it all under and ran away with it. I know he was just trying to play but he made me stop and think about everything I have. He changed my mind. I know it’s cliche but my rescue cat really did rescue me.',
  'upvotes': 787,
  'date': '2019-05-20 17:42:43',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10110},
 {'id': '17be4ed',
  'title': 'Idk',
  'post': 'Kinda wish I’d just pass away in my sleep. No fuss. No mess. Just peaceful- endless bliss. Then I wouldn’t have to worry about being a burden to anyone.',
  'text': 'Idk ### Kinda wish I’d just pass away in my sleep. No fuss. No mess. Just peaceful- endless bliss. Then I wouldn’t have to worry about being a burden to anyone.',

 {'id': '15wmhj5',
  'title': "To be blunt, I'm a lonely physically disabled guy (33). Looking for a kind woman to talk to, maybe you're feeling alone too?",
  'post': " Yep,   that's about it. I'm perpetually single and and incessantly lonely.   Maybe there's a nice girl out there who'd like to talk? It's not easy to   get out, being in a wheelchair from Muscular Dystrophy. It sucks. I   like to stay in, play games, watch anime, watch sports/tv/movies. I   guess I'm a history nerd & love stand up comedy. Very shy at first   but very affectionate, empathetic, attentive and loyal. Just looking for   a kind woman to talk to and potentially get to know, see what happens . I'm from North   Carolina if it matters.",
  'text': "To be blunt, I'm a lonely physically disabled guy (33). Looking for a kind woman to talk to, maybe you're feeling alone too? ### Yep, that's about it. I'm perpetually single and and incessantly lonely. Maybe there's a nice girl out there who'd like to talk? It's not easy to get out, being in a wheelchair from Muscular Dystrophy. It sucks. I like to stay in, play games, watch anime, watch sports/tv/movies. I guess I'm a history nerd & love stand up comedy. Very shy at first but very affectionate, empathetic, attentive and loyal. Just looking for a kind woman to talk to and potentially get to know, see what happens . I'm from North Carolina if it matters.",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2023-08-20 20:47:37',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 101100},
 {'id': '178tuao',
  'title': 'Regret',
  'post': 'I just feel like my entire life is one big regret. I have so much regret about so much. I keep telling myself it’s for a reason… but what is that reason? I’m not happy at all. Everything is shit',
  'text': 'Regret ### I just feel like my entire life is one big regret. I have so much regret about so much. I keep telling myself it’s for a reason… but what is that reason? I’m not happy at all. Everything is shit',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-16 00:53:24',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '16qajsl',
  'title': 'Im finally starting to feel better',
  'post': 'Hi everyone, Im 18 years old and have suffered ocd , adhd, general anxiety disorder and major depressive disorder since i was in the 8th grade. Every day was miserable, I wanted nothing from my life. And it wasnt like an “im unhappy with my life” no nothing made me happy, not going out not material items , i felt that even if i went out and explored the world or was successful I would never be happy or even okay. Everything felt pointless. I went on countless medications. I changed my diet , my habits, i went to therapy, walks, routine , working out, everything and absolutely nothing helped me… I recently started a new snri and though my ocd is still crippling and im still expirencing some depression, i feel like i desire things from life, like i want to have a carrer, i want to go out again and i want to read, i want knowlage and friends… just the fact that i desire these things again is a huge step for me. I feel that we lack positive stories here and i just want people out there to know that there is hope.',
  'text': 'Im finally starting to feel better ### Hi everyone, Im 18 years old and have suffered ocd , adhd, general anxiety disorder and major depressive disorder since i was in the 8th grade. Every day was miserable, I wanted nothing from my life. And it wasnt like an “im unhappy with my life” no nothing made me happy, not going out not material items , i felt that even if i went out and explored the world or was successful I would never be happy or even okay. Everything felt pointless. I went on countless medications. I changed my diet , my habits, i went to therapy, walks, routine , working out, everything and absolutely nothing helped me… I recently started a new snri and though my ocd is still crippling and im still expirencing some depression, i feel like i desire things from life, like i want to have a carrer, i want to go out again and i want to read, i want knowlage and friends… just the fact that i desire these things again is a huge step for me. I feel that we lack positive stories here and i just want people out there to know that there is hope.',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2023-09-23 17:43:09',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'worthlessness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 110001},
 {'id': '10w8975',
  'title': 'actively suicidal, please. just someone say anything.',
  'post': "i just feel so alone.\n\nvalentines day is coming up\n\ni can't handle it. the loneliness is going to kill me.\n\nplease, just say anything. I need someone to just say anything to stop me from going down this path",
  'text': "actively suicidal, please. just someone say anything. ### i just feel so alone. valentines day is coming up i can't handle it. the loneliness is going to kill me. please, just say anything. I need someone to just say anything to stop me from going down this path",
  'upvotes': 233,
  'date': '2023-02-07 17:54:08',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'wjqvjj',
  'title': 'I need advice for how to help my adult daughter.',
  'post': 'My daughter is 29 years old and is exhibiting some extremely troubling behavior. She’s angry, irresponsible with her money, in a great deal of financial debt, and goes to the doctor or ER at the drop of a hat. She asks for advice but then gets angry at the answer. She asks me, her dad, and siblings to borrow money and tells us she’s always broke. She also changes jobs often. We think she might have antisocial personality disorder. Any advice on what we can do for her? TIA',
  'text': 'I need advice for how to help my adult daughter. ### My daughter is 29 years old and is exhibiting some extremely troubling behavior. She’s angry, irresponsible with her money, in a great deal of financial debt, and goes to the doctor or ER at the drop of a hat. She asks for advice but then gets angry at the answer. She asks me, her dad, and siblings to borrow money and tells us she’s always broke. She also changes jobs often. We think she might have antisocial personality disorder. Any advice on what we can do for her? TIA',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2022-08-09 01:58:56',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010001},
 {'id': 'byl475',
  'title': 'Does anyone get horrible, horrible heartache that literally is so physically painful?',
  'post': "When I'm sad, like really, really, sad, I get these sharp pains in my heart that are continuous and jerk tears. It hurts so much at times that it spreads throughout my body and I flinch and curl up in pain while my tears uncontrollably drop down my cheeks. My stomach hurts, and my whole body begins to ache, my head starts to pound and that's when I find comfort in the idea of ending it all - that there's a way out. Thinking about it gives me comfort. Writing letters to everyone gives me comfort. Until it feels real and it all comes back and I miss people that I love. I miss the way things were and I miss when i didn't fuck everything up. I miss when I was loved unconditionally.",
  'text': "Does anyone get horrible, horrible heartache that literally is so physically painful? ### When I'm sad, like really, really, sad, I get these sharp pains in my heart that are continuous and jerk tears. It hurts so much at times that it spreads throughout my body and I flinch and curl up in pain while my tears uncontrollably drop down my cheeks. My stomach hurts, and my whole body begins to ache, my head starts to pound and that's when I find comfort in the idea of ending it all - that there's a way out. Thinking about it gives me comfort. Writing letters to everyone gives me comfort. Until it feels real and it all comes back and I miss people that I love. I miss the way things were and I miss when i didn't fuck everything up. I miss when I was loved unconditionally.",
  'upvotes': 521,
  'date': '2019-06-09 15:05:53',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '9m08om',
  'title': 'I miss my intelligence',
  'post': "Since my major trauma 7 years ago (along with other traumas) which have caused me to spend most of my days in a dissociative fog, I feel like the act of thinking is so difficult. I was labeled a 'gifted' child, and I remember my mind being quick. But now, my cognitive processes feel so scrambled up and sluggish. I get so confused sometimes I have trouble filling out simple forms or answering questions on the phone. I'm in my 3rd year at a major university but my brain feels so messed up I don't know if I'll be able to finish. Does anyone else experience this? Have you found anything that helps? ",
  'text': "I miss my intelligence ### Since my major trauma 7 years ago (along with other traumas) which have caused me to spend most of my days in a dissociative fog, I feel like the act of thinking is so difficult. I was labeled a 'gifted' child, and I remember my mind being quick. But now, my cognitive processes feel so scrambled up and sluggish. I get so confused sometimes I have trouble filling out simple forms or answering questions on the phone. I'm in my 3rd year at a major university but my brain feels so messed up I don't know if I'll be able to finish. Does anyone else experience this? Have you found anything that helps?",
  'upvotes': 210,
  'date': '2018-10-06 22:34:59',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 1010000},
 {'id': '17458bd',
  'title': 'Why live if I find nothing appealing about living',
  'post': 'I don’t want to work, I don’t want love, I don’t want to learn anything, I don’t want to pursue creative endeavors, I don’t want to eat, I don’t want to sleep. Even if I had everything handed to me and I didn’t have to work to survive I think I’d still want to die. The benefits don’t seem worth the struggle to me, so why should I continue to waste resources other people can use? Why not end it so I don’t continue to pollute the earth with my existence? I can’t imagine being here for another 60 years. I don’t see why I shouldn’t die.',
  'text': 'Why live if I find nothing appealing about living ### I don’t want to work, I don’t want love, I don’t want to learn anything, I don’t want to pursue creative endeavors, I don’t want to eat, I don’t want to sleep. Even if I had everything handed to me and I didn’t have to work to survive I think I’d still want to die. The benefits don’t seem worth the struggle to me, so why should I continue to waste resources other people can use? Why not end it so I don’t continue to pollute the earth with my existence? I can’t imagine being here for another 60 years. I don’t see why I shouldn’t die.',
  'upvotes': 137,
  'date': '2023-10-09 22:38:05',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'suicide intent',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'e9ffwa',
  'title': 'Being alive is fucking painful. I just want to go to sleep and never wake up.',
  'post': 'Post history for context',
  'text': 'Being alive is fucking painful. I just want to go to sleep and never wake up. ### Post history for context',
  'upvotes': 455,
  'date': '2019-12-11 23:49:35',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'suicide intent', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010110},
 {'id': 'nw6dcy',
  'title': 'What hurts the most is when you really need to call somebody but you have nobody that would want hear you.',
  'post': "I am SO close to just running away and taking my life somewhere nobody can find me.\n\nIf my mother new what's going on inside my head she would have never said those things to me..\nshe probably doesn't know how close she is bringing me to just ...\n\nAnd right there in my worst moments I wish there was somebody I could talk to, someone who would just listen, tell me that I'm not failure, not a burden to everyone around me, tell me that I am capable of doing what I love and that it's ok to struggle.\nSomeone who tells me I'm not worthless and that my thoughts are lying to me.\n\nBut there is nobody.\njust heavy, dark silence.\n\nno one to hug, no one to just give me their hand, no one to just listen to me, no one that just genuinely cares about me..\n\njust nothing but emptiness",
  'text': "What hurts the most is when you really need to call somebody but you have nobody that would want hear you. ### I am SO close to just running away and taking my life somewhere nobody can find me. If my mother new what's going on inside my head she would have never said those things to me.. she probably doesn't know how close she is bringing me to just ... And right there in my worst moments I wish there was somebody I could talk to, someone who would just listen, tell me that I'm not failure, not a burden to everyone around me, tell me that I am capable of doing what I love and that it's ok to struggle. Someone who tells me I'm not worthless and that my thoughts are lying to me. But there is nobody. just heavy, dark silence. no one to hug, no one to just give me their hand, no one to just listen to me, no one that just genuinely cares about me.. just nothing but emptiness",
  'upvotes': 624,
  'date': '2021-06-09 21:06:41',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11111111},
 {'id': 'q5yhcm',
  'title': 'Is it his anxiety/depression or is he just not interested in me?',
  'post': 'Started casually dating a guy a few months ago and he told me early on that he struggles with anxiety & depression. Lately, he\'s been distant over text and uninterested in hanging out with me. He blames this on his mental health but tells me he\'s still interested in me. Meanwhile, I can still see his location updating on Tinder (we\'re not exclusive). I don\'t know to what extent he\'s using Tinder for... but it makes me overthink to the point of *"oh he doesn\'t have the energy to see me but has the energy to text a bunch of other women?"*. **Is this normal behaviour for someone struggling with anxiety and depression? Or is he just uninterested and using it as an excuse?**\n\n&#x200B;\n\nIf it weren\'t for his mental health issues, I would\'ve just assumed he\'s not interested in me and would\'ve cut my losses a while ago. But this is the first time I\'m dating someone with mental health issues so I\'m feeling a little lost here. Any advice or insight is very appreciated!!',
  'text': 'Is it his anxiety/depression or is he just not interested in me? ### Started casually dating a guy a few months ago and he told me early on that he struggles with anxiety & depression. Lately, he\'s been distant over text and uninterested in hanging out with me. He blames this on his mental health but tells me he\'s still interested in me. Meanwhile, I can still see his location updating on Tinder (we\'re not exclusive). I don\'t know to what extent he\'s using Tinder for... but it makes me overthink to the point of *"oh he doesn\'t have the energy to see me but has the energy to text a bunch of other women?"*. **Is this normal behaviour for someone struggling with anxiety and depression? Or is he just uninterested and using it as an excuse?** &#x200B; If it weren\'t for his mental health issues, I would\'ve just assumed he\'s not interested in me and would\'ve cut my losses a while ago. But this is the first time I\'m dating someone with mental health issues so I\'m feeling a little lost here. Any advice or insight is very appreciated!!',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2021-10-11 15:34:48',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'loneliness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': 'bsl4k6',
  'title': 'Post breakup, do you ever look back on your life and suddenly realize that the marriage was poisoning you all along?',
  'post': "The things I've learned about my stbxh since we separated have been eye opening.  LOTS of lies being revealed. I'm thinking back to my years with him and going oh wow, that was the real problem all along. \n\nWent through a big crisis for the last year that brought all this to head. Am now looking back and realizing the crisis mostly came from the toxic marriage. Total surprise, I thought he had my back, turns out he was the source of the pain. Two faced...emotional abuse all along. \n\nReflecting on our marriage is like flipping everything into its opposite.  It was hard to switch gears at first and then it came like a flood. Don't give even a tiny damn about him, completely just want to get this over with.",
  'text': "Post breakup, do you ever look back on your life and suddenly realize that the marriage was poisoning you all along? ### The things I've learned about my stbxh since we separated have been eye opening. LOTS of lies being revealed. I'm thinking back to my years with him and going oh wow, that was the real problem all along. Went through a big crisis for the last year that brought all this to head. Am now looking back and realizing the crisis mostly came from the toxic marriage. Total surprise, I thought he had my back, turns out he was the source of the pain. Two faced...emotional abuse all along. Reflecting on our marriage is like flipping everything into its opposite. It was hard to switch gears at first and then it came like a flood. Don't give even a tiny damn about him, completely just want to get this over with.",
  'upvotes': 143,
  'date': '2019-05-24 19:29:21',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'tr9yo4',
  'title': "Fuck sake I'm lonely but too afraid to do anything about it",
  'post': "I know that if I'm feeling lonely I should talk people more and find ways to get to know people and be with them more but always I have the change to do anything I do nothing, humans are too scary it is so hard to maintain these friendships I finally get. It's really so hard. Anyone who relate?",
  'text': "Fuck sake I'm lonely but too afraid to do anything about it ### I know that if I'm feeling lonely I should talk people more and find ways to get to know people and be with them more but always I have the change to do anything I do nothing, humans are too scary it is so hard to maintain these friendships I finally get. It's really so hard. Anyone who relate?",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2022-03-29 17:14:19',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'dapl3f',
  'title': 'I just realized I’m being verbally abused',
  'post': 'I’m 13. My little sister is 9. I’m scared af for me and my sisters safety. My mom verbally abuses me and my sister on multiple occasions. I just found out that she put a hole in the wall when she was alone with my sister. I’m petrified that it will escalate to physical abuse, because my mom on multiple occasions has threatened to punch mine or my sisters teeth out. Monday morning I’m going to a teacher and telling her everything. If I was an only child I would have options, but I have my little sister I need to look out for. Yesterday she told me that she hurts herself. She hits and bites her self. She doesn’t cut because “I don’t want mom to put me in a psychiatric hospital”. This has been going on my whole life. I’m so damaged from it. I want to cut but I’m trying not to. I want to kill my self but that would make things so much worse. I need to protect my sister, so I’m going to that teacher',
  'text': 'I just realized I’m being verbally abused ### I’m 13. My little sister is 9. I’m scared af for me and my sisters safety. My mom verbally abuses me and my sister on multiple occasions. I just found out that she put a hole in the wall when she was alone with my sister. I’m petrified that it will escalate to physical abuse, because my mom on multiple occasions has threatened to punch mine or my sisters teeth out. Monday morning I’m going to a teacher and telling her everything. If I was an only child I would have options, but I have my little sister I need to look out for. Yesterday she told me that she hurts herself. She hits and bites her self. She doesn’t cut because “I don’t want mom to put me in a psychiatric hospital”. This has been going on my whole life. I’m so damaged from it. I want to cut but I’m trying not to. I want to kill my self but that would make things so much worse. I need to protect my sister, so I’m going to that teacher',
  'upvotes': 148,
  'date': '2019-09-29 02:42:58',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10011110},
 {'id': 'srt56h',
  'title': "It's just a big disappointment...",
  'post': "It is disappointing to think you gave years of your life to someone and never  really saw who they were.  \n\nIt's disappointing to see the parent you thought they were does not exist. \n\nIt is disappointing that the future you thought you would have is gone.  \n\nIt is so very disappointing  that a person you once loved is now the person  you have to fight with about what's best for your kids. \n\nIt's disappointing that someone you once shared a life with is no longer someone you can even have a conversation with bc they are illogical. \n\nIt's all just such a huge disappointment.  That is the hardest part.",
  'text': "It's just a big disappointment... ### It is disappointing to think you gave years of your life to someone and never really saw who they were. It's disappointing to see the parent you thought they were does not exist. It is disappointing that the future you thought you would have is gone. It is so very disappointing that a person you once loved is now the person you have to fight with about what's best for your kids. It's disappointing that someone you once shared a life with is no longer someone you can even have a conversation with bc they are illogical. It's all just such a huge disappointment. That is the hardest part.",
  'upvotes': 172,
  'date': '2022-02-13 21:12:37',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'loneliness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11111101},
 {'id': 'qr3umr',
  'title': 'what positive mental health actions did you take today?',
  'post': "this sub is way too unbalanced with negative and positive lol let's get some positive in also!  so much room for both.\n\nI was dealing with very bad depression yesterday and I asked a friend to come visit me today.  She did during her lunch break.  It was short but great.  Just asking, and then someone, agreeing to just come over and sit with you and give you a hug and chat for 20 minutes can freaking save lives.\n\nyou?",
  'text': "what positive mental health actions did you take today? ### this sub is way too unbalanced with negative and positive lol let's get some positive in also! so much room for both. I was dealing with very bad depression yesterday and I asked a friend to come visit me today. She did during her lunch break. It was short but great. Just asking, and then someone, agreeing to just come over and sit with you and give you a hug and chat for 20 minutes can freaking save lives. you?",
  'upvotes': 337,
  'date': '2021-11-10 20:50:34',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '15xx98x',
  'title': 'I hate that I’m no one’s favourite',
  'post': 'Basically the title. I have friends but I’m non of there favourites and it honestly hurts and is draining.',
  'text': 'I hate that I’m no one’s favourite ### Basically the title. I have friends but I’m non of there favourites and it honestly hurts and is draining.',

 {'id': 'l52n8u',
  'title': 'Women can be pedos/ephebophiles and I’m so sick of people sexualizing it!!🤬',
  'post': 'I wanted to look around on the internet to see stories of other girls/women that had gone through what I did when I was a teen.(my mom slept with my boyfriend and other minors).. all I found was porn or articles about male adults with minors. I hate that people glorify older women with young men. Both should be equally condemned! A predator is a fucking predator regardless of gender. We need to bring awareness to the fact that women can cause just as much harm and also groom children/teens.',
  'text': 'Women can be pedos/ephebophiles and I’m so sick of people sexualizing it!!🤬 ### I wanted to look around on the internet to see stories of other girls/women that had gone through what I did when I was a teen.(my mom slept with my boyfriend and other minors).. all I found was porn or articles about male adults with minors. I hate that people glorify older women with young men. Both should be equally condemned! A predator is a fucking predator regardless of gender. We need to bring awareness to the fact that women can cause just as much harm and also groom children/teens.',
  'upvotes': 70,
  'date': '2021-01-26 01:14:08',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '13ocduq',
  'title': 'Kicked out',
  'post': "Has anyone ever been kicked out of their friend group by everyone and how did you go on. I've had it happen twice now and I just don't know if there is any point anymore.\n\nI don't go out cause of disability so I have no idea how to go about my life. Even things like gaming etc has become a chore rather than fun\n\nAny advice would be amazing. I guess I'm just looking for guidance on what to do now? I feel like my options are just to become a hermit and get rid of social media since I have no reason to be on it anymore",
  'text': "Kicked out ### Has anyone ever been kicked out of their friend group by everyone and how did you go on. I've had it happen twice now and I just don't know if there is any point anymore. I don't go out cause of disability so I have no idea how to go about my life. Even things like gaming etc has become a chore rather than fun Any advice would be amazing. I guess I'm just looking for guidance on what to do now? I feel like my options are just to become a hermit and get rid of social media since I have no reason to be on it anymore",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-05-22 01:22:50',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'la3i78',
  'title': 'at this point i wish i could either kill my father or myself',
  'post': 'I don’t want this to keep going on\ni don’t want to die but I don’t want to live this way either; it’s almost the same thing anyway\ni’m so angry and sad and scared and in constant stress all these emotions and suffering it makes me rot from inside \ni wish somebody could just make it all go away but nobody will help and even I can’t do it',
  'text': 'at this point i wish i could either kill my father or myself ### I don’t want this to keep going on i don’t want to die but I don’t want to live this way either; it’s almost the same thing anyway i’m so angry and sad and scared and in constant stress all these emotions and suffering it makes me rot from inside i wish somebody could just make it all go away but nobody will help and even I can’t do it',
  'upvotes': 38,
  'date': '2021-02-01 13:52:42',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010111},
 {'id': 'pl9io5',
  'title': 'Being lonely in a crowd full of people is a terrible feeling',
  'post': 'The quote “feeling more lonely in a crowd” was never more true than it was last month. Long story short I was at an event in a state park with just around 50+ people. Everyone talking to each other, having fun while I feel I don’t belong to any friend group. And my mental health just crashed I needed to go away and actually be by myself. I felt better being by myself (in a seating area near an ice cream booth) than being in the section I was.  I hope that makes sense. Helps that I was near a bar with a man singing karaoke of 80’s songs.  I felt better surrounded by strangers walking past me than being surrounded by acquaintances and feeling more alone than ever. Also a lack of WiFi didn’t help.  \n\n## ',
  'text': 'Being lonely in a crowd full of people is a terrible feeling ### The quote “feeling more lonely in a crowd” was never more true than it was last month. Long story short I was at an event in a state park with just around 50+ people. Everyone talking to each other, having fun while I feel I don’t belong to any friend group. And my mental health just crashed I needed to go away and actually be by myself. I felt better being by myself (in a seating area near an ice cream booth) than being in the section I was. I hope that makes sense. Helps that I was near a bar with a man singing karaoke of 80’s songs. I felt better surrounded by strangers walking past me than being surrounded by acquaintances and feeling more alone than ever. Also a lack of WiFi didn’t help. ##',
  'upvotes': 22,
  'date': '2021-09-09 23:45:12',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'j76t5j',
  'title': 'Adult child of divorce here: Don’t. stay. together. for. the. kids.',
  'post': 'My mother stayed with my narcissistic father for me even though she was clearly unhappy. She is an adult child of divorce herself, and didn’t want to subject me to court battles and custody issues like her parents did. It helped prolong their dysfunctional marriage for an additional 3 years. During that time, my father continued the verbal, physical, and financial abuse towards my mother and I until I moved out at 18. Then he decided he had enough of her and filed for divorce. It was really ugly from start to end.\n\nMonths before I moved out I was diagnosed with CPTSD from the shit he pulled on my mother and I. Three years on, I am actively working to unlearn the unhealthy social traits, habits, and practices that they taught me throughout my childhood in therapy. \n\nDon’t be like my mother; please get yourself and your children out before things go further downhill.',
  'text': 'Adult child of divorce here: Don’t. stay. together. for. the. kids. ### My mother stayed with my narcissistic father for me even though she was clearly unhappy. She is an adult child of divorce herself, and didn’t want to subject me to court battles and custody issues like her parents did. It helped prolong their dysfunctional marriage for an additional 3 years. During that time, my father continued the verbal, physical, and financial abuse towards my mother and I until I moved out at 18. Then he decided he had enough of her and filed for divorce. It was really ugly from start to end. Months before I moved out I was diagnosed with CPTSD from the shit he pulled on my mother and I. Three years on, I am actively working to unlearn the unhealthy social traits, habits, and practices that they taught me throughout my childhood in therapy. Don’t be like my mother; please get yourself and your children out before things go further downhill.',
  'upvotes': 148,
  'date': '2020-10-08 04:41:22',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'edje2i',
  'title': "Do you ever realize how easily you can exit someone's life?",
  'post': 'It\'s so strange, in under a year I\'ve come to realize how easy it is to slip out of someone\'s life no matter how much you cared for each other before. It\'s comforting to think that these people will be (are?) okay without me, so nothing will be "selfish" about my suicide.\n\nedit: Thank you stranger for silver, & to everyone else who understands this. Every "you matter" and "you don\'t realize how much they care actually" is very kindhearted of you to say but untrue in my circumstance unfortunately.',
  'text': 'Do you ever realize how easily you can exit someone\'s life? ### It\'s so strange, in under a year I\'ve come to realize how easy it is to slip out of someone\'s life no matter how much you cared for each other before. It\'s comforting to think that these people will be (are?) okay without me, so nothing will be "selfish" about my suicide. edit: Thank you stranger for silver, & to everyone else who understands this. Every "you matter" and "you don\'t realize how much they care actually" is very kindhearted of you to say but untrue in my circumstance unfortunately.',
  'upvotes': 668,
  'date': '2019-12-21 01:37:44',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'xwr8v8',
  'title': 'Grieving',
  'post': "Does anyone else feel like their grieving the death of the person they once knew?\n\nI feel like I'll never see that person again and the life we built over 15 years and with 2 kids is gone just like that.\n\nI know I need to look after myself. I know I can't do anything to fix this. \n\nI am in councilling.\n\nBut I feel like nothing is helping and this pain is unbearable.",
  'text': "Grieving ### Does anyone else feel like their grieving the death of the person they once knew? I feel like I'll never see that person again and the life we built over 15 years and with 2 kids is gone just like that. I know I need to look after myself. I know I can't do anything to fix this. I am in councilling. But I feel like nothing is helping and this pain is unbearable.",
  'upvotes': 14,

   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness',

  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'z7s26p',
  'title': 'I really need someone to talk to',
  'post': 'M 19. No matter who you are. I just need someone to talk to. I feel like I can’t talk to anyone about what’s going on. I just need to feel like someone cares. And I’m more than happy to  listen to whoever messages me and help with whatever you need to talk about <3',
  'text': 'I really need someone to talk to ### M 19. No matter who you are. I just need someone to talk to. I feel like I can’t talk to anyone about what’s going on. I just need to feel like someone cares. And I’m more than happy to listen to whoever messages me and help with whatever you need to talk about <3',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2022-11-29 11:58:47',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 11100},
 {'id': '16uzsnn',
  'title': "Hi, I'm Noah",
  'post': "I'm a man with nothing to live for, I'm just trying to survive in Mexico, I have depression, I don't have friends and I don't feel like staying here either.",
  'text': "Hi, I'm Noah ### I'm a man with nothing to live for, I'm just trying to survive in Mexico, I have depression, I don't have friends and I don't feel like staying here either.",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2023-09-29 02:41:55',
