   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'tuy203',
  'title': 'Mourning my old self',
  'post': 'I’ve had PTSD for over 6 years but I’ve struggled on and off with mourning who I was before the diagnosis. I know I’ll never be the same and looking back doesn’t help, but does anyone else ever feel this too? I just feel like I used to be so much more energetic and social. Now with the sensory overload it’s so hard to just enjoy time with a group of friends without feeling overwhelmed. It’s also a lot harder to make friends. Anyone else feel this way too?',
  'text': 'Mourning my old self ### I’ve had PTSD for over 6 years but I’ve struggled on and off with mourning who I was before the diagnosis. I know I’ll never be the same and looking back doesn’t help, but does anyone else ever feel this too? I just feel like I used to be so much more energetic and social. Now with the sensory overload it’s so hard to just enjoy time with a group of friends without feeling overwhelmed. It’s also a lot harder to make friends. Anyone else feel this way too?',
  'upvotes': 116,
  'date': '2022-04-03 01:53:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000100},
 {'id': 'z60wny',
  'title': 'Apathy',
  'post': 'How should one react or handle things when their depressed partner suddenly becomes apathetic? For some weeks, things were going good and then a sudden change of mood. \nWhat kind of boundaries should one set? \nAny advice will be much appreciated.',
  'text': 'Apathy ### How should one react or handle things when their depressed partner suddenly becomes apathetic? For some weeks, things were going good and then a sudden change of mood. What kind of boundaries should one set? Any advice will be much appreciated.',
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2022-11-27 13:12:04',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 110100},
 {'id': '10rvppd',
  'title': 'I have everything and I still feel worthless',
  'post': "I have a loving family that truly cares for me, siblings that I argue with and play with everyday, a kind father who is paying for my medicine and therapy, I go to uni, I live in a third world country but I'll say I'm in a better situation than over 95% of the population, and yet I still feel so fucking worthless, I really want to stop existing. I just lay in bed all day and do nothing productive while so many people in my country are suffering and yet they still want to live and move on while I don't, why am I like this? I just want someone to hear me out.",
  'text': "I have everything and I still feel worthless ### I have a loving family that truly cares for me, siblings that I argue with and play with everyday, a kind father who is paying for my medicine and therapy, I go to uni, I live in a third world country but I'll say I'm in a better situation than over 95% of the population, and yet I still feel so fucking worthless, I really want to stop existing. I just lay in bed all day and do nothing productive while so many people in my country are suffering and yet they still want to live and move on while I don't, why am I like this? I just want someone to hear me out.",
  'upvotes': 111,
  'date': '2023-02-02 17:39:20',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': '15v7236',
  'title': 'Need advice',
  'post': 'Hi, I’m 16 years old and I’m not sure what to do. I’ve been feeling numb and like life is pointless. Like I’ve been through a lot of mental health treatment so this is the only place I can talk about this without someone putting me on a 5150. \n\nAnyway I’ve just been feeling empty. It’s not like I’m unhappy I’m just numb. Im kinda tired of living without any emotion. I don’t remember the last time I felt anything. \n\nI just don’t know what to do. Im kinda done trying. I just hope I can leave some money for my parents when I die because I know they’ve been trying but I just don’t want to be alive. \n\nThis is just thoughts but I felt like I needed to vent. Can yall give me some advice? Thanks.',
  'text': 'Need advice ### Hi, I’m 16 years old and I’m not sure what to do. I’ve been feeling numb and like life is pointless. Like I’ve been through a lot of mental health treatment so this is the only place I can talk about this without someone putting me on a 5150. Anyway I’ve just been feeling empty. It’s not like I’m unhappy I’m just numb. Im kinda tired of living without any emotion. I don’t remember the last time I felt anything. I just don’t know what to do. Im kinda done trying. I just hope I can leave some money for my parents when I die because I know they’ve been trying but I just don’t want to be alive. This is just thoughts but I felt like I needed to vent. Can yall give me some advice? Thanks.',
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-08-19 05:16:45',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 1111111},
 {'id': 'fly9i5',
  'title': 'The best PTSD advice I ever heard...',
  'post': "Was that I was trying to be who I was before the trauma, but that person doesn't exist anymore.",
  'text': "The best PTSD advice I ever heard... ### Was that I was trying to be who I was before the trauma, but that person doesn't exist anymore.",
  'upvotes': 680,
  'date': '2020-03-20 16:48:45',
  'emotions': ['emptiness'],
  'label_id': 100000},
 {'id': 's7p3io',
  'title': 'No, I don’t feel grateful for surviving the times I almost died.',
  'post': 'I am not thankful for being alive. My near death experience did not “open up my eyes” or made me “fully able to live”. It did not enhance my life in any sort of way. I wish I had died. I wish I had not survived. I’m sick of this romanticising of traumatic near death experiences.',
  'text': 'No, I don’t feel grateful for surviving the times I almost died. ### I am not thankful for being alive. My near death experience did not “open up my eyes” or made me “fully able to live”. It did not enhance my life in any sort of way. I wish I had died. I wish I had not survived. I’m sick of this romanticising of traumatic near death experiences.',
  'upvotes': 255,
  'date': '2022-01-19 12:30:54',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10110111},
 {'id': 'ecuv4i',
  'title': "It's like a switch just flips...",
  'post': "Through the lenses of a 45M / No Kids (Thank thee Gods):\n\nYou go through a divorce, for a while (individual mileage will vary) you feel a sense of existential loss. You spend time rediscovering who you are, what your value system is, what makes you tick. You go through the throes of heartbreak, depression and angst. You deal with the waves of emotions the best you can. You work on yourself (In what whatever way works best for you) to reorientate yourself in the world, you reignite your passions and belief systems.\n\nAnd then one day, it's like a switch just flips. You become happy again, you start living again. You no longer feel lost in the world. Truth be told, it does get better. Hang in there and live for you.\n\nJust wanted to put this out there because divorce is never easy, but there is light at the end of the tunnel, a very bright light.",
  'text': "It's like a switch just flips... ### Through the lenses of a 45M / No Kids (Thank thee Gods): You go through a divorce, for a while (individual mileage will vary) you feel a sense of existential loss. You spend time rediscovering who you are, what your value system is, what makes you tick. You go through the throes of heartbreak, depression and angst. You deal with the waves of emotions the best you can. You work on yourself (In what whatever way works best for you) to reorientate yourself in the world, you reignite your passions and belief systems. And then one day, it's like a switch just flips. You become happy again, you start living again. You no longer feel lost in the world. Truth be told, it does get better. Hang in there and live for you. Just wanted to put this out there because divorce is never easy, but there is light at the end of the tunnel, a very bright light.",
  'upvotes': 153,
  'date': '2019-12-19 15:41:14',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'py92ku',
  'title': "I'm a survivor of the Oct 1 Las Vegas Mass Shooting. And I am struggling as we approach the anniversary.",
  'post': "Usually I am okay I can live my life free of panic attacks. 4th of july gets me anxious but not overly so. However as it gets closer to Oct 1 any loud noise seems to trigger me. Someone honking next to my car can make my entire body shake and if I'm not careful I can slide into a crying panic attack with ease.\n\nI don't know why this is happening it's so frustrating I know I am safe and yet my entire body reacts so fiercely. I feel like I'm losing my mind and I Hate that this has been happening year after year despite making gains and recoveries everywhere else. Even just talking about this is setting me off... I don't know how else to vent.",
  'text': "I'm a survivor of the Oct 1 Las Vegas Mass Shooting. And I am struggling as we approach the anniversary. ### Usually I am okay I can live my life free of panic attacks. 4th of july gets me anxious but not overly so. However as it gets closer to Oct 1 any loud noise seems to trigger me. Someone honking next to my car can make my entire body shake and if I'm not careful I can slide into a crying panic attack with ease. I don't know why this is happening it's so frustrating I know I am safe and yet my entire body reacts so fiercely. I feel like I'm losing my mind and I Hate that this has been happening year after year despite making gains and recoveries everywhere else. Even just talking about this is setting me off... I don't know how else to vent.",
  'upvotes': 224,
  'date': '2021-09-30 01:06:55',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11010100},
 {'id': '17delw1',
  'title': 'Please, What do I do?',
  'post': "I've been struggling for over 4 years now. I feel like there's no hope, I've tried to commit about 4 times and I've wrote 3 suicide notes. I've just got into year 11 and things have never been worse. I feel as if the past years my life has been going more and more downhill and I just don't know what to do. I've tried to reach out and I've tried to get help but NOTHING seems to work, I've tired exercise and that didn't work, tired love and that failed twice, tried to reach out and got laughed at or ignored / forgotten. At this point I have 1 person and I'm worried there going to switch up on me now. I'm tired, angry, frustrated and depressed and I'm losing interest in everything and I just keep ruining everything. what do I do?",
  'text': "Please, What do I do? ### I've been struggling for over 4 years now. I feel like there's no hope, I've tried to commit about 4 times and I've wrote 3 suicide notes. I've just got into year 11 and things have never been worse. I feel as if the past years my life has been going more and more downhill and I just don't know what to do. I've tried to reach out and I've tried to get help but NOTHING seems to work, I've tired exercise and that didn't work, tired love and that failed twice, tried to reach out and got laughed at or ignored / forgotten. At this point I have 1 person and I'm worried there going to switch up on me now. I'm tired, angry, frustrated and depressed and I'm losing interest in everything and I just keep ruining everything. what do I do?",
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-21 22:43:34',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': 'vjo2xu',
  'title': 'Am I wrong',
  'post': 'So earlier this month my husband left me for someone else, he got all of his stuff and left. But now he is begging crying telling me that he wants to hurt himself because I don’t want to be with him and let him come back. He said that he doesn’t want to be with the girl anymore because she’s not like me. I told him I’m not ready to be with him right now and he is just trying to make it seem like I’m the one that did something. Am I wrong for not wanting him?',
  'text': 'Am I wrong ### So earlier this month my husband left me for someone else, he got all of his stuff and left. But now he is begging crying telling me that he wants to hurt himself because I don’t want to be with him and let him come back. He said that he doesn’t want to be with the girl anymore because she’s not like me. I told him I’m not ready to be with him right now and he is just trying to make it seem like I’m the one that did something. Am I wrong for not wanting him?',
  'upvotes': 125,
  'date': '2022-06-24 13:07:49',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10011111},
 {'id': 'mfb651',
  'title': 'I folded my laundry!',
  'post': 'It’s been 3 weeks since my boyfriend broke up with me. All I’ve done is cry. But today I cried and folded laundry! Woo! Small steps!',
  'text': 'I folded my laundry! ### It’s been 3 weeks since my boyfriend broke up with me. All I’ve done is cry. But today I cried and folded laundry! Woo! Small steps!',
  'upvotes': 553,
  'date': '2021-03-28 22:06:08',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10001100},
 {'id': 'jpt0gb',
  'title': 'A bit ago I was so worried about how badly my suicide would affect others. Now I’m starting to care less and less.',
  'post': 'When I die, that’s it for me. My life and conscious will be over and I won’t have any sort of cognitive abilities to even think of the outcome. People will be in hysterics at first but I know they’ll eventually move on. All I am is a burden, anyways. I make it harder for everyone who puts faith in me. I’m a dickhead and a fucking idiot. Maybe it won’t be now, but I hope once I’m gone, people will at least find peace in the long run. As for me, I feel like I’ll never reach that peace. I’m constantly at war with my own mind and it’s all so so tiring. I just to put my weary mind to rest. It hurts so much and I’m sorry.',
  'text': 'A bit ago I was so worried about how badly my suicide would affect others. Now I’m starting to care less and less. ### When I die, that’s it for me. My life and conscious will be over and I won’t have any sort of cognitive abilities to even think of the outcome. People will be in hysterics at first but I know they’ll eventually move on. All I am is a burden, anyways. I make it harder for everyone who puts faith in me. I’m a dickhead and a fucking idiot. Maybe it won’t be now, but I hope once I’m gone, people will at least find peace in the long run. As for me, I feel like I’ll never reach that peace. I’m constantly at war with my own mind and it’s all so so tiring. I just to put my weary mind to rest. It hurts so much and I’m sorry.',
  'upvotes': 710,
  'date': '2020-11-07 15:47:41',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 11110111},
 {'id': 'kjkccg',
  'title': 'I hate Christmas',
  'post': "I've always felt a lot lonelier during the holidays but more so this year. It's been quite a somber year overall and Christmas kind of served as a reminder of all the shit that had happened throughout the year. Lost a lot of connections this year and I'm finding it hard to ignore the itch to reach out to them but also feeling anxious of any possible confrontation that might happen. I never thought I would live with so many regrets and I'm not even 30 yet. I feel like I'm just a burden to the people who chose to stay in my life and im constantly worried that sooner or later I would lose them as well. This was such a terrible year and in some way reading the posts on this sub was oddly comforting and pretty much made me feel like I had company in one way or another. Thank you all. Merry Christmas, everyone.",
  'text': "I hate Christmas ### I've always felt a lot lonelier during the holidays but more so this year. It's been quite a somber year overall and Christmas kind of served as a reminder of all the shit that had happened throughout the year. Lost a lot of connections this year and I'm finding it hard to ignore the itch to reach out to them but also feeling anxious of any possible confrontation that might happen. I never thought I would live with so many regrets and I'm not even 30 yet. I feel like I'm just a burden to the people who chose to stay in my life and im constantly worried that sooner or later I would lose them as well. This was such a terrible year and in some way reading the posts on this sub was oddly comforting and pretty much made me feel like I had company in one way or another. Thank you all. Merry Christmas, everyone.",
  'upvotes': 20,
  'date': '2020-12-24 18:36:57',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101100},
 {'id': 'x8han2',
  'title': 'Does anyone else find the loss of their old life the hardest part?',
  'post': 'I can remember some of the awful stuff that happened over the years. But what gets every time is if something reminds me my old world is gone. \n\nIt seems there is a part of me just waiting for the day that ‘everything goes back to how it was’. \n\nI know that’s never going to happen, and it seems that truly accepting it’s gone is where the real hurt is.',
  'text': 'Does anyone else find the loss of their old life the hardest part? ### I can remember some of the awful stuff that happened over the years. But what gets every time is if something reminds me my old world is gone. It seems there is a part of me just waiting for the day that ‘everything goes back to how it was’. I know that’s never going to happen, and it seems that truly accepting it’s gone is where the real hurt is.',
  'upvotes': 132,
  'date': '2022-09-07 21:36:57',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'i3icwv',
  'title': 'How do you keep going?',
  'post': "Everything feels so meaningless. I want to find a job, meet new people and all that stuff.\n\nBut i don't have the energy for anything. I don't even have the energy to clean up my room.\n\nI hate myself for it, but i don't know how to get out of this.\n\nAll i do is sleep the whole day and dream about a better life.\n\nI feel pathetic and lost at the same time.\n\nI wish i could end everything right now, but i'm afraid of suicide (even more pathetic) so i have no other choice.",
  'text': "How do you keep going? ### Everything feels so meaningless. I want to find a job, meet new people and all that stuff. But i don't have the energy for anything. I don't even have the energy to clean up my room. I hate myself for it, but i don't know how to get out of this. All i do is sleep the whole day and dream about a better life. I feel pathetic and lost at the same time. I wish i could end everything right now, but i'm afraid of suicide (even more pathetic) so i have no other choice.",
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2020-08-04 12:23:45',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'fmgaji',
  'title': 'I’m sorry I wasn’t strong enough to stay until the end. Bye',
  'post': '[update](https://www.reddit.com/r/SuicideWatch/comments/fnbhgx/im_alive/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=ios_app&utm_name=iossmf)',
  'text': 'I’m sorry I wasn’t strong enough to stay until the end. Bye ### [update](https://www.reddit.com/r/SuicideWatch/comments/fnbhgx/im_alive/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=ios_app&utm_name=iossmf)',
  'upvotes': 609,
  'date': '2020-03-21 15:04:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'suicide intent', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10110},
 {'id': '17bskdq',
  'title': 'Literally never knew my entire life that I was depressed',
  'post': 'My entire life until now (20), I thought I was "normal". Because I\'ve always felt this way and I\'ve always just dealt with it on my own and never had anyone to speak to about it. But I started therapy and they told me i was depressed and was in total denial. It\'s so weird to me now. And especially knowing that other people don\'t feel this way.',
  'text': 'Literally never knew my entire life that I was depressed ### My entire life until now (20), I thought I was "normal". Because I\'ve always felt this way and I\'ve always just dealt with it on my own and never had anyone to speak to about it. But I started therapy and they told me i was depressed and was in total denial. It\'s so weird to me now. And especially knowing that other people don\'t feel this way.',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-10-19 20:20:11',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': '179ol2b',
  'title': 'I wish they never resuscitated me all those years ago.',
  'post': "I could have died a peaceful death, as a child none the wiser. It hurts so much. Now I'm left with a life where I have nothing to hope for. Nothing to look forward to. No one cares about me or is expecting me. Just typical, invisible. I'm too scared to do anything. What a coward I am. Cursed from the start.",
  'text': "I wish they never resuscitated me all those years ago. ### I could have died a peaceful death, as a child none the wiser. It hurts so much. Now I'm left with a life where I have nothing to hope for. Nothing to look forward to. No one cares about me or is expecting me. Just typical, invisible. I'm too scared to do anything. What a coward I am. Cursed from the start.",
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-10-17 03:06:33',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': '13rz6ar',
  'title': 'I just want to go live in the woods with my dog',
  'post': 'Nothing about society is calling me back. None of my friends talk to me anymore, I genuinely can’t stand being in public spaces. I can’t do the work I used to do, I can’t drive far. I just want to go live in the woods with my dog, maybe get another dog for him to play with, chop wood for the fire, grow my own flowers and vegetables. A small farmstead would be ideal. I feel like I could actually heal in an environment like that. Being left alone and being completely self sufficient.',
  'text': 'I just want to go live in the woods with my dog ### Nothing about society is calling me back. None of my friends talk to me anymore, I genuinely can’t stand being in public spaces. I can’t do the work I used to do, I can’t drive far. I just want to go live in the woods with my dog, maybe get another dog for him to play with, chop wood for the fire, grow my own flowers and vegetables. A small farmstead would be ideal. I feel like I could actually heal in an environment like that. Being left alone and being completely self sufficient.',
  'upvotes': 122,
  'date': '2023-05-26 01:13:06',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': '17dqx6n',
  'title': 'I’m lonely',
  'post': 'I don’t think I’ve been happy since I was 17 (9 years ago). I’m starting a new job and in all aspects I’m doing well. I just don’t know if I’m happy about all of it.',
  'text': 'I’m lonely ### I don’t think I’ve been happy since I was 17 (9 years ago). I’m starting a new job and in all aspects I’m doing well. I just don’t know if I’m happy about all of it.',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-10-22 11:12:08',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': '171btbt',
  'title': 'I can’t stop sleeping',
  'post': 'I fluctuate between sleeping 11-14 hours a night, then I spend the rest of the day in bed because I’m too exhausted to move around and do much. I’m a bit frustrated because I know the oversleeping is making me even more tired but I’m stuck in a vicious cycle. Mostly I don’t care enough to wake up or get out of bed. meds don’t really help, not unless they’re an SNRI and even then',
  'text': 'I can’t stop sleeping ### I fluctuate between sleeping 11-14 hours a night, then I spend the rest of the day in bed because I’m too exhausted to move around and do much. I’m a bit frustrated because I know the oversleeping is making me even more tired but I’m stuck in a vicious cycle. Mostly I don’t care enough to wake up or get out of bed. meds don’t really help, not unless they’re an SNRI and even then',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2023-10-06 13:05:02',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10000},
 {'id': '11wxcxb',
  'title': 'How do I stop being the toxic one?',
  'post': 'My (43F) husband (44M) went through a rough patch over the past six months. He works long hours and had some health issues, so he was just overall miserable. I knew what he was going through, so all that I asked was that he didn’t make things worse. Obviously, there were times that he did, and we were scared about his health, so things were tense for a while. \n\nI picked up some of the housework and cooking to help out. He eventually got better and things went back to normal. \n\nThe problem is that I’m used to walking on eggshells around him, and finding reasons to pick a fight as a defense mechanism. I know I’m being toxic. I was upfront and told him how I was feeling last night, and he apologized for making me feel that way when he wasn’t feeling great. \n\nSo how do I stop being the AH here? For clarity, this is a 20-year relationship that started off as two immature 23 year olds and has grown into a loving, successful relationship. I don’t want to backslide. Any tips?',
  'text': 'How do I stop being the toxic one? ### My (43F) husband (44M) went through a rough patch over the past six months. He works long hours and had some health issues, so he was just overall miserable. I knew what he was going through, so all that I asked was that he didn’t make things worse. Obviously, there were times that he did, and we were scared about his health, so things were tense for a while. I picked up some of the housework and cooking to help out. He eventually got better and things went back to normal. The problem is that I’m used to walking on eggshells around him, and finding reasons to pick a fight as a defense mechanism. I know I’m being toxic. I was upfront and told him how I was feeling last night, and he apologized for making me feel that way when he wasn’t feeling great. So how do I stop being the AH here? For clarity, this is a 20-year relationship that started off as two immature 23 year olds and has grown into a loving, successful relationship. I don’t want to backslide. Any tips?',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-03-20 21:55:22',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': '142tb41',
  'title': 'i think i’m going to kill myself tonight',
  'post': 'life has been really fucking shitty and i can’t seem to get better and i’m tired of always getting the shitty side of the stick from people even the ones that i love. i feel so fucking worthless all the time and all i wanna do ever is sleep. i hate myself fully, the way i look, my habits, interests, talk, the way i don’t seem to enjoy anything anymore. my dad is the only reason i have to live and it’s just not enough this world and life just isn’t for me.',
  'text': 'i think i’m going to kill myself tonight ### life has been really fucking shitty and i can’t seem to get better and i’m tired of always getting the shitty side of the stick from people even the ones that i love. i feel so fucking worthless all the time and all i wanna do ever is sleep. i hate myself fully, the way i look, my habits, interests, talk, the way i don’t seem to enjoy anything anymore. my dad is the only reason i have to live and it’s just not enough this world and life just isn’t for me.',
  'upvotes': 252,
  'date': '2023-06-06 21:08:15',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': 'so6w71',
  'title': 'How do you know you married a racist?',
  'post': 'A few days ago my husband approached me snarking about the fact that there\'s a Black History Month and no months for any other races, specifically citing "white history", "Asian history", and "\'Mexican\' history" (uh). To this I responded that there are history and appreciation months for groups of other ethnicities and races, and the fact that he doesn\'t know when they are shows that he\'s an idiot. Instead of accepting this information gracefully, he doubled down and said that it wasn\'t his fault that he didn\'t know when these other heritage appreciation months happened because everybody only ever makes a deal about Black History month.\n\nY\'all, I\'m Asian and Puerto Rican.\n\nAnyways, on a completely unrelated note, does anybody know how to dispose of meat? I\'ve got a 300 lb trash bag of bad meat and I\'m not quite sure how to ~~hide~~ get rid of it.',
  'text': 'How do you know you married a racist? ### A few days ago my husband approached me snarking about the fact that there\'s a Black History Month and no months for any other races, specifically citing "white history", "Asian history", and "\'Mexican\' history" (uh). To this I responded that there are history and appreciation months for groups of other ethnicities and races, and the fact that he doesn\'t know when they are shows that he\'s an idiot. Instead of accepting this information gracefully, he doubled down and said that it wasn\'t his fault that he didn\'t know when these other heritage appreciation months happened because everybody only ever makes a deal about Black History month. Y\'all, I\'m Asian and Puerto Rican. Anyways, on a completely unrelated note, does anybody know how to dispose of meat? I\'ve got a 300 lb trash bag of bad meat and I\'m not quite sure how to ~~hide~~ get rid of it.',
  'upvotes': 92,
  'date': '2022-02-09 06:38:59',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'brain dysfunction (forget)', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 11010000},
 {'id': '14aiknc',
  'title': 'Idk what to title this',
  'post': "I feel so alone, it's not even like I am alone because there are people who care and love me but I can't feel it, I don't hate myself, although, people saying that it seems so narcassistic these days, yet I still want to die, for myself, not for anyone else, I just don't like this never ending pain I'm in of just wanting to be loved wanting to be good enough, I put so much effort into every relationship I've ever had and yk what happened? I got left broke, traumatised and completely destroyed - not even a case of just dating people and ik it's different for guys from someone whos a woman but it's like nothing feels genuine either can't someone just love me for me? if I had nothing would people still want me? Friends moving on with their lives having kids all I've ever wanted that's all I want, but instead I'm just stuck in my house with a condition that lacks research or treatment and getting told you might never get better then reaching out in that time of need just to be thrown away like I? ;( ",
  'text': "Idk what to title this ### I feel so alone, it's not even like I am alone because there are people who care and love me but I can't feel it, I don't hate myself, although, people saying that it seems so narcassistic these days, yet I still want to die, for myself, not for anyone else, I just don't like this never ending pain I'm in of just wanting to be loved wanting to be good enough, I put so much effort into every relationship I've ever had and yk what happened? I got left broke, traumatised and completely destroyed - not even a case of just dating people and ik it's different for guys from someone whos a woman but it's like nothing feels genuine either can't someone just love me for me? if I had nothing would people still want me? Friends moving on with their lives having kids all I've ever wanted that's all I want, but instead I'm just stuck in my house with a condition that lacks research or treatment and getting told you might never get better then reaching out in that time of need just to be thrown away like I? ;(",
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-06-16 00:44:19',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': '16kl88g',
  'title': 'Wasting your life',
  'post': 'Someone once asked me whether I had given up on life and if I was okay with just wasting it away and ever since I\'ve been wondering, can you waste something that has no value? \n\nIf your life is a meaningless effort, and you don\'t add anything positive to someone else\'s life, society or your environment in general, and all that your depressed existence does is hurt or sadden your family, can it be really called a "waste"?',
  'text': 'Wasting your life ### Someone once asked me whether I had given up on life and if I was okay with just wasting it away and ever since I\'ve been wondering, can you waste something that has no value? If your life is a meaningless effort, and you don\'t add anything positive to someone else\'s life, society or your environment in general, and all that your depressed existence does is hurt or sadden your family, can it be really called a "waste"?',
  'upvotes': 105,
  'date': '2023-09-16 23:17:24',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 110101},
 {'id': '179tvri',
  'title': "I'm so lost.",
  'post': "I have no idea what I enjoy or what I'm fighting for. I can't imagine à future. I was a lost kid and now I'm a lost adult.",
  'text': "I'm so lost. ### I have no idea what I enjoy or what I'm fighting for. I can't imagine à future. I was a lost kid and now I'm a lost adult.",
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-10-17 08:53:36',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '14gzcc0',
  'title': 'Waking Up Extremely Depressed',
  'post': "Everyday I wake up Depressed, sometimes I cry & lay in my bed not wanting to get up or do anything. I'm tired of being alive & being a worthless human being. I just don't know what to do anymore, at this point I'm just lost.",
  'text': "Waking Up Extremely Depressed ### Everyday I wake up Depressed, sometimes I cry & lay in my bed not wanting to get up or do anything. I'm tired of being alive & being a worthless human being. I just don't know what to do anymore, at this point I'm just lost.",
  'upvotes': 155,
  'date': '2023-06-23 14:00:34',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '17dhtkq',
  'title': 'Could use a little advice.',
  'post': "Just looking for a little advice/understanding. \nI'm struggling with my anger atm. I've run out my anti-depressants and can't get more atm. I'm just wondering/hoping someone has some advice for dealing with anger that comes out of nowhere. You know? Your just angry before you realise it. Caused by little things.i just need some help/a sympathetic ear",
  'text': "Could use a little advice. ### Just looking for a little advice/understanding. I'm struggling with my anger atm. I've run out my anti-depressants and can't get more atm. I'm just wondering/hoping someone has some advice for dealing with anger that comes out of nowhere. You know? Your just angry before you realise it. Caused by little things.i just need some help/a sympathetic ear",
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-22 01:23:37',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10110000},
 {'id': '10cy84n',
  'title': 'Is the feeling of "it\'s too late" an integral component of depression? I remember thinking it was too late for me when I was 12.',
  'post': 'I\'m just wondering if anyone else has "it\'s too late" as a constant component of their depression. I distinctly remember sitting outside at lunchtime in Junior High and feeling like I was a failure and it was too late to be who I was supposed to be. That thought was obviously not an accurate assessment of reality at that early point in life, and it seems like it must have originated from chronic depression (which I already had been experiencing for many years). \n\nMaybe it\'s just one of the forms my depression takes, a offshoot or facet of the feeling of emptiness and hopelessness. "It\'s too late, it\'s hopeless, so there\'s no point doing anything" is a monster that I\'ve been (mostly unsuccessfully) fighting my whole life.',
  'text': 'Is the feeling of "it\'s too late" an integral component of depression? I remember thinking it was too late for me when I was 12. ### I\'m just wondering if anyone else has "it\'s too late" as a constant component of their depression. I distinctly remember sitting outside at lunchtime in Junior High and feeling like I was a failure and it was too late to be who I was supposed to be. That thought was obviously not an accurate assessment of reality at that early point in life, and it seems like it must have originated from chronic depression (which I already had been experiencing for many years). Maybe it\'s just one of the forms my depression takes, a offshoot or facet of the feeling of emptiness and hopelessness. "It\'s too late, it\'s hopeless, so there\'s no point doing anything" is a monster that I\'ve been (mostly unsuccessfully) fighting my whole life.',
  'upvotes': 112,
  'date': '2023-01-15 23:17:29',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '1793kj6',
  'title': "I feel like I'm killing myself little by little",
  'post': "It's horrible, just because I've lost all motivation to live, I don't go to class that often anymore And I know that a lot of absences will obstruct my future, but also, that while I stay at home I isolate myself... and therefore I continue to think in a loop about lots of negative things, which almost turns into suicidal thoughts from having almost nothing else in mind. And I can no longer count on anyone because I have also managed to lose everyone's trust... So I am now all alone, with a damaged future, a shattered past and a suffering present. I know that later I won't achieve anything because of this period of failure and that going back is impossible...",
  'text': "I feel like I'm killing myself little by little ### It's horrible, just because I've lost all motivation to live, I don't go to class that often anymore And I know that a lot of absences will obstruct my future, but also, that while I stay at home I isolate myself... and therefore I continue to think in a loop about lots of negative things, which almost turns into suicidal thoughts from having almost nothing else in mind. And I can no longer count on anyone because I have also managed to lose everyone's trust... So I am now all alone, with a damaged future, a shattered past and a suffering present. I know that later I won't achieve anything because of this period of failure and that going back is impossible...",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-16 11:14:57',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 11111111},
 {'id': '16qvagl',
  'title': 'Can someone talk to me?',
  'post': "I'm 17M and I need to talk to someone.",
  'text': "Can someone talk to me? ### I'm 17M and I need to talk to someone.",
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2023-09-24 11:21:23',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': 'edtwgl',
  'title': 'Anyone else alone for xmas/new years?',
  'post': 'How do you get through it?',
  'text': 'Anyone else alone for xmas/new years? ### How do you get through it?',
  'upvotes': 22,
  'date': '2019-12-21 19:08:32',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '17das8s',
  'title': 'Playing this would you rather game every semester',
  'post': 'Would you rather tell your teachers that you have depression, \n\nor would you rather keep your depression secret and be seen as lazy',
  'text': 'Playing this would you rather game every semester ### Would you rather tell your teachers that you have depression, or would you rather keep your depression secret and be seen as lazy',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-21 19:49:04',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '16vjd0i',
  'title': 'the gross parts of depression',
  'post': 'god i get SO disgusting when i’m really depressed. i just have no drive or energy to do anything, especially if it involves taking care of myself. i keep rewearing dirty clothes because i haven’t done laundry in weeks, haven’t brushed my teeth, sleeping with my makeup on, can barely get myself to shower, my room is vile, too depressed to even buy toilet paper so i just take a shit ton of toilet paper from the school bathrooms to keep at home. \n\nit just makes me hate myself more cus why am i like this lol',
  'text': 'the gross parts of depression ### god i get SO disgusting when i’m really depressed. i just have no drive or energy to do anything, especially if it involves taking care of myself. i keep rewearing dirty clothes because i haven’t done laundry in weeks, haven’t brushed my teeth, sleeping with my makeup on, can barely get myself to shower, my room is vile, too depressed to even buy toilet paper so i just take a shit ton of toilet paper from the school bathrooms to keep at home. it just makes me hate myself more cus why am i like this lol',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-09-29 18:30:05',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '12pq0v0',
  'title': 'Goodbye',
  'post': 'This is my final goodbye, if you’re reading this. I’m gonna kill myself. Depression is a cunt, i wish you all the best.',
  'text': 'Goodbye ### This is my final goodbye, if you’re reading this. I’m gonna kill myself. Depression is a cunt, i wish you all the best.',
  'upvotes': 130,
  'date': '2023-04-17 17:32:29',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1010110},
 {'id': 'mn5rlx',
  'title': 'Anyone else ever feel emotionally numb?',
  'post': "You've been abused a lot by your partner, but it just went too far this time. \n\nYou are so stressed out by the abuse, your entire body goes into shutdown.  Any sense of life, spirit and soul has been sucked out of you.\n\nYou completely lose your appetite, you can't think straight anymore, you don't really care if your abuser is still next to you. You don't want to stand up for yourself anymore. You don't really care about your abuser at all. You go throughout your day, not feeling anything. Like a robot.\n\nYou try and watch your favourite TV shows, but you can't feel anything but numbness. You go for a walk to cool off, but nothing is working. Food tastes bland and disgusting. You don't give a shit about your friends or family either.\n\n\nYou just don't *care* anymore.",
  'text': "Anyone else ever feel emotionally numb? ### You've been abused a lot by your partner, but it just went too far this time. You are so stressed out by the abuse, your entire body goes into shutdown. Any sense of life, spirit and soul has been sucked out of you. You completely lose your appetite, you can't think straight anymore, you don't really care if your abuser is still next to you. You don't want to stand up for yourself anymore. You don't really care about your abuser at all. You go throughout your day, not feeling anything. Like a robot. You try and watch your favourite TV shows, but you can't feel anything but numbness. You go for a walk to cool off, but nothing is working. Food tastes bland and disgusting. You don't give a shit about your friends or family either. You just don't *care* anymore.",
  'upvotes': 161,
  'date': '2021-04-09 00:44:22',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1111001},
 {'id': '17d9jub',
  'title': 'How does depression cloud your judgement of others?',
  'post': 'Interested in hearing how it affects other people.',
  'text': 'How does depression cloud your judgement of others? ### Interested in hearing how it affects other people.',
  'upvotes': 24,
  'date': '2023-10-21 18:51:56',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '111nez3',
  'title': 'anxious all the time',
  'post': "I don't know how to make it stop. I do my best to get through my day but it gets harder everyday and I just stay in my room 90% of my life. I wish I had the courage to see the world and go cool places and do cool stuff. But I can barely leave my house. Im in therapy, and go in person. And go to doctor appointments (a lot due to my chronic health issues)  aside from that, I just stay home. My friends come by and just hang out at my bedroom window. Because they know I don't want to *actually* hang out. It's too much. My best friend always comments that I'm too pale and need sun. But he understands I'm too anxious. He offers to walk with me, but I can't. I barely eat because eating makes me anxious. My house is always clean because I don't use any other rooms. I didn't used to be like this. I don't know where this came from.",
  'text': "anxious all the time ### I don't know how to make it stop. I do my best to get through my day but it gets harder everyday and I just stay in my room 90% of my life. I wish I had the courage to see the world and go cool places and do cool stuff. But I can barely leave my house. Im in therapy, and go in person. And go to doctor appointments (a lot due to my chronic health issues) aside from that, I just stay home. My friends come by and just hang out at my bedroom window. Because they know I don't want to *actually* hang out. It's too much. My best friend always comments that I'm too pale and need sun. But he understands I'm too anxious. He offers to walk with me, but I can't. I barely eat because eating makes me anxious. My house is always clean because I don't use any other rooms. I didn't used to be like this. I don't know where this came from.",
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-02-13 23:25:32',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10000},
 {'id': '147at2u',
  'title': 'Wish I could sleep forever.',
  'post': 'I don’t do anything,\nI constantly overthink,\nI feel like everybody hates me no matter how much they tell me otherwise, I’m such a loser. \n\nEverything is getting old and boring, suicidal thoughts went away for a bit, but now they’re back and I’m not sure what to do, binge watching shows/movies doesn’t work anymore, honestly for a second I thought I was getting better, guess not. \n\nIt’s not even like my life is terrible, I have a wonderful girlfriend, food and shelter, all the entertainment I could possibly need, so why do I still feel so\nempty? - why is it so hard to be happy and not want to end it all.  \n\nI just want to sleep but it feels impossible thanks to my insomnia.',
  'text': 'Wish I could sleep forever. ### I don’t do anything, I constantly overthink, I feel like everybody hates me no matter how much they tell me otherwise, I’m such a loser. Everything is getting old and boring, suicidal thoughts went away for a bit, but now they’re back and I’m not sure what to do, binge watching shows/movies doesn’t work anymore, honestly for a second I thought I was getting better, guess not. It’s not even like my life is terrible, I have a wonderful girlfriend, food and shelter, all the entertainment I could possibly need, so why do I still feel so empty? - why is it so hard to be happy and not want to end it all. I just want to sleep but it feels impossible thanks to my insomnia.',
  'upvotes': 257,
  'date': '2023-06-12 01:00:57',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'loneliness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1111111},
 {'id': '10b9qw7',
  'title': '22M international student in Germany and I have started to feel lonely',
  'post': "I moved to Germany 3 months ago. Since the beginning I have noticed that every student is for himself/herself - which seems reasonable because at the end your future is in your hands but lately things are going out of hand. I suppose people are not really interested to talk to me much - they hangout with me sometimes but I'm not a close friend to anyone but it kinda sucks now.",
  'text': "22M international student in Germany and I have started to feel lonely ### I moved to Germany 3 months ago. Since the beginning I have noticed that every student is for himself/herself - which seems reasonable because at the end your future is in your hands but lately things are going out of hand. I suppose people are not really interested to talk to me much - they hangout with me sometimes but I'm not a close friend to anyone but it kinda sucks now.",
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-01-14 00:00:06',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'mx7kp0',
  'title': 'Anyone else 100% disinterested in finding a new partner?',
  'post': 'They mean well, but I can’t stand when others suggest I’ll find someone who will treat me how I deserve. I’ve been hurt very badly and don’t want to risk that again. And I just don’t want it either. \n\nI’m also curious about those who have been divorced for a longer period. I imagine those thoughts change? What does that process feel like?',
  'text': 'Anyone else 100% disinterested in finding a new partner? ### They mean well, but I can’t stand when others suggest I’ll find someone who will treat me how I deserve. I’ve been hurt very badly and don’t want to risk that again. And I just don’t want it either. I’m also curious about those who have been divorced for a longer period. I imagine those thoughts change? What does that process feel like?',
  'upvotes': 185,
  'date': '2021-04-23 23:13:30',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': '11nazcf',
  'title': "i just want to be someone's favourite person.",
  'post': "i feel so worthless all the time. i'm not hated, but i'm always just... off to the side. forgettable, dismissed. i'm the kind of person people look at and see as their last choice. i'm never as important to them as they are to me. it hurts so much. when i'm not occupied with anything and i'm left to my own thoughts, there's this feeling of emptiness that weighs so heavily on me and cannot be filled. i just want to feel like i matter to someone. i want to know that someone truly cares for me. but instead not a day goes by where i don't feel worthless and unwanted.",
  'text': "i just want to be someone's favourite person. ### i feel so worthless all the time. i'm not hated, but i'm always just... off to the side. forgettable, dismissed. i'm the kind of person people look at and see as their last choice. i'm never as important to them as they are to me. it hurts so much. when i'm not occupied with anything and i'm left to my own thoughts, there's this feeling of emptiness that weighs so heavily on me and cannot be filled. i just want to feel like i matter to someone. i want to know that someone truly cares for me. but instead not a day goes by where i don't feel worthless and unwanted.",
  'upvotes': 273,
  'date': '2023-03-10 01:46:43',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'e98395',
  'title': 'Anyone else ever feel like there is something fundamentally wrong with them and that hampers them being successful socially?',
  'post': 'I guess when I compare myself to others I don’t understand why it is so hard for me to make/maintain friends; much less a gf.  \n\nI feel inferior to other people, like there is something wrong with me and when people see that , they leave.\n\nI don’t know what it is or how to fix it.\n\nI hate myself.',
  'text': 'Anyone else ever feel like there is something fundamentally wrong with them and that hampers them being successful socially? ### I guess when I compare myself to others I don’t understand why it is so hard for me to make/maintain friends; much less a gf. I feel inferior to other people, like there is something wrong with me and when people see that , they leave. I don’t know what it is or how to fix it. I hate myself.',
  'upvotes': 73,
  'date': '2019-12-11 14:55:26',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': '1790t9d',
  'title': 'I hate emotional attachments',
  'post': 'I get attached to quickly if anyone shows the smallest interest in me, I crack. I wait for them to respond, I wait and wait and wait despite that text message never coming through. I hate nothing more than talking to someone twice and then wait days for a response I should’ve given up on. Then I’ll get one in 3 days and all of the sudden I completely forget what happened days before. In that alone, surrounded by friends and alone. I see all these people that love me but I still feel alone… constantly',
  'text': 'I hate emotional attachments ### I get attached to quickly if anyone shows the smallest interest in me, I crack. I wait for them to respond, I wait and wait and wait despite that text message never coming through. I hate nothing more than talking to someone twice and then wait days for a response I should’ve given up on. Then I’ll get one in 3 days and all of the sudden I completely forget what happened days before. In that alone, surrounded by friends and alone. I see all these people that love me but I still feel alone… constantly',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-16 08:01:16',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': 'e8eabr',
  'title': 'u/administrativeRow2. Stop using these subreddits to promote and message people about your cbd.',
  'post': 'It’s pretty slimy to lurk mental health and depression subreddits just so you can dm certain people and suggest “this awesome product”.',
  'text': 'u/administrativeRow2. Stop using these subreddits to promote and message people about your cbd. ### It’s pretty slimy to lurk mental health and depression subreddits just so you can dm certain people and suggest “this awesome product”.',
  'upvotes': 384,
  'date': '2019-12-09 19:00:55',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 101},
 {'id': '1241csa',
  'title': 'Become an adult when you grew up with depression',
  'post': 'Hi All. \n\nFirst, sorry for my english. I\'m french (baguette). \n\nI struggle with depression since eight years. My birthday is in 4 days, I will turn 23 but I feel like I\'m still 15. Is there anyone here who can relate about it too ? I feel like depression stole my "teen years". It seems like my life just stopped. By the way, I\'m afraid about the fact that time flies. \n\nI have a therapist and I\'m going to tell her but I was wondering :  How did you started to feel like you are an adult ? How we can grow when we were alone with our own demons ? \n\nI know that I need to take my responsabilities (like having a job but god, it\'s hard for me to "take care of myself"). \n\n&#x200B;\n\nAny advice ? \n\n&#x200B;\n\nTake care of you all',
  'text': 'Become an adult when you grew up with depression ### Hi All. First, sorry for my english. I\'m french (baguette). I struggle with depression since eight years. My birthday is in 4 days, I will turn 23 but I feel like I\'m still 15. Is there anyone here who can relate about it too ? I feel like depression stole my "teen years". It seems like my life just stopped. By the way, I\'m afraid about the fact that time flies. I have a therapist and I\'m going to tell her but I was wondering : How did you started to feel like you are an adult ? How we can grow when we were alone with our own demons ? I know that I need to take my responsabilities (like having a job but god, it\'s hard for me to "take care of myself"). &#x200B; Any advice ? &#x200B; Take care of you all',
  'upvotes': 135,
  'date': '2023-03-27 21:33:41',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'hxsrwz',
  'title': 'We Broke Up',
  'post': 'My girlfriend and I broke up on Monday, and I feel a crazy sense of relief that is honestly making me feel guilty. I don\'t know if this post belongs here but I just needed to talk to people who understand what it\'s like to date someone who is so inherently unhappy with themselves. I read a quote in the last few days, while I\'ve been looking for hope, it said: "my darling, you cannot win battles against someone who is waging a war within themselves." \n\nI am still so sad, and afraid that I am going to lose her forever. But, I\'m trying to remember that this break, while incredibly painful, is perhaps the moment that we need to become the best versions of ourselves we can be. I don\'t know if this is going to be permanent or temporary I\'m just trying to stay hopeful and remember that we can grow and learn from this.',
  'text': 'We Broke Up ### My girlfriend and I broke up on Monday, and I feel a crazy sense of relief that is honestly making me feel guilty. I don\'t know if this post belongs here but I just needed to talk to people who understand what it\'s like to date someone who is so inherently unhappy with themselves. I read a quote in the last few days, while I\'ve been looking for hope, it said: "my darling, you cannot win battles against someone who is waging a war within themselves." I am still so sad, and afraid that I am going to lose her forever. But, I\'m trying to remember that this break, while incredibly painful, is perhaps the moment that we need to become the best versions of ourselves we can be. I don\'t know if this is going to be permanent or temporary I\'m just trying to stay hopeful and remember that we can grow and learn from this.',
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2020-07-25 19:37:59',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '146dus0',
  'title': 'Hi, I needed some help from people who have been through abusive relationships for a comic',
  'post': "TW: R4PE, D0MEST1C VI0LENC3\n\nHello, I'm writing the script for a future comic that talks about abusive relationships, overcoming these relationships and trusting someone again and I needed to hear reports from people who have been through these relationships.\n\nI didn't want to make this story just based on what I know about the topic and I wanted to hear from other people about what it's like to go through one to know how to properly represent my characters.\n\nThey are two main characters who went through abusive love relationships in different ways. One suffered d0mest1c vi0lenc3 and one was r4ped, and what I wanted to hear is how you feel after suffering something like that or while suffering it.\n\nDISCLAIMER: You don't have to tell me the story of what happened if you're not comfortable, I just wanted to know what kind of thoughts you got after the event, how you felt, or how you got over it.",
  'text': "Hi, I needed some help from people who have been through abusive relationships for a comic ### TW: R4PE, D0MEST1C VI0LENC3 Hello, I'm writing the script for a future comic that talks about abusive relationships, overcoming these relationships and trusting someone again and I needed to hear reports from people who have been through these relationships. I didn't want to make this story just based on what I know about the topic and I wanted to hear from other people about what it's like to go through one to know how to properly represent my characters. They are two main characters who went through abusive love relationships in different ways. One suffered d0mest1c vi0lenc3 and one was r4ped, and what I wanted to hear is how you feel after suffering something like that or while suffering it. DISCLAIMER: You don't have to tell me the story of what happened if you're not comfortable, I just wanted to know what kind of thoughts you got after the event, how you felt, or how you got over it.",
  'upvotes': 0,
  'date': '2023-06-10 23:01:53',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'qhf9c3',
  'title': 'Serious Question: has anybody in this sub found a healthy baseline with their partner’s depression in their relationship?',
  'post': 'I’m asking because I’d like to hear some success stories around people making it work.',
  'text': 'Serious Question: has anybody in this sub found a healthy baseline with their partner’s depression in their relationship? ### I’m asking because I’d like to hear some success stories around people making it work.',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2021-10-28 04:50:55',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '16sz2ai',
  'title': 'I feel like I have no one to talk to',
  'post': "I feel so lonely.  I'm severely depressed.  Things aren't going good for me. I'm lonely as hell. I don't know what to do. I feel ugly inside and out. Hardly any friends.",
  'text': "I feel like I have no one to talk to ### I feel so lonely. I'm severely depressed. Things aren't going good for me. I'm lonely as hell. I don't know what to do. I feel ugly inside and out. Hardly any friends.",
  'upvotes': 13,
  'date': '2023-09-26 20:31:05',

   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',

   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11111111},
 {'id': 'hrr53q',
  'title': 'does anyone wish their parent would just die',
  'post': "Personally I'm at the point where I wish my mother would just die. She's had many health problems due to her own warped mind, including a brain haemorrhage, I am now at a stage where I wish she would just have one again and die from it this time.\n\nPlease be careful how you act towards your children, these people don't even seem to realise the damage and hatred/disgust they cause.",
  'text': "does anyone wish their parent would just die ### Personally I'm at the point where I wish my mother would just die. She's had many health problems due to her own warped mind, including a brain haemorrhage, I am now at a stage where I wish she would just have one again and die from it this time. Please be careful how you act towards your children, these people don't even seem to realise the damage and hatred/disgust they cause.",
  'upvotes': 110,
  'date': '2020-07-15 16:49:32',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10000110},
 {'id': 'pw70th',
  'title': 'Waking up alone sucks',
  'post': 'Yup, im all alone and nothing to share with 🥲 \n\nAm I meant to be this lonely?',
  'text': 'Waking up alone sucks ### Yup, im all alone and nothing to share with 🥲 Am I meant to be this lonely?',
  'upvotes': 25,
  'date': '2021-09-27 01:37:28',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'fvz8oy',
  'title': 'I just want to feel wanted.',
  'post': "Like someone needs me around.\nI'm definitely a giver, I like to give to people.. but no one wants what I can give. \nI'm a very caring person, during this pandemic I've reached out to everyone I know, especially to those who may be struggling more than others. But no one has reached out to me in return.. \nI just want to feel like I'm needed on this earth. \nI'm unlikely to catch this virus, I live alone and I have no reason to leave the house at the moment, but if I did and I got really sick, I know no one would care.",
  'text': "I just want to feel wanted. ### Like someone needs me around. I'm definitely a giver, I like to give to people.. but no one wants what I can give. I'm a very caring person, during this pandemic I've reached out to everyone I know, especially to those who may be struggling more than others. But no one has reached out to me in return.. I just want to feel like I'm needed on this earth. I'm unlikely to catch this virus, I live alone and I have no reason to leave the house at the moment, but if I did and I got really sick, I know no one would care.",
  'upvotes': 35,
  'date': '2020-04-06 14:00:29',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': 'jdfeit',
  'title': 'Victim of wife abandonment syndrome...it’s a thing',
  'post': 'This is apparently where a husband (who you’ve been married to for a long while) up and leaves with no word or action that he was unhappy. My husband left 6 weeks ago just like this. Everything was announced to me about him being unhappy and needing to be “on his own” and then poof, he was gone. Very quick. No hesitation. He’s not on his own, of course. He already had someone lined up. \n\nOur daughter is devastated. She’s only 11. I’m sick from crying. I don’t even know why I cry anymore. He doesn’t care. He went from sweet loving husband to monster, and I never saw it coming. At this point, my daughter won’t even speak to him on the phone because he’s so verbally abusive. He just expects her to accept all this and be fine. \n\nI’ve hired a lawyer. I’m divorcing his narcissistic ass and I hope this new “person” in his life ends up doing the same. \n\nThis is sick and I’m done.',
  'text': 'Victim of wife abandonment syndrome...it’s a thing ### This is apparently where a husband (who you’ve been married to for a long while) up and leaves with no word or action that he was unhappy. My husband left 6 weeks ago just like this. Everything was announced to me about him being unhappy and needing to be “on his own” and then poof, he was gone. Very quick. No hesitation. He’s not on his own, of course. He already had someone lined up. Our daughter is devastated. She’s only 11. I’m sick from crying. I don’t even know why I cry anymore. He doesn’t care. He went from sweet loving husband to monster, and I never saw it coming. At this point, my daughter won’t even speak to him on the phone because he’s so verbally abusive. He just expects her to accept all this and be fine. I’ve hired a lawyer. I’m divorcing his narcissistic ass and I hope this new “person” in his life ends up doing the same. This is sick and I’m done.',
  'upvotes': 150,
  'date': '2020-10-18 12:20:55',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'emptiness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 110101},
 {'id': 'kcwpp4',
  'title': 'Today is my birthday and I feel so lonely.',
  'post': 'Edit: Thank you kind strangers for the birthday wishes. It means a lot to me.',
  'text': 'Today is my birthday and I feel so lonely. ### Edit: Thank you kind strangers for the birthday wishes. It means a lot to me.',
  'upvotes': 581,
  'date': '2020-12-14 12:26:16',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': '12lyx0b',
  'title': "You know that feeling when you're so sad you can physically feel the pain in your chest?",
  'post': "Does anyone else get that feeling when they think about dying?  \nLike my body is aching desperately for relief.  \nI'm homesick for the grave.",
  'text': "You know that feeling when you're so sad you can physically feel the pain in your chest? ### Does anyone else get that feeling when they think about dying? Like my body is aching desperately for relief. I'm homesick for the grave.",
  'upvotes': 750,
  'date': '2023-04-14 14:22:20',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'suicide intent', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11110},
 {'id': '179mm78',
  'title': "I've been trying for a decade and yet...",
  'post': 'I\'m just depressed. Nothing more I guess.\n\nBeen on meds for a while. Going to gerapy twice a week. Been doing this shit almost a decade now.\n\nStill depressed. I thought at 19, "I\'m so young, I\'ve got somuch time don\'t waste it" and that\'s what kept me going and out of the hospital ya know?\n\nNow I\'m almost 30. Did everything I thought I wanted. It\'s just as bad. I\'m still hurting so badly inside. I will never not be fat. I will never be loved the way I want or need. Will I accomplish my dreams? Probably not. \n\nBeen through it all. Heard it all. Done everything suggested and even some not. Still nothing helps. I end up in the same place. \n\nOh well. Don\'t think there\'s much worth staying for but I will if only to keep my friends and family from the pain. Funny. I know they love me. I love them. But it feels like I\'m on fire and all they can do is mist me with water.\n\nThis fuckin sucks.',
  'text': 'I\'ve been trying for a decade and yet... ### I\'m just depressed. Nothing more I guess. Been on meds for a while. Going to gerapy twice a week. Been doing this shit almost a decade now. Still depressed. I thought at 19, "I\'m so young, I\'ve got somuch time don\'t waste it" and that\'s what kept me going and out of the hospital ya know? Now I\'m almost 30. Did everything I thought I wanted. It\'s just as bad. I\'m still hurting so badly inside. I will never not be fat. I will never be loved the way I want or need. Will I accomplish my dreams? Probably not. Been through it all. Heard it all. Done everything suggested and even some not. Still nothing helps. I end up in the same place. Oh well. Don\'t think there\'s much worth staying for but I will if only to keep my friends and family from the pain. Funny. I know they love me. I love them. But it feels like I\'m on fire and all they can do is mist me with water. This fuckin sucks.',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-10-17 01:29:55',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': '12mg9ew',
  'title': "I don't know what's wrong with me",
  'post': "Recently my friends have not been talking to me, my girlfriend and I are also likely to brake up soon. I don't mind the brake up as we have fallen out of love. But my friends, these are people I have known for 5 years and have now all left me. I now sit alone all day, and fall asleep. I don't know what's wrong with me.",
  'text': "I don't know what's wrong with me ### Recently my friends have not been talking to me, my girlfriend and I are also likely to brake up soon. I don't mind the brake up as we have fallen out of love. But my friends, these are people I have known for 5 years and have now all left me. I now sit alone all day, and fall asleep. I don't know what's wrong with me.",
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-04-14 22:37:14',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': 'hxu6x8',
  'title': 'Mom sad after i blocked her 😢',
  'post': 'My mom is cosigned on my old checking account (i was 15 at the time so legally i needed a cosigner.) I totally forgot about it until she called me the other day. \n\nIve been NC with my parents for around 6 months now. My parents have been trying to get me to meet up and talk to them for awhile now. \n\nMy mom got fed up and somehow got my phone number. She told me if i didn\'t agree to meet up with her, shes drain my bank account. After i told her id take her to court, she replied with "id love to see you afford a lawyer sweetie." \n\nI called the bank and blocked her after. She keeps sending me emails saying she\'s sad I blocked her and how "mean and abusive" I\'ve become.',
  'text': 'Mom sad after i blocked her 😢 ### My mom is cosigned on my old checking account (i was 15 at the time so legally i needed a cosigner.) I totally forgot about it until she called me the other day. Ive been NC with my parents for around 6 months now. My parents have been trying to get me to meet up and talk to them for awhile now. My mom got fed up and somehow got my phone number. She told me if i didn\'t agree to meet up with her, shes drain my bank account. After i told her id take her to court, she replied with "id love to see you afford a lawyer sweetie." I called the bank and blocked her after. She keeps sending me emails saying she\'s sad I blocked her and how "mean and abusive" I\'ve become.',
  'upvotes': 86,
  'date': '2020-07-25 21:03:07',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'loneliness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10011100},
 {'id': 'g7qupp',
  'title': '[Rant] Stupid question',
  'post': 'Everytime I tell people I have PTSD, they immediately ask what happened and what traumatised me, and I’m like???????????????????????????????????????????????????????????\n\n\nDO. YOU. HAVE. A. MOTHERFUCKING. BRAIN??????????????\n\nSeriously are you stupid ffs?\n\nI’m sure I’m not the only that faced this before. I’m so annoyed.\n\n\nEdit: there’s only 4 simple sentence on this post, without any background info whatsoever and some of y’all manage to write assumption about me and my story. Maybe you should use this talent to write a book or something.',
  'text': '[Rant] Stupid question ### Everytime I tell people I have PTSD, they immediately ask what happened and what traumatised me, and I’m like??????????????????????????????????????????????????????????? DO. YOU. HAVE. A. MOTHERFUCKING. BRAIN?????????????? Seriously are you stupid ffs? I’m sure I’m not the only that faced this before. I’m so annoyed. Edit: there’s only 4 simple sentence on this post, without any background info whatsoever and some of y’all manage to write assumption about me and my story. Maybe you should use this talent to write a book or something.',
  'upvotes': 195,
  'date': '2020-04-25 09:35:26',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'u1ly8z',
  'title': 'One Person',
  'post': 'Honestly, when I think about what would be nice, it’d be really nice to have just that one person who I could be myself around and talk about anything with and you could count on. I’m just kind of venting here, but I’ve always kinda envied that. Not the large groups and stuff. The close connection with a sibling or a friend. That would be nice. If that makes sense.',
  'text': 'One Person ### Honestly, when I think about what would be nice, it’d be really nice to have just that one person who I could be myself around and talk about anything with and you could count on. I’m just kind of venting here, but I’ve always kinda envied that. Not the large groups and stuff. The close connection with a sibling or a friend. That would be nice. If that makes sense.',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2022-04-12 00:25:32',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10001000},
 {'id': '13k914w',
  'title': 'Who is to blame here?',
  'post': "My kids dad randomly brought me a oldish looking vanity table and said it was my mother's day gift. I just rearrange my room and my make up desk and super happy with how everything looks and I've told him before I don't like mirrors in my room. I've never told him I wanted a vanity table. He is also a hoarder and like to bring home random shit he finds and supposedly is gonna sell but just sits in the house forever. Once I saw the table I said well what am I gonna do with this or where would I even put this? (He just put it in our living room) and he said we'll it's your mother's day gift and your being really ungrateful why don't you get rid of your dresser to make room for it? \n\nLIKE WTF. Am I being ungrateful or is he just an asshole?!",
  'text': "Who is to blame here? ### My kids dad randomly brought me a oldish looking vanity table and said it was my mother's day gift. I just rearrange my room and my make up desk and super happy with how everything looks and I've told him before I don't like mirrors in my room. I've never told him I wanted a vanity table. He is also a hoarder and like to bring home random shit he finds and supposedly is gonna sell but just sits in the house forever. Once I saw the table I said well what am I gonna do with this or where would I even put this? (He just put it in our living room) and he said we'll it's your mother's day gift and your being really ungrateful why don't you get rid of your dresser to make room for it? LIKE WTF. Am I being ungrateful or is he just an asshole?!",
  'upvotes': 0,
  'date': '2023-05-17 17:54:29',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': 'zmy3vk',
  'title': 'nothing in this world is relevant enough',
  'post': "Some People just hesitate with any situation, just being too impulsive or mad or crying for any bad situation\nAt the end of the day nothing never matters, in some years in the future we all are going to be dead and nobody is going to remember your actions, not all people achieve their goals, a big part of the society are just useless numbers in this world, so don't get hesitate about dumb things, improve yourself just for your own happiness and not for other peoples opinion or approval.",
  'text': "nothing in this world is relevant enough ### Some People just hesitate with any situation, just being too impulsive or mad or crying for any bad situation At the end of the day nothing never matters, in some years in the future we all are going to be dead and nobody is going to remember your actions, not all people achieve their goals, a big part of the society are just useless numbers in this world, so don't get hesitate about dumb things, improve yourself just for your own happiness and not for other peoples opinion or approval.",
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2022-12-15 22:24:29',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': '16zl0nd',
  'title': 'Feelings in chest?',
  'post': 'When I get depressed, I usually feel a "dark" feeling in my chest, usually when I think about dying. It\'s kind of hard to explain, it\'s like how I assume dread feels like. Then the other one, the "tingling" one. This usually happens when I get really emotional and usually when I talk down to myself, "I\'m worthless", "nobody likes me", etc. This one\'s easier to explain, the tingling sensation starts with my heart and then spreads to my skin, mostly in my arms. I was just wondering what these mean and if anyone else experiences this.',
  'text': 'Feelings in chest? ### When I get depressed, I usually feel a "dark" feeling in my chest, usually when I think about dying. It\'s kind of hard to explain, it\'s like how I assume dread feels like. Then the other one, the "tingling" one. This usually happens when I get really emotional and usually when I talk down to myself, "I\'m worthless", "nobody likes me", etc. This one\'s easier to explain, the tingling sensation starts with my heart and then spreads to my skin, mostly in my arms. I was just wondering what these mean and if anyone else experiences this.',
  'upvotes': 26,
  'date': '2023-10-04 11:45:52',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1},
 {'id': 'j1b5km',
  'title': 'I wish I died when I was a happy child',
  'post': 'This way I would not  have to experience loss, depression, disappointment, desperation and endless suffering eventually resulting in suicide',
  'text': 'I wish I died when I was a happy child ### This way I would not have to experience loss, depression, disappointment, desperation and endless suffering eventually resulting in suicide',
  'upvotes': 978,
  'date': '2020-09-28 12:35:20',
