 {'id': '125ev4d',
  'title': 'It was never gonna be you',
  'post': 'Not even my type seriously 😭',
  'text': 'It was never gonna be you ### Not even my type seriously 😭',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-03-29 06:05:02',

 {'id': 'uj4pbx',
  'title': 'I went out in a skirt today!!',
  'post': "My childhood is filled with a lot of trauma around visual attractiveness, SA, sexism, etc. To the point where I've rejected all things feminine for almost 20 years.\n\n2 years ago I finally bought my first dress in years  \n\n1 year ago I worked up the courage to wear it when out with others (less public confrontation risk)\n\nToday, I went out in a skirt alone \n\nAnd I had not a single catcall or leer or touch \n\nI was able to just exist and breathe the fresh air\n\nI saw so many others wearing dresses and skirts too, all of us wearing what we like and suits the weather\n\nIts so simple but so empowering \n\nI went out in a skirt today :)",
  'text': "I went out in a skirt today!! ### My childhood is filled with a lot of trauma around visual attractiveness, SA, sexism, etc. To the point where I've rejected all things feminine for almost 20 years. 2 years ago I finally bought my first dress in years 1 year ago I worked up the courage to wear it when out with others (less public confrontation risk) Today, I went out in a skirt alone And I had not a single catcall or leer or touch I was able to just exist and breathe the fresh air I saw so many others wearing dresses and skirts too, all of us wearing what we like and suits the weather Its so simple but so empowering I went out in a skirt today :)",
  'upvotes': 222,
  'date': '2022-05-05 19:06:20',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '16ezglb',
  'title': 'Just want to disappear.',
  'post': "Why do we have to live in a society? As a community, as a family? Why can't we just wander off to nowhere? Why are we forever chasing something? Why can't we just stay in our comfort zone? Why do we have to struggle? Why each person expect something from other? Why can't we just live and die free?",
  'text': "Just want to disappear. ### Why do we have to live in a society? As a community, as a family? Why can't we just wander off to nowhere? Why are we forever chasing something? Why can't we just stay in our comfort zone? Why do we have to struggle? Why each person expect something from other? Why can't we just live and die free?",
  'upvotes': 100,

 {'id': 'q6nyzd',
  'title': 'What the heck is going on today? :(',
  'post': 'So far this morning I\'ve removed and banned multiple trolls for calling all women whores and another for blaming the \'j e w s\' for all the world\'s problems.  Now every other posts has a "DM me" on it which I can only assume is going to lead to dick pics at some point.  \n\nIf you see these kind of things report them and move on.  Divorce is hard enough without also trying to take care of a Troll.  Ignore them so they can impotently rage in mom\'s basement.\n\nAlso for the record if you\'re a happily married lurker you\'re either looking for opportunities to be an asshole or YOU\'RE NOT HAPPILY MARRIED.\n\nSINCERELY\n\nModerator who is too irritated this morning.',
  'text': 'What the heck is going on today? :( ### So far this morning I\'ve removed and banned multiple trolls for calling all women whores and another for blaming the \'j e w s\' for all the world\'s problems.  {'id': '10dbb2l',
  'title': 'Getting a divorce allowed me to realize I’m one tough motherfucker. I don’t feel inclined to be a part of a group or please everyone. Losing relationships is a part of life. And THAT IS OK.',
  'post': 'You know you can exist just fine without the safe story you held on to. And mourning the life you thought you would have is ok, you’ll realize you’re actually mourning a story you created and it isn’t real. But you have love inside your heart. And it’ll keep you going. No matter what.',
  'text': 'Getting a divorce allowed me to realize I’m one tough motherfucker. I don’t feel inclined to be a part of a group or please everyone. Losing relationships is a part of life. And THAT IS OK. ### You know you can exist just fine without the safe story you held on to. And mourning the life you thought you would have is ok, you’ll realize you’re actually mourning a story you created and it isn’t real. But you have love inside your heart. And it’ll keep you going. No matter what.',
  'upvotes': 183,
  'date': '2023-01-16 10:34:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'mm19ws',
  'title': 'Staying alive for other people is so fucking hard',

  'text': "Staying alive for other people is so fucking hard ### I just wish they didn't exist so leaving would be easier for me.",

  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': 'zzasre',
  'title': 'Oh the classic feeling of being beyond bored and yet not interested in doing anything',
  'post': 'Anything productive: \n\ntoo much work\n\nAnything lazy/casual fun like playing video games or watching tv: \n\nCan’t do more than 2 minutes without my brain going “find something else”\n\nAnything social: \n\nKeeping the mask up would be too exhausting',
  'text': 'Oh the classic feeling of being beyond bored and yet not interested in doing anything ### Anything productive: too much work Anything lazy/casual fun like playing video games or watching tv: Can’t do more than 2 minutes without my brain going “find something else” Anything social: Keeping the mask up would be too exhausting',
  'upvotes': 164,
  'date': '2022-12-30 20:35:43',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1111001},
 {'id': 'vjvpyt',
  'title': 'Is this a red flag from a therapist? I came in for a specific kind of sexual abuse and she’s spouting positivity shit to me',
  'post': 'I told her in the beginning I was coming in as a victim of trafficking and so far in 2 out of 4 sessions she felt the need to tell me how “sx work is work” and she “supports consensual sx work” and even said “I know you think that wasn’t consensual” like no I don’t think that I know it wasn’t. What the hell is this?',
  'text': 'Is this a red flag from a therapist? I came in for a specific kind of sexual abuse and she’s spouting positivity shit to me ### I told her in the beginning I was coming in as a victim of trafficking and so far in 2 out of 4 sessions she felt the need to tell me how “sx work is work” and she “supports consensual sx work” and even said “I know you think that wasn’t consensual” like no I don’t think that I know it wasn’t. What the hell is this?',
  'upvotes': 343,
  'date': '2022-06-24 18:59:41',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness', 'anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010001},
 {'id': '14smqik',
  'title': 'Am I overreacting or should I be scared?',
  'post': 'I have a 4 month old baby with my boyfriend and a few weeks back baby went floppy and I went into panic mode, anyway we got baby up to A&E but before that my bf was being horrible to me saying I should know better because I’m a nurse etc (I’m an adult nurse and never covered children’s nursing) so I hit the brakes and told him to get out, he then leaned over and grabbed me by my collar and screamed at me saying I could have broken baby’s neck. (He’s rear facing and I wasn’t going fast at all maybe 15mph coming out of our road) I panicked and cried telling him to let go of me etc, and to this day he’s never apologised to me. \n\nHe’s got an awful temper, hitting things and throwing things, granted not at me but it frightens me and I don’t want my sweet little boy to grow up around that. But nothing is his fault it feels like he always blames other people and doesn’t take ownership',
  'text': 'Am I overreacting or should I be scared? ### I have a 4 month old baby with my boyfriend and a few weeks back baby went floppy and I went into panic mode, anyway we got baby up to A&E but before that my bf was being horrible to me saying I should know better because I’m a nurse etc (I’m an adult nurse and never covered children’s nursing) so I hit the brakes and told him to get out, he then leaned over and grabbed me by my collar and screamed at me saying I could have broken baby’s neck. (He’s rear facing and I wasn’t going fast at all maybe 15mph coming out of our road) I panicked and cried telling him to let go of me etc, and to this day he’s never apologised to me. He’s got an awful temper, hitting things and throwing things, granted not at me but it frightens me and I don’t want my sweet little boy to grow up around that. But nothing is his fault it feels like he always blames other people and doesn’t take ownership',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-07-06 21:39:44',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': '170x0xe',
  'title': 'Feeling lonely and alone',
  'post': "I'm so jealous of people in happy marriages, relationships to the point that I broke down sobbing after session tonight. \n\nI'm so tired of being depressed, alone and lonely. It hurts to my soul.",
  'text': "Feeling lonely and alone ### I'm so jealous of people in happy marriages, relationships to the point that I broke down sobbing after session tonight. I'm so tired of being depressed, alone and lonely. It hurts to my soul.",

 {'id': 'xkn0nx',
  'title': 'Need help immediately',
  'post': 'My gf has been laying in bed all day (not sleeping) just staring at that wall and crying. She won’t talk to me and trying to get her to eat just makes her cry more. Please help.',
  'text': 'Need help immediately ### My gf has been laying in bed all day (not sleeping) just staring at that wall and crying. She won’t talk to me and trying to get her to eat just makes her cry more. Please help.',
  'upvotes': 11,

 {'id': 'ls0bku',
  'title': 'Thinking about suicide comforts me.',
  'post': "In the last 3-4 years, I started to have suicidal ideations.  I am an alcoholic, have ADHD, and have pretty much ruined my life in every aspect.  The alcohol is the only thing I truly enjoy.   I'm 44 now and have accepted that I will not be able to get married and raise a family.   I can't keep a job or a relationship long enough.  I am bankrupt.  I can only get low-paying menial jobs that I get sick of very quick.  \n\nI will either drink myself to death or jump off a bridge before my 50th birthday.   When I think about my fate, I am comforted.  I don't have to live in my personal hell if I don't want to.  Knowing I can end things on my terms whenever I decide brings relief. \n\nAnyone else feel better when they think about suicide?",
  'text': "Thinking about suicide comforts me. ### In the last 3-4 years, I started to have suicidal ideations. I am an alcoholic, have ADHD, and have pretty much ruined my life in every aspect. The alcohol is the only thing I truly enjoy. I'm 44 now and have accepted that I will not be able to get married and raise a family. I can't keep a job or a relationship long enough. I am bankrupt. I can only get low-paying menial jobs that I get sick of very quick. I will either drink myself to death or jump off a bridge before my 50th birthday. When I think about my fate, I am comforted. I don't have to live in my personal hell if I don't want to. Knowing I can end things on my terms whenever I decide brings relief. Anyone else feel better when they think about suicide?",
  'upvotes': 739,
  'date': '2021-02-25 06:45:29',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1010010},
 {'id': '179v9ax',
  'title': 'I wanna drop out of school',
  'post': "Hi. I missed 2 weeks of school already and next week is our exams and because of my depression I haven't been able to do any homeworks, projects, and other school things. I wanna drop out because I cannot do school rn but I still wanna finish everything. Sometimes I wanna kms because I felt like that would solve my problems with school. I love school and im a honor student but Im depressed and cant even brush my teeth. I just really need advices right now. Thank you",
  'text': "I wanna drop out of school ### Hi. I missed 2 weeks of school already and next week is our exams and because of my depression I haven't been able to do any homeworks, projects, and other school things. I wanna drop out because I cannot do school rn but I still wanna finish everything. Sometimes I wanna kms because I felt like that would solve my problems with school. I love school and im a honor student but Im depressed and cant even brush my teeth. I just really need advices right now. Thank you",
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-17 10:30:50',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'q6mqt6',
  'title': 'Educate yourself!',
  'post': "Hi all, just wanted to say that please educate yourself about this mental disorder. If left untreated it can be deadly and really destroy lives. \nWhatever your partners are going through **isn't** their fault at all and it's neither your fault. \nYou need a lot of work for this and patience too. \nRemember that there will be days when you'll feel horrible and unloved and frustrated because they cannot understand or do anything at all. \nBut also remember that it's not really in their hands. Help them do their work if possible, give them all your love and support, be with them, make sure that they take their medicines on time and visit the doctors on time, and do everything else but fight with them because of the things this disorder makes them do. \n\n\nObviously I'm saying all this from my experience, feel free to add more points if needed. \nOhh and **most** importantly, don't forget to take care of yourself. You matter too.",
  'text': "Educate yourself! ### Hi all, just wanted to say that please educate yourself about this mental disorder. If left untreated it can be deadly and really destroy lives. Whatever your partners are going through **isn't** their fault at all and it's neither your fault. You need a lot of work for this and patience too. Remember that there will be days when you'll feel horrible and unloved and frustrated because they cannot understand or do anything at all. But also remember that it's not really in their hands. Help them do their work if possible, give them all your love and support, be with them, make sure that they take their medicines on time and visit the doctors on time, and do everything else but fight with them because of the things this disorder makes them do. Obviously I'm saying all this from my experience, feel free to add more points if needed. Ohh and **most** importantly, don't forget to take care of yourself. You matter too.",
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2021-10-12 13:56:25',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '179mhei',
  'title': 'Does it get better like ever?',
  'post': 'Will we ever feel the happiness we deserve ? Why does it rain the hardest on the kindest of hearts? Why do I feel like I wanna bleed out on the bathroom floor? Why do I have to suffer while I always try to help people? All I wanted was to be happy for once. I watch the people around me be effortlessly happy even though they treat others like pieces of dirt. I treat people with respect and modesty but people make me wanna bleed out. Why is life like this? What type of world is this?',
  'text': 'Does it get better like ever? ### Will we ever feel the happiness we deserve ? Why does it rain the hardest on the kindest of hearts? Why do I feel like I wanna bleed out on the bathroom floor? Why do I have to suffer while I always try to help people? All I wanted was to be happy for once. I watch the people around me be effortlessly happy even though they treat others like pieces of dirt. I treat people with respect and modesty but people make me wanna bleed out. Why is life like this? What type of world is this?',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-17 01:23:11',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'yq3dev',
  'title': 'Anyone else feels like something changed after the pandemic?',
  'post': 'Ik a lot of ppl were feeling lonely during the pandemic, but does anyone else feels like this feeling doesn’t go away? \n\nIts like something changed. Idk how to explain but everything feels different now. I still feel lonely, and it doesn’t matter how much I try to go out. It even seems like my family is more distant now even tho we are having family gatherings again? \n\nIt also doesn’t help that I basically became an adult during the pandemic, and entered college shortly after it was ending. \n\nStill, I can’t shake the feeling that something is wrong. Everything from before seems so distant too. Idk how to explain honestly… I basically still feel isolated. Does anyone else feel the same?',
  'text': 'Anyone else feels like something changed after the pandemic? ### Ik a lot of ppl were feeling lonely during the pandemic, but does anyone else feels like this feeling doesn’t go away? Its like something changed. Idk how to explain but everything feels different now. I still feel lonely, and it doesn’t matter how much I try to go out. It even seems like my family is more distant now even tho we are having family gatherings again? It also doesn’t help that I basically became an adult during the pandemic, and entered college shortly after it was ending. Still, I can’t shake the feeling that something is wrong. Everything from before seems so distant too. Idk how to explain honestly… I basically still feel isolated. Does anyone else feel the same?',
  'upvotes': 402,
  'date': '2022-11-09 00:24:00',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},

 {'id': '81u5ce',
  'title': 'To All You People Starting Divorce - The Other Side Is AWESOME!!!',
  'post': "Only regret is I didn't divorce her earlier. Stayed in it too long for the kid. Takes awhile to get over the depression but it does go away and the people I am meeting are 10x better than my ex.\n\nHang tough, people. Divorce is amazing after the initial shock, IMHO!!!\n\n",
  'text': "To All You People Starting Divorce - The Other Side Is AWESOME!!! ### Only regret is I didn't divorce her earlier. Stayed in it too long for the kid. Takes awhile to get over the depression but it does go away and the people I am meeting are 10x better than my ex. Hang tough, people. Divorce is amazing after the initial shock, IMHO!!!",
  'upvotes': 119,
  'date': '2018-03-04 00:10:00',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'khy1hm',
  'title': 'Is it normal to heavily doubt your trauma?',
  'post': 'I was recently diagnosed with PTSD but I guess I’ve just been told none of it happened so often that I have trouble even accepting them as real events. I hardly remember anything until I have a panic attack so it’s hard to prove myself to anyone anyhow. It’s strange, and I don’t know how to describe it. I feel like I know it happened, I have a diagnosis and a shit ton of trauma after all, but the other half of me refuses to accept it. Is this ‘normal’?',
  'text': 'Is it normal to heavily doubt your trauma? ### I was recently diagnosed with PTSD but I guess I’ve just been told none of it happened so often that I have trouble even accepting them as real events. I hardly remember anything until I have a panic attack so it’s hard to prove myself to anyone anyhow. It’s strange, and I don’t know how to describe it. I feel like I know it happened, I have a diagnosis and a shit ton of trauma after all, but the other half of me refuses to accept it. Is this ‘normal’?',
  'upvotes': 179,
  'date': '2020-12-22 04:27:39',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1},
 {'id': 'dly1a8',
  'title': '16M can I tell my therapist about my suicidal thoughts without him telling my parents?',
  'post': 'I don’t want to go to a mental hospital\n\nEdit: I talked to my therapist and he told me he is going to tell my parents. I appreciate everyone trying to help me, but I just don’t see things getting better.',
  'text': '16M can I tell my therapist about my suicidal thoughts without him telling my parents? ### I don’t want to go to a mental hospital Edit: I talked to my therapist and he told me he is going to tell my parents. I appreciate everyone trying to help me, but I just don’t see things getting better.',

 {'id': 'p8dqj3',
  'title': 'Why does loneliness cause you to shop so much?',
  'post': "I notice how much I shop more because I'm lonely. I don't even need half of the stuff I buy but have this craving all the time.  In the end I still feel lonely and unsatisfied but the initial purchase gave me a high.",
  'text': "Why does loneliness cause you to shop so much? ### I notice how much I shop more because I'm lonely. I don't even need half of the stuff I buy but have this craving all the time. In the end I still feel lonely and unsatisfied but the initial purchase gave me a high.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2021-08-20 20:52:52',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '16ung4v',
  'title': "It doesn't hurt when I cut myself anymore",
  'post': "I just want everything to stop, nobody cares about me, they all act like they do but they don't. I'm done with everything.  {'id': '17bmulm',
  'title': "I feel like I can't heal",
  'post': "I've been taking medicine for my depression and anxiety and I was getting better so the doctor started to decrease dosage of my meds and I'm starting to feel bad again, like gradually getting bad. I don't want to be on meds forever but I feel like I have to.",
  'text': "I feel like I can't heal ### I've been taking medicine for my depression and anxiety and I was getting better so the doctor started to decrease dosage of my meds and I'm starting to feel bad again, like gradually getting bad. I don't want to be on meds forever but I feel like I have to.",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-19 16:12:55',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': '1718xkv',
  'title': 'Is it normal for depression to slow you down?',
  'post': "I've noticed I've been getting physically and mentally slower after I lost my job last year. \n\nI used to walk at a frantic pace but my walking speed has decreased \\~20%. People have also noted that I talk kind of slow, like Eeyore from Winnie the Pooh.\n\nI'm also not as sharp as I used to be. I did a math degree in 3 years, comp sci in 2.5, and went through a starup accelerator program at an Ivy League medical school while still in undergrad. I used to wrap my identity around being 'smart' but now I'm an actual fucking moron. Maybe a lot of it is due to insomnia and weed, but it's doesn't get better when I quit weed and actually sleep.\n\nI know that severe depressions (which I've had for over a decade) can cause psychomotor retardation, but I don't understand why it's hitting me now. I've seen a bunch of doctors and ruled out any physical causes.",
  'text': "Is it normal for depression to slow you down? ### I've noticed I've been getting physically and mentally slower after I lost my job last year. I used to walk at a frantic pace but my walking speed has decreased \\~20%. People have also noted that I talk kind of slow, like Eeyore from Winnie the Pooh. I'm also not as sharp as I used to be. I did a math degree in 3 years, comp sci in 2.5, and went through a starup accelerator program at an Ivy League medical school while still in undergrad. I used to wrap my identity around being 'smart' but now I'm an actual fucking moron. Maybe a lot of it is due to insomnia and weed, but it's doesn't get better when I quit weed and actually sleep. I know that severe depressions (which I've had for over a decade) can cause psychomotor retardation, but I don't understand why it's hitting me now. I've seen a bunch of doctors and ruled out any physical causes.",
  'upvotes': 38,
  'date': '2023-10-06 10:38:32',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'd9cau1',
  'title': 'My mom attempting to make a "deal" with me this morning.',
  'post': 'I was pouring some doritos in a ziploc and she kept trying to help me, and I told her that I didn\'t need help. She responded with "fine. I\'m just trying to help." And I again, told her I didn\'t need help. She then says "fine. But the second you drop one of those chips, I\'m allowed to smack you." I said "no, your not." She said "ha. Yeah. I am. It\'s a deal." This just went back and forth for a while till I just walked away. I wanted to fucking scream at her so bad. But then I DEFINITELY would have gotten hit. Or she would have cried and said "I just want to help youuuuuu!" So I didn\'t.',
  'text': 'My mom attempting to make a "deal" with me this morning. ### I was pouring some doritos in a ziploc and she kept trying to help me, and I told her that I didn\'t need help. She responded with "fine. I\'m just trying to help." And I again, told her I didn\'t need help. She then says "fine. But the second you drop one of those chips, I\'m allowed to smack you." I said "no, your not." She said "ha. Yeah. I am. It\'s a deal." This just went back and forth for a while till I just walked away. I wanted to fucking scream at her so bad. But then I DEFINITELY would have gotten hit. Or she would have cried and said "I just want to help youuuuuu!" So I didn\'t.',
  'upvotes': 93,
  'date': '2019-09-26 00:51:05',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 't80rkl',
  'title': 'Aside from therapy, what has been most healing for you?',
  'post': 'Does anyone have any other strategies they’ve used/currently use, that help them manage their trauma or PTSD symptoms? Anything at all. No judgment\n\nSpecial note: a big thank you to everyone who has or who will reply to this. I’ve read every single response and I appreciate them all. Thanks everyone here for creating a safe space and for being so kind to me and each other. Over the years, this sub has been incredibly helpful for me when I’ve felt at my most alone',
  'text': 'Aside from therapy, what has been most healing for you? ### Does anyone have any other strategies they’ve used/currently use, that help them manage their trauma or PTSD symptoms? Anything at all. No judgment Special note: a big thank you to everyone who has or who will reply to this. I’ve read every single response and I appreciate them all. Thanks everyone here for creating a safe space and for being so kind to me and each other. Over the years, this sub has been incredibly helpful for me when I’ve felt at my most alone',
  'upvotes': 127,
  'date': '2022-03-06 15:13:22',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '10kry6z',
  'title': 'A bad marriage',
  'post': "A bad marriage can take your life.a bad marriage can financially abuse you.a bad marriage can destroy your life.nothing can be expected from the other side.a marriage shouldn't be like this.a bad marriage can make u more lonely.",
  'text': "A bad marriage ### A bad marriage can take your life.a bad marriage can financially abuse you.a bad marriage can destroy your life.nothing can be expected from the other side.a marriage shouldn't be like this.a bad marriage can make u more lonely.",

 {'id': '16gbp08',
  'title': 'Nobody is ever actually interested in me',
  'post': 'I hate how fake people are. I feel like anyone who’s seemed romantically interested in me has just been using me for something. Every time, they get close to me and get what they want and then leave. It’s really fucked up my sense of self worth. I’m learning how to be content with being alone, because I can’t bear to have more promises that will inevitably be broken. I don’t think anyone has ever genuinely cared about me or liked me. I don’t think anyone ever will. I think they’ve only liked the idea of me, because the actual me is either too little or too much. People are shit',
  'text': 'Nobody is ever actually interested in me ### I hate how fake people are. I feel like anyone who’s seemed romantically interested in me has just been using me for something. Every time, they get close to me and get what they want and then leave. It’s really fucked up my sense of self worth. I’m learning how to be content with being alone, because I can’t bear to have more promises that will inevitably be broken. I don’t think anyone has ever genuinely cared about me or liked me. I don’t think anyone ever will. I think they’ve only liked the idea of me, because the actual me is either too little or too much. People are shit',
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2023-09-11 23:53:28',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '17dfqri',
  'title': 'Don’t See A Way Out Of This Depression',
  'post': 'And it sucks. My negative thoughts took over my mind throughout the day. And I don’t know what to think anymore. \n\nI’ve been struggling so much for too long. And I’m sick of it. Every time I try to make things better, my efforts blow up in my face. So I’m tired of trying. So very tired of trying.\n\nThat’s all I got. I’m too exhausted to think more.',
  'text': 'Don’t See A Way Out Of This Depression ### And it sucks. My negative thoughts took over my mind throughout the day. And I don’t know what to think anymore. I’ve been struggling so much for too long. And I’m sick of it. Every time I try to make things better, my efforts blow up in my face. So I’m tired of trying. So very tired of trying. That’s all I got. I’m too exhausted to think more.',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-21 23:37:34',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 11110101},
 {'id': '10mikkv',
  'title': 'My sister just realized how bad our childhood was',
  'post': 'A little while ago, I (m28) accidentally told my sister (f24) that our dad used be physically violent towards me. She broke down completely, because that’s not the dad she knows. \n\nOur biological mom was there, and offered to pay for any and all therapy, which is great, our public mental health system is not the best. My sister declined. She didn’t have a bad upbringing. \n\nThen she starts sending me all these videos describing different ways of abuse. Meal restrictions, emotional neglect, fearing your parents etc. I ask if she feels attacked by these, since she’s sending them to me, and she says yes.\n\nI’ve noticed her changing since I told her about our dad, and then yesterday she asked my opinion on whether or not she might have an eating disorder. I told her, as gently as I could, that I’ve known she has one for a long time, and what might have caused it. \n\nI am both devastated and relieved… it’s been hard protecting her from the reality for all these years, but it feels good not to be alone with it anymore..',
  'text': 'My sister just realized how bad our childhood was ### A little while ago, I (m28) accidentally told my sister (f24) that our dad used be physically violent towards me. She broke down completely, because that’s not the dad she knows. Our biological mom was there, and offered to pay for any and all therapy, which is great, our public mental health system is not the best. My sister declined. She didn’t have a bad upbringing. Then she starts sending me all these videos describing different ways of abuse. Meal restrictions, emotional neglect, fearing your parents etc. I ask if she feels attacked by these, since she’s sending them to me, and she says yes. I’ve noticed her changing since I told her about our dad, and then yesterday she asked my opinion on whether or not she might have an eating disorder. I told her, as gently as I could, that I’ve known she has one for a long time, and what might have caused it. I am both devastated and relieved… it’s been hard protecting her from the reality for all these years, but it feels good not to be alone with it anymore..',
  'upvotes': 77,
  'date': '2023-01-27 11:24:46',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '13ci08x',
  'title': 'Such a fucking loser',
  'post': 'How did I even end up here? Begging for attention on Reddit, praying that somebody will help me. I just feel like running away from everything; I want this to be over soon.',
  'text': 'Such a fucking loser ### How did I even end up here? Begging for attention on Reddit, praying that somebody will help me. I just feel like running away from everything; I want this to be over soon.',
  'upvotes': 95,
  'date': '2023-05-09 06:51:26',

   'hopelessness',

   'loneliness',
   'sadness',

 {'id': 'smudm0',
  'title': 'Sex',
  'post': "Ok I know this is a topic over and over again. My boyfriend does not initiate sex and withdraws when I try to. I told him I will not accept a relationship without sex and he said he is working on it. \n\nI just don't see it. He doesn't kiss me passionately, he doesn't kiss my body or touch me besides hugs. \n\nHow long do I wait? \nHe likes power play, should I just take his hand and tie him up like I used to or if he is not in the mood that will worsen things?\n\nAlso I am getting tired - every time it's all about his sleep, his mood, it all revolves around that and I am tiptoeing. \n\nShould I just ignore it when he says he is tired and just make a joke to distract him? Where is this fine line, I want him to feel comfortable and open up but still I don't want our whole vibe to be around his tiredness and depression",
  'text': "Sex ### Ok I know this is a topic over and over again. My boyfriend does not initiate sex and withdraws when I try to. I told him I will not accept a relationship without sex and he said he is working on it. I just don't see it. He doesn't kiss me passionately, he doesn't kiss my body or touch me besides hugs. How long do I wait? He likes power play, should I just take his hand and tie him up like I used to or if he is not in the mood that will worsen things? Also I am getting tired - every time it's all about his sleep, his mood, it all revolves around that and I am tiptoeing. Should I just ignore it when he says he is tired and just make a joke to distract him? Where is this fine line, I want him to feel comfortable and open up but still I don't want our whole vibe to be around his tiredness and depression",
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2022-02-07 16:34:09',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '134m93o',
  'title': 'I can finally look at myself in the mirror.',
  'post': "Man if feels good to like the body you're possessing. Finally excercising paying off, feels seeing yourself getting bigger, not being ashamed to be seen with out shits, even face skin slowly looking better and better, wish tho that all it would take is looking good to be good enough for anyone, well at least I'm now good enough for myself with a body good enough to die in. ❤️\n\nIt feels so strange tho not to be discussted by my own reflection.",
  'text': "I can finally look at myself in the mirror. ### Man if feels good to like the body you're possessing. Finally excercising paying off, feels seeing yourself getting bigger, not being ashamed to be seen with out shits, even face skin slowly looking better and better, wish tho that all it would take is looking good to be good enough for anyone, well at least I'm now good enough for myself with a body good enough to die in. ❤️ It feels so strange tho not to be discussted by my own reflection.",
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-05-01 13:16:58',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10},
 {'id': 'ce72sg',
  'title': 'Unworthy of a diagnosis',
  'post': "Sometimes I can't help but feel like I don't deserve to be diagnosed with PTSD. I can't help but compare my situation with that of veterans, domestic violence survivors or rape survivors feel like I don't deserve to be as traumatized by what happened to me as I am.\nI had a college classmate that I was becoming friendly with, come up behind me, grab me by my throat and drag me backwards, completely unprovoked. My college refused to protect me and tried to get him a private attorney to fight my charges against him in court.\nIt's hard being so young with a PTSD diagnosis because everyone, myself included, is inclined to dismiss me and say I'm too young to have gone through enough trauma to induce PTSD.\nDoes anyone have some advice for how to overcome this feeling?\n\nEdit: Thank you so much for the gold! Seriously made a darker day brighter :)",
  'text': "Unworthy of a diagnosis ### Sometimes I can't help but feel like I don't deserve to be diagnosed with PTSD. I can't help but compare my situation with that of veterans, domestic violence survivors or rape survivors feel like I don't deserve to be as traumatized by what happened to me as I am. I had a college classmate that I was becoming friendly with, come up behind me, grab me by my throat and drag me backwards, completely unprovoked. My college refused to protect me and tried to get him a private attorney to fight my charges against him in court. It's hard being so young with a PTSD diagnosis because everyone, myself included, is inclined to dismiss me and say I'm too young to have gone through enough trauma to induce PTSD. Does anyone have some advice for how to overcome this feeling? Edit: Thank you so much for the gold! Seriously made a darker day brighter :)",
  'upvotes': 109,
  'date': '2019-07-17 02:54:45',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1},
 {'id': 'ep5jga',
  'title': "I've become so accustomed to the fact that I'm going to kill myself that other people's struggles with suicide don't register to me much",
  'post': 'Because I think about it so much I just see them as another person like me. It also makes me feel like everyone is like me, so if I went to kill myself and people were around nobody would care.',
  'text': "I've become so accustomed to the fact that I'm going to kill myself that other people's struggles with suicide don't register to me much ### Because I think about it so much I just see them as another person like me. It also makes me feel like everyone is like me, so if I went to kill myself and people were around nobody would care.",
  'upvotes': 666,
  'date': '2020-01-15 17:46:19',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111},
 {'id': 'm1dywp',
  'title': 'I don’t feel any emotion',
  'post': 'This is my first post on Reddit, I haven’t felt emotion in a long time I just feel hollow/empty. I drink to try and feel something but still nothing I’m only 20 and in university but just feels like nothing matters\nDoes anybody else feel like this ?',
  'text': 'I don’t feel any emotion ### This is my first post on Reddit, I haven’t felt emotion in a long time I just feel hollow/empty. I drink to try and feel something but still nothing I’m only 20 and in university but just feels like nothing matters Does anybody else feel like this ?',
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2021-03-09 19:20:56',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'worthlessness', 'hopelessness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111001},
 {'id': 'c92mmx',
  'title': 'Yelling is the scariest thing....',
  'post': 'People loud in public? Scary. But usually manageable. "That person is happy/frustrated/ angry over there. It\'s got nothing to do with me."\n\nA loved one shouting? Unmanageable. Terrifying. 0 to 100 fear. "Oh no. I am the worst person to have ever lived. I cannot believe I had the audacity to be in the way or to even exist at all. I need to do everything I can to apologize and be good."\n\nI\'m so sick of being afraid and turning that into anger at myself for being scared at basically nothing.\n\nI\'m really just venting here to get some of ny energy outwards instead of turning it in on myself.... Thanks for reading <3\n\n[Note: Not yelling *at* me. Just yelling near me. Especially in an enclosed space, like a room.]\n\n\nEdit: This post got much more attention than I expected! I am so grateful because I know I\'m not alone. And also so heartbroken for you all. Thank you for your kind words. Please know I\'m sending all that good energy right back to you <3',
  'text': 'Yelling is the scariest thing.... ### People loud in public? Scary. But usually manageable. "That person is happy/frustrated/ angry over there. It\'s got nothing to do with me." A loved one shouting? Unmanageable. Terrifying. 0 to 100 fear. "Oh no. I am the worst person to have ever lived. I cannot believe I had the audacity to be in the way or to even exist at all. I need to do everything I can to apologize and be good." I\'m so sick of being afraid and turning that into anger at myself for being scared at basically nothing. I\'m really just venting here to get some of ny energy outwards instead of turning it in on myself.... Thanks for reading <3 [Note: Not yelling *at* me. Just yelling near me. Especially in an enclosed space, like a room.] Edit: This post got much more attention than I expected! I am so grateful because I know I\'m not alone. And also so heartbroken for you all. Thank you for your kind words. Please know I\'m sending all that good energy right back to you <3',
  'upvotes': 248,
  'date': '2019-07-04 13:31:19',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': '17dk4o9',
  'title': 'I just want to relapse every time I think about my problems',
  'post': "In this past month I been trying to fix my life getting 8 hours of sleep, working out, eating healthy, trying to be the best person I can to my family, Friends, and academic, trying to be strong physically, mentally, and emotionally but HOLY FUCKING SHIT IT'S HARD like every time I think about my promblems I just wonder why do I even try like is my life always gonna be like this always trying to fix my self and Wondering what am I doing wrong with my life and don't get me started with my shit family and friends evertime I think about there past mistake I like why am I still trying to build a relationship with this shit mother fucker I'm going to cut this mother fucker off my life I swear and school is shit fuck school I fucking hate this shit like I'm not even happy when I got a high score but Im so disappointed in my self if I get a bad score. My life is so exhausting sometimes I just feel this is all gonna end If I die.",
  'text': "I just want to relapse every time I think about my problems ### In this past month I been trying to fix my life getting 8 hours of sleep, working out, eating healthy, trying to be the best person I can to my family, Friends, and academic, trying to be strong physically, mentally, and emotionally but HOLY FUCKING SHIT IT'S HARD like every time I think about my promblems I just wonder why do I even try like is my life always gonna be like this always trying to fix my self and Wondering what am I doing wrong with my life and don't get me started with my shit family and friends evertime I think about there past mistake I like why am I still trying to build a relationship with this shit mother fucker I'm going to cut this mother fucker off my life I swear and school is shit fuck school I fucking hate this shit like I'm not even happy when I got a high score but Im so disappointed in my self if I get a bad score. My life is so exhausting sometimes I just feel this is all gonna end If I die.",
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-22 03:27:52',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10010111},
 {'id': 'ytajxf',
  'title': 'might spend some time here',
  'post': "I've been keenly aware of feeling extremely lonely over the past few weeks. Usually I'm pretty solitary in general, but lately it actually, physically hurts. I'm honestly kind of touch starved too, I keep fantasizing about being held or cuddled.\n\nI've been struggling with motivation and drive, even something like binging a playlist doesn't interest me anymore. I was meaning to go out today, maybe do some shopping, hole up in a coffee shop to work on an idea I had and will never follow up with, or just finish some online stuff. Maybe writing here will help me find that drive.",
  'text': "might spend some time here ### I've been keenly aware of feeling extremely lonely over the past few weeks. Usually I'm pretty solitary in general, but lately it actually, physically hurts. I'm honestly kind of touch starved too, I keep fantasizing about being held or cuddled. I've been struggling with motivation and drive, even something like binging a playlist doesn't interest me anymore. I was meaning to go out today, maybe do some shopping, hole up in a coffee shop to work on an idea I had and will never follow up with, or just finish some online stuff. Maybe writing here will help me find that drive.",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2022-11-12 15:46:26',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1111100},
 {'id': 'qqek2g',
  'title': 'Is this shit just humiliating for anyone else?',
  'post': 'I’ve always considered myself to be a strong and rational person. I can’t believe I’ve ended up in this situation. It’s embarrassing as fuck.',
  'text': 'Is this shit just humiliating for anyone else? ### I’ve always considered myself to be a strong and rational person. I can’t believe I’ve ended up in this situation. It’s embarrassing as fuck.',
  'upvotes': 237,
  'date': '2021-11-09 22:04:07',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10000001},
 {'id': 'ipqwaf',
  'title': 'I just realized I’m not lazy, I’m emotionally shutdown',
  'post': 'Just venting:\n\nI’ve been fortunate enough to have five days scheduled off from work. But during this time, I laid around and didn’t do anything productive *even though I wanted to*.\n\n\nToday it dawned on me that I’m struggling doing tasks because of issues relating to executive dysfunction, from being emotionally shutdown and numb. \n\nI’m temporarily living with a relative that is causing my PTSD symptoms to, “come out.” And these past five days have been difficult with her. We’re stuck together because of finances. I have no idea when I will be able to leave.',
  'text': 'I just realized I’m not lazy, I’m emotionally shutdown ### Just venting: I’ve been fortunate enough to have five days scheduled off from work. But during this time, I laid around and didn’t do anything productive *even though I wanted to*. Today it dawned on me that I’m struggling doing tasks because of issues relating to executive dysfunction, from being emotionally shutdown and numb. I’m temporarily living with a relative that is causing my PTSD symptoms to, “come out.” And these past five days have been difficult with her. We’re stuck together because of finances. I have no idea when I will be able to leave.',
  'upvotes': 224,
  'date': '2020-09-09 22:38:11',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 110100},
 {'id': 'ewrbhr',
  'title': 'No food until the kitchen is spotless',
  'post': 'My (F19) mom is kinda crazy. She’ll snap at me for everything. I’ve developed anxiety because she always had the highest standards set for me. So today she went for a 20 minute walk and expected me and my 6 year old sister to clean the whole kitchen by the time she returned. \n\nM: WHY ISNT IT CLEAN?!\n\nMe: there was only two of-\n\nM: STOP THE EXCUSES IT ONLY TAKES ONE OF US TO FUCKING CLEAN IT. THERE’S NO FOOD UNTIL YOU HACE IT CLEANED! \n\nShe then began to threaten me and say she’ll kick me out because I didn’t clean her entire kitchen and refused to take shit from my stepdad. So that’s fun! So is the anxiety! She doesn’t even care either. She’d rather make me feel shitty than care about how I feel.',
  'text': 'No food until the kitchen is spotless ### My (F19) mom is kinda crazy. She’ll snap at me for everything. I’ve developed anxiety because she always had the highest standards set for me. So today she went for a 20 minute walk and expected me and my 6 year old sister to clean the whole kitchen by the time she returned. M: WHY ISNT IT CLEAN?! Me: there was only two of- M: STOP THE EXCUSES IT ONLY TAKES ONE OF US TO FUCKING CLEAN IT. THERE’S NO FOOD UNTIL YOU HACE IT CLEANED! She then began to threaten me and say she’ll kick me out because I didn’t clean her entire kitchen and refused to take shit from my stepdad. So that’s fun! So is the anxiety! She doesn’t even care either. She’d rather make me feel shitty than care about how I feel.',
  'upvotes': 34,
  'date': '2020-01-31 16:59:22',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': '17agp3n',
  'title': 'Genuinely what is the point?',
  'post': "This economy is fucked, I'm unemployed, rent is insane, the cost of food makes me feel sick. Am I (24f) just gonna be living with my parents clinically depressed for the rest of my life?",
  'text': "Genuinely what is the point? ### This economy is fucked, I'm unemployed, rent is insane, the cost of food makes me feel sick. Am I (24f) just gonna be living with my parents clinically depressed for the rest of my life?",
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-18 03:10:42',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': '128qlkz',
  'title': "I hope I don't live long.",
  'post': '.......',
  'text': "I hope I don't live long. ### .......",
  'upvotes': 114,
  'date': '2023-04-01 16:05:03',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10011110},
 {'id': '17dtgu5',
  'title': "It's taking too long to die. I don't want to wait. I'm tired of it all.",
  'post': 'Man I feel like I’ve been through it all and I’m only 19. I kind of don’t want to see the next chapter. Not going to lie, it’s been hell. I think it’s best I just take a graceful exit than live through more pain and dark days. I miss my dad and the old days so much. The joy has been sucked out of pretty much everything the last couple years of my life. I’ve been feeling numb and just like I’m surviving and not really living anymore. It’s like I’m not human. And I don’t really matter. I won’t move ahead anytime in the near future. Just had my car stolen but it’s all good. I don’t think I’ll be here much longer. I wonder if many others feel the same. It’s crazy because I was feeling optimistic and better about life a week ago. It’s funny how it can change all of a sudden.',
  'text': "It's taking too long to die. I don't want to wait. I'm tired of it all. ### Man I feel like I’ve been through it all and I’m only 19. I kind of don’t want to see the next chapter. Not going to lie, it’s been hell. I think it’s best I just take a graceful exit than live through more pain and dark days. I miss my dad and the old days so much. The joy has been sucked out of pretty much everything the last couple years of my life. I’ve been feeling numb and just like I’m surviving and not really living anymore. It’s like I’m not human. And I don’t really matter. I won’t move ahead anytime in the near future. Just had my car stolen but it’s all good. I don’t think I’ll be here much longer. I wonder if many others feel the same. It’s crazy because I was feeling optimistic and better about life a week ago. It’s funny how it can change all of a sudden.",
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-10-22 13:36:41',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'suicide intent',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'shhi1n',
  'title': "I've lost all motivation",
  'post': "I get to where I feel frozen or paralyzed.  I have things I need to do but I just feel frozen when I think of doing them.  Right now I just feel so heavy but like I'm in a state of shock.  I don't know if it is all caused by loneliness, but I know that it would go away if I had nice friendly people with me.  In the past, that has helped, just to be able to interact with other humans.",
  'text': "I've lost all motivation ### I get to where I feel frozen or paralyzed. I have things I need to do but I just feel frozen when I think of doing them. Right now I just feel so heavy but like I'm in a state of shock. I don't know if it is all caused by loneliness, but I know that it would go away if I had nice friendly people with me. In the past, that has helped, just to be able to interact with other humans.",
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2022-02-01 00:52:40',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111001},
 {'id': 'mdpix3',
  'title': 'Should I check in with my depressed ex?',
  'post': 'Hi, \nWould like some advice from people with experience with depressed partners. Like so many other, my ex pushed me away and broke up with me. He has had issues with his mental health all his life, does meds but won’t go to therapy. Same reason as many has explained in this forum ‘I can’t give you what you need and want’ and I can tell having to deal with me caused him stress. Like whenever I was having a bad day he freaked out, couldn’t support me. While I would give up so many of my needs to support him. \n\nAnyways it’s been about three months and I just want to know how he is doing. I care about him so much. I want him to know that he is worthy and deserves everything a ‘healthy’ person does as well. Is it a bad idea to reach out?',
  'text': 'Should I check in with my depressed ex? ### Hi, Would like some advice from people with experience with depressed partners. Like so many other, my ex pushed me away and broke up with me. He has had issues with his mental health all his life, does meds but won’t go to therapy. Same reason as many has explained in this forum ‘I can’t give you what you need and want’ and I can tell having to deal with me caused him stress. Like whenever I was having a bad day he freaked out, couldn’t support me. While I would give up so many of my needs to support him. Anyways it’s been about three months and I just want to know how he is doing. I care about him so much. I want him to know that he is worthy and deserves everything a ‘healthy’ person does as well. Is it a bad idea to reach out?',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2021-03-26 14:11:48',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 110100},
 {'id': 'gd6qhy',
  'title': 'to any girl reading this',
  'post': "&#x200B;\n\nI remember 7 months ago I came to this page unsure if I should continue dating my now current bf, and I'm sad to say that he broke my tail bone the day before yesterday and busted my lip. I wish I never texted him back. I wish I didn't go back for sex. I wish I never opened this portal of abuse. Please if you're reading bc you're not sure listen to your gut. and to everyone on here thank u.",
  'text': "to any girl reading this ### &#x200B; I remember 7 months ago I came to this page unsure if I should continue dating my now current bf, and I'm sad to say that he broke my tail bone the day before yesterday and busted my lip. I wish I never texted him back. I wish I didn't go back for sex. I wish I never opened this portal of abuse. Please if you're reading bc you're not sure listen to your gut. and to everyone on here thank u.",
  'upvotes': 226,
  'date': '2020-05-04 07:02:05',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '13vh45j',
  'title': 'Completely alone barely have any family and no friends',
  'post': 'I’m completely alone almost every single day. I’m an only child with only one parent that is in prison that i have nothing to do with. and it gets sooo lonely. Like I’m not close with the few cousins I have and it’s like they could care less about me even when I reach out to them and I don’t have any friends because making friends is difficult when you’re autistic and have trust issues after being talked shit about so much. So it’s making me question why I’m even still living if all I’ll ever experience is hatred and contempt by almsot everyone I come in contact with. I want a relationship. I just want friends and family but I can’t even have that because you can’t make people love or care about you… and that’s what hurts it’s like I’m naturally defective and missing out on a base level form of connection that most everyone in the world has and it’s so isolating … even when I’m around people I feel alone and it haunts me I hate this feeling',
  'text': 'Completely alone barely have any family and no friends ### I’m completely alone almost every single day. I’m an only child with only one parent that is in prison that i have nothing to do with. and it gets sooo lonely. Like I’m not close with the few cousins I have and it’s like they could care less about me even when I reach out to them and I don’t have any friends because making friends is difficult when you’re autistic and have trust issues after being talked shit about so much. So it’s making me question why I’m even still living if all I’ll ever experience is hatred and contempt by almsot everyone I come in contact with. I want a relationship. I just want friends and family but I can’t even have that because you can’t make people love or care about you… and that’s what hurts it’s like I’m naturally defective and missing out on a base level form of connection that most everyone in the world has and it’s so isolating … even when I’m around people I feel alone and it haunts me I hate this feeling',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-05-30 05:03:56',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11111101},
 {'id': '17bxizo',
  'title': "I can't take it much longer",
  'post': "Every day since I was 15 I've been having suicidal thoughts and now that I'm 23 I feel like I just can't handle it anymore its only gotten worse. I'm always alone and it's a losing battle in my head and now most of the thoughts are detailed plans on how to kill myself. I've lost almost all my happiness and enjoyment in things I just want to jump onto the highway or go to the gun store and end my suffering.",
  'text': "I can't take it much longer ### Every day since I was 15 I've been having suicidal thoughts and now that I'm 23 I feel like I just can't handle it anymore its only gotten worse. I'm always alone and it's a losing battle in my head and now most of the thoughts are detailed plans on how to kill myself. I've lost almost all my happiness and enjoyment in things I just want to jump onto the highway or go to the gun store and end my suffering.",
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-10-19 23:58:43',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1011111},
 {'id': '17d3fpx',
  'title': 'Life is not too short',
  'post': 'I’m sick of hearing this. Life is not too short, it’s WAY TOO LONG. I’m only 27 and I have several more decades to go ??? Fuck that someone please just kill me',
  'text': 'Life is not too short ### I’m sick of hearing this. Life is not too short, it’s WAY TOO LONG. I’m only 27 and I have several more decades to go ??? Fuck that someone please just kill me',
  'upvotes': 317,
  'date': '2023-10-21 14:10:47',

   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10010111},
 {'id': '13aijb3',
  'title': 'I really have been gone a long time',
  'post': "Everything for the past 3 years has all been in my head why didn't you or anyone say anything literally I can't remember what was real or not",
  'text': "I really have been gone a long time ### Everything for the past 3 years has all been in my head why didn't you or anyone say anything literally I can't remember what was real or not",
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-05-07 09:21:08',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1001000},
 {'id': 'clpk56',
  'title': 'Do y’all’s ever want to kill yourself over a minor inconvenience and that makes you want to kill yourself even more cause other people have it way worse?',
  'post': 'Like, I’m reading posts on this sub where people’s siblings/loved ones have killed themselves and they want to follow, that one guy was a pedophile, people are extremely lonely/ugly/poor/abused, and it’s just an overall Shit show.\n\nI dropped like 5 dishes at work today and that was enough to almost make me go over the edge. There are literally slaves that have known nothing but agony their entire lives in this world and I’m just your average clumsy 18 year old who, in the grand scheme of things, has nothing to be worried about. Fuck.',
  'text': 'Do y’all’s ever want to kill yourself over a minor inconvenience and that makes you want to kill yourself even more cause other people have it way worse? ### Like, I’m reading posts on this sub where people’s siblings/loved ones have killed themselves and they want to follow, that one guy was a pedophile, people are extremely lonely/ugly/poor/abused, and it’s just an overall Shit show. I dropped like 5 dishes at work today and that was enough to almost make me go over the edge. There are literally slaves that have known nothing but agony their entire lives in this world and I’m just your average clumsy 18 year old who, in the grand scheme of things, has nothing to be worried about. Fuck.',
  'upvotes': 837,
  'date': '2019-08-03 23:42:56',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010111},
 {'id': 'eu4rbp',
  'title': 'Chat group idea',
  'post': 'Just checking in to see if any of you would be interested in joining a chat group (e.g. whatsapp).\n\nI get that at times it gets hard and lonesome, been there and still there tbh.\n\nDo let me know. Thanks guys/gals.',
  'text': 'Chat group idea ### Just checking in to see if any of you would be interested in joining a chat group (e.g. whatsapp). I get that at times it gets hard and lonesome, been there and still there tbh. Do let me know. Thanks guys/gals.',
  'upvotes': 18,
  'date': '2020-01-26 09:39:10',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '172l2bu',
  'title': 'Weekends',
  'post': "I've been here a while, I'm an old person (54). \n\nI have a full time office job, but I'm the only person in the office. All of my kids are grown up. My youngest has just gone to University 3 hours drive away. My other kids give an exasperated noise if I bother them.\n\nI don't have much in the way of human interaction these days, and it's really starting to get to me.\n\nI'm really close to throwing myself under a bus lately. I'm really down.",
  'text': "Weekends ### I've been here a while, I'm an old person (54). I have a full time office job, but I'm the only person in the office. All of my kids are grown up. My youngest has just gone to University 3 hours drive away. My other kids give an exasperated noise if I bother them. I don't have much in the way of human interaction these days, and it's really starting to get to me. I'm really close to throwing myself under a bus lately. I'm really down.",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2023-10-08 00:10:24',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111110},
 {'id': '176502a',
  'title': 'The worst thing about depression is knowing that one simple mistake 6 years ago cost you a good life',
  'post': "Speaking from experience here. If you want to know what I'm talking about you can check my profile",
  'text': "The worst thing about depression is knowing that one simple mistake 6 years ago cost you a good life ### Speaking from experience here. If you want to know what I'm talking about you can check my profile",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-12 11:45:44',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '146cj49',
  'title': '45 m wanting a long term friend',
  'post': 'Newly divorced and workaholic looking for a someone to chat with an a daily basis.  Someone to share our days or talk about whatever comes up. \nI am an educated professional who is trying to learn or rediscover who I am in this crazy world. I am a very laid back and easy going guy. I am a foodie and a wine and coffee snob.   I enjoy witty banter and well as deep intellectual conversations. I am always excited to learn from other people. \nI would prefer a female chat partner.  Preferably within close to the same time zone I am in. 12 hour time difference would kind of defeat the purpose in my mind.',
  'text': '45 m wanting a long term friend ### Newly divorced and workaholic looking for a someone to chat with an a daily basis. Someone to share our days or talk about whatever comes up. I am an educated professional who is trying to learn or rediscover who I am in this crazy world. I am a very laid back and easy going guy. I am a foodie and a wine and coffee snob. I enjoy witty banter and well as deep intellectual conversations. I am always excited to learn from other people. I would prefer a female chat partner. Preferably within close to the same time zone I am in. 12 hour time difference would kind of defeat the purpose in my mind.',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2023-06-10 22:04:54',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': 'jsmmdx',
  'title': "I'd say its kinda a weird reason to live but, I really like Minecraft",
  'post': "i started playing it like when i was 10 back in 2011 and watching videos now of the game it reminds me of when day's weren't stressful, and a place/time when i was at peace with myself. Kinda like if you've ever had a favorite stuffed animal growing up, and you're still fond of it to this day. Lol i started to tear up right as someone was slaughtering a ghast, not cause he was dying, but because I realized how much of an improvement this little game has made in my life.",
  'text': "I'd say its kinda a weird reason to live but, I really like Minecraft ### i started playing it like when i was 10 back in 2011 and watching videos now of the game it reminds me of when day's weren't stressful, and a place/time when i was at peace with myself. Kinda like if you've ever had a favorite stuffed animal growing up, and you're still fond of it to this day. Lol i started to tear up right as someone was slaughtering a ghast, not cause he was dying, but because I realized how much of an improvement this little game has made in my life.",
  'upvotes': 1580,
  'date': '2020-11-12 02:49:15',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': '17bwqr5',
  'title': 'thanks. (this is not an emergency, but merely a stressful situation, do not feel panic)',
  'post': "I think I've accepted my loneliness. I have nothing anymore, and it's going to stay that way. I keep telling people I'm not an immediate threat to myself to prevent any concerned 911 calls but being real, I absolutely am, I'm just too afraid to get help. I'll never succeed, I'll never live, and I'll be forced to watch everyone pass me. I'm 15 years old, and I'm not sure when the day will come, but it's only a matter time before I clock out.   \n\n\nthanks guys, we had good times together, don't forget that.  ",
  'text': "thanks. (this is not an emergency, but merely a stressful situation, do not feel panic) ### I think I've accepted my loneliness. I have nothing anymore, and it's going to stay that way. I keep telling people I'm not an immediate threat to myself to prevent any concerned 911 calls but being real, I absolutely am, I'm just too afraid to get help. I'll never succeed, I'll never live, and I'll be forced to watch everyone pass me. I'm 15 years old, and I'm not sure when the day will come, but it's only a matter time before I clock out. thanks guys, we had good times together, don't forget that.",
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-19 23:21:10',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111000},
 {'id': 'z0igvj',
  'title': 'i have awful hygiene and it makes me fucking miserable',
  'post': "I shower once a week. I don't brush my teeth or hair for days on end. I'm not sure why, but these simple tasks are so daunting to me. Please does anyone have tips? I'm starting to feel bad for the people around me because I must smell fucking horrible.\n\nEDIT: I want to thank everyone for all the tips and for sharing your experiences. I am forever grateful to you all and 2 everyone also struggling w/ this, you're not alone and I wish you the best of luck!",
  'text': "i have awful hygiene and it makes me fucking miserable ### I shower once a week. I don't brush my teeth or hair for days on end. I'm not sure why, but these simple tasks are so daunting to me. Please does anyone have tips? I'm starting to feel bad for the people around me because I must smell fucking horrible. EDIT: I want to thank everyone for all the tips and for sharing your experiences. I am forever grateful to you all and 2 everyone also struggling w/ this, you're not alone and I wish you the best of luck!",
  'upvotes': 375,
  'date': '2022-11-20 23:12:07',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': '15v4tb6',
  'title': 'Why do some people say they’re lonely when they’re not?',
  'post': 'I see it literally everywhere. It’s sickening to see someone cry about them being “lonely” when they either have a loving family, friends, and maybe even a romantic partner. As someone who is truly lonely I really don’t understand.',
  'text': 'Why do some people say they’re lonely when they’re not? ### I see it literally everywhere. It’s sickening to see someone cry about them being “lonely” when they either have a loving family, friends, and maybe even a romantic partner. As someone who is truly lonely I really don’t understand.',
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-08-19 03:17:10',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10001101},
 {'id': 'n44g7w',
  'title': 'I was hit with a racist remark',
  'post': 'I was just minding my own goddamn business when some asshole selling rip-off bullshit on the side of the street yelled “GO BACK TO FUCKING CHINA”\n\nI immediately got startled, never expected to encounter these people, I was almost gonna lunge and attack the old fucker but my mom was there, and I didn’t wanna piss her off. There’s also the fact that I would’ve gotten in trouble for attacking first\n\nAsshole was selling fake Gucci and shit\n\nI was shaking, it’s not a huge deal, just an ignorant asswipe saying ignorant shit, but it was fucking infuriating. I don’t understand how someone who likely faced a lot of racism all their life, still has the audacity to do the same to other races (he wasn’t white)',
  'text': 'I was hit with a racist remark ### I was just minding my own goddamn business when some asshole selling rip-off bullshit on the side of the street yelled “GO BACK TO FUCKING CHINA” I immediately got startled, never expected to encounter these people, I was almost gonna lunge and attack the old fucker but my mom was there, and I didn’t wanna piss her off. There’s also the fact that I would’ve gotten in trouble for attacking first Asshole was selling fake Gucci and shit I was shaking, it’s not a huge deal, just an ignorant asswipe saying ignorant shit, but it was fucking infuriating. I don’t understand how someone who likely faced a lot of racism all their life, still has the audacity to do the same to other races (he wasn’t white)',
  'upvotes': 104,
  'date': '2021-05-03 19:06:07',

 {'id': '12ej3my',
  'title': 'After 20 years of depression',
  'post': "I am going to do it. I can't do this anymore. Waking up and feeling miserable, back pain, skin problems, boredom, completely alone, no emotions except sadness. I am going to unlive myself. I don't understand why ai was brought into this world just to suffer? Makes no sense. I am going to the ocean and drown myself today. Thanks to all who have helped me try to do better but I have no cure. Death is my only friend.",
  'text': "After 20 years of depression ### I am going to do it. I can't do this anymore. Waking up and feeling miserable, back pain, skin problems, boredom, completely alone, no emotions except sadness. I am going to unlive myself. I don't understand why ai was brought into this world just to suffer? Makes no sense. I am going to the ocean and drown myself today. Thanks to all who have helped me try to do better but I have no cure. Death is my only friend.",
  'upvotes': 89,

 {'id': 'n7p7mg',
  'title': 'People are sick',
  'post': 'I’ve been “holding on” for 10 years and people just keep telling me “please just hang on a little longer”. No, you’re fucking sick for making me stay alive that long in pain and you just want me to suffer even more. You don’t truly care about me and never will.',
  'text': 'People are sick ### I’ve been “holding on” for 10 years and people just keep telling me “please just hang on a little longer”. No, you’re fucking sick for making me stay alive that long in pain and you just want me to suffer even more. You don’t truly care about me and never will.',
  'upvotes': 760,
  'date': '2021-05-08 13:26:28',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10010111},
 {'id': 'll9wt8',
  'title': 'He leaves skid marks on the bed sheets.',
  'post': 'I\'m fucking done. He can\'t even wash his own ass. Yet according to his mom "he can do no wrong!" or "I only care about \\[HIM\\]!" in spite of disrespecting me. Fuck her too for not teaching him to wipe his ass yet he\'s somehow drenching in cologne scent for work.\n\nTreats me like shit, makes me pay for 50% of rent and takes my money for other stuff in spite of making way more than me, praises women who bully me, AND can\'t wipe his own ass.\n\nEdit: Why the fuck is this problem more common than it should be?',
  'text': 'He leaves skid marks on the bed sheets. ### I\'m fucking done. He can\'t even wash his own ass. Yet according to his mom "he can do no wrong!" or "I only care about \\[HIM\\]!" in spite of disrespecting me. Fuck her too for not teaching him to wipe his ass yet he\'s somehow drenching in cologne scent for work. Treats me like shit, makes me pay for 50% of rent and takes my money for other stuff in spite of making way more than me, praises women who bully me, AND can\'t wipe his own ass. Edit: Why the fuck is this problem more common than it should be?',
  'upvotes': 138,
  'date': '2021-02-16 18:16:37',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010001},
 {'id': 'n89fcj',
  'title': 'I was reffered to as low iq guy by mental health staff',
  'post': "Today I was up at the hospital I was having a breakdown and I was seen by the emergency team and they suggested I stay in respite for a while. One of the girls were on the phone to them and they mentioned my name to them and said 'the low iq guy remember him?' That pissed me off being refered to like that like I'm not going through a rough time already. Are they even allowed to refer to patients like that? They talked to me as if i were a kid but I'm 22.",
  'text': "I was reffered to as low iq guy by mental health staff ### Today I was up at the hospital I was having a breakdown and I was seen by the emergency team and they suggested I stay in respite for a while. One of the girls were on the phone to them and they mentioned my name to them and said 'the low iq guy remember him?' That pissed me off being refered to like that like I'm not going through a rough time already. Are they even allowed to refer to patients like that? They talked to me as if i were a kid but I'm 22.",
  'upvotes': 430,
  'date': '2021-05-09 07:50:19',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': '13kqt60',
  'title': 'It hurts to watch all of my friends living their best life with their S/O.',
  'post': "I'm nearing my 30s and all of my closest friends have boyfriends/girlfriends. In the past 6 months, 4 of them have travelled abroad with their partners, and one couple just did a cross-country road trip. Besides travelling, they do lots of fun activities which include going to museums and eating out at nice restaurants. And here I am, by myself. Nobody to hang out with (they're all too busy with their partners to hang with me) and nobody to come home to at the end of the day.\n\nI know I can do all that by myself...but it's just different without the companionship. I'll take a table for one please...",
  'text': "It hurts to watch all of my friends living their best life with their S/O. ### I'm nearing my 30s and all of my closest friends have boyfriends/girlfriends. In the past 6 months, 4 of them have travelled abroad with their partners, and one couple just did a cross-country road trip. Besides travelling, they do lots of fun activities which include going to museums and eating out at nice restaurants. And here I am, by myself. Nobody to hang out with (they're all too busy with their partners to hang with me) and nobody to come home to at the end of the day. I know I can do all that by myself...but it's just different without the companionship. I'll take a table for one please...",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2023-05-18 06:42:18',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness', 'anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': 'g4btql',
  'title': 'Psychology of Loneliness: Seeking Solitude in Isolation (2020)',
  'post': "Hey guys I'm a PhD student in Psychology and I recently made a YouTube video delving into the research on loneliness, mental health and solitude. Let me know what you think! \n\n[https://youtu.be/uq65-IJEYvY](https://youtu.be/uq65-IJEYvY)",
  'text': "Psychology of Loneliness: Seeking Solitude in Isolation (2020) ### Hey guys I'm a PhD student in Psychology and I recently made a YouTube video delving into the research on loneliness, mental health and solitude. Let me know what you think! [https://youtu.be/uq65-IJEYvY](https://youtu.be/uq65-IJEYvY)",
  'upvotes': 12,
  'date': '2020-04-19 17:41:29',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': 'a1gn2y',
  'title': 'Does anyone else overly explain themselves about almost anything and or say sorry WAY TOO MUCH?',
  'post': 'It’s so annoying and frustrating because I feel the need to explain with so much detail because I truly feel it won’t be understood otherwise. Ugh',
  'text': 'Does anyone else overly explain themselves about almost anything and or say sorry WAY TOO MUCH? ### It’s so annoying and frustrating because I feel the need to explain with so much detail because I truly feel it won’t be understood otherwise. Ugh',
