 {'id': '178yf26',
  'title': 'I feel like I have no personality or even who I use to be',
  'post': 'I have been dealing with a pretty bad episode the past couple months and it just keeps getting progressively worse, I dont know how to describe it but it’s just like over the past few months I have completely forgotten who I am, the things I use to like to do and watch, even memories and how I was with my friends. All I do everyday is lay in this bed scrolling. I feel like I have no purpose. I want to get up and do things and be like how I use to and actually have hobbies but I don’t remember anything about my self what do I do how do I fix this I just feel like the hallow shell of the person I was just months before.',
  'text': 'I feel like I have no personality or even who I use to be ### I have been dealing with a pretty bad episode the past couple months and it just keeps getting progressively worse, I dont know how to describe it but it’s just like over the past few months I have completely forgotten who I am, the things I use to like to do and watch, even memories and how I was with my friends. All I do everyday is lay in this bed scrolling. I feel like I have no purpose. I want to get up and do things and be like how I use to and actually have hobbies but I don’t remember anything about my self what do I do how do I fix this I just feel like the hallow shell of the person I was just months before.',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-16 05:10:14',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],

  'title': 'I am nothing to the world',

 {'id': 'hl8c0j',
  'title': 'One of my fish died last night :(',
  'post': "His name was Jack. My fish are honestly what's keeping me together right now. Idk why but just watching them swim gives me a sense of security.\n\nRip Jack, I will miss you so much :( <3",
  'text': "One of my fish died last night :( ### His name was Jack. My fish are honestly what's keeping me together right now. Idk why but just watching them swim gives me a sense of security. Rip Jack, I will miss you so much :( <3",
  'upvotes': 363,
  'date': '2020-07-04 18:41:15',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '16xtkgv',
  'title': '33, haven’t worked for 5 years, failing my classes.',
  'post': 'All my friends (if I can still even call them that) are having great lives. They finished college a decade ago, have been saving for ten years and are buying houses with their wives and girlfriends, traveling the world. I hate my life so much, and I’ve hated it for so long. \n\nI wish my parents were gone so I could just kill myself now. I know things aren’t going to change for me.',
  'text': '33, haven’t worked for 5 years, failing my classes. ### All my friends (if I can still even call them that) are having great lives. They finished college a decade ago, have been saving for ten years and are buying houses with their wives and girlfriends, traveling the world. I hate my life so much, and I’ve hated it for so long. I wish my parents were gone so I could just kill myself now. I know things aren’t going to change for me.',
  'upvotes': 52,
  'date': '2023-10-02 10:59:23',

   'loneliness',

 {'id': 'd7zskx',
  'title': 'My Mom showed off my suicide letter like it was a fashion statement',
  'post': 'So basically i tried to do it a couple of months ago, had everything prepared, was ready to just end it all. Until all of a sudden i got way too scared and decided to call it off\n\nMy mom saw the letter that i was supposed to leave and went behind my back showed it off to her friends and some family members then talked to me about it,\n\nI became  some sort of beacon of attention which i hated people telling me that "it\'ll get better" or saying if it was true Sometimes i kinda wished i wasnt such a pussy and ended it right then and there, couldve saved myself from embarrasment',
  'text': 'My Mom showed off my suicide letter like it was a fashion statement ### So basically i tried to do it a couple of months ago, had everything prepared, was ready to just end it all. Until all of a sudden i got way too scared and decided to call it off My mom saw the letter that i was supposed to leave and went behind my back showed it off to her friends and some family members then talked to me about it, I became some sort of beacon of attention which i hated people telling me that "it\'ll get better" or saying if it was true Sometimes i kinda wished i wasnt such a pussy and ended it right then and there, couldve saved myself from embarrasment',
  'upvotes': 981,
  'date': '2019-09-23 01:38:50',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010110},
 {'id': 'm5mmp6',
  'title': 'Me (24F) realised that my parents constant fighting made me depressed and how I was never the part of the problem',
  'post': 'Fuck my parents',
  'text': 'Me (24F) realised that my parents constant fighting made me depressed and how I was never the part of the problem ### Fuck my parents',
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2021-03-15 15:03:43',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': 'u679zz',
  'title': 'Attempting to make friends on reddit',
  'post': "Hello everybody. Do you have any advice for me on how to cure my loneliness? I don't have many friends and the ones I do might be fake, they never reach out to talk to me they only reply if I message them first. This is my first time using reddit in an attempt to make new friends so if you are feeling the same way, or you just want to become my friends please shoot me a message.   \nLove Emma",
  'text': "Attempting to make friends on reddit ### Hello everybody. Do you have any advice for me on how to cure my loneliness? I don't have many friends and the ones I do might be fake, they never reach out to talk to me they only reply if I message them first. This is my first time using reddit in an attempt to make new friends so if you are feeling the same way, or you just want to become my friends please shoot me a message. Love Emma",
  'upvotes': 13,
  'date': '2022-04-18 07:23:31',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': '17dever',
  'title': 'Pls help',
  'post': 'Sometimes I just feel alone and it’s ok to feel that way. I hurt and think I’m lonely. It’s been a while since this feeling came in but I’ve realised I’m much too different. People don’t like talking or doing things I like. Whereas everyone else likes the same things. Smoke, poker, talking about girls is all something I can’t wrap my head around. People like each other and invite each other. People talk and are so happy about being around everyone. Even I like talking and spending time with friends but sometimes I just feel left out, unheard of. Something like not being around is what actually matters. Something like I’m unwanted and taken for granted I just want to be happy. Am I the problem ?',
  'text': 'Pls help ### Sometimes I just feel alone and it’s ok to feel that way. I hurt and think I’m lonely. It’s been a while since this feeling came in but I’ve realised I’m much too different. People don’t like talking or doing things I like. Whereas everyone else likes the same things. Smoke, poker, talking about girls is all something I can’t wrap my head around. People like each other and invite each other. People talk and are so happy about being around everyone. Even I like talking and spending time with friends but sometimes I just feel left out, unheard of. Something like not being around is what actually matters. Something like I’m unwanted and taken for granted I just want to be happy. Am I the problem ?',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-21 22:55:36',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101100},
 {'id': 'sxgg6g',
  'title': 'The thought of killing myself is the only thing that actually makes me happy',
  'post': "Sounds ironic, but that's it. I know what to do, I know what to get, I collected all the info I could, and the simple thought of *the* day being near fills me with a forgotten bubbly feeling of excitement. I can't stop thinking about it, it cheers me up, it motivates me to go through my (hopefully last) days, everytime I think about it I cannot help but feel really contented for some reason. Fantasizing about finally dying has became a guilty pleasure of mine at this point. It just feels so good, to think about my dreams coming true. It's the first time in many years I felt genuinely happy, so it's a surprise, but sure a welcome one.",
  'text': "The thought of killing myself is the only thing that actually makes me happy ### Sounds ironic, but that's it. I know what to do, I know what to get, I collected all the info I could, and the simple thought of *the* day being near fills me with a forgotten bubbly feeling of excitement. I can't stop thinking about it, it cheers me up, it motivates me to go through my (hopefully last) days, everytime I think about it I cannot help but feel really contented for some reason. Fantasizing about finally dying has became a guilty pleasure of mine at this point. It just feels so good, to think about my dreams coming true. It's the first time in many years I felt genuinely happy, so it's a surprise, but sure a welcome one.",
  'upvotes': 589,
  'date': '2022-02-21 00:59:56',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10},
 {'id': '11egsof',
  'title': 'Suicidal thoughts are getting more common lately.',
  'post': "I don't think I ever experienced this before, but since last year, I'd been having more suicidal thoughts, my mind is trying to be humorous of it, but I find it really disturbing.\n\nMy most recent memory started with planning out how to save money for something I want and hoping I'd find a job that pays enough for my needs and wants. Then it escalated to feelings of inadequacy. That I can't find a good job because I'm this and that. Then I felt hatred for the system and my mind just told me to slash my neck.\n\nI find it disturbing since my usual approach to these kind of problems would be to persevere, but recently, these thoughts are popping inside my head and it's beginning to worry me. I read somewhere that I should find help before it gets heavier, that's why I'm venting this one out.",
  'text': "Suicidal thoughts are getting more common lately. ### I don't think I ever experienced this before, but since last year, I'd been having more suicidal thoughts, my mind is trying to be humorous of it, but I find it really disturbing. My most recent memory started with planning out how to save money for something I want and hoping I'd find a job that pays enough for my needs and wants. Then it escalated to feelings of inadequacy. That I can't find a good job because I'm this and that. Then I felt hatred for the system and my mind just told me to slash my neck. I find it disturbing since my usual approach to these kind of problems would be to persevere, but recently, these thoughts are popping inside my head and it's beginning to worry me. I read somewhere that I should find help before it gets heavier, that's why I'm venting this one out.",
  'upvotes': 93,
  'date': '2023-02-28 19:02:54',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1010011},
 {'id': 'gwamuv',
  'title': 'I don’t even cry anymore when I brainstorm ways to kill myself.',
  'post': 'It’s been so long...',

  'upvotes': 598,

 {'id': 'hfw7xs',
  'title': "I have been feeling very panicky and can't concentrate on anything for the past weeks",
  'post': "I don't know why I am feeling panicky the entire time I already have gotten meds but they are not helping anymore and other things that used to help don't help either anymore. I already talked to my therapist about this but that still didn't help.",
  'text': "I have been feeling very panicky and can't concentrate on anything for the past weeks ### I don't know why I am feeling panicky the entire time I already have gotten meds but they are not helping anymore and other things that used to help don't help either anymore. I already talked to my therapist about this but that still didn't help.",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2020-06-25 23:03:34',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10000},
 {'id': '13hx4aq',
  'title': 'sometimes it’s okay for to me to be silent when i’m upset and angry',
  'post': 'It’s always “we’ve talked about this you need to communicate” but when i know they’re upset and i ask them to say how they feel they need to process what they’re feeling before they speak \n\nIm sick of the double standards, i’m sick of the constant goal moving, i’m sick of them feeling shitty after they do something to me when we constantly communicate that i don’t like it and now that i need space it’s my fault \n\nI’m sooo sick and tired of the lack of reciprocation or planning. they just expect me to be a mind reader like they don’t say how exhausted they are all the time \n\nThe constant mask they put around friends and a completely different personality but back to being insecure and insensitive to me',
  'text': 'sometimes it’s okay for to me to be silent when i’m upset and angry ### It’s always “we’ve talked about this you need to communicate” but when i know they’re upset and i ask them to say how they feel they need to process what they’re feeling before they speak Im sick of the double standards, i’m sick of the constant goal moving, i’m sick of them feeling shitty after they do something to me when we constantly communicate that i don’t like it and now that i need space it’s my fault I’m sooo sick and tired of the lack of reciprocation or planning. they just expect me to be a mind reader like they don’t say how exhausted they are all the time The constant mask they put around friends and a completely different personality but back to being insecure and insensitive to me',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2023-05-15 04:08:23',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '16a2847',
  'title': 'Different take on loneliness. I’ve been lonely for quite some time (30yo+ some other social categories that predispose me for loneliness) and I wonder if anyone else here has noticed the sense of freedom that comes from not being tied to a group of people or a partner.',
  'post': 'Recently joined the military at a later age so, of course, I’m surrounded by these wholesome couples that are allegedly so great. But, as I’m here longer, I notice the lack of sincerity that comes with these partnerships and peer groups. (Of course there are a few that have really made the dream work) but for the most part it’s people surrounded by a lot of people with issues.\n\nSo, I’m curious if anyone had at least noticed or acknowledged the benefit of being on your own.\n\nTLDR; does anyone else with exposure to different groups of people acknowledge the advantages or how pleasant it can be to be alone?',
  'text': 'Different take on loneliness. I’ve been lonely for quite some time (30yo+ some other social categories that predispose me for loneliness) and I wonder if anyone else here has noticed the sense of freedom that comes from not being tied to a group of people or a partner. ### Recently joined the military at a later age so, of course, I’m surrounded by these wholesome couples that are allegedly so great. But, as I’m here longer, I notice the lack of sincerity that comes with these partnerships and peer groups. (Of course there are a few that have really made the dream work) but for the most part it’s people surrounded by a lot of people with issues. So, I’m curious if anyone had at least noticed or acknowledged the benefit of being on your own. TLDR; does anyone else with exposure to different groups of people acknowledge the advantages or how pleasant it can be to be alone?',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-09-04 19:58:40',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': '11r0llt',
  'title': '(Lonely) I’ve been isolated & alone most of life',
  'post': 'I’ve been alone & isolated most of my life I’ve smoked weed since I was 14 then from ages 19-25 I had no job I did nothing but alienate myself in my small room playing video games, never dated a girl all that time & I didn’t talk to any women except online my only real friends were guys & I only chilled with them once every few months. I’m lonely I want to goto college to be around people I need company and companionship instead of rotting my brain & health from vaping/drinking/video games. Please can someone give me a push I don’t want you to be nice I lack discipline “You rack discipline!” I want a military career I just have no balls I wanna do something fun in life. I have a job now but it’s kinda boring & basic I’m a little more confident around girls. Might edit this more keep coming back  dm me if you wanna chat.  Please don’t talk about suicide here there’s a sub reddit for that (I forget the name) Because I’ll dream about scary doppelgängers & demons if I think about it',
  'text': '(Lonely) I’ve been isolated & alone most of life ### I’ve been alone & isolated most of my life I’ve smoked weed since I was 14 then from ages 19-25 I had no job I did nothing but alienate myself in my small room playing video games, never dated a girl all that time & I didn’t talk to any women except online my only real friends were guys & I only chilled with them once every few months. I’m lonely I want to goto college to be around people I need company and companionship instead of rotting my brain & health from vaping/drinking/video games. Please can someone give me a push I don’t want you to be nice I lack discipline “You rack discipline!” I want a military career I just have no balls I wanna do something fun in life. I have a job now but it’s kinda boring & basic I’m a little more confident around girls. Might edit this more keep coming back dm me if you wanna chat. Please don’t talk about suicide here there’s a sub reddit for that (I forget the name) Because I’ll dream about scary doppelgängers & demons if I think about it',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-03-14 08:24:13',

 {'id': 'zrtixd',
  'title': 'If this is going to be my next 40-50 years, I don’t want it.',
  'post': 'I’m stuck in a state far away from my family. I have multiple health issues. Working full time barely making ends meet. I can’t keep a relationship going since my divorce ended 5 years ago. I can’t afford therapy. I know I’ll survive, because I always have, but for the past few months, it feels like this is all my life is going to be.',
  'text': 'If this is going to be my next 40-50 years, I don’t want it. ### I’m stuck in a state far away from my family. I have multiple health issues. Working full time barely making ends meet. I can’t keep a relationship going since my divorce ended 5 years ago. I can’t afford therapy. I know I’ll survive, because I always have, but for the past few months, it feels like this is all my life is going to be.',
  'upvotes': 191,
  'date': '2022-12-21 16:37:09',

 {'id': '12aucmj',
  'title': 'I would’ve killed myself if I had a gun',
  'post': 'The title says it all. If I had a gun I’d point it at my had and pull the trigger without any hesitation',
  'text': 'I would’ve killed myself if I had a gun ### The title says it all. If I had a gun I’d point it at my had and pull the trigger without any hesitation',
  'upvotes': 458,
  'date': '2023-04-03 19:08:09',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010010},
 {'id': '17disfv',
  'title': 'I Don’t Matter',
  'post': 'I just feel used and hurt and upset. It doesn’t matter what I do - things won’t change. I’ve tried to make things work - I really have. But I don’t have the energy to go on doing this.\n\nI just wish that I had one friend tell me it was ok for me to be myself around them. Just one. But every time I am myself - they run away. And it hurts.\n\nYes, I have my family. But what’s going to happen when my parents die? And my brothers are more invested in themselves than being helpful to Mom, Dad, and myself.\n\nI don’t even remember the last time someone invited me somewhere just because they wanted me. \n\nSo all that leaves is society - the one that tells me that my opinions don’t matter, my kindness doesn’t matter, and more importantly that I don’t matter. \n\nAnd I’m sick of it. I just want to disappear and have everyone else forget that I exist. The world would be better off that way…',
  'text': 'I Don’t Matter ### I just feel used and hurt and upset. It doesn’t matter what I do - things won’t change. I’ve tried to make things work - I really have. But I don’t have the energy to go on doing this. I just wish that I had one friend tell me it was ok for me to be myself around them. Just one. But every time I am myself - they run away. And it hurts. Yes, I have my family. But what’s going to happen when my parents die? And my brothers are more invested in themselves than being helpful to Mom, Dad, and myself. I don’t even remember the last time someone invited me somewhere just because they wanted me. So all that leaves is society - the one that tells me that my opinions don’t matter, my kindness doesn’t matter, and more importantly that I don’t matter. And I’m sick of it. I just want to disappear and have everyone else forget that I exist. The world would be better off that way…',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-22 02:15:28',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11111111},
 {'id': '134lat0',
  'title': 'Everyday I wish to sleep and to not wakeup tomorrow',
  'post': 'My life has been miserable theres not a single day in my life where i didint want for everything to end.\n\n23 (student jobless , still living with parents ) I feel like i dont belong anywhere , as everybody rejects me even my family never told me we love you once. Depression was a constant thing througout my life with constent spikes bursts where each time i couldnt support it anymore tried even to speak to friends i came out as a complex person dellusional and everyone ended up ghosting me.  I just dont know what to do where to go anymore i have thaught about ending my life several times i just couldnt because i cant  support the pain i have to go through , im not really scared of dying as ill just cease to exist and have no consciousness im scared of the process and pain i have to go through  before i die',
  'text': 'Everyday I wish to sleep and to not wakeup tomorrow ### My life has been miserable theres not a single day in my life where i didint want for everything to end. 23 (student jobless , still living with parents ) I feel like i dont belong anywhere , as everybody rejects me even my family never told me we love you once. Depression was a constant thing througout my life with constent spikes bursts where each time i couldnt support it anymore tried even to speak to friends i came out as a complex person dellusional and everyone ended up ghosting me. I just dont know what to do where to go anymore i have thaught about ending my life several times i just couldnt because i cant support the pain i have to go through , im not really scared of dying as ill just cease to exist and have no consciousness im scared of the process and pain i have to go through before i die',
  'upvotes': 231,
  'date': '2023-05-01 12:35:46',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'zn5h1k',
  'title': 'Depression manifesting as anger',
  'post': 'Anyone else’s depression manifest as anger and extreme irritability? Followed by guilt and numbness and lack of motivation to do anything at all (even basic human hygiene is a struggle). Life is so incredibly overwhelming and unsatisfying. I feel like I am just awful to be around. It got so bad I decided to start taking my Prozac again. Don’t know what made me stop taking it a few months ago but now all I want is to seek relief from feeling like constant shit all the time. I don’t even want to be around myself.',
  'text': 'Depression manifesting as anger ### Anyone else’s depression manifest as anger and extreme irritability? Followed by guilt and numbness and lack of motivation to do anything at all (even basic human hygiene is a struggle). Life is so incredibly overwhelming and unsatisfying. I feel like I am just awful to be around. It got so bad I decided to start taking my Prozac again. Don’t know what made me stop taking it a few months ago but now all I want is to seek relief from feeling like constant shit all the time. I don’t even want to be around myself.',
  'upvotes': 133,
  'date': '2022-12-16 04:00:20',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10000001},

 {'id': 'p2ewis',
  'title': '“The Art of Solitude”- is a very good book about being alone',
  'post': 'After reading this book, I have a whole new perspective about doing things alone, it’s actually not so bad.   Highly recommend anyone going through loneliness read it.',
  'text': '“The Art of Solitude”- is a very good book about being alone ### After reading this book, I have a whole new perspective about doing things alone, it’s actually not so bad. Highly recommend anyone going through loneliness read it.',
  'upvotes': 12,

  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': 'zrc1pp',
  'title': 'I think disturbing/gore videos ruined my trust in my life.',
  'post': 'Hello, when i was younger maybe 13-15 yrs of age , I came across bestgore the website and I watched all the gore videos, even though I was freaked out at what I was seeing, I kept watching. Now I’m 19 and with social medias maybe every 2-4 days on Instagram a account I follow would post Chicago shooting and/or Ukraine/Russian combat footage. Every so often I’d see somebody shooting someone. But every person I have in my personal vicinity for example (a gym freind at my home) or (being alone with someone I don’t know in a place where I don’t know what’s going on around me) I’d start thinking negatively like “is this mf about to kill me?” Or I’d just make sure I have him in my vision or perephial. I researched on this subject and apparently it’s just as bad as watching corn. Seeing humans die is desensitizing me I guess. How do I fix this ?',
  'text': 'I think disturbing/gore videos ruined my trust in my life. ### Hello, when i was younger maybe 13-15 yrs of age , I came across bestgore the website and I watched all the gore videos, even though I was freaked out at what I was seeing, I kept watching. Now I’m 19 and with social medias maybe every 2-4 days on Instagram a account I follow would post Chicago shooting and/or Ukraine/Russian combat footage. Every so often I’d see somebody shooting someone. But every person I have in my personal vicinity for example (a gym freind at my home) or (being alone with someone I don’t know in a place where I don’t know what’s going on around me) I’d start thinking negatively like “is this mf about to kill me?” Or I’d just make sure I have him in my vision or perephial. I researched on this subject and apparently it’s just as bad as watching corn. Seeing humans die is desensitizing me I guess. How do I fix this ?',
  'upvotes': 11,

   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],

 {'id': 'h7uren',
  'title': 'He’s got to be hiding something',
  'post': 'Okay so listen been dating this guy for 3 years.. not allowed to live with him even tho he has his own house (mommy pays for it), and he says he wants a milkshake from UDF... but either I go by myself or he goes by himself... so either he stays home by himself or he goes out by himself. I just asked why I couldn’t go with (mind you we see eachother maybe 1 to twice a week if that) and when I asked he threw a huge fit and freaked out on me... tell me I’m not wrong',
  'text': 'He’s got to be hiding something ### Okay so listen been dating this guy for 3 years.. not allowed to live with him even tho he has his own house (mommy pays for it), and he says he wants a milkshake from UDF... but either I go by myself or he goes by himself... so either he stays home by himself or he goes out by himself. I just asked why I couldn’t go with (mind you we see eachother maybe 1 to twice a week if that) and when I asked he threw a huge fit and freaked out on me... tell me I’m not wrong',
  'upvotes': 2,

 {'id': 'uhi3pv',
  'title': '“suicide is a permanent solution for a temporary problem” makes no sense whatsoever',
  'post': 'how is depression a temporary problem in anyway? it feels like i’m gonna be stuck with these issues for the rest of my life. it never gets better, and it never will. there’s no realistic version of my life that could ever be “good” or “fulfilling”. i’m just dragging out this failure of an existence.',
  'text': '“suicide is a permanent solution for a temporary problem” makes no sense whatsoever ### how is depression a temporary problem in anyway? it feels like i’m gonna be stuck with these issues for the rest of my life. it never gets better, and it never will. there’s no realistic version of my life that could ever be “good” or “fulfilling”. i’m just dragging out this failure of an existence.',
  'upvotes': 1617,
  'date': '2022-05-03 15:04:16',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 110111},

 {'id': 'yolqyh',
  'title': 'work pressure IT - too much work',
  'post': "27(M). Can't handle work pressure. I took fake sick leave for 10 days. But the thought of going back to work killing me.",
  'text': "work pressure IT - too much work ### 27(M). Can't handle work pressure. I took fake sick leave for 10 days. But the thought of going back to work killing me.",
  'upvotes': 83,

  'label_id': 10111},
 {'id': 'k5s7o7',
  'title': 'What is wrong with me???',
  'post': 'Now that I’m older and living with other people that aren’t my family, i’m starting to question some of the things I do. For example, if i feel dirty i will get in a bad mood until i shower. Also with my hands, if they’re not moisturized, i get in a really bad mood. I can’t sleep or do anything if my hands feel dry. I also can’t touch certain blankets or cloths because i rub my skin on it it makes me angry and feel weird. I don’t know if this is normal or if i have sensory issues??? But my brothers are the same way, they wont even let you hug them if they haven’t moisturized or had to use another moisturize theyre not used to . Im also super specific on what moisturizers i use. On top of that, lighting is a big thing for me. Ill get really anxious and start feeling weird if lights are too bright or a certain color. Its so weird.',
  'text': 'What is wrong with me??? ### Now that I’m older and living with other people that aren’t my family, i’m starting to question some of the things I do. For example, if i feel dirty i will get in a bad mood until i shower. Also with my hands, if they’re not moisturized, i get in a really bad mood. I can’t sleep or do anything if my hands feel dry. I also can’t touch certain blankets or cloths because i rub my skin on it it makes me angry and feel weird. I don’t know if this is normal or if i have sensory issues??? But my brothers are the same way, they wont even let you hug them if they haven’t moisturized or had to use another moisturize theyre not used to . Im also super specific on what moisturizers i use. On top of that, lighting is a big thing for me. Ill get really anxious and start feeling weird if lights are too bright or a certain color. Its so weird.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2020-12-03 06:43:07',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'pdthzt',
  'title': '7 Obvious Signs Of Silence Abuse In Your Relationship',
  'post': '1. They act rude towards you without raising their voice.\n2. They make jokes at the expense of your self-esteem\n3. They always find a way to make you feel guilty.\n4. They don’t really pay attention to you when you talk.\n5. They give you the cold shoulder when they don’t get what they want.\n6. They make you feel like your complaints are invalid.\n7. They generate a culture of fear in your relationship.\n\n\nWhenever you abuse a person, you are essentially damaging that person’s quality of life. You are treating that person with violence and cruelty. And this is not LOVE.',
  'text': '7 Obvious Signs Of Silence Abuse In Your Relationship ### 1. They act rude towards you without raising their voice. 2. They make jokes at the expense of your self-esteem 3. They always find a way to make you feel guilty. 4. They don’t really pay attention to you when you talk. 5. They give you the cold shoulder when they don’t get what they want. 6. They make you feel like your complaints are invalid. 7. They generate a culture of fear in your relationship. Whenever you abuse a person, you are essentially damaging that person’s quality of life. You are treating that person with violence and cruelty. And this is not LOVE.',
  'upvotes': 189,
  'date': '2021-08-29 11:21:29',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': 'yndtvi',

  'post': "[16F] i really need to act like a whore online for people to notice me. I talk to these predators and pretend that i believe when they say they love me and doesn't just want me for my body.\n\ni am really fucked up, i cut myself, stay days without eating and i hope i die soon. if anyone want to talk to me I would love it, i promise I am a little bit interesting. i don't care if you just want to use me or something ha.",

I talk to these predators and pretend that i believe when they say they love me and doesn't just want me for my body. i am really fucked up, i cut myself, stay days without eating and i hope i die soon. if anyone want to talk to me I would love it, i promise I am a little bit interesting. i don't care if you just want to use me or something ha.",

 {'id': '10bqzh5',
  'title': "I'm sorry",
  'post': "I'm sorry I'm not like the other kids other moms got. I'm sorry there's nothing to be proud of in me. I'm sorry I'm such a failure and I can't deal with anything. I'm sorry I'm so weak. I'm sorry nothing ever works.\n\nI'm sorry for existing.",
  'text': "I'm sorry ### I'm sorry I'm not like the other kids other moms got. I'm sorry there's nothing to be proud of in me. I'm sorry I'm such a failure and I can't deal with anything. I'm sorry I'm so weak. I'm sorry nothing ever works. I'm sorry for existing.",
  'upvotes': 309,

   'sadness',

 {'id': '178pxtw',
  'title': 'The end',
  'post': 'Im not seeking help I’m just going to let myself drown in my loneliness until I succumb to the choice to end',
  'text': 'The end ### Im not seeking help I’m just going to let myself drown in my loneliness until I succumb to the choice to end',

 {'id': '11f58n5',
  'title': 'I have no drive',
  'post': 'Nothing makes me want to get up in the morning. I feel nothing, I do nothing. I’m just anxious and paranoid all day and live alone. I don’t have many friends. I just repeat “I’m just tired” or “just one more day” to myself thousands of times a day like an infinite mantra. I get paid to sit at home and do nothing, which is a privileged position, but good god I am bored and have nothing to get me excited about life. I’m only here for my mom and my cats. I wish I could call it quits.',
  'text': 'I have no drive ### Nothing makes me want to get up in the morning. I feel nothing, I do nothing. I’m just anxious and paranoid all day and live alone. I don’t have many friends. I just repeat “I’m just tired” or “just one more day” to myself thousands of times a day like an infinite mantra. I get paid to sit at home and do nothing, which is a privileged position, but good god I am bored and have nothing to get me excited about life. I’m only here for my mom and my cats. I wish I could call it quits.',
  'upvotes': 226,
  'date': '2023-03-01 14:31:50',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'lt9r71',
  'title': "I'm not deserving of help because I'm not in enough pain.",
  'post': "My parents always fought when I was little, my brother phisicaly and mentally bullied me and my friends didn't really care about me. My parents got a divorce when I was about eight,soon after my dad fell into a depression and my brothers bullying got a lot worse. My mom got a new boyfriend and we moved in with him when I was ten, my brother stayed with my dad. I never really got along with my mothers new boyfriend. It always felt like I was living with a stranger. Recently my cat also died, we had her since I was a toddler so I basically spent my whole life up to this point with her, she was like an emotional support animal to me. Watching her slowly get thinner day by day because of her liver cancer was absolutly horrible and quarantine isn't making the whole thing better. School has been taking a toll on me. \n\nI'm really sorry if my english is bad because I'm thirteen and not a native speaker. \n\nThere are children out there that have it so so much worse then me and I'm having a hard time believing that I'm deserving of help.",
  'text': "I'm not deserving of help because I'm not in enough pain. ### My parents always fought when I was little, my brother phisicaly and mentally bullied me and my friends didn't really care about me. My parents got a divorce when I was about eight,soon after my dad fell into a depression and my brothers bullying got a lot worse. My mom got a new boyfriend and we moved in with him when I was ten, my brother stayed with my dad. I never really got along with my mothers new boyfriend. It always felt like I was living with a stranger. Recently my cat also died, we had her since I was a toddler so I basically spent my whole life up to this point with her, she was like an emotional support animal to me. Watching her slowly get thinner day by day because of her liver cancer was absolutly horrible and quarantine isn't making the whole thing better. School has been taking a toll on me. I'm really sorry if my english is bad because I'm thirteen and not a native speaker. There are children out there that have it so so much worse then me and I'm having a hard time believing that I'm deserving of help.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2021-02-26 22:36:26',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10011101},
 {'id': '10lkxmc',
  'title': 'A lady and her sleeplessness',
  'post': 'Soooo I moved all the way across country and now I’m so lonely. I don’t know anyone and I’m too tired to go bar hopping. I don’t sleep like I should either. I’m not the most talkative but I’d love to hear from someone',
  'text': 'A lady and her sleeplessness ### Soooo I moved all the way across country and now I’m so lonely. I don’t know anyone and I’m too tired to go bar hopping. I don’t sleep like I should either. I’m not the most talkative but I’d love to hear from someone',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-01-26 05:56:02',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 11111101},
 {'id': '12ycqkw',
  'title': 'Read please',
  'post': "I shouldn't have cast blame without talking to someone first I'm sorry I don't have any negative feelings towards anyone again I'm sorry truly I do miss my BFF just BTW I am who I am I make many mistakes and assumptions because I react with emotion and think after I have big emotions so big reactions it's not bad all the time but I need to work on balancing it more and yes my eyes are still open but brain is not all there just yet...getting better and taking things day by day...still love Selena BTW will always be my person",
  'text': "Read please ### I shouldn't have cast blame without talking to someone first I'm sorry I don't have any negative feelings towards anyone again I'm sorry truly I do miss my BFF just BTW I am who I am I make many mistakes and assumptions because I react with emotion and think after I have big emotions so big reactions it's not bad all the time but I need to work on balancing it more and yes my eyes are still open but brain is not all there just yet...getting better and taking things day by day...still love Selena BTW will always be my person",
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-04-25 08:17:16',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000000},
 {'id': 'io17lu',
  'title': 'It hurts when your abusers treat you like you were the abuser',
  'post': 'My childhood abuser said that he can’t trust me. It bothers me so much! Sometimes, I feel like I was the “bad” one. I was just a child though.',
  'text': 'It hurts when your abusers treat you like you were the abuser ### My childhood abuser said that he can’t trust me. It bothers me so much! Sometimes, I feel like I was the “bad” one. I was just a child though.',
  'upvotes': 172,
  'date': '2020-09-07 04:54:20',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10000101},
 {'id': '16v2raw',
  'title': 'There is a suicide post every couple minutes.',
  'post': 'I see people posting every minutes for the last 2 hours and feel that I am not alone. \nI hope this is a good outlet. And for you to know that I am in the same situation and I support you too.',
  'text': 'There is a suicide post every couple minutes. ### I see people posting every minutes for the last 2 hours and feel that I am not alone. I hope this is a good outlet. And for you to know that I am in the same situation and I support you too.',
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-09-29 05:14:19',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10110},
 {'id': '17c7sf3',
  'title': 'Help me',
  'post': "Hi, im unknown I don't have any friends, in class I sit alone and no one talks to me, everyone left me because they found someone better, I feel so left put man, I wish someone could help me",
  'text': "Help me ### Hi, im unknown I don't have any friends, in class I sit alone and no one talks to me, everyone left me because they found someone better, I feel so left put man, I wish someone could help me",
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-20 10:12:25',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': 'ohonbc',
  'title': 'Not having friends',
  'post': "I always am the last picked, last called, or not invited at all. I don't have a real friend group, I do not really have things to do on a friday or saturday. Or monday.... or pretty much any day of the week. I feel empty, not loved and unappreciated. And honestly, this is just the truth. I have no friends, people I trust and can call when I have issues. I really don't know what to do? Its summer, i fill my days by being on my phone. But there is nothing going on it? Yeah, its weird.",
  'text': "Not having friends ### I always am the last picked, last called, or not invited at all. I don't have a real friend group, I do not really have things to do on a friday or saturday. Or monday.... or pretty much any day of the week. I feel empty, not loved and unappreciated. And honestly, this is just the truth. I have no friends, people I trust and can call when I have issues. I really don't know what to do? Its summer, i fill my days by being on my phone. But there is nothing going on it? Yeah, its weird.",
  'upvotes': 29,
  'date': '2021-07-10 19:00:22',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '11ac7if',
  'title': 'On the edge of the abyss',
  'post': 'I have never had a friend in my entire life. I know im never going to experience the exuberant highs of friendship, and yet i desire it more than anything else. The agony of my predicament is beyond compare. I have no idea how to interact with other people and im COMPLETELY isolated. Im paralyzed. I dont know what to do.',
  'text': 'On the edge of the abyss ### I have never had a friend in my entire life. I know im never going to experience the exuberant highs of friendship, and yet i desire it more than anything else. The agony of my predicament is beyond compare. I have no idea how to interact with other people and im COMPLETELY isolated. Im paralyzed. I dont know what to do.',
  'upvotes': 13,
  'date': '2023-02-23 23:28:58',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'zuyu6q',
  'title': 'Merry Christmas!',
  'post': "It just came to my mind that Christmas could be another tough period for depression partners. I'm going through it now even he's not my partner (we tried but he say he can't have a girlfriend right now) and I really want him to be my partner but now I have to accept a fact that he's a friend for me. So few days ago he became more irritated then he asked me to leave him alone, I hasn't texted him till yesterday. My message was very short, I wished Merry Christmas, I got nothing back. Understand him very well but still there are some feelings... I really want him get better.\n\nI know here are more people like me or going through something similar. Stay strong, you are very amazing people, your partners are amazing too even when they have some difficulties in their heads. Merry Christmas! Have a great holidays, sending a hug to each of you! <3",
  'text': "Merry Christmas! ### It just came to my mind that Christmas could be another tough period for depression partners. I'm going through it now even he's not my partner (we tried but he say he can't have a girlfriend right now) and I really want him to be my partner but now I have to accept a fact that he's a friend for me. So few days ago he became more irritated then he asked me to leave him alone, I hasn't texted him till yesterday. My message was very short, I wished Merry Christmas, I got nothing back. Understand him very well but still there are some feelings... I really want him get better. I know here are more people like me or going through something similar. Stay strong, you are very amazing people, your partners are amazing too even when they have some difficulties in their heads. Merry Christmas! Have a great holidays, sending a hug to each of you! <3",
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2022-12-25 14:12:56',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10001000},
 {'id': '11rx3at',
  'title': "Does anyone else's partners say they're going to do things when they're in a good mood and then never do it?",
  'post': "I'm wondering if this is a common thing. He'll make promises that he's going to do things and then when the time comes he will get upset that I brought it up",
  'text': "Does anyone else's partners say they're going to do things when they're in a good mood and then never do it? ### I'm wondering if this is a common thing. He'll make promises that he's going to do things and then when the time comes he will get upset that I brought it up",
  'upvotes': 20,
  'date': '2023-03-15 13:53:47',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'har4i5',
  'title': "Am I a terrible person? My mom gives me so much anxiety and I feel like that anxiety will only be gone, once she's gone.",
  'post': "I moved out of the house 10 months ago. The main reason is my mother and our toxic relationship. I never realized how much anxiety she's been causing me, until it was gone. I felt free.\nBut every now and then, my mother would text me and guilt trip me into coming back. And that's when I realized the anxiety is not totally gone. Even though we're thousand miles apart, the amount of anxiety she's causing is the same. And i thought the only time I could get rid of it is once she's gone. I don't wish for her to be gone soon, but i have strong feelings about it. Am I a terrible person?\nI don't have anyone to share this with because I know i'll be judged. All my friends have great relationships with their mother. And I come from a place with close knit families. These thoughts will sound horrible to them.",
  'text': "Am I a terrible person? My mom gives me so much anxiety and I feel like that anxiety will only be gone, once she's gone. ### I moved out of the house 10 months ago. The main reason is my mother and our toxic relationship. I never realized how much anxiety she's been causing me, until it was gone. I felt free. But every now and then, my mother would text me and guilt trip me into coming back. And that's when I realized the anxiety is not totally gone. Even though we're thousand miles apart, the amount of anxiety she's causing is the same. And i thought the only time I could get rid of it is once she's gone. I don't wish for her to be gone soon, but i have strong feelings about it. Am I a terrible person? I don't have anyone to share this with because I know i'll be judged. All my friends have great relationships with their mother. And I come from a place with close knit families. These thoughts will sound horrible to them.",
  'upvotes': 311,
  'date': '2020-06-17 13:28:53',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'hplf47',
  'title': 'I don’t know what to do',
  'post': 'My mother and her boyfriend are extremely racist, yet they refuse to admit to it. The most awful part is, my biological father is a POC, though I’m very white passing. Dealing with their hatred everyday has made me feel unsafe at home. It’s worsened since the protests started. They don’t care to listen to me. Other things are happening in my life, and coming home to hatred has made me feel suicidal. I’m sorry if this post doesn’t belong here. Please remove it if it doesn’t, I’m sorry for any trouble I cause. I just don’t know what to do. I don’t have anywhere to go.',
  'text': 'I don’t know what to do ### My mother and her boyfriend are extremely racist, yet they refuse to admit to it. The most awful part is, my biological father is a POC, though I’m very white passing. Dealing with their hatred everyday has made me feel unsafe at home. It’s worsened since the protests started. They don’t care to listen to me. Other things are happening in my life, and coming home to hatred has made me feel suicidal. I’m sorry if this post doesn’t belong here. Please remove it if it doesn’t, I’m sorry for any trouble I cause. I just don’t know what to do. I don’t have anywhere to go.',
  'upvotes': 74,
  'date': '2020-07-12 00:50:38',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10011111},
 {'id': 'knt0fx',
  'title': "Are you also tired of pretending to be happy for other people's sake bcs they can't handle your sadness and you might just burden them with whatever you're feeling?",
  'post': 'I know not everyone\'s gonna understand why or how a person can be this sad, but honestly it\'s just tiring to walk on eggshells around someone. I know I don\'t have to and I can just choose not to pretend, but it is easier to pretend than deal with all the "you\'re just choosing to be sad, just cheer up.", "you\'re overreacting. other people have it worse." It is damaging to deal with such comments and I can\'t take any more of that. ++ I don\'t want to ruin their happiness.\n\nTo anyone else who feels the same way, I c u. I\'m giving hugs to whoever wants it. I wish y\'all a happy new year. I\'m proud of you for making it this far. 🎉',
  'text': 'Are you also tired of pretending to be happy for other people\'s sake bcs they can\'t handle your sadness and you might just burden them with whatever you\'re feeling? ### I know not everyone\'s gonna understand why or how a person can be this sad, but honestly it\'s just tiring to walk on eggshells around someone. I know I don\'t have to and I can just choose not to pretend, but it is easier to pretend than deal with all the "you\'re just choosing to be sad, just cheer up.", "you\'re overreacting. other people have it worse." It is damaging to deal with such comments and I can\'t take any more of that. ++ I don\'t want to ruin their happiness. To anyone else who feels the same way, I c u. I\'m giving hugs to whoever wants it. I wish y\'all a happy new year. I\'m proud of you for making it this far. 🎉',
  'upvotes': 651,
  'date': '2020-12-31 16:29:03',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'eh4tqw',
  'title': "Y'all ever been so lonely and starved of human contact because you shut yourself off from everyone because school holidays to the point where u hug your guitar because it has grooves like the waist of a human",
  'post': "Yeah haha me neither whaaaaat that's weird",
  'text': "Y'all ever been so lonely and starved of human contact because you shut yourself off from everyone because school holidays to the point where u hug your guitar because it has grooves like the waist of a human ### Yeah haha me neither whaaaaat that's weird",
  'upvotes': 26,
  'date': '2019-12-29 11:10:07',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '11scmmd',
  'title': 'I just want someone to care about me…',
  'post': 'I dont even know what to say anymore. This is my 4th breakdown this month.\n\nI don’t like this life. I don’t like that everyone I meet eventually leaves me. I don’t like that I’m too awkward to make friends. I don’t like how even in my worst times, I feel completely worthless. I don’t even know what I’m looking for my making this post…I just want the pain to stop. The loneliness, the crying spells, the thoughts of harming myself…I just want to be happy, and I havent had that in years…\n\nI really appreciate all the helpful and caring comments. I’m feeling better, but all I can do is hope it doesnt hit me again soon.',
  'text': 'I just want someone to care about me… ### I dont even know what to say anymore. This is my 4th breakdown this month. I don’t like this life. I don’t like that everyone I meet eventually leaves me. I don’t like that I’m too awkward to make friends. I don’t like how even in my worst times, I feel completely worthless. I don’t even know what I’m looking for my making this post…I just want the pain to stop. The loneliness, the crying spells, the thoughts of harming myself…I just want to be happy, and I havent had that in years… I really appreciate all the helpful and caring comments. I’m feeling better, but all I can do is hope it doesnt hit me again soon.',
  'upvotes': 271,
  'date': '2023-03-15 23:11:10',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'worthlessness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111001},
 {'id': '16xxg94',
  'title': 'I miss my parents.',
  'post': "They've been gone for 19 years, but I always feel like it happened just recently. People say you get used to the pain and sadness as time passes; I don't think that applies to me. And I wonder why fate decided to take them both at the same time?\n\nI'm a single parent with no friends or family. Currently jobless, penniless. Every time depression kicks in, I talk to myself as if I'm talking to them, asking for advice. I don't know what to do in life; I'm still lost without you two. How do I get past this situation?    \n\nI miss you both terribly. I never got to tell you, but I love you so much. I hope you forgive me, for I was an angry teenager with so many questions in life. Never in my life have I regretted not tagging along with you two when you left. I could've saved you both.                    \nI think about dying everyday but I can't let the same thing happen to my daughter as she'll be alone as I am if I were to die soon. I don't want her to hate the world like do.",
  'text': "I miss my parents. ### They've been gone for 19 years, but I always feel like it happened just recently. People say you get used to the pain and sadness as time passes; I don't think that applies to me. And I wonder why fate decided to take them both at the same time? I'm a single parent with no friends or family. Currently jobless, penniless. Every time depression kicks in, I talk to myself as if I'm talking to them, asking for advice. I don't know what to do in life; I'm still lost without you two. How do I get past this situation? I miss you both terribly. I never got to tell you, but I love you so much. I hope you forgive me, for I was an angry teenager with so many questions in life. Never in my life have I regretted not tagging along with you two when you left. I could've saved you both. I think about dying everyday but I can't let the same thing happen to my daughter as she'll be alone as I am if I were to die soon. I don't want her to hate the world like do.",
  'upvotes': 222,
  'date': '2023-10-02 14:02:05',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111110},
 {'id': '1721ey5',
  'title': 'What if i off myself',
  'post': 'Just sayin. Would probably help the universe further into entropy.\n\nLogically, my brain knows that there are good things out there, but I’d probably screw it up with the way my brain is wired.\n\nI’ve tried everything. Talking to friends and family, going on vacation and just trying to exist.\n\nThere are days when I get this surge of “i’m alive rn, might as well do what I want” and i get motivated. Then there are days when I interpret it the opposite way.\n\nThe contradictions and endless ruminations are starting to cook my brain.\n\nI just want to escape from my brain.',
  'text': 'What if i off myself ### Just sayin. Would probably help the universe further into entropy. Logically, my brain knows that there are good things out there, but I’d probably screw it up with the way my brain is wired. I’ve tried everything. Talking to friends and family, going on vacation and just trying to exist. There are days when I get this surge of “i’m alive rn, might as well do what I want” and i get motivated. Then there are days when I interpret it the opposite way. The contradictions and endless ruminations are starting to cook my brain. I just want to escape from my brain.',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-10-07 08:40:37',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 1010000},
 {'id': 'znpu79',
  'title': '“It’s going to get better”',
  'post': 'Tired of hearing this. I don’t believe it AT ALL. Maybe I sort of believed it 5 years ago, but now after 10 years of constant misery it’s a joke 😂',
  'text': '“It’s going to get better” ### Tired of hearing this. I don’t believe it AT ALL. Maybe I sort of believed it 5 years ago, but now after 10 years of constant misery it’s a joke 😂',
  'upvotes': 369,
  'date': '2022-12-16 21:38:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': 'qbkkr5',
  'title': 'Am I the only one who HATES when people say “ omg that (annoying event) gave me PTSD” ?',
  'post': 'So I’ve been seeing a trend of people claiming they got “ PTSD” from a work meeting, getting their order wrong , being in a line too long, being in traffic & basically having any inconvenience in their life. It’s annoying & disrespectful af to people who actually have had real trauma am I the only one pissed off at how much “ptsd” is thrown around ? Like it’s the same as just being upset??  (PTSD has ruined my life & I can’t even drive without panic attacks due to my very serious car accident yet People are claiming they have ptsd like it’s cool 🙄)',
  'text': 'Am I the only one who HATES when people say “ omg that (annoying event) gave me PTSD” ? ### So I’ve been seeing a trend of people claiming they got “ PTSD” from a work meeting, getting their order wrong , being in a line too long, being in traffic & basically having any inconvenience in their life. It’s annoying & disrespectful af to people who actually have had real trauma am I the only one pissed off at how much “ptsd” is thrown around ? Like it’s the same as just being upset?? (PTSD has ruined my life & I can’t even drive without panic attacks due to my very serious car accident yet People are claiming they have ptsd like it’s cool 🙄)',
  'upvotes': 217,
  'date': '2021-10-19 20:47:37',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'brain dysfunction (forget)', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11000001},
 {'id': '177u7tf',
  'title': 'Am i depressed?',
  'post': 'Please leave a comment, i rly need to know\n\nSo for the past few weeks ive been feeling completely down, and not happy at all, like i feel so numb and emotionless, like the littlest things make me exhausted, I feel so... idk down and i wanna sleep all day, and listen to sad music. And like if i smile i can see how my eyes dont smile with me, i prob look rude, and also now i started wearing a mask, ig so ppl dont see my emotionless face. Yesterday i was at an event and i felt so miserable and sad. and i just wanted to close my eyes, listen to music, and cry.\n\nso idk, am i depressed? also background info: I have anxiety and panic disorder, also anxiety, i over think a TON, trust issues, i self h@rm, and lately ive lost many ppl in my life its left me broken, plus my mentally and verbally abusive family messed me up.\n\n&#x200B;',
  'text': 'Am i depressed? ### Please leave a comment, i rly need to know So for the past few weeks ive been feeling completely down, and not happy at all, like i feel so numb and emotionless, like the littlest things make me exhausted, I feel so... idk down and i wanna sleep all day, and listen to sad music. And like if i smile i can see how my eyes dont smile with me, i prob look rude, and also now i started wearing a mask, ig so ppl dont see my emotionless face. Yesterday i was at an event and i felt so miserable and sad. and i just wanted to close my eyes, listen to music, and cry. so idk, am i depressed? also background info: I have anxiety and panic disorder, also anxiety, i over think a TON, trust issues, i self h@rm, and lately ive lost many ppl in my life its left me broken, plus my mentally and verbally abusive family messed me up. &#x200B;',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-10-14 17:12:29',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1110100},
 {'id': '13tixhp',
  'title': 'Sleeping is my favorite activity',
  'post': 'I hate my life. I hate being alive. But I’m too much of a coward to actually end my life. So the closest I can get to dying is by falling asleep. I get excited whenever I feel tired and am about to sleep. But the worst part is that I won’t sleep forever and I’ll wake up back into my horrible life',
  'text': 'Sleeping is my favorite activity ### I hate my life. I hate being alive. But I’m too much of a coward to actually end my life. So the closest I can get to dying is by falling asleep. I get excited whenever I feel tired and am about to sleep. But the worst part is that I won’t sleep forever and I’ll wake up back into my horrible life',
  'upvotes': 653,
  'date': '2023-05-27 21:37:05',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': 'jvns8u',
  'title': 'One of the most simple yet painful things nobody talks about',
  'post': 'Is wanting be taken care of when you’re sick. Just wanting someone to hold you or bring you soup or water or hold your hair or go to the doctor with you.',
  'text': 'One of the most simple yet painful things nobody talks about ### Is wanting be taken care of when you’re sick. Just wanting someone to hold you or bring you soup or water or hold your hair or go to the doctor with you.',
  'upvotes': 270,
  'date': '2020-11-17 05:59:31',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 100100},
 {'id': 'h7q451',
  'title': 'Family does not accept diagnosis?',
  'post': 'So, I’m 17. I have been diagnosed with PTSD for a few years now, due to events I won’t disclose. My mother tells me I have never experienced trauma, and my father began to yell at the psychiatrist when he was told of my diagnoses, as he is in the marines. I have displayed these symptoms for years, and I suffer from extreme night terrors. I take Prazosin for it, and I go to a therapist who specializes in the treatment. My parents are part of the reason of my diagnoses, but are they living in denial? Am I going crazy?! Is this my fault???',
  'text': 'Family does not accept diagnosis? ### So, I’m 17. I have been diagnosed with PTSD for a few years now, due to events I won’t disclose. My mother tells me I have never experienced trauma, and my father began to yell at the psychiatrist when he was told of my diagnoses, as he is in the marines. I have displayed these symptoms for years, and I suffer from extreme night terrors. I take Prazosin for it, and I go to a therapist who specializes in the treatment. My parents are part of the reason of my diagnoses, but are they living in denial? Am I going crazy?! Is this my fault???',
  'upvotes': 102,
  'date': '2020-06-12 18:21:38',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': 'jswksa',
  'title': 'Does anyone else with depression have impaired attention span?',
  'post': 'Tell me about your struggles with it.',
  'text': 'Does anyone else with depression have impaired attention span? ### Tell me about your struggles with it.',
  'upvotes': 377,
  'date': '2020-11-12 15:30:22',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1000100},
 {'id': 'hq0aok',
  'title': "I don't mind being lonely, I just don't want to become mentally ill.",
  'post': "Hi.\nI don't usually post this kind of stuff on internet.\nI don't have friends and speak to people only at work.\nI live alone and don't make much money. From time to time i get depressed but it goes away mostly. \nI'm fine with that. I just don't wanna go crazy, like ChrisChan seriously mentally ill crazy.  I noticed i start getting paranoid sometimes. I don't trust people usually but lately i assume they want to hurt me somehow. \nWhat symptomes should I look for ? How to recognise mental ilness ?",
  'text': "I don't mind being lonely, I just don't want to become mentally ill. ### Hi. I don't usually post this kind of stuff on internet. I don't have friends and speak to people only at work. I live alone and don't make much money. From time to time i get depressed but it goes away mostly. I'm fine with that. I just don't wanna go crazy, like ChrisChan seriously mentally ill crazy. I noticed i start getting paranoid sometimes. I don't trust people usually but lately i assume they want to hurt me somehow. What symptomes should I look for ? How to recognise mental ilness ?",
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2020-07-12 19:24:55',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'mj616l',
  'title': 'Confused About Some Ideas',
  'post': "TW: Suicide????\n\nHow can I tell if the suicidal ideation is because of an underlying depression or due to the pandemic fatigue? We're still on lockdown ever since last year....",
  'text': "Confused About Some Ideas ### TW: Suicide???? How can I tell if the suicidal ideation is because of an underlying depression or due to the pandemic fatigue? We're still on lockdown ever since last year....",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2021-04-03 10:33:03',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 110},
 {'id': 'z4d0vd',
  'title': "I'm a burden to my family. I am a mistake.",
  'post': "I can't seem to find my goal and purpose in life. I envy my friends deeply, they already have a path in life. I'm a mistake unlike my younger siblings that is planned. I see it in their eyes that I'm a nuisance.",
  'text': "I'm a burden to my family. I am a mistake. ### I can't seem to find my goal and purpose in life. I envy my friends deeply, they already have a path in life. I'm a mistake unlike my younger siblings that is planned. I see it in their eyes that I'm a nuisance.",
  'upvotes': 181,
  'date': '2022-11-25 13:09:57',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': 'tpsk5y',
  'title': 'Confessing I’m lonely, nothing more than that',
  'post': 'Nothing of value to add here and not even a rant, but I am really fucking lonely so wanted to get that off my chest',
  'text': 'Confessing I’m lonely, nothing more than that ### Nothing of value to add here and not even a rant, but I am really fucking lonely so wanted to get that off my chest',
  'upvotes': 25,
  'date': '2022-03-27 20:34:08',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '177cxuj',
  'title': 'I’m so tired of being tired all the time.',
  'post': 'I wonder what it feels like to not feel like this everyday. I just don’t know what to do anymore. I feel like a bomb that could go off at any time. I don’t think my antidepressants are working anymore. I’ve felt so incredibly hopeless over the past few weeks. And irritable. I’ve been putting on a brave face and sucking it up, but it’s draining. All I want to do is lie in bed and waste away. I’m just so fucking sad all the time and I don’t know why.',
  'text': 'I’m so tired of being tired all the time. ### I wonder what it feels like to not feel like this everyday. I just don’t know what to do anymore. I feel like a bomb that could go off at any time. I don’t think my antidepressants are working anymore. I’ve felt so incredibly hopeless over the past few weeks. And irritable. I’ve been putting on a brave face and sucking it up, but it’s draining. All I want to do is lie in bed and waste away. I’m just so fucking sad all the time and I don’t know why.',
  'upvotes': 122,
  'date': '2023-10-14 00:23:28',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1010101},
 {'id': 'lqpncu',
  'title': "I hate the misconception that people who are suicidal don't think about how their family and friends will be impacted.",
  'post': "I've had several people bring this up to me when I've opened up to them about my suicidal thoughts and honestly I'm tired of hearing it. I know I've thought about my family's reactions a lot when I've been considering a plan for killing myself, so I'm tired of people thinking that we're all just selfish for being suicidal. Not only did I put heavy consideration into my family's reaction, I also thought they probably just wouldn't care or would be better off without me even if they did care. Depression and suicidal thoughts can literally warp your thinking and make it hard to think rationally about these types of things. \nI don't personally think that people who have never been suicidal have any right trying to shame us or make us feel guilty for being this way when I'm sure most of us would do anything to enjoy life and not want to die.",
  'text': "I hate the misconception that people who are suicidal don't think about how their family and friends will be impacted. ### I've had several people bring this up to me when I've opened up to them about my suicidal thoughts and honestly I'm tired of hearing it. I know I've thought about my family's reactions a lot when I've been considering a plan for killing myself, so I'm tired of people thinking that we're all just selfish for being suicidal. Not only did I put heavy consideration into my family's reaction, I also thought they probably just wouldn't care or would be better off without me even if they did care. Depression and suicidal thoughts can literally warp your thinking and make it hard to think rationally about these types of things. I don't personally think that people who have never been suicidal have any right trying to shame us or make us feel guilty for being this way when I'm sure most of us would do anything to enjoy life and not want to die.",
  'upvotes': 1376,
  'date': '2021-02-23 18:42:26',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'sadness', 'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000110},
 {'id': '10qbw54',
  'title': 'I feel really alone',
  'post': 'I have people I know but somehow I can never get close to people. My family was abusive so I don’t talk to them. It feels like everyone always has a lot of friends, go out all the time. I’m starting to feel this dread, this loneliness, that I will never fit in anywhere. I’m 23 years old, lived in several countries, know several languages, and I never fit in anywhere. I have a steady job, and things I am passionate about. I don’t know what to do and it’s make me want to give up on life. I keep seeing people saying stories about how they go out and how they try new foods and are having fun. \n\nI am here to ask for advice on what I can do to try and be more liked by people? I really dont get whats wrong with me.',
  'text': 'I feel really alone ### I have people I know but somehow I can never get close to people. My family was abusive so I don’t talk to them. It feels like everyone always has a lot of friends, go out all the time. I’m starting to feel this dread, this loneliness, that I will never fit in anywhere. I’m 23 years old, lived in several countries, know several languages, and I never fit in anywhere. I have a steady job, and things I am passionate about. I don’t know what to do and it’s make me want to give up on life. I keep seeing people saying stories about how they go out and how they try new foods and are having fun. I am here to ask for advice on what I can do to try and be more liked by people? I really dont get whats wrong with me.',
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2023-01-31 22:01:41',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': '178rn5o',
  'title': 'This shit bleeds into everything I do',
  'post': 'When I was younger writing a paper on something that interested me was like, FUN to me. I really want to get back to creating things any way I can, but every single time I try it’s like my depression just turns it in the same old allegory for my sadness. I’m so sick of these stories and I know they’re hard to relate to so I’d like to try and lead myself in a different direction. But idk how to explain it the words just start turning into self pity. I don’t know how to stop this as it feels I have very little control over it. Does ANYONE relate to what I’m saying here? My creative process usually comes naturally but the only thing that comes naturally anymore is crying in bed. Anyone ever have to get past something like this without help?',
  'text': 'This shit bleeds into everything I do ### When I was younger writing a paper on something that interested me was like, FUN to me. I really want to get back to creating things any way I can, but every single time I try it’s like my depression just turns it in the same old allegory for my sadness. I’m so sick of these stories and I know they’re hard to relate to so I’d like to try and lead myself in a different direction. But idk how to explain it the words just start turning into self pity. I don’t know how to stop this as it feels I have very little control over it. Does ANYONE relate to what I’m saying here? My creative process usually comes naturally but the only thing that comes naturally anymore is crying in bed. Anyone ever have to get past something like this without help?',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-15 23:02:51',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': '133usqm',
  'title': "I think I've lost the ability to learn or read or understand anything complex especially academics.",
  'post': "I did expect that my mental function would decline but I can safely say from my experiences that I can no longer connect things logically in terms of academic stuff like maths or science etc. Not only that but I also can't seem to remember stuff sometimes even after a few minutes almost like I'm living in a dream. I also am not able to speak that much anymore and sometimes when I go long durations without speaking or writing a language, I feel like I'm going to forget the language and lose the ability to communicate.",
  'text': "I think I've lost the ability to learn or read or understand anything complex especially academics. ### I did expect that my mental function would decline but I can safely say from my experiences that I can no longer connect things logically in terms of academic stuff like maths or science etc. Not only that but I also can't seem to remember stuff sometimes even after a few minutes almost like I'm living in a dream. I also am not able to speak that much anymore and sometimes when I go long durations without speaking or writing a language, I feel like I'm going to forget the language and lose the ability to communicate.",
  'upvotes': 493,
  'date': '2023-04-30 15:25:58',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 1010000},
 {'id': '175mne2',
  'title': 'the secret to not having depression',
  'post': 'is to find a delusion you’re willing to accept. nothing matters. everything sucks. it’s all hopeless. most people get by on something they delude themselves into accepting with their whole heart. \n\nnow to find that thing….is hard…',
  'text': 'the secret to not having depression ### is to find a delusion you’re willing to accept. nothing matters. everything sucks. it’s all hopeless. most people get by on something they delude themselves into accepting with their whole heart. now to find that thing….is hard…',
  'upvotes': 109,
  'date': '2023-10-11 19:31:01',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10001},
 {'id': 'hx2j1m',
  'title': 'Having no one',
  'post': 'Feeling alone 24/7 i have nothing in common with my family my friends are all ok without me and busy in their own lives every girl that speaks to me likes someone else whats the point anymore do i just accept this is me forever :(',
  'text': 'Having no one ### Feeling alone 24/7 i have nothing in common with my family my friends are all ok without me and busy in their own lives every girl that speaks to me likes someone else whats the point anymore do i just accept this is me forever :(',
  'upvotes': 18,
  'date': '2020-07-24 14:15:49',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '11wegyr',
  'title': 'Why should I want to be alive',
  'post': 'People act almost offended about it. And they\'re always like "well 10% of it is sometimes decent" as if that\'s supposed to sway me. I do not want to live for miniscule shreds of happiness I have to hunt for. Things keep getting worse, I don\'t think I\'m religious anymore because it just doesn\'t make sense to me. I\'m done trying to "have faith" when it makes me feel like a donkey chasing a carrot tied to a pole on its back. The goal post keeps moving further away and I\'m tired of chasing it. This isn\'t worth it. Any hope I used to have for happiness has left. I don\'t believe in it anymore.',
  'text': 'Why should I want to be alive ### People act almost offended about it. And they\'re always like "well 10% of it is sometimes decent" as if that\'s supposed to sway me. I do not want to live for miniscule shreds of happiness I have to hunt for. Things keep getting worse, I don\'t think I\'m religious anymore because it just doesn\'t make sense to me.
