 {'id': 'wkqjym',
  'title': "I don't want to kill myself. But if death comes knocking, I wouldn't hesitate to open the door.",
  'post': "I don't think I have it in me to kill myself. But at the same time, I don't do anything to make my life better. Even though I know and understand and comprehend that if I just exercised, ate healthy, talked to a therapist and whatnot, things would be much better for me. I can completely visualize it as I write this. But when it comes down to it, I don't feel like doing any of that. Call it laziness, procrastination, depression, whatever; I actively choose to do the things that will decrease my life expectancy as much as possible. \n\nI don't want to kill myself. But if I'm ever held at gunpoint, I would not care if they pulled the trigger. In fact I'd welcome it. \n\nThat's how I feel.",
  'text': "I don't want to kill myself. But if death comes knocking, I wouldn't hesitate to open the door. ### I don't think I have it in me to kill myself. But at the same time, I don't do anything to make my life better. Even though I know and understand and comprehend that if I just exercised, ate healthy, talked to a therapist and whatnot, things would be much better for me. I can completely visualize it as I write this. But when it comes down to it, I don't feel like doing any of that. Call it laziness, procrastination, depression, whatever; I actively choose to do the things that will decrease my life expectancy as much as possible. I don't want to kill myself. But if I'm ever held at gunpoint, I would not care if they pulled the trigger. In fact I'd welcome it. That's how I feel.",
  'upvotes': 630,
  'date': '2022-08-10 06:53:32',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1010110},
 {'id': 'j9on9w',
  'title': 'I tried to hang myself a few hours ago and failed, now i feel dumb and decided to not do it anymore',
  'post': "A few hours ago, i finally reached my peak and hooked up a noose. But after trying to hang, the hook broke on me and left me shaking, body cold, and my neck feels like it just went through boot camp. I was left with this chilled and frightened feeling, because it was just so new. It had me stare at the ceiling and think about things. But after that i just thought to myself if i really wanted to die or not. It took me a few hours to meditate and contemplate over what i did and now i feel dumb for even doing that.\n\nI would want to share what's up, but I'm already over it. Though I'm not really against opening up, i just don't want to bother too many people. But i just wanted to share that a curtain hook saved my life by being a bad quality product.",
  'text': "I tried to hang myself a few hours ago and failed, now i feel dumb and decided to not do it anymore ### A few hours ago, i finally reached my peak and hooked up a noose. But after trying to hang, the hook broke on me and left me shaking, body cold, and my neck feels like it just went through boot camp. I was left with this chilled and frightened feeling, because it was just so new. It had me stare at the ceiling and think about things. But after that i just thought to myself if i really wanted to die or not. It took me a few hours to meditate and contemplate over what i did and now i feel dumb for even doing that. I would want to share what's up, but I'm already over it. Though I'm not really against opening up, i just don't want to bother too many people. But i just wanted to share that a curtain hook saved my life by being a bad quality product.",
  'upvotes': 1435,
  'date': '2020-10-12 10:43:28',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111110},
 {'id': 'nd1hcv',
  'title': '"OMG grow up, you\'re an adult!!! Why don\'t you move out of your parents!? Just get your own apartment you\'re (blank years old)!"',
  'post': "Thanks I'm cured",
  'text': '"OMG grow up, you\'re an adult!!! Why don\'t you move out of your parents!? Just get your own apartment you\'re (blank years old)!" ### Thanks I\'m cured',
  'upvotes': 109,
  'date': '2021-05-15 15:32:56',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': '12xt3n8',
  'title': 'I just wanna be happy.',
  'post': "It's not much. I just wanna be happy for once. And not be fake or show i am happy to others. I want to be genuinely happy. I want to sleep without crying. I want to feel less broken. \n\nIt feels so unrealistic. Being fake feels like the only thing i can do.\n\nI am so broken. No one around me knows. I don't even know who to talk to. \n\nI need help.",
  'text': "I just wanna be happy. ### It's not much. I just wanna be happy for once. And not be fake or show i am happy to others. I want to be genuinely happy. I want to sleep without crying. I want to feel less broken. It feels so unrealistic. Being fake feels like the only thing i can do. I am so broken. No one around me knows. I don't even know who to talk to. I need help.",
  'upvotes': 204,
  'date': '2023-04-24 19:16:43',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': '17a7eyc',
  'title': 'Dont know what to do',
  'post': 'Still awake now, already 4 am here… need to dress up a few hours from now to go to the office.. ironically everything is supposedly fine but i get upset on the very stupidest details and frustrations.. it feels like my inner self is crumbling, needed to be healthy for an upcoming test but i am really exhausted and pressured, i do not have enough sleep…\n\nI dont know what to do anymore… i feel like im a burden to everyone, it sucks',
  'text': 'Dont know what to do ### Still awake now, already 4 am here… need to dress up a few hours from now to go to the office.. ironically everything is supposedly fine but i get upset on the very stupidest details and frustrations.. it feels like my inner self is crumbling, needed to be healthy for an upcoming test but i am really exhausted and pressured, i do not have enough sleep… I dont know what to do anymore… i feel like im a burden to everyone, it sucks',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-10-17 20:09:55',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'anger', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': 's6hzpb',
  'title': "Magic can't fix ptsd, why do I even have to say this...",
  'post': "It's fine to be religious, but for fucks sake astrology, crystals, manifesting, aliens, rituals to contact supernatural beings will NOT fix PTSD.  You won't believe how many people tell me it can...\n\nSide note, mods be aware that there are recruiters for alternative faiths on here trying to take advantage of desperate people. It's not any better than when Christians tell suffering people to find Jesus...\n\nI know it can be tempting to ascribe supernatural characteristics to things in order to cope, but magic isn't real. There aren't aliens, angles, and energies waiting to heal you. \n\nIt's okay to be desperate. I'm desperate. We're all desperate. It's okay to believe in alternative religion, but don't mistake it as the way people need to heal. Even if that stuff helps you cope, it's at the cost of seeing things for what they are. \n\nFuck I can't believe I'm legitimate have to say magic isn't real and can't solve ptsd. Fuck it.",
  'text': "Magic can't fix ptsd, why do I even have to say this... ### It's fine to be religious, but for fucks sake astrology, crystals, manifesting, aliens, rituals to contact supernatural beings will NOT fix PTSD. You won't believe how many people tell me it can... Side note, mods be aware that there are recruiters for alternative faiths on here trying to take advantage of desperate people. It's not any better than when Christians tell suffering people to find Jesus... I know it can be tempting to ascribe supernatural characteristics to things in order to cope, but magic isn't real. There aren't aliens, angles, and energies waiting to heal you. It's okay to be desperate. I'm desperate. We're all desperate. It's okay to believe in alternative religion, but don't mistake it as the way people need to heal. Even if that stuff helps you cope, it's at the cost of seeing things for what they are. Fuck I can't believe I'm legitimate have to say magic isn't real and can't solve ptsd. Fuck it.",
  'upvotes': 114,
  'date': '2022-01-17 23:15:24',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'anger', 'worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '106xrln',
  'title': "My parents are the only reason I haven't killed myself yet.",
  'post': "I feel guilty thinking about the pain I would have caused them and the grief they would have had to go through.\n\nI don't want to live. I don't want to spend another day in this world. I just want to die and get it all over with.\n\nI hate these thoughts, but sometimes I wish they would die too so I could kill myself without remorse.",
  'text': "My parents are the only reason I haven't killed myself yet. ### I feel guilty thinking about the pain I would have caused them and the grief they would have had to go through. I don't want to live. I don't want to spend another day in this world. I just want to die and get it all over with. I hate these thoughts, but sometimes I wish they would die too so I could kill myself without remorse.",
  'upvotes': 237,
  'date': '2023-01-08 23:22:20',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11010111},
 {'id': '16rmb39',
  'title': "I wish more people could see that I'm not OK",
  'post': "I don't like suffering alone, but it feels like I'm burdening someone when I try to bring up my depression. I feel like nobody wants to be around me because multiple people in my school say that I'm either annoying or I make them uncomfortable because they don't know me. I feel like I'm failing as a person because I don't have a friend group that feels like a support system, and nobody seems to bother when I act differently than normal...\n\nI wish I didn't have to be alone every day at school just because nobody talks to me. I want to unmask my depression more, but it feels so hard to do so...",
  'text': "I wish more people could see that I'm not OK ### I don't like suffering alone, but it feels like I'm burdening someone when I try to bring up my depression. I feel like nobody wants to be around me because multiple people in my school say that I'm either annoying or I make them uncomfortable because they don't know me. I feel like I'm failing as a person because I don't have a friend group that feels like a support system, and nobody seems to bother when I act differently than normal... I wish I didn't have to be alone every day at school just because nobody talks to me. I want to unmask my depression more, but it feels so hard to do so...",
  'upvotes': 10,
  'date': '2023-09-25 08:24:54',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11111111},
 {'id': 'f82md1',
  'title': 'Anyone also getting suicidal thoughts when seeing happy stuff?',
  'post': "Kind of a question rather than a suicide post but I just needed to get this off my mind.\n\nSo, whenever my friends send me cute stuff of their friends to them, or just happy/cute things, I immediately think about killing myself, and I'm honestly not sure why. Anyone else has them too?",
  'text': "Anyone also getting suicidal thoughts when seeing happy stuff? ### Kind of a question rather than a suicide post but I just needed to get this off my mind. So, whenever my friends send me cute stuff of their friends to them, or just happy/cute things, I immediately think about killing myself, and I'm honestly not sure why. Anyone else has them too?",
  'upvotes': 586,
  'date': '2020-02-23 01:44:37',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1011011},
 {'id': 'kbqdqj',
  'title': 'idk what to do anymore',
  'post': "I just don't know what to do anymore. My girlfriend left me without even looking back. My friends are leaving me one after the other, I'm stateless I don't even have fucking basic human rights. I live in Lebanon and we're probably going into a famine in the near future. My grandma died like 3 weeks ago. My mom is abusive. My dad isn't there for me. He left when I was 2 years old and now he's married and we don't talk like at all. I got raped a while ago and my mom blamed it on me and said that I probably enjoyed it. I'm like the black sheep of the family. No one cares about me. If I died no one would even come to my funeral. I can't show any sadness around my mom without her beating my ass. I don't have any privacy. I tried to end it 5 times before and it just didn't work. I tried to run away but my mom found me and forced me back. idk what to do I'm just lost",
  'text': "idk what to do anymore ### I just don't know what to do anymore. My girlfriend left me without even looking back. My friends are leaving me one after the other, I'm stateless I don't even have fucking basic human rights. I live in Lebanon and we're probably going into a famine in the near future. My grandma died like 3 weeks ago. My mom is abusive. My dad isn't there for me. He left when I was 2 years old and now he's married and we don't talk like at all. I got raped a while ago and my mom blamed it on me and said that I probably enjoyed it. I'm like the black sheep of the family. No one cares about me. If I died no one would even come to my funeral. I can't show any sadness around my mom without her beating my ass. I don't have any privacy. I tried to end it 5 times before and it just didn't work. I tried to run away but my mom found me and forced me back. idk what to do I'm just lost",
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2020-12-12 14:56:43',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '11jfyeq',
  'title': "I can't be the only one who always supports but never receives back?",
  'post': 'Hey all!\n\nSo I have severe depression due to loneliness and basically life going too fast I guess.\n\nI have my whole 32 years almost, reached out to friends, family and even random people online thay I\'ve seen struggling.\n\nI cannot be the only one who has no one who reaches out to them when you really need someone?\n\nI remember posting in my Instagram story a really dark messaging just pouring my heart out... One person who I barely talk to just messaged saying thanks for sharing your story with us and hope you get things sorted, which I appreciated.\n\nBut "friends", I\'ve reached out to them all the time but I never get anything back and this makes my depression worse.\n\nI have had seriously strong suicidal thoughts before and recently but thankfully due to belief in God, I\'d never do it.\n\nI just wanted to ask if anyone struggles with the same of always helping but never getting anything back?',
  'text': 'I can\'t be the only one who always supports but never receives back? ### Hey all! So I have severe depression due to loneliness and basically life going too fast I guess. I have my whole 32 years almost, reached out to friends, family and even random people online thay I\'ve seen struggling. I cannot be the only one who has no one who reaches out to them when you really need someone? I remember posting in my Instagram story a really dark messaging just pouring my heart out... One person who I barely talk to just messaged saying thanks for sharing your story with us and hope you get things sorted, which I appreciated. But "friends", I\'ve reached out to them all the time but I never get anything back and this makes my depression worse. I have had seriously strong suicidal thoughts before and recently but thankfully due to belief in God, I\'d never do it. I just wanted to ask if anyone struggles with the same of always helping but never getting anything back?',
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-03-05 22:26:52',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 111110},
 {'id': 'ipg2s9',
  'title': 'I want to pass away so badly',
  'post': "I don't want to kill myself I just want to pass away so people won't feel guilty\n\nLife hurts so badly and it just doesn't have any meaning anymore. I keep holding onto the good things and it keeps hurting me. I'm literally useless, I have no purpose. I make everything worse and I'm so done with people having to put up with me. I know what people in my life truly feel about me and I can't blame them. I want to make it easier for everyone and just die. I want to make it easier for myself. But I'm so cowardly I can't bring myself to kill myself. And there's this voice that keeps telling me what I'll miss out on. But I don't want to keep living painfully and regretting every second of my life, and making it hard for everyone else. I'm scared to die and yet I want it so bad. I hope I can just pass away in my sleep tonight or some day soon.",
  'text': "I want to pass away so badly ### I don't want to kill myself I just want to pass away so people won't feel guilty Life hurts so badly and it just doesn't have any meaning anymore. I keep holding onto the good things and it keeps hurting me. I'm literally useless, I have no purpose. I make everything worse and I'm so done with people having to put up with me. I know what people in my life truly feel about me and I can't blame them. I want to make it easier for everyone and just die. I want to make it easier for myself. But I'm so cowardly I can't bring myself to kill myself. And there's this voice that keeps telling me what I'll miss out on. But I don't want to keep living painfully and regretting every second of my life, and making it hard for everyone else. I'm scared to die and yet I want it so bad. I hope I can just pass away in my sleep tonight or some day soon.",
  'upvotes': 672,
  'date': '2020-09-09 13:40:50',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'da6y04',
  'title': 'So lonely my anxiety about my surroundings has heightened and I feel like I’m going to die',
  'post': 'My self esteem and self worth is at an all time low because people don’t see me as important they’d rather do their own thing or go on their phones than to talk to me like what is wrong with me it hurts being ignored you just feel neglected by everyone.\nThe worst part of it is you feel like a third wheel of every social group and that nobody takes you serious.You feel like such an outcast like you don’t belong anywhere.And depression has hit me too so i don’t enjoy anything or feel motivated to keep my life going its like being in a glass box seeing everything but not being able to connect.I don’t even feel motivated to talk to anyone I’m getting more fearful of socialising',
  'text': 'So lonely my anxiety about my surroundings has heightened and I feel like I’m going to die ### My self esteem and self worth is at an all time low because people don’t see me as important they’d rather do their own thing or go on their phones than to talk to me like what is wrong with me it hurts being ignored you just feel neglected by everyone. The worst part of it is you feel like a third wheel of every social group and that nobody takes you serious.You feel like such an outcast like you don’t belong anywhere.And depression has hit me too so i don’t enjoy anything or feel motivated to keep my life going its like being in a glass box seeing everything but not being able to connect.I don’t even feel motivated to talk to anyone I’m getting more fearful of socialising',
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2019-09-27 21:36:00',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'vc5c1l',
  'title': "Has your parent's “love” for you been so damaging, that you wish they “loved” you less?",
  'post': "\nHas your parent's “love” for you been so damaging, that you wish they “loved” you less? \n\n- The micromanaging (overall controlling nature)\n- The guilt-tripping \n- their self destructive nature in the name of love \n- feeling trapped and that you can't live life \n- never allowed to make your own decisions \n- your judgement is never trusted\n- the emotional abuse in the name of love \n- the physical abuse in the name of love\nAnd much much more",
  'text': "Has your parent's “love” for you been so damaging, that you wish they “loved” you less? ### Has your parent's “love” for you been so damaging, that you wish they “loved” you less? - The micromanaging (overall controlling nature) - The guilt-tripping - their self destructive nature in the name of love - feeling trapped and that you can't live life - never allowed to make your own decisions - your judgement is never trusted - the emotional abuse in the name of love - the physical abuse in the name of love And much much more",
  'upvotes': 60,
  'date': '2022-06-14 14:56:48',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10001},
 {'id': 'd2uf9w',
  'title': 'After a bit of scrolling... I’m crying because reading some of these posts really make me feel validated and like I’m not alone.',
  'post': 'This week has been god awful, but finding this sub and being able to relate / not feel so alone is really helpful and I’m really happy that this community exists.',
  'text': 'After a bit of scrolling... I’m crying because reading some of these posts really make me feel validated and like I’m not alone. ### This week has been god awful, but finding this sub and being able to relate / not feel so alone is really helpful and I’m really happy that this community exists.',
  'upvotes': 208,
  'date': '2019-09-11 18:14:02',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '16vwq19',
  'title': 'I’m just like everyone else.',
  'post': 'I’m moving into a place with my 2 little kids, in a town where I barely know anyone. I’m bad at making friends, I’m bad at relationships. Romantic and platonic. I take my frustrations out on my kids, especially my oldest. Which makes my depression worse because I know so deeply in my soul it’s wrong. I know therapy will help. I’m going to make an appointment on Tuesday to see my doctor because the loneliness ruins my life. I need to learn how to be okay in it and I don’t know if I ever will be.',
  'text': 'I’m just like everyone else. ### I’m moving into a place with my 2 little kids, in a town where I barely know anyone. I’m bad at making friends, I’m bad at relationships. Romantic and platonic. I take my frustrations out on my kids, especially my oldest. Which makes my depression worse because I know so deeply in my soul it’s wrong. I know therapy will help. I’m going to make an appointment on Tuesday to see my doctor because the loneliness ruins my life. I need to learn how to be okay in it and I don’t know if I ever will be.',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-09-30 03:49:33',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': 'oclerm',
  'title': "It hurts to know I'm nobody's best friend",
  'post': ':(',
  'text': "It hurts to know I'm nobody's best friend ### :(",
  'upvotes': 29,
  'date': '2021-07-02 22:44:35',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'op9wgu',
  'title': 'Does it bother you as well when people joke about a situation giving them PTSD? Or am I over reacting?',
  'post': 'I often hear people saying things like "if I give a presentation then I\'ll get PTSD" or "this meme gave me PTSD".\n\nHearing these "jokes" sends me into a very depressive mode for at least a few days. It\'s extremely difficult for me to hear. Am I the only one? It\'s so frustrating that people think it\'s okay to joke about trauma and mental illness.',
  'text': 'Does it bother you as well when people joke about a situation giving them PTSD? Or am I over reacting? ### I often hear people saying things like "if I give a presentation then I\'ll get PTSD" or "this meme gave me PTSD". Hearing these "jokes" sends me into a very depressive mode for at least a few days. It\'s extremely difficult for me to hear. Am I the only one? It\'s so frustrating that people think it\'s okay to joke about trauma and mental illness.',
  'upvotes': 185,
  'date': '2021-07-22 08:44:42',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'loneliness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': 'x8nscu',
  'title': 'Boy hung him self at school',
  'post': 'It is sad. Schools and society don’t do anything about it. He hung himself at 9:45 today in the boys locker room. He needed help but no one would give it to him. I know what it is like because I have gone through this type of thing but I got on meds and he did not. It’s scary to think I could of turned out the same way. I feel so bad for him and his family. You never know what is going on in someone’s life so be nice to everyone.',
  'text': 'Boy hung him self at school ### It is sad. Schools and society don’t do anything about it. He hung himself at 9:45 today in the boys locker room. He needed help but no one would give it to him. I know what it is like because I have gone through this type of thing but I got on meds and he did not. It’s scary to think I could of turned out the same way. I feel so bad for him and his family. You never know what is going on in someone’s life so be nice to everyone.',
  'upvotes': 378,
  'date': '2022-09-08 02:19:14',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10110},
 {'id': '179r07e',
  'title': "I can't take it anymore",
  'post': "It seems that things get good got a short while and then they become even worse than before. I've dragged myself out of the pit before but with a lot of support. And now I find myself in the biggest pit of my life and I truly see no hope.\n\nIf I manage to get myself out of this  then how deep will the pit be the next time.",
  'text': "I can't take it anymore ### It seems that things get good got a short while and then they become even worse than before. I've dragged myself out of the pit before but with a lot of support. And now I find myself in the biggest pit of my life and I truly see no hope. If I manage to get myself out of this then how deep will the pit be the next time.",
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2023-10-17 05:26:47',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '14ahd3s',
  'title': 'Toxic family member',
  'post': 'I wanted to ask if anyone knows what to do about an older sibling who was parentified as a kid that still tries to boss around her siblings. My sister is 31 and everything I do has to be a dig at me. She talks at me instead of talking to me. I’m 28 and I can say the sky is blue and she will argue that it is purple. I’m really lost as to why she does this. I love her but there are many times that I don’t know how to answer her besides okay… you’re right. Because I don’t want to fight. But I don’t even think that is healthy. Help me Please. I’m trying to figure out how to have a healthy relationship with her.',
  'text': 'Toxic family member ### I wanted to ask if anyone knows what to do about an older sibling who was parentified as a kid that still tries to boss around her siblings. My sister is 31 and everything I do has to be a dig at me. She talks at me instead of talking to me. I’m 28 and I can say the sky is blue and she will argue that it is purple. I’m really lost as to why she does this. I love her but there are many times that I don’t know how to answer her besides okay… you’re right. Because I don’t want to fight. But I don’t even think that is healthy. Help me Please. I’m trying to figure out how to have a healthy relationship with her.',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-06-15 23:47:50',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '16vy4rz',
  'title': "It's been so long...",
  'post': "It's been so long since I've had pancakes.\n\nIf I don't get pancakes soon, I might just die of a bleeding heart syndrome.",
  'text': "It's been so long... ### It's been so long since I've had pancakes. If I don't get pancakes soon, I might just die of a bleeding heart syndrome.",
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-09-30 05:06:43',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'wf6w4g',
  'title': 'Did what you guys suggested and got better',
  'post': 'I have a husband that isn’t around much, doesn’t put in much effort into our marriage, and is generally just aloof.  I’ve given up…no active plan to divorce but it’s a possibility for him to file. \n\nHowever, I took your (subreddit) advice and got better. I did my own thing, found my own enjoyment, and stepped out of the toxic cycle.  I just won’t engage during those angry (what are now just his) moments, and really just try to avoid them (him) all together.  Besides a crappy marriage that I’ve come to terms with, my life is really fulfilling.  I’m happy. Crappy marriage has shrunk down to a small part of my life.  I’ve accepted this situation and however it turns out, but really I’m just feeling hopeful about my life and future, regardless of what part he plays in it. \n\nI didn’t expect my husband to notice any of this. But he did. \n\nAnd then accused me of cheating.\n\n(I’m not)\n\n:/',
  'text': 'Did what you guys suggested and got better ### I have a husband that isn’t around much, doesn’t put in much effort into our marriage, and is generally just aloof. I’ve given up…no active plan to divorce but it’s a possibility for him to file. However, I took your (subreddit) advice and got better. I did my own thing, found my own enjoyment, and stepped out of the toxic cycle. I just won’t engage during those angry (what are now just his) moments, and really just try to avoid them (him) all together. Besides a crappy marriage that I’ve come to terms with, my life is really fulfilling. I’m happy. Crappy marriage has shrunk down to a small part of my life. I’ve accepted this situation and however it turns out, but really I’m just feeling hopeful about my life and future, regardless of what part he plays in it. I didn’t expect my husband to notice any of this. But he did. And then accused me of cheating. (I’m not) :/',
  'upvotes': 186,
  'date': '2022-08-03 13:39:32',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10001000},
 {'id': 'jxv2tx',
  'title': 'I’m Not a Loser for Choosing Medication',
  'post': 'I’m tired of choosing medication being made to look like a regrettable choice. That somehow I’m not as “victorious” because I couldn’t make it without meds. Look, if someone can do it without meds I think that’s great, but I don’t think they should be put on a pedestal as someone who “made it”. I’m a 46 year old mom and dammit I’m just as victorious. Yes I’m on medication for my OCD, depression, and schizophrenia. So what?! I’m still here, my kids still have their momma and to me a win is a win. I hope you don’t feel ashamed if you’re on meds. You shouldn’t.',
  'text': 'I’m Not a Loser for Choosing Medication ### I’m tired of choosing medication being made to look like a regrettable choice. That somehow I’m not as “victorious” because I couldn’t make it without meds. Look, if someone can do it without meds I think that’s great, but I don’t think they should be put on a pedestal as someone who “made it”. I’m a 46 year old mom and dammit I’m just as victorious. Yes I’m on medication for my OCD, depression, and schizophrenia. So what?! I’m still here, my kids still have their momma and to me a win is a win. I hope you don’t feel ashamed if you’re on meds. You shouldn’t.',
  'upvotes': 785,
  'date': '2020-11-20 18:55:36',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'e87u8l',
  'title': 'Do anyone have 30 minutes just to talk?',
  'post': "So I called in sick today because I didn't do anything that I was supposed to during the weekend since I have been feeling low lately. \nI've stopped eating regularly and don't get much sleep lately. In addition to that I have no social interaction outside of work and I wondered if someone had the time to talk for maybe an half hour? I think it could help me out and get my day going.",
  'text': "Do anyone have 30 minutes just to talk? ### So I called in sick today because I didn't do anything that I was supposed to during the weekend since I have been feeling low lately. I've stopped eating regularly and don't get much sleep lately. In addition to that I have no social interaction outside of work and I wondered if someone had the time to talk for maybe an half hour? I think it could help me out and get my day going.",
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2019-12-09 09:35:45',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': 'g9q3ee',
  'title': "WE ARE YOUR PARENTS! WE CAN MAKE RUDE REMARKS AND HOLD RIDICULOUS DOUBLE STANDARTS TOWARDS YOU, BUT YOU CAN'T BECAUSE WE RAISED YOU AND CLOTHED YOU",
  'post': "And that's my parents view on me. Apparently they can yell at me for hours, make rude remarks towards me and require me to never say a single bad thing to them (I once said 'shut up' to my dad for a good reason and he took away my phone and started playing the biggest victim) but I am supposed to be their happy marionette? F*ck logic!!",
  'text': "WE ARE YOUR PARENTS! WE CAN MAKE RUDE REMARKS AND HOLD RIDICULOUS DOUBLE STANDARTS TOWARDS YOU, BUT YOU CAN'T BECAUSE WE RAISED YOU AND CLOTHED YOU ### And that's my parents view on me. Apparently they can yell at me for hours, make rude remarks towards me and require me to never say a single bad thing to them (I once said 'shut up' to my dad for a good reason and he took away my phone and started playing the biggest victim) but I am supposed to be their happy marionette? F*ck logic!!",
  'upvotes': 96,
  'date': '2020-04-28 16:12:52',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'brain dysfunction (forget)', 'worthlessness'],

 {'id': 'q1y46i',
  'title': 'Has anyone else got so used to hyper arousal that it just feels normal to them?',
  'post': 'I was just lying down earlier ‘relaxing’ when I realised my heart was still pounding, strangely enough I felt fairly calm but when I really thought about it could feel all of the activation and tension in my body. \n\nIt seem like I’ve become so accustomed to being stuck in fight or flight that it’s almost normal to me now',
  'text': 'Has anyone else got so used to hyper arousal that it just feels normal to them? ### I was just lying down earlier ‘relaxing’ when I realised my heart was still pounding, strangely enough I felt fairly calm but when I really thought about it could feel all of the activation and tension in my body. It seem like I’ve become so accustomed to being stuck in fight or flight that it’s almost normal to me now',
  'upvotes': 127,
  'date': '2021-10-05 15:03:31',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': '17ct4rq',
  'title': 'Lonely',
  'post': 'Is it this normal to feel this lonely? I am trying so hard to distract myself etc. trying to cook, clean, watch shows, do my nails etc but I am still so so lonely. Is this normal? How can I enjoy solitude. Everyone says get a hobby etc but the anxiety keeps me alone and keeps me inside. I am so sad watching Netflix and tv but I have no energy to do anything else. I hold back tears when people ask if I am okay, I am not okay. I don’t know my solution. I am sick of crying by myself each night. \n\nDoes anyone else experience this?',
  'text': 'Lonely ### Is it this normal to feel this lonely? I am trying so hard to distract myself etc. trying to cook, clean, watch shows, do my nails etc but I am still so so lonely. Is this normal? How can I enjoy solitude. Everyone says get a hobby etc but the anxiety keeps me alone and keeps me inside. I am so sad watching Netflix and tv but I have no energy to do anything else. I hold back tears when people ask if I am okay, I am not okay. I don’t know my solution. I am sick of crying by myself each night. Does anyone else experience this?',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-21 03:15:21',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111100},

 {'id': '171l3wv',
  'title': "I can't stop crying",
  'post': "I have been crying since last two days. I have never felt this low and lonely in my life n just want someone to make me feel better. I feel so bad to even expect that. Why do i need anyone? Why can't i feel better about myself? It hurts so much and I am not sure for how long I can take it. I have kind people in my life but they go away when they begin to know me more and I feel like everyone hates me.",
  'text': "I can't stop crying ### I have been crying since last two days. I have never felt this low and lonely in my life n just want someone to make me feel better. I feel so bad to even expect that. Why do i need anyone? Why can't i feel better about myself? It hurts so much and I am not sure for how long I can take it. I have kind people in my life but they go away when they begin to know me more and I feel like everyone hates me.",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-10-06 19:17:42',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',

 {'id': '172lyyv',
  'title': '27 Years old and so alone',
  'post': "My life feels like it's falling apart. \n\nThis isn't what I wanted things to look like by this age.\n\nMy relationship with my gf of 1.5 years is bad right now. I don't think she loves me anymore, I think she's with me solely at this point out of the convenience of living together. Besides her, I don't really have a social life. I think she's gonna leave me soon too, so after that I really will be basically alone.\n\nThe friends I had are pretty much all gone by now.  They either moved, life event, or we lost touch altogether. My best friend and I have lost touch. He lives far away. I think my fate was just to be born and live like this. It's hard to see people going to Halloween parties and being out and me feeling so alone. Even my gf is always out with her other friends. \n\nI'm holding onto faith and hope that things could get better one day. I don't really want to be alive anymore at this rate, the future just looks really bleak to me.",
  'text': "27 Years old and so alone ### My life feels like it's falling apart. This isn't what I wanted things to look like by this age. My relationship with my gf of 1.5 years is bad right now. I don't think she loves me anymore, I think she's with me solely at this point out of the convenience of living together. Besides her, I don't really have a social life. I think she's gonna leave me soon too, so after that I really will be basically alone. The friends I had are pretty much all gone by now. They either moved, life event, or we lost touch altogether. My best friend and I have lost touch. He lives far away. I think my fate was just to be born and live like this. It's hard to see people going to Halloween parties and being out and me feeling so alone. Even my gf is always out with her other friends. I'm holding onto faith and hope that things could get better one day. I don't really want to be alive anymore at this rate, the future just looks really bleak to me.",
  'upvotes': 61,
  'date': '2023-10-08 00:54:18',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': 'z5gy48',
  'title': '“Suicide is a permanent solution to a temporary problem”. Why does it disturb me when my mom says this?',
  'post': 'A family friend just died. This prompted my mom to bring up my own suicidal feelings. She said “suicide is a permanent solution to a temporary problem”. Is there something wrong with saying this or is it my problem?',
  'text': '“Suicide is a permanent solution to a temporary problem”. Why does it disturb me when my mom says this? ### A family friend just died. This prompted my mom to bring up my own suicidal feelings. She said “suicide is a permanent solution to a temporary problem”. Is there something wrong with saying this or is it my problem?',

  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'suicide intent', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010110},
 {'id': 'ynol3w',
  'title': "Has anyone's PTSD caused them to have outbursts at others?",
  'post': "I'm really struggling to live with the shame of my erratic behaviour when things have felt overwhelming\n\nEdit: thanks for the response to this, how do people go about trying to forgive themselves?",
  'text': "Has anyone's PTSD caused them to have outbursts at others? ### I'm really struggling to live with the shame of my erratic behaviour when things have felt overwhelming Edit: thanks for the response to this, how do people go about trying to forgive themselves?",

  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': '16wlqy3',
  'title': "I'm tired of my family making me feel guilty for everything.",
  'post': "I'm just existing and my parents keep saying that they paid for a roof over my head and fed and bought me clothes. I'm like isn't that what you're supposed to do as a parent or as soon as you have a kid you don't take care of them at all? They keep trying to guilt trip me about it and I'm tired of it.",
  'text': "I'm tired of my family making me feel guilty for everything. ### I'm just existing and my parents keep saying that they paid for a roof over my head and fed and bought me clothes.  {'id': '150odzi',
  'title': 'Am I in a toxic relationship?',
  'post': "M25 here I'm in a relationship since 7 years.\n\nThings became worse when I came back from 7 month deployment with the army. Since then I remember we were arguing a lot more.. it's always my fault and we only have sex 1 max 2 times a month. I also don't have the feeling of love but on the other hand I don't wanna let her go. We have an apartment together, a car we also had a dog and somehow I don't wanna let her and all these things go. But I'm only really happy about 50% of the time.",
  'text': "Am I in a toxic relationship? ### M25 here I'm in a relationship since 7 years. Things became worse when I came back from 7 month deployment with the army. Since then I remember we were arguing a lot more.. it's always my fault and we only have sex 1 max 2 times a month. I also don't have the feeling of love but on the other hand I don't wanna let her go. We have an apartment together, a car we also had a dog and somehow I don't wanna let her and all these things go. But I'm only really happy about 50% of the time.",
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-07-15 22:01:42',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10100000},
 {'id': '16z4gvs',
  'title': 'I wish something would just kill me so that I don’t have to',
  'post': 'I wish I could just die without it being my fault. I wish I could just die without being blamed for everyone else’s pain. I truly do not want to be here and I just can’t do this anymore.',
  'text': 'I wish something would just kill me so that I don’t have to ### I wish I could just die without it being my fault. I wish I could just die without being blamed for everyone else’s pain. I truly do not want to be here and I just can’t do this anymore.',

 {'id': 'i5ydy2',
  'title': 'I feel so unproductive and cannot motivate myself to be productive',
  'post': "I spend most of my free time in video games. However almost every night I become extremely upset about how unproductive I was that day, caused me to try to distract myself with my phone and causes me to stay up extremely late. This cycle has been on repeat for months now and I don't know what to do. I feel so bad about wasting my time yet I still do everyday. I don't know what to do.",
  'text': "I feel so unproductive and cannot motivate myself to be productive ### I spend most of my free time in video games. However almost every night I become extremely upset about how unproductive I was that day, caused me to try to distract myself with my phone and causes me to stay up extremely late. This cycle has been on repeat for months now and I don't know what to do. I feel so bad about wasting my time yet I still do everyday. I don't know what to do.",
  'upvotes': 387,

 {'id': 'glk21u',
  'title': 'The reason I like being alone is ridiculous',
  'post': "I like being alone; it's such a peaceful moment. However, I like being alone not because for the sake of it. It's because when I'm with friends or my group I feel lonely lots of times. When I am alone, I'm not lonely because there is literally nobody around me, therefore I can't feel lonely. I wish I were closer to my friends.",
  'text': "The reason I like being alone is ridiculous ### I like being alone; it's such a peaceful moment. However, I like being alone not because for the sake of it. It's because when I'm with friends or my group I feel lonely lots of times. When I am alone, I'm not lonely because there is literally nobody around me, therefore I can't feel lonely. I wish I were closer to my friends.",
  'upvotes': 21,
  'date': '2020-05-17 18:03:02',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1001},
 {'id': 'cx73ya',
  'title': "Receiving help is not that easy. Why does society make it seem like when you reach out, you'll immediately get help?",
  'post': "Some places don't take your insurance. Some have waitlists. Some don't even answer the phone. I just feeling like that phrase really gets people's hopes up.",
  'text': "Receiving help is not that easy. Why does society make it seem like when you reach out, you'll immediately get help? ### Some places don't take your insurance. Some have waitlists. Some don't even answer the phone. I just feeling like that phrase really gets people's hopes up.",
  'upvotes': 361,
  'date': '2019-08-29 21:20:15',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'lplpxe',
  'title': 'Memory loss after arguments?',
  'post': "One HUGELY annoying thing about my PTSD is that I seem to blank out during arguments so that afterwards I can't remember what the person said or did. So therefore I have absolutely no leg to stand on, and can rarely win any argument because I simply can't remember. It's so frustrating when I know I'm right but can't prove it. Especially when the person I'm arguing with has been a complete ass.\n\nI've never seen anybody else mention this before. Is this common with PTSD?",
  'text': "Memory loss after arguments? ### One HUGELY annoying thing about my PTSD is that I seem to blank out during arguments so that afterwards I can't remember what the person said or did. So therefore I have absolutely no leg to stand on, and can rarely win any argument because I simply can't remember. It's so frustrating when I know I'm right but can't prove it. Especially when the person I'm arguing with has been a complete ass. I've never seen anybody else mention this before. Is this common with PTSD?",
  'upvotes': 147,
  'date': '2021-02-22 11:22:34',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1111001},
 {'id': '179rfsf',
  'title': 'No fight left',
  'post': "24F\n\nLong story short, there is a lot of shit that has gone wrong in my life and it just keeps getting worse. I fixed 1 issue and 5 more appear.\n\nI've attempted unaliving since I was 12yo. I now know my blood clots quite quickly and I have a high tolerance to medz.\n\nI have been diagnosed with major depression CPTSD and anxiety.. Stopped going to therapy because I have no money left..\n\nQuite frankly, I genuinely don't want to keep going. We're gonna die anyways, what's the big deal with expediting the process?\n\nSeriously, if we needed to get somewhere ASAP we'd take a cab over the bus if it were faster. What's the point of finishing my journey when it's gonna be shitty either way?\n\nMakes no sense to me basically.\n\nSo yeah, I'm still very much plotting how I will go out and sorting things through. I don't intend to fail this time around. It will be a combo method.\n\nI suppose my question is why delay the inevitable? What's the point exactly?",
  'text': "No fight left ### 24F Long story short, there is a lot of shit that has gone wrong in my life and it just keeps getting worse. I fixed 1 issue and 5 more appear. I've attempted unaliving since I was 12yo. I now know my blood clots quite quickly and I have a high tolerance to medz. I have been diagnosed with major depression CPTSD and anxiety.. Stopped going to therapy because I have no money left.. Quite frankly, I genuinely don't want to keep going. We're gonna die anyways, what's the big deal with expediting the process? Seriously, if we needed to get somewhere ASAP we'd take a cab over the bus if it were faster. What's the point of finishing my journey when it's gonna be shitty either way? Makes no sense to me basically. So yeah, I'm still very much plotting how I will go out and sorting things through. I don't intend to fail this time around. It will be a combo method. I suppose my question is why delay the inevitable? What's the point exactly?",
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2023-10-17 05:55:10',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '16549ar',
  'title': 'They say you can talk to them anytime. Their door is always open.',
  'post': "But they don't mean it. You got to get used to the little white lies. Like when they ask how you're doing. They don't really want to know. They don't care.",
  'text': "They say you can talk to them anytime. Their door is always open. ### But they don't mean it. You got to get used to the little white lies. Like when they ask how you're doing. They don't really want to know. They don't care.",
  'upvotes': 197,
  'date': '2023-08-30 04:03:25',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10001},
 {'id': 'ztxb2f',
  'title': 'Why do people with depression see relationships as a burden?',
  'post': 'It seems like it’s common for depressed people to break up with their partners, push them away etc.  my partner did this even though during time with me was the time when he was happy.  \n\nIt makes no sense to me to see your main source of happiness as something that is too much effort and cut it off rather than see it as a source of suppprt? I want to understand but it feels so confusing.',
  'text': 'Why do people with depression see relationships as a burden? ### It seems like it’s common for depressed people to break up with their partners, push them away etc. my partner did this even though during time with me was the time when he was happy. It makes no sense to me to see your main source of happiness as something that is too much effort and cut it off rather than see it as a source of suppprt? I want to understand but it feels so confusing.',
  'upvotes': 26,
  'date': '2022-12-24 00:39:37',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 101},
 {'id': 'eo3zu0',
  'title': 'There is an Arabic saying and it goes like this:',
  'post': '“You want to die? Then throw yourself into the sea and you’ll see yourself fighting to survive. You do not want to kill yourself, rather you want to kill something inside of you”',
  'text': 'There is an Arabic saying and it goes like this: ### “You want to die? Then throw yourself into the sea and you’ll see yourself fighting to survive. You do not want to kill yourself, rather you want to kill something inside of you”',
  'upvotes': 1487,
  'date': '2020-01-13 13:18:17',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010},
 {'id': 'zve0sy',
  'title': "I don't believe that I can let someone into my life. Or I can be let into someone's life especially.",
  'post': 'I have been alone for too long.',
  'text': "I don't believe that I can let someone into my life. Or I can be let into someone's life especially. ### I have been alone for too long.",
  'upvotes': 98,
  'date': '2022-12-26 03:31:45',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': 's49tiu',
  'title': 'I’m a 24 year old year old lonely lonely girl.',
  'post': 'I live alone and have a cat and truly she’s my only companion. I don’t talk to people because of my social anxiety and my depression prevents me from being able to go out and meet people, or even begin to care about dating. I would love to do those things but I’m terrified and I also am always so fatigued. But I feel so lonely every single day, and I’m sitting here sobbing as I write this out because I have no hope anymore. I feel like nobody cares about me or my well-being and I’m just so lonely in this world.',
  'text': 'I’m a 24 year old year old lonely lonely girl. ### I live alone and have a cat and truly she’s my only companion. I don’t talk to people because of my social anxiety and my depression prevents me from being able to go out and meet people, or even begin to care about dating. I would love to do those things but I’m terrified and I also am always so fatigued. But I feel so lonely every single day, and I’m sitting here sobbing as I write this out because I have no hope anymore. I feel like nobody cares about me or my well-being and I’m just so lonely in this world.',
  'upvotes': 42,
  'date': '2022-01-15 02:44:29',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 1111111},
 {'id': '13jpc9n',
  'title': 'Can’t sleep',
  'post': 'For the past few days I cannot sleep with an emptiness feeling in my heart. I feel so dead inside and it been killing me for a while . I just can’t do it anymore. I’m always stressed out I just really can’t do it anymore. With the sleeping problem I cant seem to to fall asleep . I went to bed at 8 and it’s now nearly 4:00 am and I’m still here awake trying to figure out what’s keeping me awake all these past few weeks.',
  'text': 'Can’t sleep ### For the past few days I cannot sleep with an emptiness feeling in my heart. I feel so dead inside and it been killing me for a while . I just can’t do it anymore. I’m always stressed out I just really can’t do it anymore. With the sleeping problem I cant seem to to fall asleep . I went to bed at 8 and it’s now nearly 4:00 am and I’m still here awake trying to figure out what’s keeping me awake all these past few weeks.',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-05-17 02:55:24',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'yv7w2b',
  'title': '(F28) How does one gets out?',
  'post': 'How does one gets out of extreme loneliness? Any personal experiences? Practices that worked?\n\nLiterally anything',
  'text': '(F28) How does one gets out? ### How does one gets out of extreme loneliness? Any personal experiences? Practices that worked? Literally anything',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2022-11-14 18:20:28',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': 'fir6p8',
  'title': 'Male perspective of body dysmorphia',
  'post': "When I was 13, during my physical my doctor told me that if i didnt put on muscle, women would never be attracted to and love me.\nTo say that it fucked me up would be an understatement.\nI also have extreme penile dysmorphia, when in reality I am decently above average, but mentally I feel as if I'm only a couple inches hard. This has affected every romantic relationship ive had, even preventing me from attempting some relstionships.\nFuck this disorder.",
  'text': "Male perspective of body dysmorphia ### When I was 13, during my physical my doctor told me that if i didnt put on muscle, women would never be attracted to and love me. To say that it fucked me up would be an understatement. I also have extreme penile dysmorphia, when in reality I am decently above average, but mentally I feel as if I'm only a couple inches hard. This has affected every romantic relationship ive had, even preventing me from attempting some relstionships. Fuck this disorder.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2020-03-14 22:51:45',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '17cwhwb',
  'title': 'Doing terrible',
  'post': 'I’m doing terrible I’m so hurt and crying in my bed not wanting to live I know that no one cares but why have I reached a point where I’m just bad at explaining why I’m feeling like this',
  'text': 'Doing terrible ### I’m doing terrible I’m so hurt and crying in my bed not wanting to live I know that no one cares but why have I reached a point where I’m just bad at explaining why I’m feeling like this',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-21 06:48:27',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': '14w0viq',
  'title': "I'm tired of living the same day everyday",
  'post': "All I do every day is get up, go to work, come back home, have dinner, sleep, wake up, and repeat for the next day. I haven't done anything interesting in a long time. I have no one to talk to. I've never had a boyfriend, and the only friend I have is married and busy with her life, while I sit here in my room doing nothing. I have no motivation to pursue my interests as they all seem uninteresting to me. Everyone I know is married or with kids or travelling and doing something interesting while I'm here lonely and tired and bored to death. I don't even have it in me to survive this any longer.",
  'text': "I'm tired of living the same day everyday ### All I do every day is get up, go to work, come back home, have dinner, sleep, wake up, and repeat for the next day. I haven't done anything interesting in a long time. I have no one to talk to. I've never had a boyfriend, and the only friend I have is married and busy with her life, while I sit here in my room doing nothing. I have no motivation to pursue my interests as they all seem uninteresting to me. Everyone I know is married or with kids or travelling and doing something interesting while I'm here lonely and tired and bored to death. I don't even have it in me to survive this any longer.",
  'upvotes': 80,
  'date': '2023-07-10 17:46:16',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': '10mj6ru',
  'title': 'I want a depressed friend',
  'post': 'I\'m so sick of talking to bubbly happy positive people. They wear me down with their life propaganda. I just want someone that actually understands me, that doesn\'t try to fix my problems, that doesn\'t say "it\'ll get better". I really want someone that understands.\n\nI feel so alone.\n\nEdit: I\'m too scared to actually make friends',
  'text': 'I want a depressed friend ### I\'m so sick of talking to bubbly happy positive people. They wear me down with their life propaganda. I just want someone that actually understands me, that doesn\'t try to fix my problems, that doesn\'t say "it\'ll get better". I really want someone that understands. I feel so alone. Edit: I\'m too scared to actually make friends',

 {'id': 'mo5yvj',
  'title': 'I wish my dad would burn in hell',

 {'id': '100lfab',
  'title': 'My bestfriend is depressed',
  'post': 'Yesterday at 5am my bestfriend sent me a long paragraph about his life and how hes ready to end it. I really dont know what to do. Were both 16M so we have a long life ahead of us but he feels like he wont achieve anything with his life.',
  'text': 'My bestfriend is depressed ### Yesterday at 5am my bestfriend sent me a long paragraph about his life and how hes ready to end it. I really dont know what to do. Were both 16M so we have a long life ahead of us but he feels like he wont achieve anything with his life.',

 {'id': 'vt61hm',
  'title': 'Married but lonely',
  'post': 'Anyone else on here in a committed relationship yet you often still feel very very alone? I love my husband but sometimes I feel like he just doesn’t see me',
  'text': 'Married but lonely ### Anyone else on here in a committed relationship yet you often still feel very very alone? I love my husband but sometimes I feel like he just doesn’t see me',

 {'id': '179jfhe',
  'title': 'Lost and getting worse',
  'post': 'Idk what I’m supposed to do anymore. I’m just so fucking exhausted with everything. All I can do is drag myself to work and go home, every day. I don’t have the energy or motivation to do anything. I’ve been trying to get myself to take the trash out for 3 fucking days. When I get home at night, I just stare at this fucking phone until I drink enough to fall asleep, and do it all over again. When does this get better…',
  'text': 'Lost and getting worse ### Idk what I’m supposed to do anymore. I’m just so fucking exhausted with everything. All I can do is drag myself to work and go home, every day. I don’t have the energy or motivation to do anything. I’ve been trying to get myself to take the trash out for 3 fucking days. When I get home at night, I just stare at this fucking phone until I drink enough to fall asleep, and do it all over again. When does this get better…',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-16 22:58:55',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': 'ibbbz1',
  'title': 'I finally understood why I prefer to stay up at night.',
  'post': "Its not just insomnia, it's not sleep apnea, just nightmares or the silence.\n\nI stay up at night because I'm hypervigilant all the time, and being alone awake at night triggers my alertness so much I'm unable to sleep without medication.\n\nOf course, when I eventually end up sleeping its out of exhaustion more than anything, but it's better than the dreadful feeling of going to sleep without knowing who or what could end up waking me.\n\nI was terrorised by a babysitter as a kid, and I lived in rough neighborhoods for four years. Those factors, plus my other child abuse and depression is what I think truly triggers this now.",
  'text': "I finally understood why I prefer to stay up at night. ### Its not just insomnia, it's not sleep apnea, just nightmares or the silence. I stay up at night because I'm hypervigilant all the time, and being alone awake at night triggers my alertness so much I'm unable to sleep without medication. Of course, when I eventually end up sleeping its out of exhaustion more than anything, but it's better than the dreadful feeling of going to sleep without knowing who or what could end up waking me. I was terrorised by a babysitter as a kid, and I lived in rough neighborhoods for four years. Those factors, plus my other child abuse and depression is what I think truly triggers this now.",
  'upvotes': 200,
  'date': '2020-08-17 10:04:14',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'gppeyj',
  'title': 'Are my parents actually abusive?',
  'post': 'I’ve been wondering this for a while now and I didn’t know any other suitable subreddits to ask so I’m just putting this here. My parents have told me on multiple occasions that I waste their time and should just stick to myself. They also often tell me that I should be grateful for having somewhere to live and someone to take care of me, but I think that if it was their decision to have a kid that I shouldn’t be obligated to be grateful for the things they tell me. It’s not that I’m not grateful for having a roof over my head or anything, it’s just that they often tell me that I don’t have any reason to be unhappy. My dad yells at me for really trivial things and sometimes throws stuff. Other than that they act pretty decent though and care or at least act like they do. Are they actually abusive or am I just acting entitled to more than I deserve?',
  'text': 'Are my parents actually abusive? ### I’ve been wondering this for a while now and I didn’t know any other suitable subreddits to ask so I’m just putting this here. My parents have told me on multiple occasions that I waste their time and should just stick to myself. They also often tell me that I should be grateful for having somewhere to live and someone to take care of me, but I think that if it was their decision to have a kid that I shouldn’t be obligated to be grateful for the things they tell me. It’s not that I’m not grateful for having a roof over my head or anything, it’s just that they often tell me that I don’t have any reason to be unhappy. My dad yells at me for really trivial things and sometimes throws stuff. Other than that they act pretty decent though and care or at least act like they do. Are they actually abusive or am I just acting entitled to more than I deserve?',
  'upvotes': 57,
  'date': '2020-05-24 13:08:02',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': '17dy9o4',
  'title': 'gcses',
  'post': 'in year 11 doing gcses in jan if for whatever reason i fail my gcses i’m going to kill myself because i’d rather die than see the disappointed looks on my parents faces',
  'text': 'gcses ### in year 11 doing gcses in jan if for whatever reason i fail my gcses i’m going to kill myself because i’d rather die than see the disappointed looks on my parents faces',

 {'id': 'z87ati',
  'title': 'At my breaking point',
  'post': 'I’ve posted so much on here but I think I finally reached my breaking point. We’ve been together for 8 months and he’s struggled on and off for months now. I have no problem supporting him but he’s so indecisive! He isn’t from my state but we’re living together and he decided he was gonna stay here for at least another 6 months. Today he woke up and because he had a dream about his ex or something, he decided he’s moving back home. When I asked him what about me he said that my life didn’t revolve around him and I’d be fine. \nThat sounds stupid as hell and I think this was the breaking point for me. I need to be with someone I can plan ahead with. I’m so sorry for the rant but I don’t have anyone to talk to.',
  'text': 'At my breaking point ### I’ve posted so much on here but I think I finally reached my breaking point. We’ve been together for 8 months and he’s struggled on and off for months now. I have no problem supporting him but he’s so indecisive! He isn’t from my state but we’re living together and he decided he was gonna stay here for at least another 6 months. Today he woke up and because he had a dream about his ex or something, he decided he’s moving back home. When I asked him what about me he said that my life didn’t revolve around him and I’d be fine. That sounds stupid as hell and I think this was the breaking point for me. I need to be with someone I can plan ahead with. I’m so sorry for the rant but I don’t have anyone to talk to.',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2022-11-29 21:49:09',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10011100},
 {'id': 'sbst5u',
  'title': "If you thought about killing yourself today and you didn't",
  'post': 'Know that I am proud of you, that I think of you, and that you won today.\n\nAnd tomorrow we will fight again until things get better.  We can do this. We are not alone.',
  'text': "If you thought about killing yourself today and you didn't ### Know that I am proud of you, that I think of you, and that you won today. And tomorrow we will fight again until things get better. We can do this. We are not alone.",
  'upvotes': 304,
  'date': '2022-01-24 18:27:15',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10000010},
 {'id': 'esxmr3',
  'title': "Well that's that I suppose",
  'post': "Well, after 2 1/2 years, my depressed bf (30) finally broke up with me. I shouldn't be surprised, he has been really challenging for a lot of that time. But I am angry, and frankly pretty devastated.  I know in time these feeling will pass but in the meantime it sucks. \n\nI hope and pray he gets the help he needs. My dream is that he will, and we can work things out. But I cant cling to a small chance of that happening. This is on him now, and he has to do the work. I'm pretty discouraged about that happening. \n\nAnyway, just needed to post.",
  'text': "Well that's that I suppose ### Well, after 2 1/2 years, my depressed bf (30) finally broke up with me. I shouldn't be surprised, he has been really challenging for a lot of that time. But I am angry, and frankly pretty devastated. I know in time these feeling will pass but in the meantime it sucks. I hope and pray he gets the help he needs. My dream is that he will, and we can work things out. But I cant cling to a small chance of that happening. This is on him now, and he has to do the work. I'm pretty discouraged about that happening. Anyway, just needed to post.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2020-01-23 19:02:05',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11010100},

 {'id': '154ataw',
  'title': "I feel so lonely, yet I'm not alone",
  'post': "I have friends who I hope care about me. I hang out with them from time to time. But my family has completely abandoned me. They gave up on me years ago. I've never had a girlfriend or been in a relationship. I've never even held hands romantically. I don't want a girlfriend for the sex or lust, I just want someone I can confide in, find solice in. I just need to know I'm cared about. That I'm useful and needed. Because if I'm not, what's the point of living. I have no purpose or goal. I just... Exist.",
  'text': "I feel so lonely, yet I'm not alone ### I have friends who I hope care about me. I hang out with them from time to time. But my family has completely abandoned me. They gave up on me years ago. I've never had a girlfriend or been in a relationship. I've never even held hands romantically. I don't want a girlfriend for the sex or lust, I just want someone I can confide in, find solice in. I just need to know I'm cared about. That I'm useful and needed. Because if I'm not, what's the point of living. I have no purpose or goal. I just... Exist.",
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-07-19 23:43:12',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': 'umvc34',
  'title': 'What loneliness is',
  'post': "Loneliness is when nobody is sad to see you leave. Loneliness is when nobody is disappointed when you're not there, or even care at all. Loneliness is when you walk behind on the sidewalk, or nobody waits for you. Loneliness is when you're in a group and you try to talk but no one acknowledges you or even looks at you. Loneliness is when people treat you differently because they can tell there is something wrong with you. They give you a look of pity, indifference, disgust or smug arrogance. Loneliness is having no one to love you when you feel down, no one to support you when you're struggling, no one to help you up when you fall, and no one to encourage you when you feel discouraged. Loneliness is feeling completely and totally useless and unlovable because you are alone when near everyone else is surrounded by people who care for them. Total isolation is a pain incompatible with the human soul, as human beings are social creatures who NEED, I repeat NEED love and attention to be psychologically healthy. Without them, people begin to fall apart.",
  'text': "What loneliness is ### Loneliness is when nobody is sad to see you leave. Loneliness is when nobody is disappointed when you're not there, or even care at all. Loneliness is when you walk behind on the sidewalk, or nobody waits for you. Loneliness is when you're in a group and you try to talk but no one acknowledges you or even looks at you. Loneliness is when people treat you differently because they can tell there is something wrong with you. They give you a look of pity, indifference, disgust or smug arrogance. Loneliness is having no one to love you when you feel down, no one to support you when you're struggling, no one to help you up when you fall, and no one to encourage you when you feel discouraged. Loneliness is feeling completely and totally useless and unlovable because you are alone when near everyone else is surrounded by people who care for them. Total isolation is a pain incompatible with the human soul, as human beings are social creatures who NEED, I repeat NEED love and attention to be psychologically healthy. Without them, people begin to fall apart.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2022-05-10 23:02:40',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'jtgib2',
  'title': 'This is by far the loneliest and saddest birthday I ever had',
  'post': "I'm literally just sitting here playing games, hoping something falls on my head. From minute to minute the need for inflicting pai.n or more raises...",
  'text': "This is by far the loneliest and saddest birthday I ever had ### I'm literally just sitting here playing games, hoping something falls on my head. From minute to minute the need for inflicting pai.n or more raises...",
  'upvotes': 836,
  'date': '2020-11-13 13:20:06',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',

   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11111111},
 {'id': 'vz9ti8',
  'title': 'The depression of tonight already creeping in',
  'post': "It's ~7:00 PM just had some dinner and already feeling the depression for the night creeping in. I had some alright moments in the day time and bam! I'm going into another wave for the night. The dark bringing it's darkness and all I can do is look forward to the day coming around. So I may feel a relief. \n\nFor reasons that are beyond my control I'm both unable to date anytime soon and it is difficult for me to due to several reasons. However the heart wants what it wants and day by day I've been longing to have someone to come home to. Someone to lookout and care about each other whom we are attracted to each other. I can't wait the day this pain and loneliness will be swapped with love. 💔 \n\nI'm gonna have to curl up into bed and hug that pillow to soothe the pain that I'm sure is coming.",
  'text': "The depression of tonight already creeping in ### It's ~7:00 PM just had some dinner and already feeling the depression for the night creeping in. I had some alright moments in the day time and bam! I'm going into another wave for the night. The dark bringing it's darkness and all I can do is look forward to the day coming around. So I may feel a relief. For reasons that are beyond my control I'm both unable to date anytime soon and it is difficult for me to due to several reasons. However the heart wants what it wants and day by day I've been longing to have someone to come home to. Someone to lookout and care about each other whom we are attracted to each other. I can't wait the day this pain and loneliness will be swapped with love. 💔 I'm gonna have to curl up into bed and hug that pillow to soothe the pain that I'm sure is coming.",
  'upvotes': 13,
  'date': '2022-07-14 23:37:26',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': 'kcx6sa',
  'title': 'What can do :((',
  'post': "Hi everyone :) I haven't been able to handle my mood swings for a long time. As a lot of people have written here before, my mood can change in a moment. I'm excited about something and then suddenly I'm not. I'm happy and in a moment I'm unreasonably sad. For the last few days, I've been scared of all the drawers in the room because I feel like someone is watching me. When I have to talk to someone, I'm uncomfortable. Yesterday I met a foreign lady on the way home and she asked me on the way to the store and I then felt that she was talking to me for some other scary reason.\nI don't know what could happen to me, but it's awful :(",
  'text': "What can do :(( ### Hi everyone :) I haven't been able to handle my mood swings for a long time. As a lot of people have written here before, my mood can change in a moment. I'm excited about something and then suddenly I'm not. I'm happy and in a moment I'm unreasonably sad. For the last few days, I've been scared of all the drawers in the room because I feel like someone is watching me. When I have to talk to someone, I'm uncomfortable. Yesterday I met a foreign lady on the way home and she asked me on the way to the store and I then felt that she was talking to me for some other scary reason. I don't know what could happen to me, but it's awful :(",
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2020-12-14 13:00:28',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '14ysghc',
  'title': '(20M) Been lonely for years now',
  'post': "Hey guys, \n\nI am a 20 year old male, I haven't been able to find genuine friends for years. Anybody wants to have a chat? It can literally be about whatever. ",
  'text': "(20M) Been lonely for years now ### Hey guys, I am a 20 year old male, I haven't been able to find genuine friends for years. Anybody wants to have a chat? It can literally be about whatever.",
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-07-13 18:27:51',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '17det3v',
  'title': 'I’m going to end it HELP',
  'post': 'Basically, saw my ex today because I came back to the college we went to. We ended on good terms and was excited to fly out and be with her. We have talked about it for a while and would of been dating if I didn’t transfer. When I got here she’s been avoiding until today. Finally I went to her place and she was blacked out and embarrassing. Then when she sobered up we went in her bed and left her roomates to take a nap before the night party. Saw her texting another guy “he’s my ex stopping by” and apparently she’s been with this guy for a couple months and never told me. I’m with her right now and she hardly cuddling with me and texting him. But then when I give her no attention she holds my hand. I lost it. She is napping right now we are supposed to pregame for the next party but this girl has put me through the hardest times in my life. Wtf do I do I’m in love with her…',
  'text': 'I’m going to end it HELP ### Basically, saw my ex today because I came back to the college we went to. We ended on good terms and was excited to fly out and be with her. We have talked about it for a while and would of been dating if I didn’t transfer. When I got here she’s been avoiding until today. Finally I went to her place and she was blacked out and embarrassing. Then when she sobered up we went in her bed and left her roomates to take a nap before the night party. Saw her texting another guy “he’s my ex stopping by” and apparently she’s been with this guy for a couple months and never told me. I’m with her right now and she hardly cuddling with me and texting him. But then when I give her no attention she holds my hand. I lost it. She is napping right now we are supposed to pregame for the next party but this girl has put me through the hardest times in my life. Wtf do I do I’m in love with her…',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-10-21 22:52:35',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '17c7snd',
  'title': 'Help me',
