 {'id': '17bpiep',
  'title': "is it normal that someone haven't experienced happiness for a long time?",
  'post': 'i rarley feel happy and content i dont feel sad most of the time, sometimes I experience sadness and most of the time i feel empty neither happy neither sad.\n\nso my question is it normal to not feeling happiness for a very very long time or it means i suffer from something.',
  'text': "is it normal that someone haven't experienced happiness for a long time? ### i rarley feel happy and content i dont feel sad most of the time, sometimes I experience sadness and most of the time i feel empty neither happy neither sad. so my question is it normal to not feeling happiness for a very very long time or it means i suffer from something.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2023-10-19 18:09:23',
  'emotions': ['emptiness', 'sadness', 'loneliness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': '14fzkru',
  'title': 'What are Things Narcissists Will Do When You Go No Contact?',
  'post': ' They will project their feelings and blame you for how they feel. They do this because they don’t want to be responsible for their emotions, so they blame others for what is happening inside them. By doing this they set themselves up as victims, which allows them to play the role of hero.\n\n This makes them feel justified in doing whatever it takes to get back at you. Narcissists are masters of manipulation and control, they notice what buttons to push on other people to get what they want. The narcissist will say: “You made me feel this way”.\n\nNarcissists ensure that you take responsibility for them, even though they are at fault. They will also accuse you of doing things that they have done. Narcissists will never admit they’ve done wrong because they only want to see things from their perspective.\n\n[https://www.bignama.com/10-things-narcissists-will-do-when-you-go-no-contact/](https://www.bignama.com/10-things-narcissists-will-do-when-you-go-no-contact/)',
  'text': 'What are Things Narcissists Will Do When You Go No Contact? ### They will project their feelings and blame you for how they feel. They do this because they don’t want to be responsible for their emotions, so they blame others for what is happening inside them. By doing this they set themselves up as victims, which allows them to play the role of hero. This makes them feel justified in doing whatever it takes to get back at you. Narcissists are masters of manipulation and control, they notice what buttons to push on other people to get what they want. The narcissist will say: “You made me feel this way”. Narcissists ensure that you take responsibility for them, even though they are at fault. They will also accuse you of doing things that they have done. Narcissists will never admit they’ve done wrong because they only want to see things from their perspective. [https://www.bignama.com/10-things-narcissists-will-do-when-you-go-no-contact/](https://www.bignama.com/10-things-narcissists-will-do-when-you-go-no-contact/)',
  'upvotes': 1,
  'date': '2023-06-22 10:15:38',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'porliy',
  'title': 'Has anyone not realised that they were abused until they were adults?',
  'post': "My mother shouted insults at me to do with my sexuality from when I was a child until I was about 16 and it's only now that I am starting to view it as abuse (after therapy).  When I was child and teenager, my mother would snap when she was angry and start shouting at me at the top of her voice, calling me a 'gay boy' and a 'poof' and had a running insult where she called me the name I would have had were I a girl, as a way of implying that I was too feminine and gay. These days as a adult, I have severe mental health issues around sex, relationship, sexuality that has ruined my life. I never viewed it as abuse at the time - I thought everyone's parents did it. Has anyone else been blind about their abuse for most of their life?",
  'text': "Has anyone not realised that they were abused until they were adults? ### My mother shouted insults at me to do with my sexuality from when I was a child until I was about 16 and it's only now that I am starting to view it as abuse (after therapy). When I was child and teenager, my mother would snap when she was angry and start shouting at me at the top of her voice, calling me a 'gay boy' and a 'poof' and had a running insult where she called me the name I would have had were I a girl, as a way of implying that I was too feminine and gay. These days as a adult, I have severe mental health issues around sex, relationship, sexuality that has ruined my life. I never viewed it as abuse at the time - I thought everyone's parents did it. Has anyone else been blind about their abuse for most of their life?",
  'upvotes': 63,
  'date': '2021-09-15 14:48:29',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': 'phxj17',
  'title': 'I’m alright until it’s bedtime',
  'post': 'I can keep myself preoccupied during the day even maybe a little bit before I put the phone down,but then it’s just me with my thoughts,there’s no escaping it.I still love the same person who left me and I’m afraid I’m always going to.I’m so dogmatic when it comes to love,it took me forever to allow someone into my life exactly because of this.',
  'text': 'I’m alright until it’s bedtime ### I can keep myself preoccupied during the day even maybe a little bit before I put the phone down,but then it’s just me with my thoughts,there’s no escaping it.I still love the same person who left me and I’m afraid I’m always going to.I’m so dogmatic when it comes to love,it took me forever to allow someone into my life exactly because of this.',
  'upvotes': 13,
  'date': '2021-09-04 19:02:54',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11100},
 {'id': 'zur8xe',
  'title': 'I don’t know what’s going on',
  'post': 'Lately I’ve been feeling paranoid and tensed for no good reason, I’ve never felt like this before and I don’t know why it’s happening now it feels like something bad might happen to me or someone else it’s like a weird lingering feeling on the back of my head and it sucks because I have no good reason to feel like this nothing bad happens to me nor have I witnessed anything that might make me feel this way',
  'text': 'I don’t know what’s going on ### Lately I’ve been feeling paranoid and tensed for no good reason, I’ve never felt like this before and I don’t know why it’s happening now it feels like something bad might happen to me or someone else it’s like a weird lingering feeling on the back of my head and it sucks because I have no good reason to feel like this nothing bad happens to me nor have I witnessed anything that might make me feel this way',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2022-12-25 05:14:10',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1},
 {'id': '9wpffi',
  'title': 'Do you ever feel like everyone around you thinks you’re “too much”?',
  'post': 'I can’t shake the feeling that everyone I know thinks I’m “ too mental” to be around. I’ve reached out for help because I feel like I’m drowning and nobody is there. For the first time in my life I have no one. So, that makes it me, right? \n\nI feel so small, I want to disappear. I don’t know how to get out of it this time. \n\n\nEdit: just want to thank Reddit for giving a fuck, it does help. ',
  'text': 'Do you ever feel like everyone around you thinks you’re “too much”? ### I can’t shake the feeling that everyone I know thinks I’m “ too mental” to be around. I’ve reached out for help because I feel like I’m drowning and nobody is there. For the first time in my life I have no one. So, that makes it me, right? I feel so small, I want to disappear. I don’t know how to get out of it this time. Edit: just want to thank Reddit for giving a fuck, it does help.',
  'upvotes': 310,
  'date': '2018-11-13 14:18:43',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 1111110},
 {'id': 'l4qqir',
  'title': 'hypervigilance',
  'post': 'When I was at college, I was attacked on the street by a random man. He came up to me and choked me and then threw me into the street. This was a couple months ago and I’m really struggling with leaving my house now. How do you get over hypervigilance? Everytime I leave my house I’m constantly looking over my shoulder, and I panic anytime I see a man on the street. Any advice? This has made my life unbelievably hard.',
  'text': 'hypervigilance ### When I was at college, I was attacked on the street by a random man. He came up to me and choked me and then threw me into the street. This was a couple months ago and I’m really struggling with leaving my house now. How do you get over hypervigilance? Everytime I leave my house I’m constantly looking over my shoulder, and I panic anytime I see a man on the street. Any advice? This has made my life unbelievably hard.',
  'upvotes': 108,
  'date': '2021-01-25 16:00:57',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'hgwdk5',
  'title': "Can't talk to anyone about being suicidal because it will just lead to them calling the police on me and becoming prisoner in a hospital",
  'post': "I dont wanna live anymore. And I CERTAINLY dont wanna be chained to a bed in a psych ward. I can't talk to my friends or family cause they just immediately call the police and say I'm a danger which gets me locked in a hospital for a week and 5000 dollars in bills. I can't even act suicidal. Im just forced to sit here and think. I never asked to be born. I DIDN'T ASK TO BE ALIVE. I DON'T WANT TO. I hate myself so much and there's no reason to live my whole life in poverty and sadness. People just want me to be alive so they don't have to deal with my death. I hate myself and I hate my life",
  'text': "Can't talk to anyone about being suicidal because it will just lead to them calling the police on me and becoming prisoner in a hospital ### I dont wanna live anymore. And I CERTAINLY dont wanna be chained to a bed in a psych ward. I can't talk to my friends or family cause they just immediately call the police and say I'm a danger which gets me locked in a hospital for a week and 5000 dollars in bills. I can't even act suicidal. Im just forced to sit here and think. I never asked to be born. I DIDN'T ASK TO BE ALIVE. I DON'T WANT TO. I hate myself so much and there's no reason to live my whole life in poverty and sadness. People just want me to be alive so they don't have to deal with my death. I hate myself and I hate my life",
  'upvotes': 799,
  'date': '2020-06-27 16:18:30',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'suicide intent',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': 'bg1mf9',
  'title': "You're divorcing another person, not yourself",
  'post': "My ex-wife of 10 years left me last February for another man, I've recently started dating, and it's fucking scary, things can seem to great to fantasize about but at the end of the day going home and having time to be by yourself has no price tag, at least not right now.\n\n&#x200B;\n\nBe nice to yourself and take things slow, don't rush right back into a relationship because you feel it's your duty, you will only experience shitty feelings if you cannot reconnect with yourself first, you need to be able to introduce yourself as the person you are, not the person divorce made you.   Be happy friends.",
  'text': "You're divorcing another person, not yourself ### My ex-wife of 10 years left me last February for another man, I've recently started dating, and it's fucking scary, things can seem to great to fantasize about but at the end of the day going home and having time to be by yourself has no price tag, at least not right now. &#x200B; Be nice to yourself and take things slow, don't rush right back into a relationship because you feel it's your duty, you will only experience shitty feelings if you cannot reconnect with yourself first, you need to be able to introduce yourself as the person you are, not the person divorce made you. Be happy friends.",
  'upvotes': 131,
  'date': '2019-04-22 12:38:13',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': 'd80558',
  'title': 'That time Dad found out I’m queer.',
  'post': 'I just remembered the time my Dad heard a rumor that I was making out with girls at school (the rumor was 100% true lol) and he yelled and threatened to ship me off to a catholic girls school. I wasn’t entirely opposed to the idea of course, who doesn’t love a good catholic school girl lol. The absurdity of the threat still makes me laugh 12 years later.',
  'text': 'That time Dad found out I’m queer. ### I just remembered the time my Dad heard a rumor that I was making out with girls at school (the rumor was 100% true lol) and he yelled and threatened to ship me off to a catholic girls school. I wasn’t entirely opposed to the idea of course, who doesn’t love a good catholic school girl lol. The absurdity of the threat still makes me laugh 12 years later.',
  'upvotes': 70,
  'date': '2019-09-23 02:09:21',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'nz81i2',
  'title': 'Break up update',
  'post': 'Hey guys, thought I’d follow up on my post about my (27F) break up with my ex-partner (28M) - in case this helps anyone. You can view this in my history if needed....\n\nA month on from the breakup, I’m putting myself out there and doing all the things I want to do. I’m still sad and I miss my best friend so much, that will take time to heal. But it does feel good to regain and reexperience a part of me that was on the back burner as a partner of someone who had depression, to taste life fully as I see fit. I feel more positive and have reconnected with friends. I also spoke to him briefly and he’s taking care of himself ❤️ \n\nThis is not to undermine anyone’s experience in this group, if we’re all here we know what the highs and lows are like. But maybe someone is in the midst of a breakup and needs to hear that it does get better. Even if at this stage it feels like I’ll miss him forever haha. Anybody want to share what it’s like 3 months on? \n\n✨',
  'text': 'Break up update ### Hey guys, thought I’d follow up on my post about my (27F) break up with my ex-partner (28M) - in case this helps anyone. You can view this in my history if needed.... A month on from the breakup, I’m putting myself out there and doing all the things I want to do. I’m still sad and I miss my best friend so much, that will take time to heal. But it does feel good to regain and reexperience a part of me that was on the back burner as a partner of someone who had depression, to taste life fully as I see fit. I feel more positive and have reconnected with friends. I also spoke to him briefly and he’s taking care of himself ❤️ This is not to undermine anyone’s experience in this group, if we’re all here we know what the highs and lows are like. But maybe someone is in the midst of a breakup and needs to hear that it does get better. Even if at this stage it feels like I’ll miss him forever haha. Anybody want to share what it’s like 3 months on? ✨',
  'upvotes': 26,
  'date': '2021-06-13 22:42:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '10c25lo',
  'title': 'What’s the point',
  'post': 'I’m so sick of feeling this way. I know you can’t be happy all of the time. But I am so sick of living in a constant state of depression/anxiety/dread. Yeah, the good moments are good. But 90% of the time existing is absolutely exhausting. I am so sick of thinking.',
  'text': 'What’s the point ### I’m so sick of feeling this way. I know you can’t be happy all of the time. But I am so sick of living in a constant state of depression/anxiety/dread. Yeah, the good moments are good. But 90% of the time existing is absolutely exhausting. I am so sick of thinking.',
  'upvotes': 303,
  'date': '2023-01-14 22:17:12',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': 'zyd2vr',
  'title': 'I wish I had the courage to kill myself.',
  'post': 'I always see characters or even real people killing themselves, doesn’t matter if it was painful or not, I still get an urge to do it as well.\nA coward, that is me. Who can’t do it.',
  'text': 'I wish I had the courage to kill myself. ### I always see characters or even real people killing themselves, doesn’t matter if it was painful or not, I still get an urge to do it as well. A coward, that is me. Who can’t do it.',
  'upvotes': 302,
  'date': '2022-12-29 18:54:41',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'worthlessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 111},
 {'id': 'lbc45q',
  'title': 'I woke up so fucking happy',
  'post': 'I woke up so fucking happy and motivated to be productive and get out of my “slump” I woke up at 6:00am I made my bed, showered, did laundry ,made breakfast hell I even participated in my meeting when I got to work. But the more day went on I felt my energy and positive thought just fade. Now I’m sitting here in my room with my lights off thinking of how much a waste of space I am. I so fucking tired man. I just want to be happy. I want to stop waking up at noon every day and dread my day.',
  'text': 'I woke up so fucking happy ### I woke up so fucking happy and motivated to be productive and get out of my “slump” I woke up at 6:00am I made my bed, showered, did laundry ,made breakfast hell I even participated in my meeting when I got to work. But the more day went on I felt my energy and positive thought just fade. Now I’m sitting here in my room with my lights off thinking of how much a waste of space I am. I so fucking tired man. I just want to be happy. I want to stop waking up at noon every day and dread my day.',
  'upvotes': 530,
  'date': '2021-02-03 01:26:22',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)', 'worthlessness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 1010001},
 {'id': '13io8d1',
  'title': 'I feel lost',
  'post': 'I got out a relationship about 6 months ago and I’m so lonely, not because I chose to but all the people I had in my life stop responding nor did they ever reach out to me for anything, I always did and still try to but it’s only one sided. My last relationship was my everything to me due to the lack of relationships around me. Now I have no one and it sucks really bad, I don’t know what to do, it’s hard to live everyday alone and in my head, it hasn’t help my healing process. I don’t know what to do anymore, I’ve lost all the energy to try to live another day and it’s hard to make friends now. I just really need to vent.',
  'text': 'I feel lost ### I got out a relationship about 6 months ago and I’m so lonely, not because I chose to but all the people I had in my life stop responding nor did they ever reach out to me for anything, I always did and still try to but it’s only one sided. My last relationship was my everything to me due to the lack of relationships around me. Now I have no one and it sucks really bad, I don’t know what to do, it’s hard to live everyday alone and in my head, it hasn’t help my healing process. I don’t know what to do anymore, I’ve lost all the energy to try to live another day and it’s hard to make friends now. I just really need to vent.',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-05-15 23:27:18',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'xq0m4n',
  'title': 'Tired of needing money in order to live a life we never asked to be born into it…',
  'post': 'Why is this normal? Why do we need money to survive? Why do we need to pay for everything? Why do I have to get up and go to a job I fucking hate in order to make money to live a life I don’t even wanna live anyway? I’m so tired of the grind and everything. All I want to do everyday is lay in my bed and be away from everyone. I’m tired of having to force to get up everyday to work. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it….\n\n\nEdit: Wow… I never anticipated to get this many up votes… It’s really nice to know that I have people who understands how I feel. I really do hope and wish the best of luck towards all of you guys with anything you’re struggling and going through at the moment. 🥺💗',
  'text': 'Tired of needing money in order to live a life we never asked to be born into it… ### Why is this normal? Why do we need money to survive? Why do we need to pay for everything? Why do I have to get up and go to a job I fucking hate in order to make money to live a life I don’t even wanna live anyway? I’m so tired of the grind and everything. All I want to do everyday is lay in my bed and be away from everyone. I’m tired of having to force to get up everyday to work. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it. I hate it…. Edit: Wow… I never anticipated to get this many up votes… It’s really nice to know that I have people who understands how I feel. I really do hope and wish the best of luck towards all of you guys with anything you’re struggling and going through at the moment. 🥺💗',
  'upvotes': 571,
  'date': '2022-09-28 02:48:30',
  'emotions': ['anger'],
  'label_id': 10000000},
 {'id': 'yhraon',
  'title': "Halloween's the Toughest",
  'post': "Everybody always talks about how much it sucks to be lonely/alone on New Year's Eve, but for me it's Halloween. I think it's just cause I'm a single guy. Anybody else feel this way?",
  'text': "Halloween's the Toughest ### Everybody always talks about how much it sucks to be lonely/alone on New Year's Eve, but for me it's Halloween. I think it's just cause I'm a single guy. Anybody else feel this way?",
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2022-10-30 22:01:34',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': '16qitk5',
  'title': 'Tired of this',
  'post': 'My mind feels like it’s constantly at war with itself. I fool myself into thinking I’m fine with being alone, but ultimately what always happens it I get sick and tired of it. I’m 30 years old and completely alone. Not going through a break up or divorce because I’ve never married and I haven’t had a serious relationship in 7 years. I live paycheck to paycheck so I wouldn’t have any money to spend on a partner or friend anyway. What friends I have are either always busy with their sick family or simply do not want to hang out. They’re content with staying at home with their spouse. Same goes for my nearby family. My brother and his wife are constantly going out because they actually have friends that want to see them. And the kicker is whenever they go out, they ask me to look after their dogs. So the only company I end up having is 2 dogs. I feel like setting a date for myself. Like if I’m not with someone in 10 years and still in this situation, I should end my life. Im starting to feel like a burden as if taking my life would actually help others in my life.',
  'text': 'Tired of this ### My mind feels like it’s constantly at war with itself. I fool myself into thinking I’m fine with being alone, but ultimately what always happens it I get sick and tired of it. I’m 30 years old and completely alone. Not going through a break up or divorce because I’ve never married and I haven’t had a serious relationship in 7 years. I live paycheck to paycheck so I wouldn’t have any money to spend on a partner or friend anyway. What friends I have are either always busy with their sick family or simply do not want to hang out. They’re content with staying at home with their spouse. Same goes for my nearby family. My brother and his wife are constantly going out because they actually have friends that want to see them. And the kicker is whenever they go out, they ask me to look after their dogs. So the only company I end up having is 2 dogs. I feel like setting a date for myself. Like if I’m not with someone in 10 years and still in this situation, I should end my life. Im starting to feel like a burden as if taking my life would actually help others in my life.',
  'upvotes': 6,
  'date': '2023-09-23 23:42:33',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 11111110},
 {'id': '11xl1ca',
  'title': 'Is it just me?',
  'post': 'He refuses to brush his teeth (Like ever!!) but INSISTSSSSS he gives me oral sex, (if no is the answer I’m put down and told that I’m withholding sex from my partner and thats a sure way for relationships to end quickly) It’s just really becoming gross to me🤦🏽\u200d♀️ and I believe it’s the cause of all these recurring UTI’s. He doesn’t care about my body at all. Just uses it for sexual gratification. If a women is already pregnant why do you have to ejaculate inside them 5 times a day, Am I weird for thinking this way? Do other women feel the way I feel? I need help?!?!?!?!? He says that any other lady would be glad to get f*cked alll day🤦🏽\u200d♀️',
  'text': 'Is it just me? ### He refuses to brush his teeth (Like ever!!) but INSISTSSSSS he gives me oral sex, (if no is the answer I’m put down and told that I’m withholding sex from my partner and thats a sure way for relationships to end quickly) It’s just really becoming gross to me🤦🏽\u200d♀️ and I believe it’s the cause of all these recurring UTI’s. He doesn’t care about my body at all. Just uses it for sexual gratification. If a women is already pregnant why do you have to ejaculate inside them 5 times a day, Am I weird for thinking this way? Do other women feel the way I feel? I need help?!?!?!?!? He says that any other lady would be glad to get f*cked alll day🤦🏽\u200d♀️',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-03-21 15:56:04',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10000001},
 {'id': '170lm6b',
  'title': 'tired of masking',
  'post': 'like the title says. it’s been getting so draining; i’m forcing my smiles and energy wherever i am and by the end of the day i crash. i get in bed and become so numb from crying that i don’t even feel my tears anymore. i feel like i’m not myself at all and i’m constantly dissociating. how do i take the load off? what can i do?',
  'text': 'tired of masking ### like the title says. it’s been getting so draining; i’m forcing my smiles and energy wherever i am and by the end of the day i crash. i get in bed and become so numb from crying that i don’t even feel my tears anymore. i feel like i’m not myself at all and i’m constantly dissociating. how do i take the load off? what can i do?',
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2023-10-05 15:59:08',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'yxbbzy',
  'title': 'Hate having my period',
  'post': 'Life is a chore and this is just another thing to deal with. I have no interest in having kids so me menstruating is literally pointless.',
  'text': 'Hate having my period ### Life is a chore and this is just another thing to deal with. I have no interest in having kids so me menstruating is literally pointless.',
  'upvotes': 106,
  'date': '2022-11-17 00:32:59',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '125n7kn',
  'title': 'I just wish I had tougher skin. Everything seems to absolutely effing destroy me...',
  'post': "The day barely began (9:47am, São Paulo time), a little something already hurt my feelings. I overthink stuff, I'm sensitive, I feel like I'm already failing the only thing that really matters achieving for me while everyone around me just get it without caring about it that much. It feels like it's their secret.\n\nI always try so hard. I bother so much in giving a 100 per cent. I don't know how to be different, it's either 100 or zero. I just wish my sadness, frustrations and fears didn't overwhelm me. It's hard to breathe. My chest hurts.",
  'text': "I just wish I had tougher skin. Everything seems to absolutely effing destroy me... ### The day barely began (9:47am, São Paulo time), a little something already hurt my feelings. I overthink stuff, I'm sensitive, I feel like I'm already failing the only thing that really matters achieving for me while everyone around me just get it without caring about it that much. It feels like it's their secret. I always try so hard. I bother so much in giving a 100 per cent. I don't know how to be different, it's either 100 or zero. I just wish my sadness, frustrations and fears didn't overwhelm me. It's hard to breathe. My chest hurts.",
  'upvotes': 354,
  'date': '2023-03-29 12:51:19',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': 'bwbicm',
  'title': 'I go back and forth between thinking "wow I\'ve been through so much and I\'m still here and not at my worst and that\'s great" to "oh my God my life story is so fucked up"',
  'post': "Sometimes I just think about everything and want to vent but there's so much to say and I don't know who to tell it to without being annoying or disturbing. I'm in therapy. But still. Sometimes I just want to vent to friends but there's so much to say and most of it is dark. I remember random things sometimes and keep thinking about them but can't really let it out because it's just not something you say in a casual conversation. So it just stays repeating in my mind.",
  'text': 'I go back and forth between thinking "wow I\'ve been through so much and I\'m still here and not at my worst and that\'s great" to "oh my God my life story is so fucked up" ### Sometimes I just think about everything and want to vent but there\'s so much to say and I don\'t know who to tell it to without being annoying or disturbing. I\'m in therapy. But still. Sometimes I just want to vent to friends but there\'s so much to say and most of it is dark. I remember random things sometimes and keep thinking about them but can\'t really let it out because it\'s just not something you say in a casual conversation. So it just stays repeating in my mind.',
  'upvotes': 187,
  'date': '2019-06-03 14:49:34',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'brain dysfunction (forget)', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1010100},
 {'id': '15qkt37',
  'title': 'Phasing through reality completely invisible',
  'post': ' People don’t look at me, they look past me, they don’t interact, don’t  approach, don’t acknowledge. My presence is like that of an apparition  phasing through life, sometimes I question if I’m even a real person all  together or just some conceptual observer of reality. When I go out  into the world and try accomplishing the days tasks it’s without so much  as speaking a single word; though invisible. With so much in society  being vapidly automated, self-checkout, self-regulating .. you are left  more than ever before with only the self; even the most mundane  interactions of life are fading, I’m fading. If I fell off the face of  the Earth disappearing into obscurity and nobody notices then did I even  exist to begin with? ',
  'text': 'Phasing through reality completely invisible ### People don’t look at me, they look past me, they don’t interact, don’t approach, don’t acknowledge. My presence is like that of an apparition phasing through life, sometimes I question if I’m even a real person all together or just some conceptual observer of reality. When I go out into the world and try accomplishing the days tasks it’s without so much as speaking a single word; though invisible. With so much in society being vapidly automated, self-checkout, self-regulating .. you are left more than ever before with only the self; even the most mundane interactions of life are fading, I’m fading. If I fell off the face of the Earth disappearing into obscurity and nobody notices then did I even exist to begin with?',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-08-14 04:56:36',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'fitj70',
  'title': 'Conversation with parents',
  'post': "So I just had a conversation about racism with my parents... yeah I know.\nTo sum up the conversation there arguement is this\n1. You should be racist if there racist to you\n2. Blacks are more rasist so why not\n3. Your a pussy if you're not racist\n\nI basically said\n\n1. being racist is definitely not okay\n2. Just because other people are racist to you you shouldn't be racist to them\n3. If someone is racist to you stand up for your self and call them out on it.\n\nMy parents the said I need to get out of the world and face real life... I already have a job and working on my own business and that I'm to young to understand how things work... fuck dude I'm an adult.\nI really can't believe this was a real conversation it literally felt like a skit because of how stupid there arguements were. I'm just posting this to get people's thoughts.",
  'text': "Conversation with parents ### So I just had a conversation about racism with my parents... yeah I know. To sum up the conversation there arguement is this 1. You should be racist if there racist to you 2. Blacks are more rasist so why not 3. Your a pussy if you're not racist I basically said 1. being racist is definitely not okay 2. Just because other people are racist to you you shouldn't be racist to them 3. If someone is racist to you stand up for your self and call them out on it. My parents the said I need to get out of the world and face real life... I already have a job and working on my own business and that I'm to young to understand how things work... fuck dude I'm an adult. I really can't believe this was a real conversation it literally felt like a skit because of how stupid there arguements were. I'm just posting this to get people's thoughts.",
  'upvotes': 75,
  'date': '2020-03-15 01:32:28',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': 'v62yyp',
  'title': 'Why do I constantly get tormented with unpleasant, embarrassing memories of myself from the past?',
  'post': "Embarrassing memories of myself keep storming my mind nonstop. When I forget one, another pops up. And the more I fight them the stronger they attach. This happens periodically almost everyday and only worsens when I don't sleep for extended periods. The memories cause me to howl in pain begging them to just vanish. Feels like I'm reliving them. To clarify, these memories are not about sexual abuse or violence or anything of that nature. They're about highly cringy things I have said or done in front of others. These grave mistakes have tormented me for as long as I can remember and I want to know why. Have any of you experienced the same thing to perhaps a lesser degree? I reckon my case is extreme",
  'text': "Why do I constantly get tormented with unpleasant, embarrassing memories of myself from the past? ### Embarrassing memories of myself keep storming my mind nonstop. When I forget one, another pops up. And the more I fight them the stronger they attach. This happens periodically almost everyday and only worsens when I don't sleep for extended periods. The memories cause me to howl in pain begging them to just vanish. Feels like I'm reliving them. To clarify, these memories are not about sexual abuse or violence or anything of that nature. They're about highly cringy things I have said or done in front of others. These grave mistakes have tormented me for as long as I can remember and I want to know why. Have any of you experienced the same thing to perhaps a lesser degree? I reckon my case is extreme",
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2022-06-06 12:59:32',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1},
 {'id': 'dwmnok',
  'title': 'I [14F] Survived A School Shooting and Now I Feel Numb',
  'post': 'throwaway account \nand i’m sorry if this isn’t the right forum, i have no idea where to put it and my mind is all over the place right now.\n\nearlier this morning my school got shot up. it was the most terrifying moment of my life, i heard gunshots and screams and ran as fast as i could off of campus. i’m safe, and my friends are safe, but multiple kids didn’t. \ni feel like i’m dreaming. i feel like nothing is real and my brain is so foggy. i don’t feel safe anywhere anymore and the thought of going back to school makes me sick. i keep hearing the gunshots over and over again in my head. please give me advice.\n\ntl;dr\ni survived a school shooting and i feel like i’m dreaming',
  'text': 'I [14F] Survived A School Shooting and Now I Feel Numb ### throwaway account and i’m sorry if this isn’t the right forum, i have no idea where to put it and my mind is all over the place right now. earlier this morning my school got shot up. it was the most terrifying moment of my life, i heard gunshots and screams and ran as fast as i could off of campus. i’m safe, and my friends are safe, but multiple kids didn’t. i feel like i’m dreaming. i feel like nothing is real and my brain is so foggy. i don’t feel safe anywhere anymore and the thought of going back to school makes me sick. i keep hearing the gunshots over and over again in my head. please give me advice. tl;dr i survived a school shooting and i feel like i’m dreaming',
  'upvotes': 568,
  'date': '2019-11-15 06:16:16',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 1111111},
 {'id': '16w25ms',
  'title': "It's overwhelming when a person looks at and talks to me like an actual human being of worth",
  'post': "Especially since I'm not of worth and have no right to receive that kindness. But there's one person at work who does so, and I suppose that makes her very kind to humor trash like me. Most don't even do that much. It makes me feel good inside for such a brief moment, even when I know it isn't real. It's still an act of kindness that really helps me through another difficult day.",
  'text': "It's overwhelming when a person looks at and talks to me like an actual human being of worth ### Especially since I'm not of worth and have no right to receive that kindness. But there's one person at work who does so, and I suppose that makes her very kind to humor trash like me. Most don't even do that much. It makes me feel good inside for such a brief moment, even when I know it isn't real. It's still an act of kindness that really helps me through another difficult day.",
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2023-09-30 09:11:59',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 1},
 {'id': 'fk6ciq',
  'title': 'Today my Daddy would have turned 60 years old, if only he could have admitted he needed help.',
  'post': "In September it will be 18 years since I received that call from my brother.  It was the day after my little brother's 20th birthday and we were just learning that my father had given up on himself and taken his life the day before.  My father felt so alone that in his state of mind he couldn't comprehend the guilt and ache that her would bestow upon his children. Almost 2 decades have passed and yet that pain has barely dulled.\n\nPlease, to anyone currently feeling like no one cares, I hope you know that many of us do care.  Many of us would run through fire to save you from your loneliness and self hatred.  Please know that its okay to just not be okay.  Most of all, please don't ever hesitate to ask for help because you think you can manage it.  Seriously, I for one will never shame someone who ever tells me they need help.",
  'text': "Today my Daddy would have turned 60 years old, if only he could have admitted he needed help. ### In September it will be 18 years since I received that call from my brother. It was the day after my little brother's 20th birthday and we were just learning that my father had given up on himself and taken his life the day before. My father felt so alone that in his state of mind he couldn't comprehend the guilt and ache that her would bestow upon his children. Almost 2 decades have passed and yet that pain has barely dulled. Please, to anyone currently feeling like no one cares, I hope you know that many of us do care. Many of us would run through fire to save you from your loneliness and self hatred. Please know that its okay to just not be okay. Most of all, please don't ever hesitate to ask for help because you think you can manage it. Seriously, I for one will never shame someone who ever tells me they need help.",
  'upvotes': 326,
  'date': '2020-03-17 14:39:26',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 101100},
 {'id': '16wiitf',
  'title': 'Is it just me? (just a breakdown)',
  'post': "Am I the only one that's constantly feeling lonely even being around friends/people? I can't help it, every time all the people around me is busy, I start feeling so freaking lonely, and don't get me wrong, I understand that everybody needs their own time and the adult life it's very busy, but why does it have to be like this? I know it's not normal and I don't want to feel selfish, but damn, I don't like being alone...",
  'text': "Is it just me? (just a breakdown) ### Am I the only one that's constantly feeling lonely even being around friends/people? I can't help it, every time all the people around me is busy, I start feeling so freaking lonely, and don't get me wrong, I understand that everybody needs their own time and the adult life it's very busy, but why does it have to be like this? I know it's not normal and I don't want to feel selfish, but damn, I don't like being alone...",
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-09-30 21:32:11',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1111101},
 {'id': 'q0sew9',
  'title': "We. Can't. Diagnose. Anybody.",
  'post': "Not you, not your parents, not some kid you know. The only person who can tell you if you have something is your doctor. That's literally their jobs.",
  'text': "We. Can't. Diagnose. Anybody. ### Not you, not your parents, not some kid you know. The only person who can tell you if you have something is your doctor. That's literally their jobs.",
  'upvotes': 301,
  'date': '2021-10-03 22:32:02',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'emptiness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 110001},
 {'id': 'hs39li',
  'title': "Nothing seems fun when I can't share it",
  'post': "I've been thinking of why I feel so depressed most of the time. One of the things that makes me feel the worst is how I usually no longer have interest in doing stuff that in other points of my life I have enjoyed, such as playing videogames or watching tv shows. Then I realized that when I shared my room with my brother, I always had someone to talk to while I played videogames, and I never realized that was a big part of the fun. I also noticed that when I have seen a long tv show, I stucked with it because I would share my opinions with friends as I watched it. Nowadays I just don't have people to talk to as much anymore, and I'm starting to think that's one of the biggest reasons I've lost passion for my interests. Has anyone come to the same conclusion?",
  'text': "Nothing seems fun when I can't share it ### I've been thinking of why I feel so depressed most of the time. One of the things that makes me feel the worst is how I usually no longer have interest in doing stuff that in other points of my life I have enjoyed, such as playing videogames or watching tv shows. Then I realized that when I shared my room with my brother, I always had someone to talk to while I played videogames, and I never realized that was a big part of the fun. I also noticed that when I have seen a long tv show, I stucked with it because I would share my opinions with friends as I watched it. Nowadays I just don't have people to talk to as much anymore, and I'm starting to think that's one of the biggest reasons I've lost passion for my interests. Has anyone come to the same conclusion?",
  'upvotes': 24,
  'date': '2020-07-16 04:35:45',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': '1764v1d',
  'title': 'I think I have no reason to be depressed, am I right though',
  'post': 'For the last three years, I have always been depressed and at first I brush it off as teenage hormones or something but the sadness just never stops and it keeps on going for months, years even and it keeps getting worse 😀\n\n\nYou see I have a relatively good childhood (kind of lonely since I am an only child and my parents both worked, but its still good), a roof over my head, warm foods, parents who are still married and on good terms, good friends also so I do not understand as to why am I like this when people would kill to be in my position 😀\n\n\nI mean, sure I have a history of SA and bullying but its still so silly it was all in the past right 😀',
  'text': 'I think I have no reason to be depressed, am I right though ### For the last three years, I have always been depressed and at first I brush it off as teenage hormones or something but the sadness just never stops and it keeps on going for months, years even and it keeps getting worse 😀 You see I have a relatively good childhood (kind of lonely since I am an only child and my parents both worked, but its still good), a roof over my head, warm foods, parents who are still married and on good terms, good friends also so I do not understand as to why am I like this when people would kill to be in my position 😀 I mean, sure I have a history of SA and bullying but its still so silly it was all in the past right 😀',
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2023-10-12 11:37:37',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11100},
 {'id': 'ructel',
  'title': 'Struggling with partner being "back" from a depressive episode',
  'post': "He laid on the couch for a week,  barely spoke to me or even looked at me for the duration of our winter vacation.\n\nThe day i go back to work, he's suddenly better.  \n\nI know it's not his fault, but it still sucked a lot.\n\nHe's all penitent and being sweet now and trying to make up for it. \n\nAnd it's nice, I am incredibly relieved it's over, \n\nI do feel some resentment\n\nMostly though, I just don't trust him. I filled my own cup, I took care of myself.  But I can't bring myself to lean on him at all now,  because I feel like he'll just crumble.  \n\nHow can you have emotional intimacy without being able to be vulnerable with your partner? \n\nI think I feel sort of unsafe if that makes sense?\n\nIs this something y'all have grappled with?",
  'text': 'Struggling with partner being "back" from a depressive episode ### He laid on the couch for a week, barely spoke to me or even looked at me for the duration of our winter vacation. The day i go back to work, he\'s suddenly better. I know it\'s not his fault, but it still sucked a lot. He\'s all penitent and being sweet now and trying to make up for it. And it\'s nice, I am incredibly relieved it\'s over, I do feel some resentment Mostly though, I just don\'t trust him. I filled my own cup, I took care of myself. But I can\'t bring myself to lean on him at all now, because I feel like he\'ll just crumble. How can you have emotional intimacy without being able to be vulnerable with your partner? I think I feel sort of unsafe if that makes sense? Is this something y\'all have grappled with?',
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2022-01-02 16:11:38',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '109jxp8',
  'title': 'loneliness stings',
  'post': "I always try to be the best I can towards people, but nobody cares. People only care about building their lives now and I'm like a lonely kid looking for a friend. Or like an alien trying to truly befriend one of these human beings. Well, an alien with frequent emotional breakdowns. And really good ways of hiding them. But seriously, I'm in a lot of pain way too often. Like nothing happens in my life, but my emotions are on overdrive. Wish me luck I'm gonna try to get out of it somehow.",
  'text': "loneliness stings ### I always try to be the best I can towards people, but nobody cares. People only care about building their lives now and I'm like a lonely kid looking for a friend. Or like an alien trying to truly befriend one of these human beings. Well, an alien with frequent emotional breakdowns. And really good ways of hiding them. But seriously, I'm in a lot of pain way too often. Like nothing happens in my life, but my emotions are on overdrive. Wish me luck I'm gonna try to get out of it somehow.",
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2023-01-11 23:45:57',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 101101},
 {'id': '1012i7l',
  'title': "I'm afraid to be alive, but I'm also afraid to die",
  'post': "I don't know what's happening to me lately. My depression comes within seasons. Sometimes, it is worse, and sometimes it is gone, but lately, what I'm feeling is not just depression but a big fear of being alive. The idea of being alive makes me horrified and makes me want to cry, mostly because it doesn't feel as if I'm alive. What does it mean to be alive? The more I think about it, the worse I feel, and the more I want to stop being alive, but the idea of dying is also horrible. I feel that I'm stuck in a horrible, scary, and dark limbo.",
  'text': "I'm afraid to be alive, but I'm also afraid to die ### I don't know what's happening to me lately. My depression comes within seasons. Sometimes, it is worse, and sometimes it is gone, but lately, what I'm feeling is not just depression but a big fear of being alive. The idea of being alive makes me horrified and makes me want to cry, mostly because it doesn't feel as if I'm alive. What does it mean to be alive? The more I think about it, the worse I feel, and the more I want to stop being alive, but the idea of dying is also horrible. I feel that I'm stuck in a horrible, scary, and dark limbo.",
  'upvotes': 92,
  'date': '2023-01-02 03:51:56',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'worthlessness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 111},
 {'id': 'jl3ipc',
  'title': 'Why so easy to get married but hard to get divorced?',
  'post': 'I’m convinced that if the government made it as difficult to get married as it is to get divorced, more people would think twice before getting married. \n\nWhy is it so cheap and easy to get married but so expensive difficult to get divorced? Even without an attorney, the filing fees for getting divorced can be hundreds of dollars. Meanwhile, a marriage license is usually less than $50.',
  'text': 'Why so easy to get married but hard to get divorced? ### I’m convinced that if the government made it as difficult to get married as it is to get divorced, more people would think twice before getting married. Why is it so cheap and easy to get married but so expensive difficult to get divorced? Even without an attorney, the filing fees for getting divorced can be hundreds of dollars. Meanwhile, a marriage license is usually less than $50.',
  'upvotes': 174,
  'date': '2020-10-30 19:32:57',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': 'zkyofc',
  'title': 'Broke up',
  'post': "After 5+ years, he ended it. After years of being depressed, he has decided to seek therapy. I guess I'm hoping therapy may save our relationship. I still have hope and I'm not sure if I should hold on to that. I don't know how seriously he will do it.\nHe is afraid of dragging me down to the depths of his depression and me being collateral damage. \nEven though he broke up, he still suggested that we don't end contact and talk often. I don't know how that will work. I think sudden change may not agree with him and hence this was suggested.\nI don't know why I am posting here. Maybe because this was my safe space and a judgement free zone. \nI read so many posts here about break ups and never thought I'd be going through one.\nAnyway, thank you for taking the time in reading this.",
  'text': "Broke up ### After 5+ years, he ended it. After years of being depressed, he has decided to seek therapy. I guess I'm hoping therapy may save our relationship. I still have hope and I'm not sure if I should hold on to that. I don't know how seriously he will do it. He is afraid of dragging me down to the depths of his depression and me being collateral damage. Even though he broke up, he still suggested that we don't end contact and talk often. I don't know how that will work. I think sudden change may not agree with him and hence this was suggested. I don't know why I am posting here. Maybe because this was my safe space and a judgement free zone. I read so many posts here about break ups and never thought I'd be going through one. Anyway, thank you for taking the time in reading this.",
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2022-12-13 15:39:54',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '16rg4tb',
  'title': 'I want to go home',
  'post': "Do you ever get the feeling that you aren't home even when you are? I want to go home but the problem is I'm already there. I want to go home and give my mom a hug and go play in my room but I can't, I'm an adult now. I want to help my dad make dinner and play with my sister. I want someone to take care of me, where I don't have to deal with any finances or bills or going to work. I want something that I can't bring back and it makes me cry. I want to be a kid again and I just want to go home",
  'text': "I want to go home ### Do you ever get the feeling that you aren't home even when you are? I want to go home but the problem is I'm already there. I want to go home and give my mom a hug and go play in my room but I can't, I'm an adult now. I want to help my dad make dinner and play with my sister. I want someone to take care of me, where I don't have to deal with any finances or bills or going to work. I want something that I can't bring back and it makes me cry. I want to be a kid again and I just want to go home",
  'upvotes': 243,
  'date': '2023-09-25 02:32:57',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': 'msrvxh',
  'title': 'First morning in new place...',
  'post': 'and sipping my morning cup of coffee sitting on a new couch, and taking in a beautiful view of the city. The first morning cup of many, in a new place, living a new life -- by myself. \n\nEveryone I told about the move to the new place kept saying things like "this will be exciting!" or "I\'m sure you\'re happy to be settling in"...  I want to slap on a smile and respond that *yes, this is exciting and I\'m happy to have a new place to start a new life.* But right now, my heart is breaking and I feel like I\'m drowning in grief. The reality is hitting me now. This *in fact* is my new life. *By myself. No partner. Alone.*',
  'text': 'First morning in new place... ### and sipping my morning cup of coffee sitting on a new couch, and taking in a beautiful view of the city. The first morning cup of many, in a new place, living a new life -- by myself. Everyone I told about the move to the new place kept saying things like "this will be exciting!" or "I\'m sure you\'re happy to be settling in"... I want to slap on a smile and respond that *yes, this is exciting and I\'m happy to have a new place to start a new life.* But right now, my heart is breaking and I feel like I\'m drowning in grief. The reality is hitting me now. This *in fact* is my new life. *By myself. No partner. Alone.*',
  'upvotes': 151,
  'date': '2021-04-17 14:37:14',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '17devje',
  'title': 'I wish I killed myself before I had a kid.',
  'post': "I've dealt with manic depression silently for more than half my life. Long story short I'm a single mother of an autistic child after a failed 12 year relationship. I can't kill myself because I am ALL he has. No one even tries have have relationship with him. I have been drowning and I do badly want to give up but I know I can't.",
  'text': "I wish I killed myself before I had a kid. ### I've dealt with manic depression silently for more than half my life. Long story short I'm a single mother of an autistic child after a failed 12 year relationship. I can't kill myself because I am ALL he has. No one even tries have have relationship with him. I have been drowning and I do badly want to give up but I know I can't.",

  'title': 'R.I.P George Floyd',

 {'id': 'dmqav9',
  'title': '“Have you made any plans to kill yourself?”',
  'post': 'Difficult question to answer doc.\n\nI’ve planned how I’d do it in detail thousand of times, but have I planned it in the sense of how I’d plan to go to the mall and buy a new coat on Tuesday evening? No.\n\nNo timeframe, just a very detailed get-out clause for if I stop being able to handle this bullshit life any more. So I don’t know if that counts as making plans or not.',
  'text': '“Have you made any plans to kill yourself?” ### Difficult question to answer doc. I’ve planned how I’d do it in detail thousand of times, but have I planned it in the sense of how I’d plan to go to the mall and buy a new coat on Tuesday evening? No. No timeframe, just a very detailed get-out clause for if I stop being able to handle this bullshit life any more. So I don’t know if that counts as making plans or not.',
  'upvotes': 512,
  'date': '2019-10-25 01:30:45',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111},
 {'id': 'w63wp6',
  'title': 'We had an argument because I’m not going to help her move out… am I in the wrong ?',
  'post': 'My wife and I are in the process of getting a divorce. We work in the same office building and will likely see each other often for the next two years so we are trying to keep it as amicable as possible. \nShe started dreading having to move out of the apartment and she brought up that I could help her move. \n\nI pretty much said “how stupid would I be to help you move out after you divorce me (her decision. I suggested counseling she denied).\n\nAm I in the wrong???',
  'text': 'We had an argument because I’m not going to help her move out… am I in the wrong ? ### My wife and I are in the process of getting a divorce. We work in the same office building and will likely see each other often for the next two years so we are trying to keep it as amicable as possible. She started dreading having to move out of the apartment and she brought up that I could help her move. I pretty much said “how stupid would I be to help you move out after you divorce me (her decision. I suggested counseling she denied). Am I in the wrong???',
  'upvotes': 155,
  'date': '2022-07-23 13:21:35',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': '120zyjh',
  'title': 'They really do turn into strangers.',
  'post': 'Not just who they are going forward, but in some cases who they were. The image of them you had in your head - the trust and belief that they would be there, loving you, supportive, like they said they would be. Like they had been. \n\nStonewalling. Cold. With every next step in the fucking paperwork, more stitches that had sewn the two of you together are painfully ripped out.\n\nI hate this whole process. I am a half destroyed human. I am so tired of crying.',
  'text': 'They really do turn into strangers. ### Not just who they are going forward, but in some cases who they were. The image of them you had in your head - the trust and belief that they would be there, loving you, supportive, like they said they would be. Like they had been. Stonewalling. Cold. With every next step in the fucking paperwork, more stitches that had sewn the two of you together are painfully ripped out. I hate this whole process. I am a half destroyed human. I am so tired of crying.',
  'upvotes': 262,
  'date': '2023-03-24 21:50:03',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'fiba00',
  'title': 'A great quote from Ernest Hemingway',
  'post': '“The most painful thing is losing yourself in the process of loving someone too much, and forgetting that you are special too.”',
  'text': 'A great quote from Ernest Hemingway ### “The most painful thing is losing yourself in the process of loving someone too much, and forgetting that you are special too.”',
  'upvotes': 240,
  'date': '2020-03-14 02:09:31',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000100},
 {'id': 'jtuaom',
  'title': 'I am an Asian Teenager',
  'post': "My parent are like torturing me. They say it was an discipline, but I think is not. My grades are pretty good but they say it's not. I sometimes cry myself to sleep. The pain is still in me. They sound like they like me to be gone. Dead. They wanna torture me.\n\n&#x200B;\n\nEDIT: I still make my assignments and nothing ever changed. Im still insulted and i am crying myself to sleep for the whole week.",
  'text': "I am an Asian Teenager ### My parent are like torturing me. They say it was an discipline, but I think is not. My grades are pretty good but they say it's not. I sometimes cry myself to sleep. The pain is still in me. They sound like they like me to be gone. Dead. They wanna torture me. &#x200B; EDIT: I still make my assignments and nothing ever changed. Im still insulted and i am crying myself to sleep for the whole week.",
  'upvotes': 38,
  'date': '2020-11-14 02:48:09',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '16nalru',
  'title': 'I’ve been sad for awhile now.',
  'post': 'I think it’s because I feel Alone or left out. Right now particularly is really sad for because my Mom passed last summer. and I feel empty and forgotten like nobody cares about me except my Dad. I feel like I have no purpose except to be forgotten about by people and be treated like I’m nothing. I’m just wondering if anyone else thinks the same way.',
  'text': 'I’ve been sad for awhile now. ### I think it’s because I feel Alone or left out. Right now particularly is really sad for because my Mom passed last summer. and I feel empty and forgotten like nobody cares about me except my Dad. I feel like I have no purpose except to be forgotten about by people and be treated like I’m nothing. I’m just wondering if anyone else thinks the same way.',
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-09-20 03:15:33',

   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'worthlessness',

 {'id': '171gzsx',
  'title': 'Advice for remembering to take meds?',
  'post': 'Hey guys, so I’ve been in a hole the last few months, you can see my Reddit history 💀🤡. And I noticed I’ve been forgetting to take some things like my lexapro at night. Before all of this, I usually always remembered for years, but I think being in the mental hole effects me to remember to take them. I feel like other people have had this issue, and if so, was there something yall did to help remember? I’m adhd too, so I’m forgetful and even if i set an alarm, I know I’ll tell myself “eh, I’m not going to bed yet so I’ll wait” and then forget-  lol',
  'text': 'Advice for remembering to take meds? ### Hey guys, so I’ve been in a hole the last few months, you can see my Reddit history 💀🤡. And I noticed I’ve been forgetting to take some things like my lexapro at night. Before all of this, I usually always remembered for years, but I think being in the mental hole effects me to remember to take them. I feel like other people have had this issue, and if so, was there something yall did to help remember? I’m adhd too, so I’m forgetful and even if i set an alarm, I know I’ll tell myself “eh, I’m not going to bed yet so I’ll wait” and then forget- lol',
  'upvotes': 7,
  'date': '2023-10-06 16:34:37',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000000},
 {'id': 'jsaprw',
  'title': 'Advice please?..',
  'post': 'Recently i realized the fact that i get phisicaly exhausted not just mentality after people yell at me or make fun of me (even if ther are saying nonsense). I dont fell remorse most of the time or bad or even sad (most of the time).Just REALY tired. Why ?',
  'text': 'Advice please?.. ### Recently i realized the fact that i get phisicaly exhausted not just mentality after people yell at me or make fun of me (even if ther are saying nonsense). I dont fell remorse most of the time or bad or even sad (most of the time).Just REALY tired. Why ?',
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2020-11-11 16:01:20',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10000001},
 {'id': '17ce9ua',
  'title': 'Being awake is a chore',
  'post': 'So much has happened this year that’s traumatized me and put me through hell. I used to have coping mechanisms that let me live on autopilot but now I’m having meltdowns every day and I’m hyperaware of everything that’s happened, what continues to happen, and all of the emotions that come with it. I can’t focus on anything because my mind is always racing with negative thoughts and emotions. I can’t hold conversations because I space out and forget what I’m doing or where I am. I sleep for 12 hours and when I wake up I get upset that I have to wait before I go to sleep again. Sleeping without dreaming is the most peace I have. When I dream, it feels so realistic and my brain makes up really screwed up scenarios. I hate being awake. I just want it to end.',
  'text': 'Being awake is a chore ### So much has happened this year that’s traumatized me and put me through hell. I used to have coping mechanisms that let me live on autopilot but now I’m having meltdowns every day and I’m hyperaware of everything that’s happened, what continues to happen, and all of the emotions that come with it. I can’t focus on anything because my mind is always racing with negative thoughts and emotions. I can’t hold conversations because I space out and forget what I’m doing or where I am. I sleep for 12 hours and when I wake up I get upset that I have to wait before I go to sleep again. Sleeping without dreaming is the most peace I have. When I dream, it feels so realistic and my brain makes up really screwed up scenarios. I hate being awake. I just want it to end.',
  'upvotes': 12,
  'date': '2023-10-20 15:42:45',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000100},
 {'id': '16i4okg',
  'title': 'My 17 yo son left in April',
  'post': 'He left in the middle of the night to go live with his mother. He left us because I wouldn’t allow him to keep bringing drugs into the house. He ran to a woman he refused to talk to for over a year because she was THE trigger to him. No apology, no remorse, no anything. He was my everything since my husband died and my heart has been broken beyond repair. I went off the deep end back in June and relapsed into SH after 30 years. I miss him so much. I want to wake up from this nightmare.',
  'text': 'My 17 yo son left in April ### He left in the middle of the night to go live with his mother. He left us because I wouldn’t allow him to keep bringing drugs into the house. He ran to a woman he refused to talk to for over a year because she was THE trigger to him. No apology, no remorse, no anything. He was my everything since my husband died and my heart has been broken beyond repair. I went off the deep end back in June and relapsed into SH after 30 years. I miss him so much. I want to wake up from this nightmare.',
  'upvotes': 122,
  'date': '2023-09-14 01:09:33',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'anger', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10110100},
 {'id': '14tsq3k',
  'title': 'I believe in you',
  'post': "I believe you have purpose and sometimes it's easy to lose sight of your mission. \n\nSet your intentions and challenge yourself to not spiral downward when it gets dark... it won't always work but sometimes it may shorten your dark days. This is what I've been trying and little by little it is helping me grow.\n\n- someone lonely",
  'text': "I believe in you ### I believe you have purpose and sometimes it's easy to lose sight of your mission. Set your intentions and challenge yourself to not spiral downward when it gets dark... it won't always work but sometimes it may shorten your dark days. This is what I've been trying and little by little it is helping me grow. - someone lonely",
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-07-08 03:44:51',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'djhsg0',
  'title': 'The days you don’t feel like going to therapy, are the days you should go the most.',
  'post': 'I’ve noticed this. Every time I have wanted to stay home is when I needed therapy the most; and when I do go the therapy session it ends up being the most helpful since I get all the advice & info I needed. \n\n\nTomorrow I have therapy and right now I don’t feel like going, but it’s because I’m so unhappy that I don’t even want to talk about it, but I still put my alarm to wake my ass up and go because I need it.\n\n\nIt’s like feeling sick so you don’t want to get up and go to the doctor because your symptoms make it really hard for you to move around, but in the end you have to go because it is the only way to get better.',
  'text': 'The days you don’t feel like going to therapy, are the days you should go the most. ### I’ve noticed this. Every time I have wanted to stay home is when I needed therapy the most; and when I do go the therapy session it ends up being the most helpful since I get all the advice & info I needed. Tomorrow I have therapy and right now I don’t feel like going, but it’s because I’m so unhappy that I don’t even want to talk about it, but I still put my alarm to wake my ass up and go because I need it. It’s like feeling sick so you don’t want to get up and go to the doctor because your symptoms make it really hard for you to move around, but in the end you have to go because it is the only way to get better.',
  'upvotes': 298,
  'date': '2019-10-18 03:42:19',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '1294hud',
  'title': 'I hate the words trigger, triggered, and triggering. What can I use instead?',
  'post': 'These words have been ruined by social media and sound so pathetic and cringe now. I need substitutes.',
  'text': 'I hate the words trigger, triggered, and triggering. What can I use instead? ### These words have been ruined by social media and sound so pathetic and cringe now. I need substitutes.',
  'upvotes': 124,
  'date': '2023-04-02 00:38:35',

  'title': 'I just want a hug so bad',
  'post': 'So so so bad I want to feel loved and cared for',

 {'id': '11c5tth',
  'title': "I would kill myself if it wasn't for my parents",
  'post': "I don't want them to mourn me, i live so that they don't suffer, but i don't feel optimistic about life anymore, i don't really enjoy it anymore, i would be fine with dying already, i will probably do it once they pass on",
  'text': "I would kill myself if it wasn't for my parents ### I don't want them to mourn me, i live so that they don't suffer, but i don't feel optimistic about life anymore, i don't really enjoy it anymore, i would be fine with dying already, i will probably do it once they pass on",
  'upvotes': 109,
  'date': '2023-02-26 04:59:16',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11110},
 {'id': 'g4zuhy',
  'title': 'I’m more afraid to live another 60 years than dying.',
  'post': 'Does anyone else feel this way?',
  'text': 'I’m more afraid to live another 60 years than dying. ### Does anyone else feel this way?',
  'upvotes': 1033,

 {'id': 'o7a8k8',
  'title': 'Way too overreactive to be considered a mother',
  'post': "I just got threatened to have my neck snapped and called a dumb bitch.\n\nWhy?\n\nBecause I put a plate in the wrong section of the dishwasher\n\nNo, it didn't get turned on.\nNo, if it had of been turned on it wouldn't of damaged or altered the cleaning of the dishwasher in any way.\n\nI just skipped a slot, that is all.\n\nFml :)",
  'text': "Way too overreactive to be considered a mother ### I just got threatened to have my neck snapped and called a dumb bitch. Why? Because I put a plate in the wrong section of the dishwasher No, it didn't get turned on. No, if it had of been turned on it wouldn't of damaged or altered the cleaning of the dishwasher in any way. I just skipped a slot, that is all. Fml :)",
  'upvotes': 40,
  'date': '2021-06-24 21:18:39',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
