 {'id': '17az16p',
  'title': 'I give up.',
  'post': 'Everyone is so obsessed with their own wants they can’t even stop for a second to consider others. People are disgusting and a failure. I give up.',
  'text': 'I give up. ### Everyone is so obsessed with their own wants they can’t even stop for a second to consider others. People are disgusting and a failure. I give up.',
  'upvotes': 18,
  'date': '2023-10-18 19:25:18',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 11010111},
 {'id': 'v4idsm',
  'title': 'Unreal feelings',
  'post': "I have reached the point where I am completely disconnected from my own being and from the people around me, family and coworkers, I have reached the point where weeks can go by where I have totally forgotten the fact that I exist.  Today I realized that I saw a cute girl to whom I only said 2 words, a simple hello and have a nice day, I don't think she really remembers that she even interacted with me for a few seconds, which gave me pause, really Is it possible for a human being to be worthy of the attention of another human being? Am I really a person capable of being able to love and be loved? Am I not just a lifeless body? It seems to me such a distant and illogical idea, or is it just that I have reached the total numbness of my humanity?.",
  'text': "Unreal feelings ### I have reached the point where I am completely disconnected from my own being and from the people around me, family and coworkers, I have reached the point where weeks can go by where I have totally forgotten the fact that I exist. Today I realized that I saw a cute girl to whom I only said 2 words, a simple hello and have a nice day, I don't think she really remembers that she even interacted with me for a few seconds, which gave me pause, really Is it possible for a human being to be worthy of the attention of another human being? Am I really a person capable of being able to love and be loved? Am I not just a lifeless body? It seems to me such a distant and illogical idea, or is it just that I have reached the total numbness of my humanity?.",
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2022-06-04 05:51:47',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1111101},
 {'id': 'bm8ukv',
  'title': 'Perspective',
  'post': '* Clears throat * \n\nMeghan Markle got divorced and then went on to marry PRINCE HARRY. \n\nKeep on keeping on. 🙌🏻 👸',
  'text': 'Perspective ### * Clears throat * Meghan Markle got divorced and then went on to marry PRINCE HARRY. Keep on keeping on. 🙌🏻 👸',
  'upvotes': 228,
  'date': '2019-05-08 18:27:30',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'ak8uty',
  'title': 'Anyone else miss long meaningful hugs.',
  'post': 'Th last one I got was when my ex came to grab some of her things from my house then she left. \n\nIt mad me think there was a chance for us.  But I guess I was wrong.',
  'text': 'Anyone else miss long meaningful hugs. ### Th last one I got was when my ex came to grab some of her things from my house then she left. It mad me think there was a chance for us. But I guess I was wrong.',
  'upvotes': 15,
  'date': '2019-01-27 04:27:28',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '11gqssc',
  'title': 'How to lessen birthday depression?',
  'post': 'Every year since about my 15th I just have come to hate my own birthday. I am absolutely swamped with anxiety, feeling like a failure, and crippling depression for lack of a more fitting term haha. \n\nMy constant perfectionism and need to feel like I’m “on track” and meeting my high standards leaves me always feeling like a joke..\n\nLeaving the past behind for a future that seems far more bleak as I lose any positive connections and outlooks is terrifying.\n\nCherry on top, I never feel like I can accept any attention to my self because of it.\n\nNow I’m turning 21.. the pressure is real, people.\n\nTo anyone else who has experienced this, any suggestions to make my day tomorrow suck a little less?',
  'text': 'How to lessen birthday depression? ### Every year since about my 15th I just have come to hate my own birthday. I am absolutely swamped with anxiety, feeling like a failure, and crippling depression for lack of a more fitting term haha. My constant perfectionism and need to feel like I’m “on track” and meeting my high standards leaves me always feeling like a joke.. Leaving the past behind for a future that seems far more bleak as I lose any positive connections and outlooks is terrifying. Cherry on top, I never feel like I can accept any attention to my self because of it. Now I’m turning 21.. the pressure is real, people. To anyone else who has experienced this, any suggestions to make my day tomorrow suck a little less?',
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2023-03-03 04:08:41',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '12nfw95',
  'title': 'I was at a comics convention today. Wish people interacted with me more.',
  'post': 'I had a pretty cool uniform if I dare say so myself and some people interacted with me, mostly for a quick greeting or question or so. I had to go out of my way to talk to people, especially girls. And they were very nice and kind to me so I can\'t complain at all. I just wish I made a friend or something or we could hang out longer than that, but it would have been creepy for me to ask them "I came alone, mind if I join in you/ your group?" So I didn\'t. I\'m not exactly socially anxious but I draw my limit there. So I feel bittersweet right now but oh well, what can  you do? I\'m going again tomorrow and trying my luck once more.',
  'text': 'I was at a comics convention today. Wish people interacted with me more. ### I had a pretty cool uniform if I dare say so myself and some people interacted with me, mostly for a quick greeting or question or so. I had to go out of my way to talk to people, especially girls. And they were very nice and kind to me so I can\'t complain at all. I just wish I made a friend or something or we could hang out longer than that, but it would have been creepy for me to ask them "I came alone, mind if I join in you/ your group?" So I didn\'t. I\'m not exactly socially anxious but I draw my limit there. So I feel bittersweet right now but oh well, what can you do? I\'m going again tomorrow and trying my luck once more.',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2023-04-15 19:37:03',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'i2wuaj',
  'title': "I was arrested for a ptsd attack and I'm so scared",
  'post': "I had a ptsd attack 2 months ago I was thrown down and arrested by 2 police officers for disorderly conduct and resisting arrest . I have police that have helped me in the past that have offered to speak in court on it being a PTSD attack even the county Sheriff sent out a notice to the police force under his jurisdiction that I have PTSD and to do everything in their power trying deescalate the situation if they ever come out again the police officers that are willing to come to my Aid in court even said that it should not have happened and seemed pretty convinced that the prosecuting attorney will drop the charges I have doctors that work for the state that say I have what I have and even put me on disability because of all of it but I'm still being prosecuted even with all this proof that I'm not at fault can I legally be prosecuted for a PTSD attack how is this even going on I also have a lawyer",
  'text': "I was arrested for a ptsd attack and I'm so scared ### I had a ptsd attack 2 months ago I was thrown down and arrested by 2 police officers for disorderly conduct and resisting arrest . I have police that have helped me in the past that have offered to speak in court on it being a PTSD attack even the county Sheriff sent out a notice to the police force under his jurisdiction that I have PTSD and to do everything in their power trying deescalate the situation if they ever come out again the police officers that are willing to come to my Aid in court even said that it should not have happened and seemed pretty convinced that the prosecuting attorney will drop the charges I have doctors that work for the state that say I have what I have and even put me on disability because of all of it but I'm still being prosecuted even with all this proof that I'm not at fault can I legally be prosecuted for a PTSD attack how is this even going on I also have a lawyer",
  'upvotes': 163,
  'date': '2020-08-03 13:16:21',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': '12btqn2',
  'title': 'he ghosted, even when we were having a great time',
  'post': '\nit’s just sad, he gave me hope and then dipped and vanished. The loneliness when someone removes themselves from your life without an explaination is just so sad and isolating \nTips to get over this?',
  'text': 'he ghosted, even when we were having a great time ### it’s just sad, he gave me hope and then dipped and vanished. The loneliness when someone removes themselves from your life without an explaination is just so sad and isolating Tips to get over this?',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-04-04 19:31:09',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': 'rk8oma',
  'title': 'Sometimes I wish my abuser was dead or didn’t exist.',
  'post': 'I feel like a terrible person for wishing someone would never experience happiness or freedom. Here we are tho. I hate him so much it hurts. It hurts knowing he’s out there living his life. I lost people over him. They chose him. He fucked up my life. I don’t know trust or love anymore. I don’t want to know happiness because what he did to me has made me miserable despite therapy and time. He doesn’t deserve to be happy. He deserves to feel the pain I do. I’m terrible for saying it but it’s how I feel.',
  'text': 'Sometimes I wish my abuser was dead or didn’t exist. ### I feel like a terrible person for wishing someone would never experience happiness or freedom. Here we are tho. I hate him so much it hurts. It hurts knowing he’s out there living his life. I lost people over him. They chose him. He fucked up my life. I don’t know trust or love anymore. I don’t want to know happiness because what he did to me has made me miserable despite therapy and time. He doesn’t deserve to be happy. He deserves to feel the pain I do. I’m terrible for saying it but it’s how I feel.',
  'upvotes': 158,
  'date': '2021-12-19 23:23:10',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': 'xkqcpd',
  'title': 'Extremely Lonely Guy',
  'post': 'I am a guy who has a job, an apartment and a car but I am so extremely lonely. How can I get a girlfriend and friends? I am also very depressed with a very introverted personality. Is it possible for me to get a girlfriend and friends?',
  'text': 'Extremely Lonely Guy ### I am a guy who has a job, an apartment and a car but I am so extremely lonely. How can I get a girlfriend and friends? I am also very depressed with a very introverted personality. Is it possible for me to get a girlfriend and friends?',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2022-09-22 03:40:21',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '13tpya5',
  'title': 'Need help determining if this relationship is toxic and what to do.',
  'post': 'My GF said that "i’ve been thinking of committing suicide and i’ll prob do it if i’m given the chance and find a way," because she has been feeling like I don\'t care or love her anymore. She says that I am her only sense of happiness, and I have been spending more time studying recently and had less time with her, even though I have been calling her everyday. What should I do? I don\'t want her to kill herself of course but I think that this relationship may be toxic.\n\n&#x200B;\n\nOther exact texts:\n\n"im tired of waiting and crying over you, i just want you to be there for me"\n\n"why can’t you just ask like you love me" (meant act instead of ask)\n\n&#x200B;\n\nI feel like she is taking away my freedoms to even be away from her to do work for just 8 hours.',
  'text': 'Need help determining if this relationship is toxic and what to do. ### My GF said that "i’ve been thinking of committing suicide and i’ll prob do it if i’m given the chance and find a way," because she has been feeling like I don\'t care or love her anymore. She says that I am her only sense of happiness, and I have been spending more time studying recently and had less time with her, even though I have been calling her everyday. What should I do? I don\'t want her to kill herself of course but I think that this relationship may be toxic. &#x200B; Other exact texts: "im tired of waiting and crying over you, i just want you to be there for me" "why can’t you just ask like you love me" (meant act instead of ask) &#x200B; I feel like she is taking away my freedoms to even be away from her to do work for just 8 hours.',
  'upvotes': 5,
  'date': '2023-05-28 03:13:05',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10011110},
 {'id': '17acqhq',
  'title': 'I’ve always had a gut feeling I would die young. I’m starting to feel like it’ll be at my own hands, too.',
  'post': 'Has anyone else had an instinctual feeling you wouldn’t live to be over the age of 30? I always thought it would be an accident or one of my health problems that would do it, but in the past year, I’m starting to think I’ll be the one to end it. I lost my young child. I lost my husband due to the death of our daughter. I’m about to lose the place I live. I don’t have a good relationship with my family. I barely speak to anyone but miscellaneous strangers on the internet. Therapy made my thoughts worse. I can’t take anymore.',
  'text': 'I’ve always had a gut feeling I would die young. I’m starting to feel like it’ll be at my own hands, too. ### Has anyone else had an instinctual feeling you wouldn’t live to be over the age of 30? I always thought it would be an accident or one of my health problems that would do it, but in the past year, I’m starting to think I’ll be the one to end it. I lost my young child. I lost my husband due to the death of our daughter. I’m about to lose the place I live. I don’t have a good relationship with my family. I barely speak to anyone but miscellaneous strangers on the internet. Therapy made my thoughts worse. I can’t take anymore.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-10-18 00:01:24',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 110},
 {'id': '17b51yz',
  'title': 'I can feel myself falling in the pit again',
  'post': 'I (15f) had severe depression last year. To sum it up as quickly as I can, my two siblings, mom, and I escaped violence from my father and filed a restraining order. It took a huge toll on my mental health. I got medication for my depression though, which helped a ton. But I’m starting to feel horrible again. I just broke my ankle and had surgery, and feel hopeless. These ten weeks of healing are going to be hell. Though I don’t want to actively harm myself like last year, it’s been difficult. Would it be easier to end it all? \n\nI can’t go back to moping. I would cry everyday at school hoping to be dead. Mentally I was drained and exhausted. I’ve missed so much work at school and that’s not helping. My teachers keep harassing me about quizzes I have to take. The work load is weighing down on me. I don’t know how much longer I can take before I go back to the hell that’s severe depression.',
  'text': 'I can feel myself falling in the pit again ### I (15f) had severe depression last year. To sum it up as quickly as I can, my two siblings, mom, and I escaped violence from my father and filed a restraining order. It took a huge toll on my mental health. I got medication for my depression though, which helped a ton. But I’m starting to feel horrible again. I just broke my ankle and had surgery, and feel hopeless. These ten weeks of healing are going to be hell. Though I don’t want to actively harm myself like last year, it’s been difficult. Would it be easier to end it all? I can’t go back to moping. I would cry everyday at school hoping to be dead. Mentally I was drained and exhausted. I’ve missed so much work at school and that’s not helping. My teachers keep harassing me about quizzes I have to take. The work load is weighing down on me. I don’t know how much longer I can take before I go back to the hell that’s severe depression.',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-18 23:48:19',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'suicide intent',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 110111},
 {'id': 'gq6m12',
  'title': 'Sometimes I feel like am just an npc in everyone elses life',
  'post': 'I have friends, but rarely ever do I make meaningful enough relationships with others, I always feel like am part of the background, even in a group of friends that i’ve known for the longest. Ik am not very interesting, and I wanna try to be, but I really don’t know where to start.',
  'text': 'Sometimes I feel like am just an npc in everyone elses life ### I have friends, but rarely ever do I make meaningful enough relationships with others, I always feel like am part of the background, even in a group of friends that i’ve known for the longest. Ik am not very interesting, and I wanna try to be, but I really don’t know where to start.',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2020-05-25 07:30:36',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111001},
 {'id': 'f8a4jq',
  'title': 'Fantasising about being saved.',
  'post': 'I often daydream about trying to jump off a bridge and having someone grab me from the edge, hold me tight and tell me it will be okay.\n \nWe all want what we can’t have, I guess.',
  'text': 'Fantasising about being saved. ### I often daydream about trying to jump off a bridge and having someone grab me from the edge, hold me tight and tell me it will be okay. We all want what we can’t have, I guess.',
  'upvotes': 757,
  'date': '2020-02-23 14:30:20',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10},
 {'id': 'gtkhrq',
  'title': "I don't know how to convince myself that not everyone hates me",
  'post': "Recently diagnosed with PTSD and I'm going down this rabbit hole of everything I've done my whole life I see in a new light because I'm no longer trying to deny my traumatic past, I'm not sure if that makes sense. My paranoia effects every relationship in my life from random people in public, to classmates, to professors, to my coworkers, and friends, family, and my boyfriend. I just can't believe that everyone doesn't hate me or want to use/abuse/or has some sort of ill intent towards me. My boyfriend is my strongest support and tries his best to help but it's so hard for me and I don't always want to go to him when I need reassurance because he's not my therapist and I don't want him to feel like he always has to fix things or I don't want to burden him or have him take on my stress (he's never called me a burden I just feel guilty sometimes for telling him) and I want to be strong on my own but right now it's so hard. Advice for grounding myself or believing people at face value?",
  'text': "I don't know how to convince myself that not everyone hates me ### Recently diagnosed with PTSD and I'm going down this rabbit hole of everything I've done my whole life I see in a new light because I'm no longer trying to deny my traumatic past, I'm not sure if that makes sense. My paranoia effects every relationship in my life from random people in public, to classmates, to professors, to my coworkers, and friends, family, and my boyfriend. I just can't believe that everyone doesn't hate me or want to use/abuse/or has some sort of ill intent towards me. My boyfriend is my strongest support and tries his best to help but it's so hard for me and I don't always want to go to him when I need reassurance because he's not my therapist and I don't want him to feel like he always has to fix things or I don't want to burden him or have him take on my stress (he's never called me a burden I just feel guilty sometimes for telling him) and I want to be strong on my own but right now it's so hard. Advice for grounding myself or believing people at face value?",
  'upvotes': 118,
  'date': '2020-05-30 19:48:40',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'wgdnxv',
  'title': 'Does anybody feel that loneliness is making them a more cynical bitter person?',
  'post': "I don't want to be this cynical bitter person but I'm so lonely that that's who I've become.",
  'text': "Does anybody feel that loneliness is making them a more cynical bitter person? ### I don't want to be this cynical bitter person but I'm so lonely that that's who I've become.",
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2022-08-04 22:05:28',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 101000},
 {'id': '16wskkl',
  'title': 'I hate eating',
  'post': 'I haven’t enjoyed food in like five months. Eating is a dreadful chore and I only do it because I know I’ll pass out if I don’t.\n\nI used to love food. Now I just hate everything. I dread having to eat. Even when I haven’t eaten for over a day, I still don’t want to eat, I have to force myself to. For example, today I ate for the first time in like 36 hours and even though it was my favorite meal I could barely finish it because I just did not want to be eating and I wish I didn’t have to eat. I’m not anorexic/I’m not trying to lose weight. I’m extremely depressed.\n\nIs this normal? I’ve heard about emotional eating/binge eating when people have depression, which I definitely used to do, but this is just weird. I thought it was just a phase but it’s been many months…I feel like there’s something uniquely wrong with me.',
  'text': 'I hate eating ### I haven’t enjoyed food in like five months. Eating is a dreadful chore and I only do it because I know I’ll pass out if I don’t. I used to love food. Now I just hate everything. I dread having to eat. Even when I haven’t eaten for over a day, I still don’t want to eat, I have to force myself to. For example, today I ate for the first time in like 36 hours and even though it was my favorite meal I could barely finish it because I just did not want to be eating and I wish I didn’t have to eat. I’m not anorexic/I’m not trying to lose weight. I’m extremely depressed. Is this normal? I’ve heard about emotional eating/binge eating when people have depression, which I definitely used to do, but this is just weird. I thought it was just a phase but it’s been many months…I feel like there’s something uniquely wrong with me.',
  'upvotes': 60,
  'date': '2023-10-01 05:23:20',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'if57js',
  'title': 'Am I the only one here going a month without human touch?',
  'post': "You guessed wrong...I live in a metropolis... And I'm not elderly, at all...",
  'text': "Am I the only one here going a month without human touch? ### You guessed wrong...I live in a metropolis... And I'm not elderly, at all...",
  'upvotes': 22,
  'date': '2020-08-23 15:33:52',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'ebo9cu',
  'title': 'Your 20s',
  'post': "So... I'm seeing these people I know finishing up uni or whatever and having all these friends they met, travelling and having relationships and just having a solid group to always refer to. And I don't have that. I am 20 years old and I really have no one I feel close with like this. \n\nWhat am I supposed to do? People clearly don't want me in their lives, but I don't know what I'm doing wrong. I mean I know I'm quiet and a bit boring but I feel like I'm a good person or I try to be?\n\nHow do I make friends at this point and from now on? How the fuck am I supposed to solve this issue of loneliness when I'm supposed to be in my prime???? \n\nWhat am I supposed to be doing for the rest of my life? What is the point in sticking around when I can't even fix why I ended up so lonely right now?\n\nI worded this so odd but it's how I feel\n\nAny other lonely people in their 20s feel like this?\n\nPlease someone give me advice. Please I'm losing my mind",
  'text': "Your 20s ### So... I'm seeing these people I know finishing up uni or whatever and having all these friends they met, travelling and having relationships and just having a solid group to always refer to. And I don't have that. I am 20 years old and I really have no one I feel close with like this. What am I supposed to do? People clearly don't want me in their lives, but I don't know what I'm doing wrong. I mean I know I'm quiet and a bit boring but I feel like I'm a good person or I try to be? How do I make friends at this point and from now on? How the fuck am I supposed to solve this issue of loneliness when I'm supposed to be in my prime???? What am I supposed to be doing for the rest of my life? What is the point in sticking around when I can't even fix why I ended up so lonely right now? I worded this so odd but it's how I feel Any other lonely people in their 20s feel like this? Please someone give me advice. Please I'm losing my mind",
  'upvotes': 20,
  'date': '2019-12-17 00:55:58',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '13bqtve',
  'title': 'I feel like i have no future',
  'post': 'I’m 17, and it’s right around the time of everyone getting into university. My friends are so smart and most of them have gotten into college already. I have another test in 2 days and I already know I’m gonna flunk it. I wish i was smart. Those who haven’t gotten into college yet are working super hard and studying their ass off all day and I cannot bring myself to do ANYTHING. I have been trying for the last three years but i can not absorb a single word that my textbook says. It is so hard to fall asleep every night. I keep thinking of everything i could’ve done and i toss and turn for hours. i’m a misfit and i’m good at nothing. everyday is the same and nothing ever changes. i have given a few tests for university entrance and i flunked all of them so bad. I feel so inferior compared to everyone and everyday is so fucking sad. I cannot stop comparing myself to others and it only gets worse each day. I feel so shallow and sad.',
  'text': 'I feel like i have no future ### I’m 17, and it’s right around the time of everyone getting into university. My friends are so smart and most of them have gotten into college already. I have another test in 2 days and I already know I’m gonna flunk it. I wish i was smart. Those who haven’t gotten into college yet are working super hard and studying their ass off all day and I cannot bring myself to do ANYTHING. I have been trying for the last three years but i can not absorb a single word that my textbook says. It is so hard to fall asleep every night. I keep thinking of everything i could’ve done and i toss and turn for hours. i’m a misfit and i’m good at nothing. everyday is the same and nothing ever changes. i have given a few tests for university entrance and i flunked all of them so bad. I feel so inferior compared to everyone and everyday is so fucking sad. I cannot stop comparing myself to others and it only gets worse each day. I feel so shallow and sad.',
  'upvotes': 161,
  'date': '2023-05-08 14:07:47',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'worthlessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'loneliness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 1111111},
 {'id': 'di9vb5',
  'title': 'Wrote this while sitting on a bridge looking down',
  'post': 'Each night like this. I just want to slip into the water. And come up in a new place. And breath a different air. In a world far from here.',
  'text': 'Wrote this while sitting on a bridge looking down ### Each night like this. I just want to slip into the water. And come up in a new place. And breath a different air. In a world far from here.',
  'upvotes': 702,
  'date': '2019-10-15 15:55:17',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'loneliness', 'suicide intent', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 11110},
 {'id': '13t85dg',
  'title': 'this guy asked me to share me trauma on being touched inappropriate and without my consent ( I don’t want to mention the M or R word)',
  'post': 'I felt like he was trying to trauma bond just because he mentioned he was M0lested in the past. Then he proceed to ask me(F23)  if I had similar experiences and he wanted to know about them. I thought this might be narcissistic of him or extremely inappropriate. I don’t think it’s okay to ask people to tell you their traumatic experiences unless they offer to speak on it. We haven’t had sex even though after knowing eachother for years but I am respecting his boundaries. However sometimes he has a boner from cuddle and refers it to ‘me touching him’ whenever he gets hard. He tells me this and it makes me feel guilty for showing minor affection. How do I approach away from this I feel so uncomfortable now and I don’t want to be in a position of being falsely accused :( I just feel like I can’t hug or hold hands anymore with him(M24)',
  'text': 'this guy asked me to share me trauma on being touched inappropriate and without my consent ( I don’t want to mention the M or R word) ### I felt like he was trying to trauma bond just because he mentioned he was M0lested in the past. Then he proceed to ask me(F23) if I had similar experiences and he wanted to know about them. I thought this might be narcissistic of him or extremely inappropriate. I don’t think it’s okay to ask people to tell you their traumatic experiences unless they offer to speak on it. We haven’t had sex even though after knowing eachother for years but I am respecting his boundaries. However sometimes he has a boner from cuddle and refers it to ‘me touching him’ whenever he gets hard. He tells me this and it makes me feel guilty for showing minor affection. How do I approach away from this I feel so uncomfortable now and I don’t want to be in a position of being falsely accused :( I just feel like I can’t hug or hold hands anymore with him(M24)',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-05-27 13:55:23',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'lf1a4i',
  'title': 'Zoom group chats?',
  'post': 'Are their any Zoom group chats where a bunch of lonely people can just get together and talk? Maybe the subject matter could be curated or maybe just free form for a platform to socialize?',
  'text': 'Zoom group chats? ### Are their any Zoom group chats where a bunch of lonely people can just get together and talk? Maybe the subject matter could be curated or maybe just free form for a platform to socialize?',
  'upvotes': 13,
  'date': '2021-02-08 01:55:19',
  'emotions': ['loneliness'],
  'label_id': 1000},
 {'id': '1420zkx',
  'title': 'I’m committing suicide in 6 hours. I have everything prepared there’s not one thing that could change my mind all I want is a farewell.',
  'post': 'I’m not gonna go into detail but this is it. I’m not even phased I’m numb to this shit. I have everytbing prepped. I’m going away to do jt somewhere so kids won’t find me or something. I would hate for that to happen. Fuck this sub Reddit too I’ve been here for years same shir over and over again repeating cycle I’ve hated every minute of it I’m glad for it to be over I feel free. Also fuck you to everyone in this world who had a problem with me and also fuck you to the people who didn’t. Even the people who didn’t even know me. Fuck you. Fuck you reading this. Fuck everyone. I’m out peace bitch ✌️fuck you',
  'text': 'I’m committing suicide in 6 hours. I have everything prepared there’s not one thing that could change my mind all I want is a farewell. ### I’m not gonna go into detail but this is it. I’m not even phased I’m numb to this shit. I have everytbing prepped. I’m going away to do jt somewhere so kids won’t find me or something. I would hate for that to happen. Fuck this sub Reddit too I’ve been here for years same shir over and over again repeating cycle I’ve hated every minute of it I’m glad for it to be over I feel free. Also fuck you to everyone in this world who had a problem with me and also fuck you to the people who didn’t. Even the people who didn’t even know me. Fuck you. Fuck you reading this. Fuck everyone. I’m out peace bitch ✌️fuck you',
  'upvotes': 500,
  'date': '2023-06-06 02:41:40',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 10111111},
 {'id': '145hn3v',
  'title': 'If i were to ever to succumb to this illness I don’t think I feel like I’d have to hide everything',
  'post': 'I don’t realize being on the other side as a partner supporting someone with this diseases how emotionally draining it is and how inadequate I feel. How much shame I have not being able to stick around when they needed me most. How deep down I couldn’t take it anymore. I wanted them to get treatment so badly and tried to guide them. \n\nBut juggling school and work I was left tired all the time. Then the demands to go on dates, plan things, essentially spoil them while I barely get anything back. I felt like a horrible boyfriend because I couldn’t give them what they wanted while I was trying my hardest just to make our relationship stay afloat. All the times I’ve let them cry on my shoulder, care for them when they’re sick, help cook and clean, help get groceries, and vent to me, just to not be acknowledged and told I couldn’t love them the way they wanted me to has essentially broken me.  What else could I have possibly done? I’ve communicated so much how much I needed help.',
  'text': 'If i were to ever to succumb to this illness I don’t think I feel like I’d have to hide everything ### I don’t realize being on the other side as a partner supporting someone with this diseases how emotionally draining it is and how inadequate I feel. How much shame I have not being able to stick around when they needed me most. How deep down I couldn’t take it anymore. I wanted them to get treatment so badly and tried to guide them. But juggling school and work I was left tired all the time. Then the demands to go on dates, plan things, essentially spoil them while I barely get anything back. I felt like a horrible boyfriend because I couldn’t give them what they wanted while I was trying my hardest just to make our relationship stay afloat. All the times I’ve let them cry on my shoulder, care for them when they’re sick, help cook and clean, help get groceries, and vent to me, just to not be acknowledged and told I couldn’t love them the way they wanted me to has essentially broken me. What else could I have possibly done? I’ve communicated so much how much I needed help.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2023-06-09 21:38:43',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '168uepe',
  'title': 'Fuck it.',
  'post': "Man I'm just fucking tired .... Like I wanna go to sleep and never wake up, fucking tired of no matter how much I try ,it's never enough ... Like fighting everyday for nothing ....\nI'm tired of life , I'm tired of my depression, from my anxiety, from me and from the fucking luck that brought me here.\nNo matter how much they say to always try to be positive, it really doesn't help , why should I keep trying to look happy to just satisfying themselves and think that everything is alright ? Well, at the end of the day you're the one who gonna suffer .......\nSorry... I just needed to vent a bit , I'm going through a really bad episode and I'm not a man enough according to my wife .",
  'text': "Fuck it. ### Man I'm just fucking tired .... Like I wanna go to sleep and never wake up, fucking tired of no matter how much I try ,it's never enough ... Like fighting everyday for nothing .... I'm tired of life , I'm tired of my depression, from my anxiety, from me and from the fucking luck that brought me here. No matter how much they say to always try to be positive, it really doesn't help , why should I keep trying to look happy to just satisfying themselves and think that everything is alright ? Well, at the end of the day you're the one who gonna suffer ....... Sorry... I just needed to vent a bit , I'm going through a really bad episode and I'm not a man enough according to my wife .",
  'upvotes': 100,
  'date': '2023-09-03 11:19:50',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'emptiness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10110111},
 {'id': '175l1f7',
  'title': 'Still finding it hard to cope sometimes.',
  'post': "I'm a M/29 from WALES UK.\n\nBeen depressed since I was a toddler.\nBecame hard of hearing at 5.. bullied by students and teachers throughout school. College I got ganged on for being deaf, kicked and punched by em.\nNever finished college due to it. I couldn't.\n\nIf it wasn't for games and Lego collection.. I don't know where I'd be at this point.\n\nI worked hard over the years to resist urges of self harm. And I haven't done so in 8 years.\n\nThere was times I really wanted to. Especially the last 4 years of abuse from my ex, which I broke up with her in November last year, then losing my gran back in March..\nSometimes things just test me.\n\n\nI hate being single.. but better than being abused I suppose.",
  'text': "Still finding it hard to cope sometimes. ### I'm a M/29 from WALES UK. Been depressed since I was a toddler. Became hard of hearing at 5.. bullied by students and teachers throughout school. College I got ganged on for being deaf, kicked and punched by em. Never finished college due to it. I couldn't. If it wasn't for games and Lego collection.. I don't know where I'd be at this point. I worked hard over the years to resist urges of self harm. And I haven't done so in 8 years. There was times I really wanted to. Especially the last 4 years of abuse from my ex, which I broke up with her in November last year, then losing my gran back in March.. Sometimes things just test me. I hate being single.. but better than being abused I suppose.",
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2023-10-11 18:22:20',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'mzgl3i',
  'title': 'In my school bathroom crying',
  'post': 'So at my school we have this new website called stymie where you can anonymously send in reports to teachers about serious matters without making yourself known and apparently some people had sent in some about me having suicidal thoughts and so I had to talk to my team leader who is a 6ft woman with a very strong German accent and she’s fucking terrifying \n\nAnyways she pulls me into her office and asks me a bunch of questions and then proceeded to call my mother so yeah I am crying and going back to science class as we speak \n\n🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠',
  'text': 'In my school bathroom crying ### So at my school we have this new website called stymie where you can anonymously send in reports to teachers about serious matters without making yourself known and apparently some people had sent in some about me having suicidal thoughts and so I had to talk to my team leader who is a 6ft woman with a very strong German accent and she’s fucking terrifying Anyways she pulls me into her office and asks me a bunch of questions and then proceeded to call my mother so yeah I am crying and going back to science class as we speak 🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠🤠',
  'upvotes': 912,
  'date': '2021-04-27 04:38:19',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'suicide intent', 'anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010110},
 {'id': '17a8tuq',
  'title': 'I was prescribed sertraline.',
  'post': 'My psychiatrist says I have severe depression and anxiety I was prescribed sertraline? Has anyone took this before this is my first time taking meds what should I expect??? I’m going to take it in the morning. I also have a therapy appointment should I wait to take it until after? She wanted to give me prozac but I’m nursing(breastfeeding)my son.',
  'text': 'I was prescribed sertraline. ### My psychiatrist says I have severe depression and anxiety I was prescribed sertraline? Has anyone took this before this is my first time taking meds what should I expect??? I’m going to take it in the morning. I also have a therapy appointment should I wait to take it until after? She wanted to give me prozac but I’m nursing(breastfeeding)my son.',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-17 21:11:02',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': 'ldp0g4',
  'title': 'DAE feel like they don’t deserve to be happy',
  'post': 'Feel like they don’t deserve to be happy\n\nJust wondering if anyone else felt the same like so much has gone wrong in the past but now I still push away people that care about me and sometimes self sabotage what could be an enjoyable event because I feel like I don’t deserve to be happy. I have self sabotaged and not gone to drinks with friends after arguments with my girlfriend and refused countless efforts to get me involved with drinking. I just don’t know what to do anymore if I’m not having anxiety about going I’m self sabotaging and even then I still fail to catch myself before it happens or I knowingly\nSelf sabotage and can’t stop it.',
  'text': 'DAE feel like they don’t deserve to be happy ### Feel like they don’t deserve to be happy Just wondering if anyone else felt the same like so much has gone wrong in the past but now I still push away people that care about me and sometimes self sabotage what could be an enjoyable event because I feel like I don’t deserve to be happy. I have self sabotaged and not gone to drinks with friends after arguments with my girlfriend and refused countless efforts to get me involved with drinking. I just don’t know what to do anymore if I’m not having anxiety about going I’m self sabotaging and even then I still fail to catch myself before it happens or I knowingly Self sabotage and can’t stop it.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2021-02-06 03:36:43',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 110101},
 {'id': 'laq4vg',
  'title': 'How do you handle/share your own life issues and sadnesses to a significant other who has depression and anxiety?',
  'post': 'Sometimes I feel unable to express my own problems to my partner and have them understand how I feel at times worrying that by doing so it would affect their mental state and trigger thoughts of not being able to do enough in the relationship. I understand I can share these thoughts with others that aren’t my partner, but I also feel that it is important to share this part of me with them and receive some consoling from them as part of healing.',
  'text': 'How do you handle/share your own life issues and sadnesses to a significant other who has depression and anxiety? ### Sometimes I feel unable to express my own problems to my partner and have them understand how I feel at times worrying that by doing so it would affect their mental state and trigger thoughts of not being able to do enough in the relationship. I understand I can share these thoughts with others that aren’t my partner, but I also feel that it is important to share this part of me with them and receive some consoling from them as part of healing.',
  'upvotes': 19,
  'date': '2021-02-02 07:19:50',
  'emotions': ['sadness'],
  'label_id': 100},
 {'id': '17b31nf',
  'title': 'Everything hurts',
  'post': 'F 18, genuinely am hurting so bad mentally, I live with my dad and it’s the worse thing ever, I’m waiting until I can move up north with my sister,  I was on 3  medications until I lost my insurance and now I’m no longer on them and my mental health has completely declined.',
  'text': 'Everything hurts ### F 18, genuinely am hurting so bad mentally, I live with my dad and it’s the worse thing ever, I’m waiting until I can move up north with my sister, I was on 3 medications until I lost my insurance and now I’m no longer on them and my mental health has completely declined.',
  'upvotes': 2,
  'date': '2023-10-18 22:17:25',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness', 'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11101},
 {'id': '17d263f',
  'title': 'Bad oral hygiene',
  'post': 'My depression has been so bad that I have let my oral hygiene go. Now I need a tooth extracted and I’m terrified. Have you ever had a tooth extracted?  How was it?  I’m scared.',
  'text': 'Bad oral hygiene ### My depression has been so bad that I have let my oral hygiene go. Now I need a tooth extracted and I’m terrified. Have you ever had a tooth extracted? How was it? I’m scared.',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-21 13:06:50',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'kemoh6',
  'title': 'Fuck off with the "it gets better" bs. ive felt this way for 7 years.',
  'post': 'Saying "it gets better" is worse than ignoring. It means you dont have the time to actually give a shit about somebody in a bad state and just go with "it gets better" because you dont know how bad that sounds to people like us',
  'text': 'Fuck off with the "it gets better" bs. ive felt this way for 7 years. ### Saying "it gets better" is worse than ignoring. It means you dont have the time to actually give a shit about somebody in a bad state and just go with "it gets better" because you dont know how bad that sounds to people like us',
  'upvotes': 971,
  'date': '2020-12-17 01:07:27',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness', 'hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '16v8nkl',
  'title': 'The thought of death is starting to comfort me',
  'post': 'I used to think about dying or killing myself and it would scare me even though there was a part of me that wanted it. But nowadays when I fantasize about killing myself I feel relief. I don’t feel sad or wonder what life could have had in store for me, I just feel calm. It’s one of the few thoughts that calms me down',
  'text': 'The thought of death is starting to comfort me ### I used to think about dying or killing myself and it would scare me even though there was a part of me that wanted it. But nowadays when I fantasize about killing myself I feel relief. I don’t feel sad or wonder what life could have had in store for me, I just feel calm. It’s one of the few thoughts that calms me down',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2023-09-29 11:08:18',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10},
 {'id': '13c0gm3',
  'title': 'He freaks out when I talk about my passions.',
  'post': 'My partner gets really mad and upset if I talk about things that I like, such as traveling. He hates it when I’m happy or if I’m getting the attention that he craves.  How do I fix this or how do I leave them? We’ve lived together for almost 4 years and we have a dog— what do I do?',
  'text': 'He freaks out when I talk about my passions. ### My partner gets really mad and upset if I talk about things that I like, such as traveling. He hates it when I’m happy or if I’m getting the attention that he craves. How do I fix this or how do I leave them? We’ve lived together for almost 4 years and we have a dog— what do I do?',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2023-05-08 18:31:42',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010000},
 {'id': '173r6nr',
  'title': 'I want people to care but I don’t want them to care',
  'post': 'I feel I need someone to know what I am going through and to care about me but when they start caring and doing everything they can to help me, I push them away because I don’t want to be a burden on them. I don’t want to rely on them and make them feel they have to be there for me all the time and then get anxious that I’m going to disappear. It makes me feel the need to isolate myself even more because being a burden for someone makes me feel even worse.',
  'text': 'I want people to care but I don’t want them to care ### I feel I need someone to know what I am going through and to care about me but when they start caring and doing everything they can to help me, I push them away because I don’t want to be a burden on them. I don’t want to rely on them and make them feel they have to be there for me all the time and then get anxious that I’m going to disappear. It makes me feel the need to isolate myself even more because being a burden for someone makes me feel even worse.',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-09 12:59:16',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10011101},
 {'id': '158rv3t',
  'title': 'I feel so alone and unwanted what is the point?',
  'post': 'I went up to my co worker put my hand in his shoulder. I said hey brother he tells me haven’t you heard that people could be possessed by demons. He’s very religious but he used to talk to me all the time now he just ignores me like everyone else like I’m not even there. I just try to be friendly and he told me it’s not about being friendly he could be possessed by demons. Or anyone could I give up on ever having friends or a significant others if people reject me all the time it isn’t worth it anymore. I guess I’ll be alone forever.',
  'text': 'I feel so alone and unwanted what is the point? ### I went up to my co worker put my hand in his shoulder. I said hey brother he tells me haven’t you heard that people could be possessed by demons. He’s very religious but he used to talk to me all the time now he just ignores me like everyone else like I’m not even there. I just try to be friendly and he told me it’s not about being friendly he could be possessed by demons. Or anyone could I give up on ever having friends or a significant others if people reject me all the time it isn’t worth it anymore. I guess I’ll be alone forever.',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2023-07-25 00:11:52',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': '13854u9',
  'title': 'Wanting to die but not commit suicide',
  'post': "I really want to die. I don't wanna live anymore but I don't want my loved ones to blame themselves so an accident would be ideal. I don't even want therapy anymore.  I Just don't wanna deal with this shit. I didn't choose to and I never will.",
  'text': "Wanting to die but not commit suicide ### I really want to die. I don't wanna live anymore but I don't want my loved ones to blame themselves so an accident would be ideal. I don't even want therapy anymore. I Just don't wanna deal with this shit. I didn't choose to and I never will.",
  'upvotes': 165,
  'date': '2023-05-05 00:27:01',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'suicide intent', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10110},
 {'id': '15rzjo3',
  'title': "I'm here.",
  'post': "My DM is open if anyone wants to talk. I'm going through a rough patch too so we could share stories of our loneliness and whatever. Hopefully we ease the pain of feeling lonely, I want to talk with someone too.",
  'text': "I'm here. ### My DM is open if anyone wants to talk. I'm going through a rough patch too so we could share stories of our loneliness and whatever. Hopefully we ease the pain of feeling lonely, I want to talk with someone too.",
  'upvotes': 3,
  'date': '2023-08-15 17:49:59',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 1100},
 {'id': 'po1l44',
  'title': 'I assume this is normal, but does anyone else get really fucking scared when the see anyone that looks like their partner/ex?',
  'post': "I can't stand it. Its makes me so so nervous",
  'text': "I assume this is normal, but does anyone else get really fucking scared when the see anyone that looks like their partner/ex? ### I can't stand it. Its makes me so so nervous",
  'upvotes': 186,
  'date': '2021-09-14 12:15:42',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10001},
 {'id': '104qqh9',
  'title': 'I wish people stop recommending therapy to people',
  'post': "\nI seriously don't know if people are willingly ignoring the fact that not everyone has access to therapy or if they don't believe it \n\nThe amount of times that asked people for help and they simply said “just go to therapy” is annoying. Therapy is a privilege that not all of us have, and yes it's unfair but it's the truth, and something I would like to add is that if everyone is being put on hold by the suicide hotline, who are they saving exactly? \n\nI'm done with people trying to simplify things that aren't simple at all",
  'text': "I wish people stop recommending therapy to people ### I seriously don't know if people are willingly ignoring the fact that not everyone has access to therapy or if they don't believe it The amount of times that asked people for help and they simply said “just go to therapy” is annoying. Therapy is a privilege that not all of us have, and yes it's unfair but it's the truth, and something I would like to add is that if everyone is being put on hold by the suicide hotline, who are they saving exactly? I'm done with people trying to simplify things that aren't simple at all",
  'upvotes': 137,
  'date': '2023-01-06 10:20:03',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10010100},
 {'id': 'sy99xt',
  'title': "literally lonely. this can't be real..",
  'post': "i'm 21F and i can't fathom how i just don't have anybody. i still live at home but me and my family all grew up so disconnected from eachother so it's not like i can go to them and cry to them and hang out like normal. the one friend i thought i had left me on read...my birthday is this friday. im scared im gonna be so lonely on my birthday. this is the first year that i won't have anyone. the past years and all those people i thought we're friends are not. i'm so mad. it's not fair how everyone else has friends but i don't. how is this possible. i spent the entire day on my off day just in bed. today was so nice and felt like spring out and i could feel in my body all the people hanging with friends today. except for me. i know i just need to get out more but i feel like i do? i don't know HOW to talk to people. i'm kind of ranting and venting so if anyone can relate..please comment so i don't feel so alone in this..",
  'text': "literally lonely. this can't be real.. ### i'm 21F and i can't fathom how i just don't have anybody. i still live at home but me and my family all grew up so disconnected from eachother so it's not like i can go to them and cry to them and hang out like normal. the one friend i thought i had left me on read...my birthday is this friday. im scared im gonna be so lonely on my birthday. this is the first year that i won't have anyone. the past years and all those people i thought we're friends are not. i'm so mad. it's not fair how everyone else has friends but i don't. how is this possible. i spent the entire day on my off day just in bed. today was so nice and felt like spring out and i could feel in my body all the people hanging with friends today. except for me. i know i just need to get out more but i feel like i do? i don't know HOW to talk to people. i'm kind of ranting and venting so if anyone can relate..please comment so i don't feel so alone in this..",
  'upvotes': 17,
  'date': '2022-02-22 00:28:36',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'anger', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': 'emucan',
  'title': 'Father raised his voiced and shouted through the door over a rant thinking I was ranting about him (but I was not)',
  'post': "I was ranting in my room about roommates I had in another country when I suddenly heard an angry yell outside my bedroom door. I opened the door and then saw that angry old guy who exclaimed a few unintelligible words with an angry expression on his face. He believed I was ranting about him - but I explained I was not. He literally got so upset by the rant, and of course totally embarrassed himself, that he went to bed angry. I just found it hilarious how this old man acts like an insecure, narcissistic teenager who thinks everyone is talking about him.\n\nPlease, he's not even worth the time nor attention for a conversation. *eye roll* It was too funny not to share. Imagine a 65-year-old throwing a tantrum because he THOUGHT someone was ranting about him. Pfft. Embarrassing.",
  'text': "Father raised his voiced and shouted through the door over a rant thinking I was ranting about him (but I was not) ### I was ranting in my room about roommates I had in another country when I suddenly heard an angry yell outside my bedroom door. I opened the door and then saw that angry old guy who exclaimed a few unintelligible words with an angry expression on his face. He believed I was ranting about him - but I explained I was not. He literally got so upset by the rant, and of course totally embarrassed himself, that he went to bed angry. I just found it hilarious how this old man acts like an insecure, narcissistic teenager who thinks everyone is talking about him. Please, he's not even worth the time nor attention for a conversation. *eye roll* It was too funny not to share. Imagine a 65-year-old throwing a tantrum because he THOUGHT someone was ranting about him. Pfft. Embarrassing.",
  'upvotes': 59,
  'date': '2020-01-10 17:40:56',
  'emotions': ['anger',
   'worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness'],
  'label_id': 11111001},
 {'id': '171xy6p',
  'title': "My depression is the worst it's ever been.",
  'post': "Hey all. Like everyone else here I've been depressed for a really long time, but I manage to scrape by and at least try to act somewhat okay. \n\nLately though, it feels like everything has gotten so much worse. Like I've entered a whole new level of depression.\n\n I don't know what's wrong with me. I can't get out of bed unless I have to go to work. I get no sleep. I stopped eating entirely. I do nothing but lay in bed. The worst part is that sometimes I'll just start crying randomly. I can't even remember the last time I cried, now it's almost a daily thing. I just don't have the energy to even function anymore. \n\n Is anyone else in the same boat right now, where everything is 10x worse than usual? Why do I feel so fucking awful? What's wrong with me?",
  'text': "My depression is the worst it's ever been. ### Hey all. Like everyone else here I've been depressed for a really long time, but I manage to scrape by and at least try to act somewhat okay. Lately though, it feels like everything has gotten so much worse. Like I've entered a whole new level of depression. I don't know what's wrong with me. I can't get out of bed unless I have to go to work. I get no sleep. I stopped eating entirely. I do nothing but lay in bed. The worst part is that sometimes I'll just start crying randomly. I can't even remember the last time I cried, now it's almost a daily thing. I just don't have the energy to even function anymore. Is anyone else in the same boat right now, where everything is 10x worse than usual? Why do I feel so fucking awful? What's wrong with me?",
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2023-10-07 05:06:49',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': '1359w5t',
  'title': 'i think i’m the problem',
  'post': 'i go to a large university, and am graduating after 4 years in just a few days. i have no new, truly meaningful relationships to show for it. \n\ni never made any close friends of my own, either through classes, work, or the extracurricular group i was heavily involved in. it seemed so easy for everyone else but i always feel like an outsider. i really have no one, yet i’ve heard it only gets harder\n\ni think my introversion and social awkwardness has damned me to a life of loneliness. it seems as though i’m off-putting to people sometimes? or just not viewed as approachable. \n\nbut in reality i’m just shy and assume no one is interested in getting to know me to begin with so i don’t often engage first… which is probably a self-esteem issue but. anyways i’m just reflecting\n\ni miss the feeling of close friendship </3',
  'text': 'i think i’m the problem ### i go to a large university, and am graduating after 4 years in just a few days. i have no new, truly meaningful relationships to show for it. i never made any close friends of my own, either through classes, work, or the extracurricular group i was heavily involved in. it seemed so easy for everyone else but i always feel like an outsider. i really have no one, yet i’ve heard it only gets harder i think my introversion and social awkwardness has damned me to a life of loneliness. it seems as though i’m off-putting to people sometimes? or just not viewed as approachable. but in reality i’m just shy and assume no one is interested in getting to know me to begin with so i don’t often engage first… which is probably a self-esteem issue but. anyways i’m just reflecting i miss the feeling of close friendship </3',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2023-05-02 03:22:54',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 111101},
 {'id': '10pplfn',
  'title': 'You can’t even tell people about your problems',
  'post': 'First of all I’m so damn mentally drained and exhausted i could kms any moment but i wanted to talk about my feelings but everytime i try someone says “must be hard being like that” or along the lines i wanna talk about my problems but someone just told me “im stepping away because i don’t care goodnight” like honestly if i die I wouldn’t have this burden',
  'text': 'You can’t even tell people about your problems ### First of all I’m so damn mentally drained and exhausted i could kms any moment but i wanted to talk about my feelings but everytime i try someone says “must be hard being like that” or along the lines i wanna talk about my problems but someone just told me “im stepping away because i don’t care goodnight” like honestly if i die I wouldn’t have this burden',
  'upvotes': 186,
  'date': '2023-01-31 05:19:49',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness',
   'emptiness',
   'loneliness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10111101},
 {'id': 'yx2xdd',
  'title': 'I looked in the mirror today.',
  'post': 'I looked in the mirror today. The person looking back at me looked so dead, so sad. I didn’t even recognize myself. It truly felt like I was staring at someone else; someone almost soul-less.\n\nWhat a strange feeling.',
  'text': 'I looked in the mirror today. ### I looked in the mirror today. The person looking back at me looked so dead, so sad. I didn’t even recognize myself. It truly felt like I was staring at someone else; someone almost soul-less. What a strange feeling.',
  'upvotes': 118,
  'date': '2022-11-16 19:09:48',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'worthlessness',
   'loneliness',
   'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 111111},
 {'id': 'dkrmv8',
  'title': 'I hate how your brain teases you with random moments of motivation/hope/joy/etc. then plunges you back into feeling like subhuman trash for days or weeks on end',
  'post': "I feel like I have nothing worth living for, my music sucks ass, which is the only thing I care about. I'm very grateful my parents care about me but I feel like this isn't getting better no matter how much I've tried. My therapist appointment is so far away even though its only thursday. I've tried holding on, but for some reason it just gets worse.\n\nedit: dumbass spelling error",
  'text': "I hate how your brain teases you with random moments of motivation/hope/joy/etc. then plunges you back into feeling like subhuman trash for days or weeks on end ### I feel like I have nothing worth living for, my music sucks ass, which is the only thing I care about. I'm very grateful my parents care about me but I feel like this isn't getting better no matter how much I've tried. My therapist appointment is so far away even though its only thursday. I've tried holding on, but for some reason it just gets worse. edit: dumbass spelling error",
  'upvotes': 1046,
  'date': '2019-10-20 23:19:47',
  'emotions': ['sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness',
   'hopelessness',
   'anger',
   'loneliness',
   'emptiness'],
  'label_id': 11111101},
 {'id': 'ou24aw',
  'title': 'I play online games to cope with loneliness but people use lots of bad words to me and insult me',
  'post': 'There is no place for outcasts...',
  'text': 'I play online games to cope with loneliness but people use lots of bad words to me and insult me ### There is no place for outcasts...',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2021-07-29 17:32:31',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'anger', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': 'o1rd39',
  'title': 'Living With My Ex Husband',
  'post': 'I (20F) recently called it quits with my husband (25M) who i’ve been married to for a little over a year. I caught him multiple times talking to other women online and asking them to send him pictures. \n\nDue to the pandemic we both lost our jobs at one point. We have new ones now, but are still struggling to get by and catch up on bills. Neither one of us can afford to move out, or pay for the divorce, and neither of us have the option of moving in with family. \nWe have a 2 bedroom house and I have moved into a separate room. I am currently saving my money to pay for the divorce and a new place to live.  \n\nHe still express his want to fix things between us, but I have already emotionally and physically ended the relationship between us.\nWhat boundaries do I need to set and emphasize between us? I still want to be civil but I do not see us being on the same terms that we once were.',
  'text': 'Living With My Ex Husband ### I (20F) recently called it quits with my husband (25M) who i’ve been married to for a little over a year. I caught him multiple times talking to other women online and asking them to send him pictures. Due to the pandemic we both lost our jobs at one point. We have new ones now, but are still struggling to get by and catch up on bills. Neither one of us can afford to move out, or pay for the divorce, and neither of us have the option of moving in with family. We have a 2 bedroom house and I have moved into a separate room. I am currently saving my money to pay for the divorce and a new place to live. He still express his want to fix things between us, but I have already emotionally and physically ended the relationship between us. What boundaries do I need to set and emphasize between us? I still want to be civil but I do not see us being on the same terms that we once were.',
  'upvotes': 113,
  'date': '2021-06-17 07:30:17',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10100},
 {'id': 'sdw7td',
  'title': 'Reproaches me to be "emotionally dead"',
  'post': 'Really?\n\nWith all the emotional strength and stability I worked hard to give us because he couldn\'t, all the listening, all the compassion, all the patience, all the understanding and empathy though the worst times, all the warmth and love, and, yeah, all the tears.\n\nWords in my mouth "don\'t feel real to him".\n\nAnyone else is getting the same shit?\nIs he projecting on me or...? Is that a classic depression thing? Or is there something else going on here?\n\nLosing my mind. I don\'t even know how to start processing this.',
  'text': 'Reproaches me to be "emotionally dead" ### Really? With all the emotional strength and stability I worked hard to give us because he couldn\'t, all the listening, all the compassion, all the patience, all the understanding and empathy though the worst times, all the warmth and love, and, yeah, all the tears. Words in my mouth "don\'t feel real to him". Anyone else is getting the same shit? Is he projecting on me or...? Is that a classic depression thing? Or is there something else going on here? Losing my mind. I don\'t even know how to start processing this.',
  'upvotes': 14,
  'date': '2022-01-27 11:23:57',
  'emotions': ['emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 10110101},
 {'id': '13hjtjs',
  'title': 'I want to be allowed to have a bad day.',
  'post': "Can anybody else relate? \n\nI'm tired of always having to appear positive. When I do have a bad day and I'm not on top form he takes it as an attack on himself and on our relationship.\n\nI'm not angry at you. I'm just a human that has had a shit day. You don't need to turn it into an argument. \n\nI had to leave the flat today and not comfort him as he cries in his bed. Now I feel like a terrible human.",
  'text': "I want to be allowed to have a bad day. ### Can anybody else relate? I'm tired of always having to appear positive. When I do have a bad day and I'm not on top form he takes it as an attack on himself and on our relationship. I'm not angry at you. I'm just a human that has had a shit day. You don't need to turn it into an argument. I had to leave the flat today and not comfort him as he cries in his bed. Now I feel like a terrible human.",
  'upvotes': 53,
  'date': '2023-05-14 18:40:40',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10101},
 {'id': 'yg6yh3',
  'title': 'Child of a Pedofile',
  'post': 'Who is out there that is a child of a pedofile? Honestly I am alone and wish I had someone out there that has experienced it as well.',
  'text': 'Child of a Pedofile ### Who is out there that is a child of a pedofile? Honestly I am alone and wish I had someone out there that has experienced it as well.',
  'upvotes': 9,
  'date': '2022-10-29 01:57:50',

  'label_id': 10111100},
 {'id': '178ouqx',
  'title': 'wouldn’t it be nice… (rant)',
  'post': 'someone i know commented the other day that SSRI’s can cause permanent sexual changes even after discontinuation and that they would never take an SSRI due to that…\n\nhow fucking nice is it to have that decision, dude. to be able to decide nah, i don’t need this drug because its side effects suck! \n\nfuck you. if i wasn’t on medications, i am certain i would have committed suicide by now.',
  'text': 'wouldn’t it be nice… (rant) ### someone i know commented the other day that SSRI’s can cause permanent sexual changes even after discontinuation and that they would never take an SSRI due to that… how fucking nice is it to have that decision, dude. to be able to decide nah, i don’t need this drug because its side effects suck! fuck you. if i wasn’t on medications, i am certain i would have committed suicide by now.',
  'upvotes': 4,
  'date': '2023-10-15 20:56:46',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'hopelessness', 'suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10010010},
 {'id': '11b2tjm',
  'title': 'Feeling left out and lonely',
  'post': 'I really need your advice! \n\nSo, i’ve just realised how toxic is the social media for me. All i see (on BeReal, Snapchat, Instagram, etc…) is that all of my friends are in parties and stuffs like that.. they’re with friends basically. And i sit home alone and no one texts me for weeks actually. \nI have a kinda supportive family and that’s all. I’ve always wanted an exiting life. And now, I’m almost 19 and I have nobody to be with in parties or just talk to. \nI’m not gonna say this is others fault, it’s okay if they don’t like me, i can understand. But it still hurts. \nI really want to be someone’s favourite friend. \nCan you give me advices how to “survive” this phase?',
  'text': 'Feeling left out and lonely ### I really need your advice! So, i’ve just realised how toxic is the social media for me. All i see (on BeReal, Snapchat, Instagram, etc…) is that all of my friends are in parties and stuffs like that.. they’re with friends basically. And i sit home alone and no one texts me for weeks actually. I have a kinda supportive family and that’s all. I’ve always wanted an exiting life. And now, I’m almost 19 and I have nobody to be with in parties or just talk to. I’m not gonna say this is others fault, it’s okay if they don’t like me, i can understand. But it still hurts. I really want to be someone’s favourite friend. Can you give me advices how to “survive” this phase?',
  'upvotes': 12,
  'date': '2023-02-24 21:35:56',
  'emotions': ['loneliness', 'emptiness', 'sadness', 'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 111100},
 {'id': '11wo79x',
  'title': 'I want it to end',
  'post': 'Im tired of everything im tired of my sensitive mind i dont wanna be in this world anymore',
  'text': 'I want it to end ### Im tired of everything im tired of my sensitive mind i dont wanna be in this world anymore',
  'upvotes': 16,
  'date': '2023-03-20 16:53:30',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent',
   'anger',
   'sadness',
   'hopelessness',
   'loneliness',

 {'id': 'b97pud',
  'title': 'Mental Disorder',
  'post': '"The worst thing about having a mental illness is people expect you to behave as if you don\'t."\n\nThis is from the Joker movie. I\'d have never expected I\'d find something so poignant that explains perfectly how it  feels to deal with the stress of being neurologically different, within a comic book movie. This is exactly how they make us feel. I\'m so tired of feeling guilty for being different, for being me. \n\nDid anyone else see the trailer? Thought I\'d drop this tid bit off for those struggling to articulate their feelings.',
  'text': 'Mental Disorder ### "The worst thing about having a mental illness is people expect you to behave as if you don\'t." This is from the Joker movie. I\'d have never expected I\'d find something so poignant that explains perfectly how it feels to deal with the stress of being neurologically different, within a comic book movie. This is exactly how they make us feel. I\'m so tired of feeling guilty for being different, for being me. Did anyone else see the trailer? Thought I\'d drop this tid bit off for those struggling to articulate their feelings.',
  'upvotes': 297,
  'date': '2019-04-04 03:30:11',
  'emotions': ['brain dysfunction (forget)'],
  'label_id': 1000000},
 {'id': 'ofkc4a',
  'title': 'I wish I can just disappear without a trace...',
  'post': "I'm tired of living like this",
  'text': "I wish I can just disappear without a trace... ### I'm tired of living like this",
  'upvotes': 561,
