 {'id': 'hdk94w',
  'title': 'Hey guys, please help STOP this starvation suicide attempt',
  'post': 'Connor Murphy is a bodybuilder/actor youtuber who is on the 8th day of a 40-day water only starvation suicide attempt which he is livestreaming. He has been diagnosed with either drug-induced psychosis or bipolar disorder. Please help put an end to this as the message is not being heard loud enough.\n\nThrough the power of the internet we can make this happen!\n\nPlease watch and share this video containing this information – [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MbJ3mP1UC4o](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MbJ3mP1UC4o)\n\nPlease sign the petition at [https://www.thepetitionsite.com/tell-a-friend/66050395](https://www.thepetitionsite.com/tell-a-friend/66050395)\n\nPlease contact the following emails:\n\nIntegral Care Services (local mental health services in Texas): [info@integralcare.org](mailto:info@integralcare.org)\n\nResnick Neuropsychiatric Hospital: [contactuclahealth@mednet.ucla.edu](mailto:contactuclahealth@mednet.ucla.edu)',
  'text': 'Hey guys, please help STOP this starvation suicide attempt ### Connor Murphy is a bodybuilder/actor youtuber who is on the 8th day of a 40-day water only starvation suicide attempt which he is livestreaming. He has been diagnosed with either drug-induced psychosis or bipolar disorder. Please help put an end to this as the message is not being heard loud enough. Through the power of the internet we can make this happen! Please watch and share this video containing this information – [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MbJ3mP1UC4o](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MbJ3mP1UC4o) Please sign the petition at [https://www.thepetitionsite.com/tell-a-friend/66050395](https://www.thepetitionsite.com/tell-a-friend/66050395) Please contact the following emails: Integral Care Services (local mental health services in Texas): [info@integralcare.org](mailto:info@integralcare.org) Resnick Neuropsychiatric Hospital: [contactuclahealth@mednet.ucla.edu](mailto:contactuclahealth@mednet.ucla.edu)',
  'upvotes': 8,
  'date': '2020-06-22 03:18:01',
  'emotions': ['suicide intent'],
  'label_id': 10},
 {'id': 'i04gqv',
  'title': 'my friend just called me gross for struggling with hygiene',
  'post': "i think the title says it all; a few minutes ago i told my best friend about how i can't motivate myself enough to wash my hair more than 1 time a week and the first thing she did was laugh at me and say i'm disgusting for doing that. if she thinks like that already, I can't even seek comfort in her when i can't brush my teeth, or take a bath because i know her reactions would be even worse. \ni have a pretty bad past, so little things like that are enough to make me break down for days and ignore everyone that tries to help me because i know I don't deserve it. i guess i expected her to know better :(\nthat's all, i just needed to talk, thank you if you read it all!",
  'text': "my friend just called me gross for struggling with hygiene ### i think the title says it all; a few minutes ago i told my best friend about how i can't motivate myself enough to wash my hair more than 1 time a week and the first thing she did was laugh at me and say i'm disgusting for doing that. if she thinks like that already, I can't even seek comfort in her when i can't brush my teeth, or take a bath because i know her reactions would be even worse. i have a pretty bad past, so little things like that are enough to make me break down for days and ignore everyone that tries to help me because i know I don't deserve it. i guess i expected her to know better :( that's all, i just needed to talk, thank you if you read it all!",
  'upvotes': 435,
  'date': '2020-07-29 17:16:01',
  'emotions': ['hopelessness', 'sadness', 'anger', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 10010101},
 {'id': '17c2del',
  'title': 'Eating is hard',
  'post': 'I was thawing some chicken but then something made me sad and now I don’t feel like cooking or eating. My hunger is no longer enough motivation to force myself up to cook or eat. When I do cook I’m either not hungry anymore once the food is done, or I’m too sad to eat it. It’s like being hungry but having no appetite. I’m losing weight. Losing progress I’ve worked so hard for in the gym. I’m really in a hole rn. I hope everyone is doing okay tonight',
  'text': 'Eating is hard ### I was thawing some chicken but then something made me sad and now I don’t feel like cooking or eating. My hunger is no longer enough motivation to force myself up to cook or eat. When I do cook I’m either not hungry anymore once the food is done, or I’m too sad to eat it. It’s like being hungry but having no appetite. I’m losing weight. Losing progress I’ve worked so hard for in the gym. I’m really in a hole rn. I hope everyone is doing okay tonight',
  'upvotes': 11,
  'date': '2023-10-20 04:06:30',
  'emotions': ['sadness', 'hopelessness', 'emptiness', 'worthlessness'],
  'label_id': 110101},
 {'id': '174942j',
  'title': 'I have nothing, my depression and anxiety made everyone leave',
  'post': 'I’ve struggled for a long time. I made friends for the first time in forever. But then I went into a depressive episode and fell apart. I got paranoid, convinced myself everyone hates me, and it caused me to act insane. And my friends never asked what’s going on with me. They just cut me off. Now I’m stuck, sitting in a shitty apartment by myself, nothing to do. I can’t stop fixating on the fact that I’m alone again, I don’t want to be alone again. I can’t go through this again. I know it’s me to. I know I always push people away. It sucks. But I can’t stop. I can’t fucking stop. And I just want everything to go back to normal. I was happy for the first time in years for a bit. And now it’s just gone',
  'text': 'I have nothing, my depression and anxiety made everyone leave ### I’ve struggled for a long time. I made friends for the first time in forever. But then I went into a depressive episode and fell apart. I got paranoid, convinced myself everyone hates me, and it caused me to act insane. And my friends never asked what’s going on with me. They just cut me off. Now I’m stuck, sitting in a shitty apartment by myself, nothing to do. I can’t stop fixating on the fact that I’m alone again, I don’t want to be alone again. I can’t go through this again. I know it’s me to. I know I always push people away. It sucks. But I can’t stop. I can’t fucking stop. And I just want everything to go back to normal. I was happy for the first time in years for a bit. And now it’s just gone',
  'upvotes': 20,
  'date': '2023-10-10 01:33:36',
  'emotions': ['loneliness',
   'emptiness',
   'hopelessness',
   'sadness',
   'brain dysfunction (forget)',
   'worthlessness',
   'anger'],
  'label_id': 11111101},
 {'id': 'b7k6ht',
  'title': 'Does anyone here talk to literally no one. Like no friends. I’m rotting',
  'post': 'Anyone else rotting away and dying in this shithole prison cell known as life. I’m not exaggerating either when I say I talk to no one.  I can’t think, I can’t talk I’m a degenerate peace  of shit.',
  'text': 'Does anyone here talk to literally no one. Like no friends. I’m rotting ### Anyone else rotting away and dying in this shithole prison cell known as life. I’m not exaggerating either when I say I talk to no one. I can’t think, I can’t talk I’m a degenerate peace of shit.',
  'upvotes': 491,

 {'id': '16vfda4',
  'title': 'This life is about losing friends',
  'post': "I'm tired of being abandoned, its a shit",
  'text': "This life is about losing friends ### I'm tired of being abandoned, its a shit",
  'upvotes': 75,
  'date': '2023-09-29 15:55:25',
  'emotions': ['worthlessness',
   'sadness',
   'loneliness',
   'anger',
   'hopelessness'],
  'label_id': 10011101},
 {'id': '10krtt4',
  'title': 'i had to drink dog piss as a kid',
  'post': 'my dad wasn’t the best as a kid. we had a puppy who wasn’t quite potty trained yet, and he had an accident on the floor. my dad saw it and started losing his shit since he thought it was piss. i told him it was just apple juice i spilled (i was 8 years old at the time). my dad said “i’m gonna beat the shit out of the dog if it’s actually piss” …. then he said “if it’s really apple juice, then drink it”. i got on my knees and drank it so my dad wouldn’t beat the dog. it tasted so fucking bad, i still remember it 10+ years later. he did worse things but yeah…. i still forgive him for the most part. i try my best at least.',
  'text': 'i had to drink dog piss as a kid ### my dad wasn’t the best as a kid. we had a puppy who wasn’t quite potty trained yet, and he had an accident on the floor. my dad saw it and started losing his shit since he thought it was piss. i told him it was just apple juice i spilled (i was 8 years old at the time). my dad said “i’m gonna beat the shit out of the dog if it’s actually piss” …. then he said “if it’s really apple juice, then drink it”. i got on my knees and drank it so my dad wouldn’t beat the dog. it tasted so fucking bad, i still remember it 10+ years later. he did worse things but yeah…. i still forgive him for the most part. i try my best at least.',
  'upvotes': 146,
  'date': '2023-01-25 06:10:33',
  'emotions': ['anger', 'sadness'],
  'label_id': 10000100},
 {'id': '142yco6',
  'title': 'Why bother posting',
  'post': "It just gets filtered off the sub, or if it does make it, nobody reads or cares. I don't know what why I bother",
  'text': "Why bother posting ### It just gets filtered off the sub, or if it does make it, nobody reads or cares. I don't know what why I bother",

 {'id': 'gov30d',
  'title': 'Never a good time to talk',
  'post': "My spouse has anxious and depression. I'm not happy with our relationship. It's not bad, it's just lacking in romance and connection, to the point where I feel like we're just co-parenting for the most part. It's been this way for awhile, though quarantine certainly isn't helping.\n\nI've talked to him about this before, but he either gets angry/defensive, or he promises to make more of an effort, which either doesn't happen or lasts a week or two.\n\nI'm getting tired, emotionally. I'm pretty sure I need to be a lot more blunt than I've been in the past, so he understands how serious this is for me. But it just never seems like there's a good time and I'm afraid of just sending him into a deeper depression.\n\nI guess I'm just trying to figure out how to have a hard conversation that doesn't just end with him more depressed, me feeling guilty for not being happy, and no actual improvement. Or should I just accept that things aren't going to change and quit trying to have this conversation?",
  'text': "Never a good time to talk ### My spouse has anxious and depression. I'm not happy with our relationship. It's not bad, it's just lacking in romance and connection, to the point where I feel like we're just co-parenting for the most part. It's been this way for awhile, though quarantine certainly isn't helping. I've talked to him about this before, but he either gets angry/defensive, or he promises to make more of an effort, which either doesn't happen or lasts a week or two. I'm getting tired, emotionally. I'm pretty sure I need to be a lot more blunt than I've been in the past, so he understands how serious this is for me. But it just never seems like there's a good time and I'm afraid of just sending him into a deeper depression. I guess I'm just trying to figure out how to have a hard conversation that doesn't just end with him more depressed, me feeling guilty for not being happy, and no actual improvement. Or should I just accept that things aren't going to change and quit trying to have this conversation?",

def len_after_tokenization(txt:str):
    return len(tokenizer(txt).input_ids)

df["len-tokenized"] = df["text"].apply(len_after_tokenization)

import re
url_regex_pattern = "(https:\/\/www\.|http:\/\/www\.|https:\/\/|http:\/\/)?[a-zA-Z0-9]{2,}(\.[a-zA-Z0-9]{2,})(\.[a-zA-Z0-9]{2,})?" #https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/how-to-write-a-regular-expression-for-a-url/
url_regex_pattern_2 = "(http|ftp|https):\/\/([\w_-]+(?:(?:\.[\w_-]+)+))([\w.,@?^=%&:\/~+#-]*[\w@?^=%&\/~+#-])" #  https://stackoverflow.com/questions/6038061/regular-expression-to-find-urls-within-a-string#6041965
md_link_regex_patter = '\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\s?(?:"(.*?)")?\)' # https://gist.github.com/elfefe/ef08e583e276e7617cd316ba2382fc40

df["text-clean"] = df["text"].apply(lambda t : re.sub(md_link_regex_patter, "", t))
df["text-clean"] = df["text-clean"].apply(lambda t : re.sub(url_regex_pattern_2, "", t))
forbidden_list = {
    "FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKK":"FUCK",
    "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaahhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaahhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh":"ahah"
}

def replace_forbidden(t : str):
    for (word, replacement) in forbidden_list.items():
        t = t.replace(word, replacement)
    return t
df["text-clean"] = df["text-clean"].apply(replace_forbidden)

from cleantext import clean 
df["text-clean-no-emoji"] = df["text-clean"].apply(lambda t : clean(t, no_emoji=True, lower = False))
Since the GPL-licensed package `unidecode` is not installed, using Python's `unicodedata` package which yields worse results.
for text in df["text-clean-no-emoji"]:
    tokenized_text = tokenizer.backend_tokenizer.pre_tokenizer.pre_tokenize_str(text)
    for (token,_) in tokenized_text:
        if tokenizer.unk_token_id in tokenizer(token).input_ids:
            print(token)
from fast_langdetect import detect_language, detect

df["language"] = df["text"].apply(lambda x : detect(x, model='full', k=1)[0]['lang'])
print("\n\n--\n\n".join(df.loc[df["language"]!="en", ["language", "text-clean-no-emoji"]].apply(lambda r : f"{r['language']}\n{r['text-clean-no-emoji']}", axis = 1)))

de
Finanzen / aus dem Leben
Ich habe Schulden.
Das ist okaj, ich habe ja n Haus gekauft.
Ich habe Depressionen,
Das ist ok, das entwickelte sich uber eine lange berufliche Stressphase und private Schlage und ich habe Sie aktuell im Griff.
Ich habe Schulden von denen ich nichts wusste.
Weil meine Frau mich in der Depression schutzen wollte.
Weil sich in diesen 1 1/2 Jahren l, in denen bei mir nichts ging, sich daran gewohnte mir Dinge nicht zu erzahlen.
Jetzt habe ich eine Frau, die Nervlich fertig ist, weil das alles ubern Kopf gewachsen ist.
Ich wei das alles seit 2 Tagen.
Das wir uns bei Freunden und Familie Geld geliehen haben.
Das ein Inkasso gegen uns lauft.
Das das Auto vor dem Verpfanden steht.
Ich habe heute mit diversen Banken und der Inkasso telefoniert.
Als alles getan war, musste ich mich ubergeben.
Aber wir arbeiten daran.
Wir werden da schon raus kommen.
Wir haben Hoffnung da wieder raus zu kommen.
Dennoch ist es erstaunlich.
Manchmal ist der Abstand zwischen "heile Welt" und "Abgrund" der Inhalt des eigenen Briefkastens.

--

de
You're not alone
You're not alone
Hey. Anyone else bipolar? So am I. I'm not ashamed of it. You aren't alone. Bipolar disorder actually affects millions of Americans. Yes, millions (on the lower end, probably around 2.5) but still.
Also, you aren't crazy. You are not crazy.
And if you need someone to talk to, even in your worst moments, I'm here for you.

Hey ich bin erst 17 und werde bald 18 aber vor ca 2 Monaten hat meine Freundin mit mir Schluss gemacht Tag darauf haben mir meine Kumpels erzahlt sie mochten mit mir nichts zu tun haben. Ich wei vllt sagen du bist noch so jung usw aber irgendwie komm ich gerade nicht weiter im Leben ich hab mir Hilfe gesucht aber irgendwie bringt mir das nichts ich habe kein spa am Leben wo ich nur schmerzen habe ich wei nicht was ich machen soll mir macht nichts mehr spa ich komme von der Arbeit und hock in meinem Zimmer und warte bis der Tag vorbei ist und es ist einfach nur noch so ein Kreis lauf jeden Tag das selbe..

cols = [
    "id", 
    "text-clean", 
    "text-clean-no-emoji", 
    "date", 
    "sadness", 
    "anger", 
    "hopelessness", 
    "loneliness", 
    "worthlessness",

    "emptiness", 
]
cond = np.logical_and(
    df["language"] == "en", 
    df["len-tokenized"] < 512
)
df.loc[cond, cols].set_index("id").to_csv("multilabel_classification_emotions.csv")
